authors_text: Jayshree Sarathy,Sophia Song,Audrey Haque,Tania Schlatter,Salil Vadhan
title: Don't Look at the Data! How Differential Privacy Reconfigures the Practices of Data Science
title_zh: 别看数据！差异隐私如何重新配置​​数据科学实践
abstract: Across academia, government, and industry, data stewards are facing increasing pressure to make datasets more openly accessible for researchers while also protecting the privacy of data subjects. Differential privacy (DP) is one promising way to offer privacy along with open access, but further inquiry is needed into the tensions between DP and data science. In this study, we conduct interviews with 19 data practitioners who are non-experts in DP as they use a DP data analysis prototype to release privacy-preserving statistics about sensitive data, in order to understand perceptions, challenges, and opportunities around using DP. We find that while DP is promising for providing wider access to sensitive datasets, it also introduces challenges into every stage of the data science workflow. We identify ethics and governance questions that arise when socializing data scientists around new privacy constraints and offer suggestions to better integrate DP and data science.
summary: Across academia, government, and industry, data stewards are facing increasing pressure to make datasets more openly accessible for researchers while also protecting the privacy of data subjects. Differential privacy (DP) is one promising way to offer privacy along with open access, but further inquiry is needed into the tensions between DP and data science. In this study, we conduct interviews with 19 data practitioners who are non-experts in DP as they use a DP data analysis prototype to release privacy-preserving statistics about sensitive data, in order to understand perceptions, challenges, and opportunities around using DP. We find that while DP is promising for providing wider access to sensitive datasets, it also introduces challenges into every stage of the data science workflow. We identify ethics and governance questions that arise when socializing data scientists around new privacy constraints and offer suggestions to better integrate DP and data science.
abstract_zh: 在学术界、政府和行业中，数据管理员面临着越来越大的压力，要求研究人员更公开地访问数据集，同时保护数据主体的隐私。差分隐私（DP）是一种提供隐私和开放访问的有前景的方式，但需要进一步探究 DP 和数据科学之间的紧张关系。在本研究中，我们对 19 位非 DP 专家的数据从业者进行了采访，他们使用 DP 数据分析原型发布有关敏感数据的隐私保护统计数据，以了解有关使用 DP 的看法、挑战和机遇。我们发现，虽然 DP 有望提供对敏感数据集的更广泛访问，但它也给数据科学工作流程的每个阶段带来了挑战。我们确定了数据科学家围绕新的隐私限制进行社交时出现的道德和治理问题，并提供了更好地整合 DP 和数据科学的建议。

AI.tldr: 本文通过访谈数据从业者，探讨差分隐私（DP）在数据科学实践中的挑战与伦理问题。
AI.motivation: 数据开放与隐私保护存在矛盾，差分隐私作为解决方案需进一步研究其与数据科学实践的适配性。
AI.method: 对19名非DP专家的数据从业者进行访谈，观察其使用DP原型分析敏感数据的实践过程。
AI.result: DP在数据科学各阶段引入挑战，引发伦理与治理问题，并提出整合DP与数据科学的建议。
AI.conclusion: DP虽能促进数据开放，但需调整数据科学实践流程与治理结构以应对隐私约束带来的影响。

authors_text: Zhepei Wang,Ritwik Giri,Devansh Shah,Jean-Marc Valin,Michael M. Goodwin,Paris Smaragdis
title: A Framework for Unified Real-time Personalized and Non-Personalized Speech Enhancement
title_zh: 统一实时个性化和非个性化语音增强的框架
abstract: In this study, we present an approach to train a single speech enhancement network that can perform both personalized and non-personalized speech enhancement. This is achieved by incorporating a frame-wise conditioning input that specifies the type of enhancement output. To improve the quality of the enhanced output and mitigate oversuppression, we experiment with re-weighting frames by the presence or absence of speech activity and applying augmentations to speaker embeddings. By training under a multi-task learning setting, we empirically show that the proposed unified model obtains promising results on both personalized and non-personalized speech enhancement benchmarks and reaches similar performance to models that are trained specialized for either task. The strong performance of the proposed method demonstrates that the unified model is a more economical alternative compared to keeping separate task-specific models during inference.
summary: In this study, we present an approach to train a single speech enhancement network that can perform both personalized and non-personalized speech enhancement. This is achieved by incorporating a frame-wise conditioning input that specifies the type of enhancement output. To improve the quality of the enhanced output and mitigate oversuppression, we experiment with re-weighting frames by the presence or absence of speech activity and applying augmentations to speaker embeddings. By training under a multi-task learning setting, we empirically show that the proposed unified model obtains promising results on both personalized and non-personalized speech enhancement benchmarks and reaches similar performance to models that are trained specialized for either task. The strong performance of the proposed method demonstrates that the unified model is a more economical alternative compared to keeping separate task-specific models during inference.
abstract_zh: 在本研究中，我们提出了一种训练单个语音增强网络的方法，该网络可以执行个性化和非个性化语音增强。这是通过合并指定增强输出类型的逐帧调节输入来实现的。为了提高增强输出的质量并减轻过度抑制，我们尝试通过语音活动的存在或不存在来重新加权帧，并将增强应用于说话者嵌入。通过在多任务学习设置下进行训练，我们凭经验表明，所提出的统一模型在个性化和非个性化语音增强基准上都获得了有希望的结果，并且达到了与专门针对任一任务训练的模型相似的性能。该方法的强大性能表明，与在推理过程中保留单独的特定任务模型相比，统一模型是一种更经济的替代方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种统一的实时语音增强框架，可同时处理个性化和非个性化语音增强任务。
AI.motivation: 传统方法需分别训练专用模型处理个性化与非个性化语音增强，导致资源浪费与部署复杂度增加，亟需更经济的统一解决方案。
AI.method: 通过引入帧级条件输入指定增强类型，结合语音活动检测重加权、说话人嵌入增强及多任务学习框架训练单一网络。
AI.result: 统一模型在两类基准测试中均达到与专用模型相当的性能，验证了其有效性与经济性。
AI.conclusion: 统一模型可替代多个专用模型，降低推理成本，适用于实时语音增强场景。

authors_text: Minghao Guo,Yan Gao,Zheng Pan
title: Adaptive Approximate Implicitization of Planar Parametric Curves via Weak Gradient Constraints
title_zh: 通过弱梯度约束的平面参数曲线的自适应近似隐式化
abstract: Converting a parametric curve into the implicit form, which is called implicitization, has always been a popular but challenging problem in geometric modeling and related applications. However, the existing methods mostly suffer from the problems of maintaining geometric features and choosing a reasonable implicit degree. The present paper has two contributions. We first introduce a new regularization constraint(called the weak gradient constraint) for both polynomial and non-polynomial curves, which efficiently possesses shape preserving. We then propose two adaptive algorithms of approximate implicitization for polynomial and non-polynomial curves respectively, which find the ``optimal'' implicit degree based on the behavior of the weak gradient constraint. More precisely, the idea is gradually increasing the implicit degree, until there is no obvious improvement in the weak gradient loss of the outputs. Experimental results have shown the effectiveness and high quality of our proposed methods.
summary: Converting a parametric curve into the implicit form, which is called implicitization, has always been a popular but challenging problem in geometric modeling and related applications. However, the existing methods mostly suffer from the problems of maintaining geometric features and choosing a reasonable implicit degree. The present paper has two contributions. We first introduce a new regularization constraint(called the weak gradient constraint) for both polynomial and non-polynomial curves, which efficiently possesses shape preserving. We then propose two adaptive algorithms of approximate implicitization for polynomial and non-polynomial curves respectively, which find the ``optimal'' implicit degree based on the behavior of the weak gradient constraint. More precisely, the idea is gradually increasing the implicit degree, until there is no obvious improvement in the weak gradient loss of the outputs. Experimental results have shown the effectiveness and high quality of our proposed methods.
abstract_zh: 将参数曲线转换为隐式形式（称为隐式化）一直是几何建模和相关应用中一个流行但具有挑战性的问题。然而，现有方法大多存在保持几何特征和选择合理隐含度的问题。本文有两个贡献。我们首先为多项式和非多项式曲线引入一种新的正则化约束（称为弱梯度约束），它有效地保持形状。然后，我们分别提出了多项式和非多项式曲线的两种近似隐式化的自适应算法，它们根据弱梯度约束的行为找到“最佳”隐式度。更准确地说，这个想法是逐渐增加隐含程度，直到输出的弱梯度损失没有明显的改善。实验结果表明了我们提出的方法的有效性和高质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于弱梯度约束的自适应近似隐式化方法，用于解决平面参数曲线隐式化过程中几何特征保持和隐式次数选择的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有隐式化方法难以同时保持参数曲线的几何特征并选择合适的隐式次数，导致结果质量不高。
AI.method: 引入弱梯度约束作为正则化条件，提出两种自适应算法分别处理多项式和非多项式曲线，通过逐步增加隐式次数直至弱梯度损失无明显改善来确定最优次数。
AI.result: 实验验证了所提方法在保持形状特征和隐式次数选择上的有效性，输出结果质量较高。
AI.conclusion: 弱梯度约束与自适应算法结合能够高效解决参数曲线隐式化中的关键问题，为几何建模提供了新思路。

We then propose two adaptive algorithms of approximate implicitization for polynomial and non-polynomial curves respectively, which find the ``optimal'' implicit degree based on the behavior of the weak gradient constraint. Experimental results have shown the effectiveness and high quality of our proposed methods. 将参数曲线转换为隐式形式（称为隐式化）一直是几何建模和相关应用中一个流行但具有挑战性的问题。然而，现有方法大多存在保持几何特征和选择合理隐含度的问题。本文有两个贡献。我们首先为多项式和非多项式曲线引入一种新的正则化约束（称为弱梯度约束），它有效地保持形状。然后，我们分别提出了多项式和非多项式曲线的两种近似隐式化的自适应算法，它们根据弱梯度约束的行为找到“最佳”隐式度。更准确地说，这个想法是逐渐增加隐含程度，直到输出的弱梯度损失没有明显的改善。实验结果表明了我们提出的方法的有效性和高质量。 本文提出了一种基于弱梯度约束的自适应近似隐式化方法，用于解决平面参数曲线隐式化过程中几何特征保持和隐式次数选择的问题。 Minghao Guo,Yan Gao,Zheng Pan cs.GR,cs.CG,cs.CV

authors_text: Qiongqiong Wang,Kong Aik Lee,Tianchi Liu
title: Incorporating Uncertainty from Speaker Embedding Estimation to Speaker Verification
title_zh: 将说话人嵌入估计的不确定性纳入说话人验证
abstract: Speech utterances recorded under differing conditions exhibit varying degrees of confidence in their embedding estimates, i.e., uncertainty, even if they are extracted using the same neural network. This paper aims to incorporate the uncertainty estimate produced in the xi-vector network front-end with a probabilistic linear discriminant analysis (PLDA) back-end scoring for speaker verification. To achieve this we derive a posterior covariance matrix, which measures the uncertainty, from the frame-wise precisions to the embedding space. We propose a log-likelihood ratio function for the PLDA scoring with the uncertainty propagation. We also propose to replace the length normalization pre-processing technique with a length scaling technique for the application of uncertainty propagation in the back-end. Experimental results on the VoxCeleb-1, SITW test sets as well as a domain-mismatched CNCeleb1-E set show the effectiveness of the proposed techniques with 14.5%-41.3% EER reductions and 4.6%-25.3% minDCF reductions.
summary: Speech utterances recorded under differing conditions exhibit varying degrees of confidence in their embedding estimates, i.e., uncertainty, even if they are extracted using the same neural network. This paper aims to incorporate the uncertainty estimate produced in the xi-vector network front-end with a probabilistic linear discriminant analysis (PLDA) back-end scoring for speaker verification. To achieve this we derive a posterior covariance matrix, which measures the uncertainty, from the frame-wise precisions to the embedding space. We propose a log-likelihood ratio function for the PLDA scoring with the uncertainty propagation. We also propose to replace the length normalization pre-processing technique with a length scaling technique for the application of uncertainty propagation in the back-end. Experimental results on the VoxCeleb-1, SITW test sets as well as a domain-mismatched CNCeleb1-E set show the effectiveness of the proposed techniques with 14.5%-41.3% EER reductions and 4.6%-25.3% minDCF reductions.
abstract_zh: 在不同条件下记录的语音话语对其嵌入估计表现出不同程度的置信度，即不确定性，即使它们是使用相同的神经网络提取的。本文旨在将 xi 向量网络前端产生的不确定性估计与概率线性判别分析 (PLDA) 后端评分相结合，以进行说话人验证。为了实现这一目标，我们推导出后验协方差矩阵，用于测量从逐帧精度到嵌入空间的不确定性。我们提出了带有不确定性传播的 PLDA 评分的对数似然比函数。我们还建议用长度缩放技术代替长度归一化预处理技术，以在后端应用不确定性传播。 VoxCeleb-1、SITW 测试集以及域不匹配的 CNCeleb1-E 集上的实验结果表明所提出技术的有效性，EER 降低了 14.5%-41.3%，minDCF 降低了 4.6%-25.3%。

AI.tldr: 将说话人嵌入估计中的不确定性纳入说话人验证系统，以提高验证性能。
AI.motivation: 现有说话人验证系统通常忽略嵌入估计中的不确定性，导致在不同录音条件下性能受限，需通过不确定性建模提升鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过推导后验协方差矩阵量化不确定性，提出带不确定性传播的对数似然比函数，并采用长度缩放技术替代传统长度归一化预处理。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上实现14.5%-41.3%的EER降低和4.6%-25.3%的minDCF降低，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过不确定性建模有效提升说话人验证系统在不同录音条件下的鲁棒性和准确性。

authors_text: Gongpu Chen,Soung-Chang Liew
title: Intermittently Observable Markov Decision Processes
title_zh: 间歇可观察马尔可夫决策过程
abstract: This paper investigates MDPs with intermittent state information. We consider a scenario where the controller perceives the state information of the process via an unreliable communication channel. The transmissions of state information over the whole time horizon are modeled as a Bernoulli lossy process. Hence, the problem is finding an optimal policy for selecting actions in the presence of state information losses. We first formulate the problem as a belief MDP to establish structural results. The effect of state information losses on the expected total discounted reward is studied systematically. Then, we reformulate the problem as a tree MDP whose state space is organized in a tree structure. Two finite-state approximations to the tree MDP are developed to find near-optimal policies efficiently. Finally, we put forth a nested value iteration algorithm for the finite-state approximations, which is proved to be faster than standard value iteration. Numerical results demonstrate the effectiveness of our methods.
summary: This paper investigates MDPs with intermittent state information. We consider a scenario where the controller perceives the state information of the process via an unreliable communication channel. The transmissions of state information over the whole time horizon are modeled as a Bernoulli lossy process. Hence, the problem is finding an optimal policy for selecting actions in the presence of state information losses. We first formulate the problem as a belief MDP to establish structural results. The effect of state information losses on the expected total discounted reward is studied systematically. Then, we reformulate the problem as a tree MDP whose state space is organized in a tree structure. Two finite-state approximations to the tree MDP are developed to find near-optimal policies efficiently. Finally, we put forth a nested value iteration algorithm for the finite-state approximations, which is proved to be faster than standard value iteration. Numerical results demonstrate the effectiveness of our methods.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了具有间歇状态信息的 MDP。我们考虑这样一个场景：控制器通过不可靠的通信通道感知进程的状态信息。整个时间范围内状态信息的传输被建模为伯努利有损过程。因此，问题是在存在状态信息丢失的情况下找到选择操作的最佳策略。我们首先将问题表述为信念 MDP 来建立结构结果。系统地研究了状态信息损失对预期总贴现奖励的影响。然后，我们将问题重新表述为树 MDP，其状态空间以树结构组织。开发了树 MDP 的两种有限状态近似，以有效地找到接近最优的策略。最后，我们提出了一种有限状态近似的嵌套值迭代算法，该算法被证明比标准值迭代更快。数值结果证明了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 研究间歇可观测马尔可夫决策过程，在状态信息丢失的情况下寻找最优策略
AI.motivation: 传统MDP假设状态信息可靠，但实际中通信不可靠导致信息丢失，需研究其影响及应对策略
AI.method: 将问题建模为信念MDP和树状MDP，开发有限状态近似方法，并提出嵌套值迭代算法
AI.result: 数值结果验证了近似方法和算法的有效性，且嵌套值迭代比标准方法更快
AI.conclusion: 提出的近似方法和算法有效解决了状态信息丢失问题，为间歇可观测MDP提供了新思路

authors_text: Jinan Yu,Liyan Ma,Zhenglin Li,Yan Peng,Shaorong Xie
title: Open-World Object Detection via Discriminative Class Prototype Learning
title_zh: 通过判别类原型学习进行开放世界对象检测
abstract: Open-world object detection (OWOD) is a challenging problem that combines object detection with incremental learning and open-set learning. Compared to standard object detection, the OWOD setting is task to: 1) detect objects seen during training while identifying unseen classes, and 2) incrementally learn the knowledge of the identified unknown objects when the corresponding annotations is available. We propose a novel and efficient OWOD solution from a prototype perspective, which we call OCPL: Open-world object detection via discriminative Class Prototype Learning, which consists of a Proposal Embedding Aggregator (PEA), an Embedding Space Compressor (ESC) and a Cosine Similarity-based Classifier (CSC). All our proposed modules aim to learn the discriminative embeddings of known classes in the feature space to minimize the overlapping distributions of known and unknown classes, which is beneficial to differentiate known and unknown classes. Extensive experiments performed on PASCAL VOC and MS-COCO benchmark demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method.
summary: Open-world object detection (OWOD) is a challenging problem that combines object detection with incremental learning and open-set learning. Compared to standard object detection, the OWOD setting is task to: 1) detect objects seen during training while identifying unseen classes, and 2) incrementally learn the knowledge of the identified unknown objects when the corresponding annotations is available. We propose a novel and efficient OWOD solution from a prototype perspective, which we call OCPL: Open-world object detection via discriminative Class Prototype Learning, which consists of a Proposal Embedding Aggregator (PEA), an Embedding Space Compressor (ESC) and a Cosine Similarity-based Classifier (CSC). All our proposed modules aim to learn the discriminative embeddings of known classes in the feature space to minimize the overlapping distributions of known and unknown classes, which is beneficial to differentiate known and unknown classes. Extensive experiments performed on PASCAL VOC and MS-COCO benchmark demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method.
abstract_zh: 开放世界对象检测（OWOD）是一个具有挑战性的问题，它将对象检测与增量学习和开放集学习相结合。与标准对象检测相比，OWOD 设置的任务是：1）检测训练期间看到的对象，同时识别未见过的类；2）当相应的注释可用时，逐步学习已识别的未知对象的知识。我们从原型角度提出了一种新颖高效的 OWOD 解决方案，我们称之为 OCPL：通过判别类原型学习进行开放世界对象检测，它由提案嵌入聚合器（PEA）、嵌入空间压缩器（ESC）和基于余弦相似度的分类器（CSC）组成。我们提出的所有模块都旨在学习特征空间中已知类的判别性嵌入，以最小化已知类和未知类的重叠分布，这有利于区分已知类和未知类。在 PASCAL VOC 和 MS-COCO 基准上进行的大量实验证明了我们提出的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种开放世界目标检测方法OCPL，通过判别性类原型学习解决已知与未知类别区分及增量学习问题。
AI.motivation: 传统目标检测无法处理训练中未见类别，开放世界检测需同时实现已知类别检测与未知类别识别，并在获得标注后增量学习新知识。
AI.method: 设计包含提案嵌入聚合器（PEA）、嵌入空间压缩器（ESC）和余弦相似度分类器（CSC）的OCPL框架，通过学习判别性特征嵌入减少已知与未知类分布重叠。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC和MS-COCO基准测试中验证了方法有效性，显著提升开放世界场景下的检测与分类性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过原型学习增强类间区分度，提出的OCPL方法为开放世界目标检测提供了高效解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出一种开放世界目标检测方法OCPL，通过判别性类原型学习解决已知与未知类别区分及增量学习问题。
motivation: 传统目标检测无法处理训练中未见类别，开放世界检测需同时实现已知类别检测与未知类别识别，并在获得标注后增量学习新知识。
method: 设计包含提案嵌入聚合器（PEA）、嵌入空间压缩器（ESC）和余弦相似度分类器（CSC）的OCPL框架，通过学习判别性特征嵌入减少已知与未知类分布重叠。
result: 在PASCAL VOC和MS-COCO基准测试中验证了方法有效性，显著提升开放世界场景下的检测与分类性能。
conclusion: 通过原型学习增强类间区分度，提出的OCPL方法为开放世界目标检测提供了高效解决方案。
search_text: Open-World Object Detection via Discriminative Class Prototype Learning 通过判别类原型学习进行开放世界对象检测 Open-world object detection (OWOD) is a challenging problem that combines object detection with incremental learning and open-set learning. Compared to standard object detection, the OWOD setting is task to: 1) detect objects seen during training while identifying unseen classes, and 2) incrementally learn the knowledge of the identified unknown objects when the corresponding annotations is available. We propose a novel and efficient OWOD solution from a prototype perspective, which we call OCPL: Open-world object detection via discriminative Class Prototype Learning, which consists of a Proposal Embedding Aggregator (PEA), an Embedding Space Compressor (ESC) and a Cosine Similarity-based Classifier (CSC). All our proposed modules aim to learn the discriminative embeddings of known classes in the feature space to minimize the overlapping distributions of known and unknown classes, which is beneficial to differentiate known and unknown classes. Extensive experiments performed on PASCAL VOC and MS-COCO benchmark demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method. 开放世界对象检测（OWOD）是一个具有挑战性的问题，它将对象检测与增量学习和开放集学习相结合。与标准对象检测相比，OWOD 设置的任务是：1）检测训练期间看到的对象，同时识别未见过的类；2）当相应的注释可用时，逐步学习已识别的未知对象的知识。我们从原型角度提出了一种新颖高效的 OWOD 解决方案，我们称之为 OCPL：通过判别类原型学习进行开放世界对象检测，它由提案嵌入聚合器（PEA）、嵌入空间压缩器（ESC）和基于余弦相似度的分类器（CSC）组成。我们提出的所有模块都旨在学习特征空间中已知类的判别性嵌入，以最小化已知类和未知类的重叠分布，这有利于区分已知类和未知类。在 PASCAL VOC 和 MS-COCO 基准上进行的大量实验证明了我们提出的方法的有效性。 本文提出一种开放世界目标检测方法OCPL，通过判别性类原型学习解决已知与未知类别区分及增量学习问题。 Jinan Yu,Liyan Ma,Zhenglin Li,Yan Peng,Shaorong Xie cs.CV

authors_text: Yijia Zheng,Tong He,Yixuan Qiu,David Wipf
title: Learning Manifold Dimensions with Conditional Variational Autoencoders
title_zh: 使用条件变分自动编码器学习流形维度
abstract: Although the variational autoencoder (VAE) and its conditional extension (CVAE) are capable of state-of-the-art results across multiple domains, their precise behavior is still not fully understood, particularly in the context of data (like images) that lie on or near a low-dimensional manifold. For example, while prior work has suggested that the globally optimal VAE solution can learn the correct manifold dimension, a necessary (but not sufficient) condition for producing samples from the true data distribution, this has never been rigorously proven. Moreover, it remains unclear how such considerations would change when various types of conditioning variables are introduced, or when the data support is extended to a union of manifolds (e.g., as is likely the case for MNIST digits and related). In this work, we address these points by first proving that VAE global minima are indeed capable of recovering the correct manifold dimension. We then extend this result to more general CVAEs, demonstrating practical scenarios whereby the conditioning variables allow the model to adaptively learn manifolds of varying dimension across samples. Our analyses, which have practical implications for various CVAE design choices, are also supported by numerical results on both synthetic and real-world datasets.
summary: Although the variational autoencoder (VAE) and its conditional extension (CVAE) are capable of state-of-the-art results across multiple domains, their precise behavior is still not fully understood, particularly in the context of data (like images) that lie on or near a low-dimensional manifold. For example, while prior work has suggested that the globally optimal VAE solution can learn the correct manifold dimension, a necessary (but not sufficient) condition for producing samples from the true data distribution, this has never been rigorously proven. Moreover, it remains unclear how such considerations would change when various types of conditioning variables are introduced, or when the data support is extended to a union of manifolds (e.g., as is likely the case for MNIST digits and related). In this work, we address these points by first proving that VAE global minima are indeed capable of recovering the correct manifold dimension. We then extend this result to more general CVAEs, demonstrating practical scenarios whereby the conditioning variables allow the model to adaptively learn manifolds of varying dimension across samples. Our analyses, which have practical implications for various CVAE design choices, are also supported by numerical results on both synthetic and real-world datasets.
abstract_zh: 尽管变分自动编码器 (VAE) 及其条件扩展 (CVAE) 能够在多个领域获得最先进的结果，但它们的精确行为仍未完全理解，特别是在低维流形上或附近的数据（如图像）的背景下。例如，虽然之前的工作表明全局最优 VAE 解决方案可以学习正确的流形维度，这是从真实数据分布生成样本的必要（但不是充分）条件，但这从未得到严格证明。此外，目前还不清楚当引入各种类型的条件变量时，或者当数据支持扩展到流形的并集时（例如，MNIST 数字和相关数字可能就是这种情况），这些考虑因素将如何改变。在这项工作中，我们首先证明 VAE 全局最小值确实能够恢复正确的流形维度来解决这些问题。然后，我们将此结果扩展到更一般的 CVAE，展示了实际场景，其中条件变量允许模型自适应地学习跨样本的不同维度的流形。我们的分析对各种 CVAE 设计选择具有实际意义，并且得到了合成数据集和真实数据集的数值结果的支持。

AI.tldr: 本文研究条件变分自编码器（CVAE）在学习数据流形维度方面的能力，证明其全局最优解可正确恢复流形维度，并分析条件变量对模型适应性的影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管VAE/CVAE在多个领域表现优异，但其在流形数据上的行为机制尚未被严格证明，尤其缺乏对条件变量引入及多流形场景的理论分析。
AI.method: 通过理论证明VAE全局最小值可恢复流形维度，扩展至CVAE并设计实验验证条件变量使模型适应不同样本维度流形的能力，结合合成与真实数据集进行数值分析。
AI.result: 严格证明VAE全局最优解的流形维度学习能力，展示CVAE通过条件变量实现多维度流形适应，实验验证了理论分析的有效性及设计选择的实践意义。
AI.conclusion: 理论与实验共同表明，CVAE可通过条件变量灵活学习多流形数据的维度结构，为模型设计提供了关键理论依据与实践指导。

authors_text: Naibo Wang,Wenjie Feng,Fusheng Liu,Moming Duan,See-Kiong Ng
title: Data-Free Diversity-Based Ensemble Selection For One-Shot Federated Learning in Machine Learning Model Market
title_zh: 机器学习模型市场中一次性联邦学习的无数据基于多样性的集成选择
abstract: The emerging availability of trained machine learning models has put forward the novel concept of Machine Learning Model Market in which one can harness the collective intelligence of multiple well-trained models to improve the performance of the resultant model through one-shot federated learning and ensemble learning in a data-free manner. However, picking the models available in the market for ensemble learning is time-consuming, as using all the models is not always the best approach. It is thus crucial to have an effective ensemble selection strategy that can find a good subset of the base models for the ensemble. Conventional ensemble selection techniques are not applicable, as we do not have access to the local datasets of the parties in the federated learning setting. In this paper, we present a novel Data-Free Diversity-Based method called DeDES to address the ensemble selection problem for models generated by one-shot federated learning in practical applications such as model markets. Experiments showed that our method can achieve both better performance and higher efficiency over 5 datasets and 4 different model structures under the different data-partition strategies.
summary: The emerging availability of trained machine learning models has put forward the novel concept of Machine Learning Model Market in which one can harness the collective intelligence of multiple well-trained models to improve the performance of the resultant model through one-shot federated learning and ensemble learning in a data-free manner. However, picking the models available in the market for ensemble learning is time-consuming, as using all the models is not always the best approach. It is thus crucial to have an effective ensemble selection strategy that can find a good subset of the base models for the ensemble. Conventional ensemble selection techniques are not applicable, as we do not have access to the local datasets of the parties in the federated learning setting. In this paper, we present a novel Data-Free Diversity-Based method called DeDES to address the ensemble selection problem for models generated by one-shot federated learning in practical applications such as model markets. Experiments showed that our method can achieve both better performance and higher efficiency over 5 datasets and 4 different model structures under the different data-partition strategies.
abstract_zh: 经过训练的机器学习模型的出现提出了机器学习模型市场的新概念，其中人们可以利用多个训练有素的模型的集体智慧，通过一次性联邦学习和集成学习以无数据的方式提高最终模型的性能。然而，选择市场上可用的模型进行集成学习非常耗时，因为使用所有模型并不总是最好的方法。因此，拥有一种有效的集成选择策略至关重要，该策略可以为集成找到良好的基础模型子集。传统的集成选择技术不适用，因为我们无法访问联邦学习环境中各方的本地数据集。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 DeDES 的新颖的基于无数据多样性的方法，用于解决模型市场等实际应用中一次性联邦学习生成的模型的集成选择问题。实验表明，我们的方法在不同的数据划分策略下，可以在 5 个数据集和 4 种不同的模型结构上实现更好的性能和更高的效率。

AI.tldr: 提出一种数据免的多样性集成选择方法DeDES，用于机器学习模型市场中的一次性联邦学习，以高效选择优质模型子集提升性能。
AI.motivation: 传统集成选择依赖本地数据，在联邦学习场景下无法获取，需有效策略解决模型选择问题。
AI.method: 提出基于多样性的数据免方法DeDES，无需访问本地数据，通过模型预测多样性评估选择优质模型子集。
AI.result: 在5个数据集和4种模型结构下，DeDES在多种数据划分策略中表现出更优性能和效率。
AI.conclusion: DeDES有效解决了联邦学习中模型集成选择难题，为模型市场应用提供高效解决方案。

ai_content.conclusion: DeDES有效解决了联邦学习中模型集成选择难题，为模型市场应用提供高效解决方案。

authors_text: Yaoming Zhuang,Pengrun Jia,Zheng Liu,Li Li,Chengdong Wu,Wei cui,Zhanlin Liu
title: Amos-SLAM: An Anti-Dynamics Two-stage SLAM Approach
title_zh: Amos-SLAM：反动力学两阶段 SLAM 方法
abstract: The traditional Simultaneous Localization And Mapping (SLAM) systems rely on the assumption of a static environment and fail to accurately estimate the system's location when dynamic objects are present in the background. While learning-based dynamic SLAM systems have difficulties in handling unknown moving objects, geometry-based methods have limited success in addressing the residual effects of unidentified dynamic objects on location estimation. To address these issues, we propose an anti-dynamics two-stage SLAM approach. Firstly, the potential motion regions of both prior and non-prior dynamic objects are extracted and pose estimates for dynamic discrimination are quickly obtained using optical flow tracking and model generation methods. Secondly, dynamic points in each frame are removed through dynamic judgment. For non-prior dynamic objects, we present a approach that uses super-pixel extraction and geometric clustering to determine the potential motion regions based on color and geometric information in the image. Evaluations on multiple low and high dynamic sequences in a public RGB-D dataset show that our proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art dynamic SLAM methods.
summary: The traditional Simultaneous Localization And Mapping (SLAM) systems rely on the assumption of a static environment and fail to accurately estimate the system's location when dynamic objects are present in the background. While learning-based dynamic SLAM systems have difficulties in handling unknown moving objects, geometry-based methods have limited success in addressing the residual effects of unidentified dynamic objects on location estimation. To address these issues, we propose an anti-dynamics two-stage SLAM approach. Firstly, the potential motion regions of both prior and non-prior dynamic objects are extracted and pose estimates for dynamic discrimination are quickly obtained using optical flow tracking and model generation methods. Secondly, dynamic points in each frame are removed through dynamic judgment. For non-prior dynamic objects, we present a approach that uses super-pixel extraction and geometric clustering to determine the potential motion regions based on color and geometric information in the image. Evaluations on multiple low and high dynamic sequences in a public RGB-D dataset show that our proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art dynamic SLAM methods.
abstract_zh: 传统的同步定位与建图（SLAM）系统依赖于静态环境的假设，当背景中存在动态物体时，无法准确估计系统的位置。虽然基于学习的动态 SLAM 系统在处理未知移动物体方面存在困难，但基于几何的方法在解决未知动态物体对位置估计的残余影响方面取得的成功有限。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种反动力学两阶段 SLAM 方法。首先，提取先验和非先验动态对象的潜在运动区域，并使用光流跟踪和模型生成方法快速获得用于动态区分的姿态估计。其次，通过动态判断去除每一帧中的动态点。对于非先验动态对象，我们提出了一种使用超像素提取和几何聚类的方法，根据图像中的颜色和几何信息来确定潜在的运动区域。对公共 RGB-D 数据集中多个低动态序列和高动态序列的评估表明，我们提出的方法优于最先进的动态 SLAM 方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种抗动态两阶段SLAM方法（Amos-SLAM），用于解决动态环境下传统SLAM系统定位误差大的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统SLAM假设环境静态，无法处理背景动态物体；基于学习的动态SLAM难以应对未知运动物体，几何方法对未识别动态物体的残留影响处理有限。
AI.method: 分两阶段：1）通过光流跟踪和模型生成快速提取先验及非先验动态物体的潜在运动区域；2）通过动态判断移除每帧动态点，对非先验物体采用超像素提取与几何聚类结合颜色和几何信息确定运动区域。
AI.result: 在公开RGB-D数据集的高低动态序列测试中，所提方法优于现有动态SLAM方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过两阶段动态物体处理机制，有效提升了动态环境下的SLAM定位精度。

authors_text: Huaqi Tao,Bingxi Liu,Jinqiang Cui,Hong Zhang
title: A Convolutional-Transformer Network for Crack Segmentation with Boundary Awareness
title_zh: 用于具有边界感知的裂纹分割的卷积变压器网络
abstract: Cracks play a crucial role in assessing the safety and durability of manufactured buildings. However, the long and sharp topological features and complex background of cracks make the task of crack segmentation extremely challenging. In this paper, we propose a novel convolutional-transformer network based on encoder-decoder architecture to solve this challenge. Particularly, we designed a Dilated Residual Block (DRB) and a Boundary Awareness Module (BAM). The DRB pays attention to the local detail of cracks and adjusts the feature dimension for other blocks as needed. And the BAM learns the boundary features from the dilated crack label. Furthermore, the DRB is combined with a lightweight transformer that captures global information to serve as an effective encoder. Experimental results show that the proposed network performs better than state-of-the-art algorithms on two typical datasets. Datasets, code, and trained models are available for research at https://github.com/HqiTao/CT-crackseg.
summary: Cracks play a crucial role in assessing the safety and durability of manufactured buildings. However, the long and sharp topological features and complex background of cracks make the task of crack segmentation extremely challenging. In this paper, we propose a novel convolutional-transformer network based on encoder-decoder architecture to solve this challenge. Particularly, we designed a Dilated Residual Block (DRB) and a Boundary Awareness Module (BAM). The DRB pays attention to the local detail of cracks and adjusts the feature dimension for other blocks as needed. And the BAM learns the boundary features from the dilated crack label. Furthermore, the DRB is combined with a lightweight transformer that captures global information to serve as an effective encoder. Experimental results show that the proposed network performs better than state-of-the-art algorithms on two typical datasets. Datasets, code, and trained models are available for research at https://github.com/HqiTao/CT-crackseg.
abstract_zh: 裂缝在评估装配式建筑的安全性和耐久性方面起着至关重要的作用。然而，裂缝长而尖锐的拓扑特征和复杂的背景使得裂缝分割任务极具挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于编码器-解码器架构的新型卷积变换器网络来解决这一挑战。特别是，我们设计了扩张残差块（DRB）和边界感知模块（BAM）。 DRB关注裂纹的局部细节，并根据需要调整其他块的特征尺寸。 BAM 从扩张的裂纹标签中学习边界特征。此外，DRB 与捕获全局信息的轻量级转换器相结合，作为有效的编码器。实验结果表明，所提出的网络在两个典型数据集上的性能优于最先进的算法。数据集、代码和训练模型可用于研究：https://github.com/HqiTao/CT-crackseg。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于编码器-解码器结构的卷积-Transformer网络，用于具有边界感知能力的裂缝分割。
AI.motivation: 裂缝在评估建筑安全性和耐久性中起着关键作用，但裂缝的长而尖锐的拓扑特征和复杂背景使得裂缝分割任务极具挑战性。
AI.method: 本文设计了扩张残差块（DRB）和边界感知模块（BAM）。DRB关注裂缝的局部细节并调整其他模块的特征维度，BAM从扩张裂缝标签中学习边界特征。DRB与轻量级Transformer结合，用于捕捉全局信息并作为有效的编码器。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，所提出的网络在两个典型数据集上优于最先进的算法。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法在裂缝分割任务中表现出色，为相关研究提供了可用的数据集、代码和训练模型。

authors_text: Ming-Hung Wang,Chia-Yuan Zhang,Jia-Ru Song
title: CrowDC: A Divide-and-Conquer Approach for Paired Comparisons in Crowdsourcing
title_zh: CrowDC：众包中配对比较的分而治之方法
abstract: Ranking a set of samples based on subjectivity, such as the experience quality of streaming video or the happiness of images, has been a typical crowdsourcing task. Numerous studies have employed paired comparison analysis to solve challenges since it reduces the workload for participants by allowing them to select a single solution. Nonetheless, to thoroughly compare all target combinations, the number of tasks increases quadratically. This paper presents ``CrowDC'', a divide-and-conquer algorithm for paired comparisons. Simulation results show that when ranking more than 100 items, CrowDC can reduce 40-50% in the number of tasks while maintaining 90-95% accuracy compared to the baseline approach.
summary: Ranking a set of samples based on subjectivity, such as the experience quality of streaming video or the happiness of images, has been a typical crowdsourcing task. Numerous studies have employed paired comparison analysis to solve challenges since it reduces the workload for participants by allowing them to select a single solution. Nonetheless, to thoroughly compare all target combinations, the number of tasks increases quadratically. This paper presents ``CrowDC'', a divide-and-conquer algorithm for paired comparisons. Simulation results show that when ranking more than 100 items, CrowDC can reduce 40-50% in the number of tasks while maintaining 90-95% accuracy compared to the baseline approach.
abstract_zh: 基于主观性对一组样本进行排名，例如流媒体视频的体验质量或图像的幸福感，一直是典型的众包任务。许多研究都采用配对比较分析来解决挑战，因为它允许参与者选择单一解决方案，从而减少了参与者的工作量。尽管如此，为了彻底比较所有目标组合，任务数量呈二次方增加。本文提出了“CrowDC”，一种用于配对比较的分治算法。模拟结果表明，当对超过 100 个项目进行排名时，与基线方法相比，CrowDC 可以减少 40-50% 的任务数量，同时保持 90-95% 的准确率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CrowDC的分治算法，用于在众包环境中通过成对比较高效地对样本进行排序。
AI.motivation: 传统的成对比较方法在处理大量物品时任务数量呈二次增长，导致效率低下，而现有方法在物品数量超过100时难以有效应对。
AI.method: 采用分治策略（divide-and-conquer）将大规模排序任务分解为多个子任务，通过局部比较逐步合并结果，减少总任务量。
AI.result: 模拟实验表明，当排序物品超过100个时，CrowDC可减少40-50%的任务数量，同时保持90-95%的准确率。
AI.conclusion: CrowDC通过分治算法有效解决了众包排序中任务规模爆炸的问题，在保证精度的前提下显著提升了效率。

tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CrowDC的分治算法，用于在众包环境中通过成对比较高效地对样本进行排序。
motivation: 传统的成对比较方法在处理大量物品时任务数量呈二次增长，导致效率低下，而现有方法在物品数量超过100时难以有效应对。
method: 采用分治策略（divide-and-conquer）将大规模排序任务分解为多个子任务，通过局部比较逐步合并结果，减少总任务量。
result: 模拟实验表明，当排序物品超过100个时，CrowDC可减少40-50%的任务数量，同时保持90-95%的准确率。
conclusion: CrowDC通过分治算法有效解决了众包排序中任务规模爆炸的问题，在保证精度的前提下显著提升了效率。
search_text: CrowDC: A Divide-and-Conquer Approach for Paired Comparisons in Crowdsourcing CrowDC：众包中配对比较的分而治之方法 Ranking a set of samples based on subjectivity, such as the experience quality of streaming video or the happiness of images, has been a typical crowdsourcing task. Numerous studies have employed paired comparison analysis to solve challenges since it reduces the workload for participants by allowing them to select a single solution. Nonetheless, to thoroughly compare all target combinations, the number of tasks increases quadratically. This paper presents ``CrowDC'', a divide-and-conquer algorithm for paired comparisons. Simulation results show that when ranking more than 100 items, CrowDC can reduce 40-50% in the number of tasks while maintaining 90-95% accuracy compared to the baseline approach. 基于主观性对一组样本进行排名，例如流媒体视频的体验质量或图像的幸福感，一直是典型的众包任务。许多研究都采用配对比较分析来解决挑战，因为它允许参与者选择单一解决方案，从而减少了参与者的工作量。尽管如此，为了彻底比较所有目标组合，任务数量呈二次方增加。本文提出了“CrowDC”，一种用于配对比较的分治算法。模拟结果表明，当对超过 100 个项目进行排名时，与基线方法相比，CrowDC 可以减少 40-50% 的任务数量，同时保持 90-95% 的准确率。 本文提出了一种名为CrowDC的分治算法，用于在众包环境中通过成对比较高效地对样本进行排序。 Ming-Hung Wang,Chia-Yuan Zhang,Jia-Ru Song cs.HC,cs.SI

authors_text: Ji Yin,Charles Dawson,Chuchu Fan,Panagiotis Tsiotras
title: Shield Model Predictive Path Integral: A Computationally Efficient Robust MPC Approach Using Control Barrier Functions
title_zh: 屏蔽模型预测路径积分：使用控制屏障函数的计算高效的鲁棒 MPC 方法
comment: 8 pages, 7 figures. Submitted to RA-L for review
comments: 8 pages, 7 figures. Submitted to RA-L for review
abstract: Model Predictive Path Integral (MPPI) control is a type of sampling-based model predictive control that simulates thousands of trajectories and uses these trajectories to synthesize optimal controls on-the-fly. In practice, however, MPPI encounters problems limiting its application. For instance, it has been observed that MPPI tends to make poor decisions if unmodeled dynamics or environmental disturbances exist, preventing its use in safety-critical applications. Moreover, the multi-threaded simulations used by MPPI require significant onboard computational resources, making the algorithm inaccessible to robots without modern GPUs. To alleviate these issues, we propose a novel (Shield-MPPI) algorithm that provides robustness against unpredicted disturbances and achieves real-time planning using a much smaller number of parallel simulations on regular CPUs. The novel Shield-MPPI algorithm is tested on an aggressive autonomous racing platform both in simulation and using experiments. The results show that the proposed controller greatly reduces the number of constraint violations compared to state-of-the-art robust MPPI variants and stochastic MPC methods.
summary: Model Predictive Path Integral (MPPI) control is a type of sampling-based model predictive control that simulates thousands of trajectories and uses these trajectories to synthesize optimal controls on-the-fly. In practice, however, MPPI encounters problems limiting its application. For instance, it has been observed that MPPI tends to make poor decisions if unmodeled dynamics or environmental disturbances exist, preventing its use in safety-critical applications. Moreover, the multi-threaded simulations used by MPPI require significant onboard computational resources, making the algorithm inaccessible to robots without modern GPUs. To alleviate these issues, we propose a novel (Shield-MPPI) algorithm that provides robustness against unpredicted disturbances and achieves real-time planning using a much smaller number of parallel simulations on regular CPUs. The novel Shield-MPPI algorithm is tested on an aggressive autonomous racing platform both in simulation and using experiments. The results show that the proposed controller greatly reduces the number of constraint violations compared to state-of-the-art robust MPPI variants and stochastic MPC methods.
abstract_zh: 模型预测路径积分 (MPPI) 控制是一种基于采样的模型预测控制，可模拟数千条轨迹并使用这些轨迹即时合成最优控制。然而在实践中，MPPI 遇到了限制其应用的问题。例如，据观察，如果存在未建模的动态或环境干扰，MPPI 往往会做出错误的决策，从而妨碍其在安全关键型应用中的使用。此外，MPPI 使用的多线程模拟需要大量的机载计算资源，使得没有现代 GPU 的机器人无法使用该算法。为了缓解这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的 (Shield-MPPI) 算法，该算法具有针对不可预测干扰的鲁棒性，并在常规 CPU 上使用更少数量的并行模拟来实现实时规划。新颖的 Shield-MPPI 算法在一个激进的自动驾驶赛车平台上进行了模拟和实验测试。结果表明，与最先进的鲁棒 MPPI 变体和随机 MPC 方法相比，所提出的控制器大大减少了约束违规的数量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Shield-MPPI的新型鲁棒模型预测控制算法，通过结合控制屏障函数提升算法鲁棒性并降低计算需求。
AI.motivation: 传统MPPI控制在存在未建模动态或环境干扰时决策效果差，且依赖现代GPU的高计算资源，难以应用于安全关键场景。
AI.method: 设计Shield-MPPI算法，利用控制屏障函数确保安全性，通过减少并行模拟数量使普通CPU可实现实时规划。
AI.result: 在自主赛车平台实验中，该算法相比现有方法显著减少约束违规次数，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: Shield-MPPI在保持计算效率的同时提升了鲁棒性，为安全关键场景的实时控制提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Yang Chen,Hexiang Hu,Yi Luan,Haitian Sun,Soravit Changpinyo,Alan Ritter,Ming-Wei Chang
title: Can Pre-trained Vision and Language Models Answer Visual Information-Seeking Questions?
title_zh: 预训练的视觉和语言模型可以回答视觉信息搜索问题吗？
comment: EMNLP 2023 (main conference); Our dataset and evaluation is available at https://open-vision-language.github.io/infoseek/
comments: EMNLP 2023 (main conference); Our dataset and evaluation is available at https://open-vision-language.github.io/infoseek/
abstract: Pre-trained vision and language models have demonstrated state-of-the-art capabilities over existing tasks involving images and texts, including visual question answering. However, it remains unclear whether these models possess the capability to answer questions that are not only querying visual content but knowledge-intensive and information-seeking. In this study, we introduce InfoSeek, a visual question answering dataset tailored for information-seeking questions that cannot be answered with only common sense knowledge. Using InfoSeek, we analyze various pre-trained visual question answering models and gain insights into their characteristics. Our findings reveal that state-of-the-art pre-trained multi-modal models (e.g., PaLI-X, BLIP2, etc.) face challenges in answering visual information-seeking questions, but fine-tuning on the InfoSeek dataset elicits models to use fine-grained knowledge that was learned during their pre-training. Furthermore, we show that accurate visual entity recognition can be used to improve performance on InfoSeek by retrieving relevant documents, showing a significant space for improvement.
summary: Pre-trained vision and language models have demonstrated state-of-the-art capabilities over existing tasks involving images and texts, including visual question answering. However, it remains unclear whether these models possess the capability to answer questions that are not only querying visual content but knowledge-intensive and information-seeking. In this study, we introduce InfoSeek, a visual question answering dataset tailored for information-seeking questions that cannot be answered with only common sense knowledge. Using InfoSeek, we analyze various pre-trained visual question answering models and gain insights into their characteristics. Our findings reveal that state-of-the-art pre-trained multi-modal models (e.g., PaLI-X, BLIP2, etc.) face challenges in answering visual information-seeking questions, but fine-tuning on the InfoSeek dataset elicits models to use fine-grained knowledge that was learned during their pre-training. Furthermore, we show that accurate visual entity recognition can be used to improve performance on InfoSeek by retrieving relevant documents, showing a significant space for improvement.
abstract_zh: 预训练的视觉和语言模型在涉及图像和文本的现有任务（包括视觉问答）上展示了最先进的能力。然而，目前尚不清楚这些模型是否具有回答不仅查询视觉内容而且知识密集和信息搜索的问题的能力。在本研究中，我们引入了 InfoSeek，这是一个专门针对仅用常识知识无法回答的信息搜索问题而定制的视觉问答数据集。使用 InfoSeek，我们分析了各种预先训练的视觉问答模型并深入了解它们的特征。我们的研究结果表明，最先进的预训练多模态模型（例如 PaLI-X、BLIP2 等）在回答视觉信息搜索问题时面临挑战，但对 InfoSeek 数据集进行微调可以促使模型使用在预训练期间学到的细粒度知识。此外，我们还表明，准确的视觉实体识别可用于通过检索相关文档来提高 InfoSeek 的性能，显示出巨大的改进空间。

AI.tldr: 本文评估预训练视觉语言模型在回答知识密集型视觉信息寻求问题上的能力，并提出新的数据集InfoSeek进行分析。
AI.motivation: 尽管预训练视觉语言模型在常规视觉问答任务中表现优异，但其处理需要外部知识的复杂信息寻求问题的能力尚未明确，需针对性研究。
AI.method: 构建InfoSeek数据集，包含需外部知识回答的视觉问题；分析PaLI-X、BLIP2等模型表现，并通过微调及结合视觉实体识别与文档检索优化性能。
AI.result: SOTA模型在InfoSeek上表现不足，但微调后能激活预训练知识；视觉实体识别结合文档检索可显著提升模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 现有模型在视觉信息寻求任务中存在局限，但通过微调与外部知识整合可有效改进，表明该方向有较大优化空间。

authors_text: Pranav Aggarwal,Hareesh Ravi,Naveen Marri,Sachin Kelkar,Fengbin Chen,Vinh Khuc,Midhun Harikumar,Ritiz Tambi,Sudharshan Reddy Kakumanu,Purvak Lapsiya,Alvin Ghouas,Sarah Saber,Malavika Ramprasad,Baldo Faieta,Ajinkya Kale
title: Controlled and Conditional Text to Image Generation with Diffusion Prior
title_zh: 使用扩散先验生成受控和条件文本到图像
abstract: Denoising Diffusion models have shown remarkable performance in generating diverse, high quality images from text. Numerous techniques have been proposed on top of or in alignment with models like Stable Diffusion and Imagen that generate images directly from text. A lesser explored approach is DALLE-2's two step process comprising a Diffusion Prior that generates a CLIP image embedding from text and a Diffusion Decoder that generates an image from a CLIP image embedding. We explore the capabilities of the Diffusion Prior and the advantages of an intermediate CLIP representation. We observe that Diffusion Prior can be used in a memory and compute efficient way to constrain the generation to a specific domain without altering the larger Diffusion Decoder. Moreover, we show that the Diffusion Prior can be trained with additional conditional information such as color histogram to further control the generation. We show quantitatively and qualitatively that the proposed approaches perform better than prompt engineering for domain specific generation and existing baselines for color conditioned generation. We believe that our observations and results will instigate further research into the diffusion prior and uncover more of its capabilities.
summary: Denoising Diffusion models have shown remarkable performance in generating diverse, high quality images from text. Numerous techniques have been proposed on top of or in alignment with models like Stable Diffusion and Imagen that generate images directly from text. A lesser explored approach is DALLE-2's two step process comprising a Diffusion Prior that generates a CLIP image embedding from text and a Diffusion Decoder that generates an image from a CLIP image embedding. We explore the capabilities of the Diffusion Prior and the advantages of an intermediate CLIP representation. We observe that Diffusion Prior can be used in a memory and compute efficient way to constrain the generation to a specific domain without altering the larger Diffusion Decoder. Moreover, we show that the Diffusion Prior can be trained with additional conditional information such as color histogram to further control the generation. We show quantitatively and qualitatively that the proposed approaches perform better than prompt engineering for domain specific generation and existing baselines for color conditioned generation. We believe that our observations and results will instigate further research into the diffusion prior and uncover more of its capabilities.
abstract_zh: 去噪扩散模型在从文本生成多样化的高质量图像方面表现出了卓越的性能。人们在 Stable Diffusion 和 Imagen 等直接从文本生成图像的模型之上或与之对齐提出了许多技术。一种较少探索的方法是 DALLE-2 的两步过程，包括从文本生成 CLIP 图像嵌入的扩散先验和从 CLIP 图像嵌入生成图像的扩散解码器。我们探索扩散先验的功能和中间 CLIP 表示的优点。我们观察到，扩散先验可以用于内存和计算有效的方式，以将生成限制到特定域，而无需改变更大的扩散解码器。此外，我们表明可以使用颜色直方图等附加条件信息来训练扩散先验，以进一步控制生成。我们定量和定性地表明，所提出的方法比特定领域生成的即时工程和颜色调节生成的现有基线表现更好。我们相信，我们的观察和结果将激发对扩散先验的进一步研究，并揭示其更多功能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究基于扩散先验的可控与条件文本到图像生成方法，通过引入CLIP图像嵌入作为中间表示，提升生成质量与领域适应性。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到图像模型（如Stable Diffusion）直接生成图像，但DALLE-2的两阶段扩散先验与解码器架构潜力未被充分挖掘，尤其在特定领域约束与条件控制方面存在改进空间。
AI.method: 采用两阶段框架：1) 使用扩散先验从文本生成CLIP图像嵌入；2) 通过扩散解码器生成图像。引入颜色直方图等条件信息训练扩散先验，实现对生成过程的额外控制。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在特定领域图像生成和颜色条件生成任务中，优于传统提示工程及现有基线方法，且计算与内存效率更高。
AI.conclusion: 扩散先验作为中间表示能有效提升生成控制能力，未来研究可进一步探索其在更多条件约束下的应用潜力。

authors_text: Rui Ming,Haiping Xu,Shannon E. Gibbs,Donghui Yan,Ming Shao
title: A Deep Neural Network Based Approach to Building Budget-Constrained Models for Big Data Analysis
title_zh: 基于深度神经网络的方法来构建大数据分析的预算受限模型
abstract: Deep learning approaches require collection of data on many different input features or variables for accurate model training and prediction. Since data collection on input features could be costly, it is crucial to reduce the cost by selecting a subset of features and developing a budget-constrained model (BCM). In this paper, we introduce an approach to eliminating less important features for big data analysis using Deep Neural Networks (DNNs). Once a DNN model has been developed, we identify the weak links and weak neurons, and remove some input features to bring the model cost within a given budget. The experimental results show our approach is feasible and supports user selection of a suitable BCM within a given budget.
summary: Deep learning approaches require collection of data on many different input features or variables for accurate model training and prediction. Since data collection on input features could be costly, it is crucial to reduce the cost by selecting a subset of features and developing a budget-constrained model (BCM). In this paper, we introduce an approach to eliminating less important features for big data analysis using Deep Neural Networks (DNNs). Once a DNN model has been developed, we identify the weak links and weak neurons, and remove some input features to bring the model cost within a given budget. The experimental results show our approach is feasible and supports user selection of a suitable BCM within a given budget.
abstract_zh: 深度学习方法需要收集许多不同输入特征或变量的数据，以进行准确的模型训练和预测。由于输入特征的数据收集可能成本高昂，因此通过选择特征子集并开发预算约束模型 (BCM) 来降低成本至关重要。在本文中，我们介绍了一种使用深度神经网络（DNN）消除大数据分析中不太重要的特征的方法。一旦开发出 DNN 模型，我们就会识别薄弱环节和薄弱神经元，并删除一些输入特征，以使模型成本保持在给定的预算范围内。实验结果表明我们的方法是可行的，并且支持用户在给定的预算内选择合适的BCM。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度神经网络的预算受限模型构建方法，通过移除不重要的输入特征降低大数据分析成本。
AI.motivation: 深度学习需要大量特征数据，但特征收集成本高昂，需在保证性能的前提下通过特征选择控制模型成本。
AI.method: 构建DNN模型后识别弱链接和弱神经元，通过移除部分输入特征将模型成本控制在预算范围内。
AI.result: 实验验证了该方法的可行性，支持用户在给定预算内选择合适的预算受限模型。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效平衡了模型性能与成本，为大数据分析提供了经济高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Sihan Xu,Zelong Jiang,Ruisi Liu,Kaikai Yang,Zhijie Huang
title: ACE: Zero-Shot Image to Image Translation via Pretrained Auto-Contrastive-Encoder
title_zh: ACE：通过预训练自动对比编码器进行零样本图像到图像转换
abstract: Image-to-image translation is a fundamental task in computer vision. It transforms images from one domain to images in another domain so that they have particular domain-specific characteristics. Most prior works train a generative model to learn the mapping from a source domain to a target domain. However, learning such mapping between domains is challenging because data from different domains can be highly unbalanced in terms of both quality and quantity. To address this problem, we propose a new approach to extract image features by learning the similarities and differences of samples within the same data distribution via a novel contrastive learning framework, which we call Auto-Contrastive-Encoder (ACE). ACE learns the content code as the similarity between samples with the same content information and different style perturbations. The design of ACE enables us to achieve zero-shot image-to-image translation with no training on image translation tasks for the first time. Moreover, our learning method can learn the style features of images on different domains effectively. Consequently, our model achieves competitive results on multimodal image translation tasks with zero-shot learning as well. Additionally, we demonstrate the potential of our method in transfer learning. With fine-tuning, the quality of translated images improves in unseen domains. Even though we use contrastive learning, all of our training can be performed on a single GPU with the batch size of 8.
summary: Image-to-image translation is a fundamental task in computer vision. It transforms images from one domain to images in another domain so that they have particular domain-specific characteristics. Most prior works train a generative model to learn the mapping from a source domain to a target domain. However, learning such mapping between domains is challenging because data from different domains can be highly unbalanced in terms of both quality and quantity. To address this problem, we propose a new approach to extract image features by learning the similarities and differences of samples within the same data distribution via a novel contrastive learning framework, which we call Auto-Contrastive-Encoder (ACE). ACE learns the content code as the similarity between samples with the same content information and different style perturbations. The design of ACE enables us to achieve zero-shot image-to-image translation with no training on image translation tasks for the first time. Moreover, our learning method can learn the style features of images on different domains effectively. Consequently, our model achieves competitive results on multimodal image translation tasks with zero-shot learning as well. Additionally, we demonstrate the potential of our method in transfer learning. With fine-tuning, the quality of translated images improves in unseen domains. Even though we use contrastive learning, all of our training can be performed on a single GPU with the batch size of 8.
abstract_zh: 图像到图像的转换是计算机视觉中的一项基本任务。它将图像从一个域转换为另一个域中的图像，以便它们具有特定于域的特征。大多数先前的工作训练生成模型来学习从源域到目标域的映射。然而，学习域之间的这种映射具有挑战性，因为来自不同域的数据在质量和数量上可能高度不平衡。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新的方法来提取图像特征，通过一种新颖的对比学习框架（我们称之为自动对比编码器（ACE））学习同一数据分布中样本的相似性和差异。 ACE 将内容代码学习为具有相同内容信息和不同风格扰动的样本之间的相似性。 ACE的设计使我们首次能够在无需图像翻译任务训练的情况下实现零样本图像到图像的翻译。此外，我们的学习方法可以有效地学习不同领域图像的风格特征。因此，我们的模型在零样本学习的多模态图像翻译任务上也取得了有竞争力的结果。此外，我们还展示了我们的方法在迁移学习中的潜力。通过微调，翻译图像的质量在看不见的领域得到提高。尽管我们使用对比学习，但我们所有的训练都可以在批量大小为 8 的单个 GPU 上执行。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ACE框架，通过预训练的自对比编码器实现无需图像翻译任务训练的零样本图像到图像转换。
AI.motivation: 传统图像翻译方法因跨域数据质量与数量不平衡而难以学习有效映射，且需依赖大量标注数据。
AI.method: 设计Auto-Contrastive-Encoder（ACE）框架，通过对比学习提取内容码与风格码，利用相同内容不同风格样本的相似性实现零样本翻译。
AI.result: 在多模态图像翻译任务中取得竞争性结果，微调后在未见域表现提升，且可在单GPU上高效训练（批量8）。
AI.conclusion: ACE通过对比学习有效分离内容与风格特征，首次实现无需图像翻译训练的零样本转换，并展示出良好的迁移学习潜力。

motivation: 传统图像翻译方法因跨域数据质量与数量不平衡而难以学习有效映射，且需依赖大量标注数据。
method: 设计Auto-Contrastive-Encoder（ACE）框架，通过对比学习提取内容码与风格码，利用相同内容不同风格样本的相似性实现零样本翻译。
result: 在多模态图像翻译任务中取得竞争性结果，微调后在未见域表现提升，且可在单GPU上高效训练（批量8）。
conclusion: ACE通过对比学习有效分离内容与风格特征，首次实现无需图像翻译训练的零样本转换，并展示出良好的迁移学习潜力。
search_text: ACE: Zero-Shot Image to Image Translation via Pretrained Auto-Contrastive-Encoder ACE：通过预训练自动对比编码器进行零样本图像到图像转换 Image-to-image translation is a fundamental task in computer vision. It transforms images from one domain to images in another domain so that they have particular domain-specific characteristics. Most prior works train a generative model to learn the mapping from a source domain to a target domain. However, learning such mapping between domains is challenging because data from different domains can be highly unbalanced in terms of both quality and quantity. To address this problem, we propose a new approach to extract image features by learning the similarities and differences of samples within the same data distribution via a novel contrastive learning framework, which we call Auto-Contrastive-Encoder (ACE). ACE learns the content code as the similarity between samples with the same content information and different style perturbations. The design of ACE enables us to achieve zero-shot image-to-image translation with no training on image translation tasks for the first time. Moreover, our learning method can learn the style features of images on different domains effectively. Consequently, our model achieves competitive results on multimodal image translation tasks with zero-shot learning as well. Additionally, we demonstrate the potential of our method in transfer learning. With fine-tuning, the quality of translated images improves in unseen domains. Even though we use contrastive learning, all of our training can be performed on a single GPU with the batch size of 8. 图像到图像的转换是计算机视觉中的一项基本任务。它将图像从一个域转换为另一个域中的图像，以便它们具有特定于域的特征。大多数先前的工作训练生成模型来学习从源域到目标域的映射。然而，学习域之间的这种映射具有挑战性，因为来自不同域的数据在质量和数量上可能高度不平衡。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新的方法来提取图像特征，通过一种新颖的对比学习框架（我们称之为自动对比编码器（ACE））学习同一数据分布中样本的相似性和差异。 ACE 将内容代码学习为具有相同内容信息和不同风格扰动的样本之间的相似性。 ACE的设计使我们首次能够在无需图像翻译任务训练的情况下实现零样本图像到图像的翻译。此外，我们的学习方法可以有效地学习不同领域图像的风格特征。因此，我们的模型在零样本学习的多模态图像翻译任务上也取得了有竞争力的结果。此外，我们还展示了我们的方法在迁移学习中的潜力。通过微调，翻译图像的质量在看不见的领域得到提高。尽管我们使用对比学习，但我们所有的训练都可以在批量大小为 8 的单个 GPU 上执行。 本文提出ACE框架，通过预训练的自对比编码器实现无需图像翻译任务训练的零样本图像到图像转换。 Sihan Xu,Zelong Jiang,Ruisi Liu,Kaikai Yang,Zhijie Huang cs.CV

authors_text: Steven Moore,Q. Vera Liao,Hariharan Subramonyam
title: fAIlureNotes: Supporting Designers in Understanding the Limits of AI Models for Computer Vision Tasks
title_zh: fAIlureNotes：支持设计人员了解计算机视觉任务的 AI 模型的局限性
abstract: To design with AI models, user experience (UX) designers must assess the fit between the model and user needs. Based on user research, they need to contextualize the model's behavior and potential failures within their product-specific data instances and user scenarios. However, our formative interviews with ten UX professionals revealed that such a proactive discovery of model limitations is challenging and time-intensive. Furthermore, designers often lack technical knowledge of AI and accessible exploration tools, which challenges their understanding of model capabilities and limitations. In this work, we introduced a failure-driven design approach to AI, a workflow that encourages designers to explore model behavior and failure patterns early in the design process. The implementation of fAIlureNotes, a designer-centered failure exploration and analysis tool, supports designers in evaluating models and identifying failures across diverse user groups and scenarios. Our evaluation with UX practitioners shows that fAIlureNotes outperforms today's interactive model cards in assessing context-specific model performance.
summary: To design with AI models, user experience (UX) designers must assess the fit between the model and user needs. Based on user research, they need to contextualize the model's behavior and potential failures within their product-specific data instances and user scenarios. However, our formative interviews with ten UX professionals revealed that such a proactive discovery of model limitations is challenging and time-intensive. Furthermore, designers often lack technical knowledge of AI and accessible exploration tools, which challenges their understanding of model capabilities and limitations. In this work, we introduced a failure-driven design approach to AI, a workflow that encourages designers to explore model behavior and failure patterns early in the design process. The implementation of fAIlureNotes, a designer-centered failure exploration and analysis tool, supports designers in evaluating models and identifying failures across diverse user groups and scenarios. Our evaluation with UX practitioners shows that fAIlureNotes outperforms today's interactive model cards in assessing context-specific model performance.
abstract_zh: 要使用 AI 模型进行设计，用户体验 (UX) 设计师必须评估模型与用户需求之间的契合度。基于用户研究，他们需要将模型的行为和潜在故障置于特定于产品的数据实例和用户场景中。然而，我们对十位用户体验专业人士的形成性访谈表明，这种主动发现模型局限性的做法具有挑战性且耗时。此外，设计人员往往缺乏人工智能技术知识和易于使用的探索工具，这挑战了他们对模型功能和局限性的理解。在这项工作中，我们引入了人工智能的故障驱动设计方法，该工作流程鼓励设计人员在设计过程的早期探索模型行为和故障模式。 fAIlureNotes 是一种以设计人员为中心的故障探索和分析工具，它的实施支持设计人员评估模型并识别不同用户组和场景的故障。我们对用户体验从业者的评估表明，fAIlureNotes 在评估特定于上下文的模型性能方面优于当今的交互式模型卡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为fAIlureNotes的工具，帮助UX设计师在计算机视觉任务中理解AI模型的局限性。
AI.motivation: UX设计师在评估AI模型与用户需求的匹配度时，面临发现模型局限性困难、缺乏技术知识和探索工具的挑战。
AI.method: 引入了一种以失败驱动的设计方法，通过开发设计师为中心的fAIlureNotes工具，支持在设计早期探索模型行为和失败模式。
AI.result: 与UX从业者评估显示，fAIlureNotes在评估特定场景下的模型性能方面优于现有的交互式模型卡片。
AI.conclusion: fAIlureNotes有效支持设计师理解AI模型的局限性，提升了AI集成产品的设计流程。

authors_text: Yanran Wang,David Boyle
title: Constrained Reinforcement Learning using Distributional Representation for Trustworthy Quadrotor UAV Tracking Control
title_zh: 使用分布式表示的约束强化学习实现可信四旋翼无人机跟踪控制
comment: 18 pages, 9 figures. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2205.07150
comments: 18 pages, 9 figures. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2205.07150
abstract: Simultaneously accurate and reliable tracking control for quadrotors in complex dynamic environments is challenging. As aerodynamics derived from drag forces and moment variations are chaotic and difficult to precisely identify, most current quadrotor tracking systems treat them as simple `disturbances' in conventional control approaches. We propose a novel, interpretable trajectory tracker integrating a Distributional Reinforcement Learning disturbance estimator for unknown aerodynamic effects with a Stochastic Model Predictive Controller (SMPC). The proposed estimator `Constrained Distributional Reinforced disturbance estimator' (ConsDRED) accurately identifies uncertainties between true and estimated values of aerodynamic effects. Simplified Affine Disturbance Feedback is used for control parameterization to guarantee convexity, which we then integrate with a SMPC. We theoretically guarantee that ConsDRED achieves at least an optimal global convergence rate and a certain sublinear rate if constraints are violated with an error decreases as the width and the layer of neural network increase. To demonstrate practicality, we show convergent training in simulation and real-world experiments, and empirically verify that ConsDRED is less sensitive to hyperparameter settings compared with canonical constrained RL approaches. We demonstrate our system improves accumulative tracking errors by at least 70% compared with the recent art. Importantly, the proposed framework, ConsDRED-SMPC, balances the tradeoff between pursuing high performance and obeying conservative constraints for practical implementations.
summary: Simultaneously accurate and reliable tracking control for quadrotors in complex dynamic environments is challenging. As aerodynamics derived from drag forces and moment variations are chaotic and difficult to precisely identify, most current quadrotor tracking systems treat them as simple `disturbances' in conventional control approaches. We propose a novel, interpretable trajectory tracker integrating a Distributional Reinforcement Learning disturbance estimator for unknown aerodynamic effects with a Stochastic Model Predictive Controller (SMPC). The proposed estimator `Constrained Distributional Reinforced disturbance estimator' (ConsDRED) accurately identifies uncertainties between true and estimated values of aerodynamic effects. Simplified Affine Disturbance Feedback is used for control parameterization to guarantee convexity, which we then integrate with a SMPC. We theoretically guarantee that ConsDRED achieves at least an optimal global convergence rate and a certain sublinear rate if constraints are violated with an error decreases as the width and the layer of neural network increase. To demonstrate practicality, we show convergent training in simulation and real-world experiments, and empirically verify that ConsDRED is less sensitive to hyperparameter settings compared with canonical constrained RL approaches. We demonstrate our system improves accumulative tracking errors by at least 70% compared with the recent art. Importantly, the proposed framework, ConsDRED-SMPC, balances the tradeoff between pursuing high performance and obeying conservative constraints for practical implementations.
abstract_zh: 在复杂的动态环境中，四旋翼飞行器同时准确可靠的跟踪控制具有挑战性。由于阻力和力矩变化产生的空气动力学是混乱的并且难以精确识别，因此大多数当前的四旋翼跟踪系统将它们视为传统控制方法中的简单“干扰”。我们提出了一种新颖的、可解释的轨迹跟踪器，它将用于未知空气动力学效应的分布式强化学习扰动估计器与随机模型预测控制器（SMPC）相结合。所提出的估计器“约束分布增强扰动估计器”（ConsDRED）准确地识别了空气动力效应的真实值和估计值之间的不确定性。简化仿射干扰反馈用于控制参数化以保证凸性，然后我们将其与 SMPC 集成。我们从理论上保证，如果违反约束且误差随着神经网络宽度和层数的增加而减小，ConsDRED 至少能实现最佳全局收敛速度和一定的次线性速度。为了证明实用性，我们在模拟和现实实验中展示了收敛训练，并凭经验验证与规范约束 RL 方法相比，ConsDRED 对超参数设置的敏感度较低。我们证明，与最新技术相比，我们的系统将累积跟踪误差提高了至少 70%。重要的是，所提出的框架 ConsDRED-SMPC 在追求高性能和遵守实际实现的保守约束之间进行了权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合分布强化学习与随机模型预测控制的框架，用于提高四旋翼无人机在复杂环境中的轨迹跟踪控制性能。
AI.motivation: 传统四旋翼控制方法将气动效应简化为干扰，难以准确处理复杂动态环境中的不确定性，导致跟踪精度和可靠性不足。
AI.method: 设计约束分布强化学习干扰估计器（ConsDRED）以量化气动效应的不确定性，并与随机模型预测控制器（SMPC）结合，通过仿射干扰反馈保证凸优化，理论证明其收敛性并验证鲁棒性。
AI.result: 仿真与实际实验表明，该方法相比最新技术将累积跟踪误差降低至少70%，且对超参数敏感度更低。
AI.conclusion: ConsDRED-SMPC框架在保证保守约束的前提下提升了控制性能，为实际应用提供了可靠且高效的解决方案。

To demonstrate practicality, we show convergent training in simulation and real-world experiments, and empirically verify that ConsDRED is less sensitive to hyperparameter settings compared with canonical constrained RL approaches. We demonstrate our system improves accumulative tracking errors by at least 70% compared with the recent art. Importantly, the proposed framework, ConsDRED-SMPC, balances the tradeoff between pursuing high performance and obeying conservative constraints for practical implementations. 在复杂的动态环境中，四旋翼飞行器同时准确可靠的跟踪控制具有挑战性。由于阻力和力矩变化产生的空气动力学是混乱的并且难以精确识别，因此大多数当前的四旋翼跟踪系统将它们视为传统控制方法中的简单“干扰”。我们提出了一种新颖的、可解释的轨迹跟踪器，它将用于未知空气动力学效应的分布式强化学习扰动估计器与随机模型预测控制器（SMPC）相结合。所提出的估计器“约束分布增强扰动估计器”（ConsDRED）准确地识别了空气动力效应的真实值和估计值之间的不确定性。简化仿射干扰反馈用于控制参数化以保证凸性，然后我们将其与 SMPC 集成。我们从理论上保证，如果违反约束且误差随着神经网络宽度和层数的增加而减小，ConsDRED 至少能实现最佳全局收敛速度和一定的次线性速度。为了证明实用性，我们在模拟和现实实验中展示了收敛训练，并凭经验验证与规范约束 RL 方法相比，ConsDRED 对超参数设置的敏感度较低。我们证明，与最新技术相比，我们的系统将累积跟踪误差提高了至少 70%。重要的是，所提出的框架 ConsDRED-SMPC 在追求高性能和遵守实际实现的保守约束之间进行了权衡。 本文提出一种结合分布强化学习与随机模型预测控制的框架，用于提高四旋翼无人机在复杂环境中的轨迹跟踪控制性能。 Yanran Wang,David Boyle cs.RO,cs.AI,eess.SY

authors_text: Yi Ru Wang,Yuchi Zhao,Haoping Xu,Saggi Eppel,Alan Aspuru-Guzik,Florian Shkurti,Animesh Garg
title: MVTrans: Multi-View Perception of Transparent Objects
title_zh: MVTrans：透明物体的多视图感知
comment: Accepted to ICRA 2023; 6 pages, 4 figures, 4 tables
comments: Accepted to ICRA 2023; 6 pages, 4 figures, 4 tables
abstract: Transparent object perception is a crucial skill for applications such as robot manipulation in household and laboratory settings. Existing methods utilize RGB-D or stereo inputs to handle a subset of perception tasks including depth and pose estimation. However, transparent object perception remains to be an open problem. In this paper, we forgo the unreliable depth map from RGB-D sensors and extend the stereo based method. Our proposed method, MVTrans, is an end-to-end multi-view architecture with multiple perception capabilities, including depth estimation, segmentation, and pose estimation. Additionally, we establish a novel procedural photo-realistic dataset generation pipeline and create a large-scale transparent object detection dataset, Syn-TODD, which is suitable for training networks with all three modalities, RGB-D, stereo and multi-view RGB. Project Site: https://ac-rad.github.io/MVTrans/
summary: Transparent object perception is a crucial skill for applications such as robot manipulation in household and laboratory settings. Existing methods utilize RGB-D or stereo inputs to handle a subset of perception tasks including depth and pose estimation. However, transparent object perception remains to be an open problem. In this paper, we forgo the unreliable depth map from RGB-D sensors and extend the stereo based method. Our proposed method, MVTrans, is an end-to-end multi-view architecture with multiple perception capabilities, including depth estimation, segmentation, and pose estimation. Additionally, we establish a novel procedural photo-realistic dataset generation pipeline and create a large-scale transparent object detection dataset, Syn-TODD, which is suitable for training networks with all three modalities, RGB-D, stereo and multi-view RGB. Project Site: https://ac-rad.github.io/MVTrans/
abstract_zh: 透明的物体感知对于家庭和实验室环境中的机器人操作等应用来说是一项至关重要的技能。现有方法利用 RGB-D 或立体输入来处理感知任务的子集，包括深度和姿态估计。然而，透明物体感知仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。在本文中，我们放弃了 RGB-D 传感器不可靠的深度图，并扩展了基于立体的方法。我们提出的方法 MVTrans 是一种端到端多视图架构，具有多种感知功能，包括深度估计、分割和姿态估计。此外，我们建立了一种新颖的程序真实感数据集生成管道，并创建了一个大规模透明对象检测数据集 Syn-TODD，它适用于使用 RGB-D、立体和多视图 RGB 三种模式的训练网络。项目站点：https://ac-rad.github.io/MVTrans/

AI.tldr: 本文提出MVTrans，一种用于透明物体感知的多视角端到端架构，并构建了大规模透明物体检测数据集Syn-TODD。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖RGB-D或立体视觉输入，但透明物体的深度图不可靠，且缺乏统一的多模态解决方案。
AI.method: 设计多视角架构MVTrans，集成深度估计、分割和姿态估计能力，并开发程序化生成管道创建Syn-TODD数据集（支持RGB-D、立体视觉和多视角RGB模态）。
AI.result: 实现了透明物体的鲁棒感知，Syn-TODD数据集可训练多模态网络，验证了方法在多种输入模态下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MVTrans通过多视角数据融合解决了透明物体感知难题，Syn-TODD为未来研究提供了重要基准。

authors_text: James Swedeen,Greg Droge
title: Batch Informed Trees (BIT*)
title_zh: 批量知情树 (BIT*)
abstract: Path planning through complex obstacle spaces is a fundamental requirement of many mobile robot applications. Recently a rapid convergence path planning algorithm, Batch Informed Trees (BIT*), was introduced. This work serves as a concise write-up and explanation of BIT*. This work includes a description of BIT* and how BIT* operates, a graphical demonstration of BIT*, and simulation results where BIT* is compared to Optimal Rapidly-exploring Random Trees (RRT*).
summary: Path planning through complex obstacle spaces is a fundamental requirement of many mobile robot applications. Recently a rapid convergence path planning algorithm, Batch Informed Trees (BIT*), was introduced. This work serves as a concise write-up and explanation of BIT*. This work includes a description of BIT* and how BIT* operates, a graphical demonstration of BIT*, and simulation results where BIT* is compared to Optimal Rapidly-exploring Random Trees (RRT*).
abstract_zh: 通过复杂障碍空间的路径规划是许多移动机器人应用的基本要求。最近推出了一种快速收敛路径规划算法，即批量知情树 (BIT*)。这项工作是对 BIT* 的简明撰写和解释。这项工作包括 BIT* 的描述以及 BIT* 的运作方式、BIT* 的图形演示以及将 BIT* 与最佳快速探索随机树 (RRT*) 进行比较的模拟结果。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了Batch Informed Trees (BIT*)算法，用于复杂障碍环境中的路径规划，并通过仿真比较其与RRT*的性能。
AI.motivation: 移动机器人需要高效路径规划算法以应对复杂障碍空间，传统方法存在收敛速度或路径质量不足的问题。
AI.method: 提出BIT*算法，通过批量信息处理优化树结构扩展，并结合图形演示与RRT*进行仿真对比实验。
AI.result: 仿真结果验证了BIT*在路径规划效率和质量上优于RRT*，尤其在复杂环境中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: BIT*作为一种快速收敛的路径规划算法，为复杂障碍空间下的移动机器人应用提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Bill Fan,Farhan Rozaidi,Capprin Bass,Gina Olson,Melinda Malley,Ross L Hatton
title: Linear Kinematics for General Constant Curvature and Torsion Manipulators
title_zh: 一般恒曲率和扭转机械臂的线性运动学
comment: Accepted for presentation at the 6th IEEE-RAS International Conference on Soft Robotics (RoboSoft 2023)
comments: Accepted for presentation at the 6th IEEE-RAS International Conference on Soft Robotics (RoboSoft 2023)
abstract: We present a novel general model that unifies the kinematics of constant curvature and constant twist continuum manipulators. Combining this kinematics with energy-based physics, we derive a linear mapping from actuator configuration to manipulator deformation that is analogous to traditional robot forward kinematics. Our model generalizes across manipulators with different sizes, types of bending, and types of actuators, without the need for parameter re-fitting. The combination of generality and linearity makes the model useful for control and planning algorithms. Finally, our model is shown to be accurate through experimental validation on manipulators with pneumatic artificial muscles.
summary: We present a novel general model that unifies the kinematics of constant curvature and constant twist continuum manipulators. Combining this kinematics with energy-based physics, we derive a linear mapping from actuator configuration to manipulator deformation that is analogous to traditional robot forward kinematics. Our model generalizes across manipulators with different sizes, types of bending, and types of actuators, without the need for parameter re-fitting. The combination of generality and linearity makes the model useful for control and planning algorithms. Finally, our model is shown to be accurate through experimental validation on manipulators with pneumatic artificial muscles.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的通用模型，该模型统一了恒定曲率和恒定扭曲连续体机械臂的运动学。将该运动学与基于能量的物理学相结合，我们得出了从执行器配置到机械臂变形的线性映射，类似于传统机器人正向运动学。我们的模型适用于不同尺寸、弯曲类型和执行器类型的机械臂，无需重新拟合参数。通用性和线性的结合使得该模型对于控制和规划算法非常有用。最后，通过对带有气动人造肌肉的机械手的实验验证，我们的模型被证明是准确的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通用线性运动学模型，统一了恒定曲率和扭转连续体机械臂的运动学分析。
AI.motivation: 传统连续体机械臂模型存在参数依赖性强、无法跨类型泛化的问题，需建立更通用的运动学描述方法。
AI.method: 结合能量物理原理，推导出从执行器配置到机械臂变形的线性映射关系，无需参数重新拟合。
AI.result: 实验验证表明该模型在不同尺寸、弯曲类型和执行器配置的气动人工肌肉机械臂上均具有高准确性。
AI.conclusion: 该线性模型为连续体机械臂的控制与规划算法提供了通用且高效的运动学基础。

Finally, our model is shown to be accurate through experimental validation on manipulators with pneumatic artificial muscles. 我们提出了一种新颖的通用模型，该模型统一了恒定曲率和恒定扭曲连续体机械臂的运动学。将该运动学与基于能量的物理学相结合，我们得出了从执行器配置到机械臂变形的线性映射，类似于传统机器人正向运动学。我们的模型适用于不同尺寸、弯曲类型和执行器类型的机械臂，无需重新拟合参数。通用性和线性的结合使得该模型对于控制和规划算法非常有用。最后，通过对带有气动人造肌肉的机械手的实验验证，我们的模型被证明是准确的。 本文提出一种通用线性运动学模型，统一了恒定曲率和扭转连续体机械臂的运动学分析。 Bill Fan,Farhan Rozaidi,Capprin Bass,Gina Olson,Melinda Malley,Ross L Hatton cs.RO

authors_text: Ashwin Jagadeesha,Pranathi Rayavaram,Justin Marward,Sashank Narain,Claire Seungeun Lee
title: Integrating Data Structures and Algorithms in K-12 Education using Block-based Programming
title_zh: 使用基于块的编程将数据结构和算法集成到 K-12 教育中
comment: ef:2023 IEEE Global Engineering Education Conference (EDUCON)
comments: ef:2023 IEEE Global Engineering Education Conference (EDUCON)
abstract: This paper describes the design and evaluation of DSAScratch, an extension to Scratch, a widely used block-based programming language. The DSAScratch framework implements advanced data structures such as arrays, sets, dictionaries, and searching and sorting algorithms. By presenting these concepts in an intuitive block-based interface, these blocks abstract away technical details and simplify data structures and algorithms concepts for K-12 students to grasp and apply to programming problems more readily. A preliminary evaluation of the tool's usability and learning outcomes is presented in this paper. Given the information we have gathered about DSAScratch, we show that the extension is beneficial for students to develop a deeper understanding of programming and an intuitive understanding of these concepts in high school. We present the methodology and preliminary results of a user study conducted with ten high school students. During the user study, 70% of the participants understood the key ideas behind DSAScratch implemented data structures and algorithms through a mixture of lectures and hands-on activities. We show that DSAScratch was also an important part of the workshop for 90% of the students who participated, as it enhanced their understanding of algorithms and data structures. Furthermore, they indicated that they would recommend DSAScratch to their peers.
summary: This paper describes the design and evaluation of DSAScratch, an extension to Scratch, a widely used block-based programming language. The DSAScratch framework implements advanced data structures such as arrays, sets, dictionaries, and searching and sorting algorithms. By presenting these concepts in an intuitive block-based interface, these blocks abstract away technical details and simplify data structures and algorithms concepts for K-12 students to grasp and apply to programming problems more readily. A preliminary evaluation of the tool's usability and learning outcomes is presented in this paper. Given the information we have gathered about DSAScratch, we show that the extension is beneficial for students to develop a deeper understanding of programming and an intuitive understanding of these concepts in high school. We present the methodology and preliminary results of a user study conducted with ten high school students. During the user study, 70% of the participants understood the key ideas behind DSAScratch implemented data structures and algorithms through a mixture of lectures and hands-on activities. We show that DSAScratch was also an important part of the workshop for 90% of the students who participated, as it enhanced their understanding of algorithms and data structures. Furthermore, they indicated that they would recommend DSAScratch to their peers.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 DSAScratch 的设计和评估，DSAScratch 是 Scratch（一种广泛使用的基于块的编程语言）的扩展。 DSAScratch 框架实现了高级数据结构，例如数组、集合、字典以及搜索和排序算法。通过在直观的基于块的界面中呈现这些概念，这些块抽象了技术细节并简化了数据结构和算法概念，使 K-12 学生能够更轻松地掌握和应用编程问题。本文对该工具的可用性和学习成果进行了初步评估。根据我们收集的有关 DSAScratch 的信息，我们表明该扩展有利于学生在高中加深对编程的理解以及对这些概念的直观理解。我们介绍了对十名高中生进行的用户研究的方法和初步结果。在用户研究期间，70% 的参与者通过讲座和实践活动了解了 DSAScratch 实现数据结构和算法背后的关键思想。我们表明，对于 90% 的参与学生来说，DSAScratch 也是研讨会的重要组成部分，因为它增强了他们对算法和数据结构的理解。此外，他们表示会向同行推荐 DSAScratch。

AI.tldr: 本文设计并评估了DSAScratch，一种基于Scratch的可视化编程扩展工具，旨在帮助K-12学生更直观地学习数据结构与算法。
AI.motivation: 传统编程教学难以让学生直观理解抽象的数据结构与算法概念，需通过更直观的工具提升学习效果。
AI.method: 开发DSAScratch扩展，集成数组、集合、字典等数据结构及搜索排序算法，通过讲座与实践结合的方式对10名高中生进行教学实验。
AI.result: 70%学生通过实验掌握核心概念，90%学生认为该工具显著提升了算法与数据结构的理解，且均表示愿意推荐给同学。
AI.conclusion: DSAScratch有效增强了高中生对编程核心概念的理解，是中学阶段算法教育的可行工具。

authors_text: Yushan Huang,Yuchen Zhao,Alexander Capstick,Francesca Palermo,Hamed Haddadi,Payam Barnaghi
title: Information Theory Inspired Pattern Analysis for Time-series Data
title_zh: 信息论启发的时间序列数据模式分析
abstract: Current methods for pattern analysis in time series mainly rely on statistical features or probabilistic learning and inference methods to identify patterns and trends in the data. Such methods do not generalize well when applied to multivariate, multi-source, state-varying, and noisy time-series data. To address these issues, we propose a highly generalizable method that uses information theory-based features to identify and learn from patterns in multivariate time-series data. To demonstrate the proposed approach, we analyze pattern changes in human activity data. For applications with stochastic state transitions, features are developed based on Shannon's entropy of Markov chains, entropy rates of Markov chains, entropy production of Markov chains, and von Neumann entropy of Markov chains. For applications where state modeling is not applicable, we utilize five entropy variants, including approximate entropy, increment entropy, dispersion entropy, phase entropy, and slope entropy. The results show the proposed information theory-based features improve the recall rate, F1 score, and accuracy on average by up to 23.01% compared with the baseline models and a simpler model structure, with an average reduction of 18.75 times in the number of model parameters.
summary: Current methods for pattern analysis in time series mainly rely on statistical features or probabilistic learning and inference methods to identify patterns and trends in the data. Such methods do not generalize well when applied to multivariate, multi-source, state-varying, and noisy time-series data. To address these issues, we propose a highly generalizable method that uses information theory-based features to identify and learn from patterns in multivariate time-series data. To demonstrate the proposed approach, we analyze pattern changes in human activity data. For applications with stochastic state transitions, features are developed based on Shannon's entropy of Markov chains, entropy rates of Markov chains, entropy production of Markov chains, and von Neumann entropy of Markov chains. For applications where state modeling is not applicable, we utilize five entropy variants, including approximate entropy, increment entropy, dispersion entropy, phase entropy, and slope entropy. The results show the proposed information theory-based features improve the recall rate, F1 score, and accuracy on average by up to 23.01% compared with the baseline models and a simpler model structure, with an average reduction of 18.75 times in the number of model parameters.
abstract_zh: 当前时间序列模式分析的方法主要依靠统计特征或概率学习和推理方法来识别数据中的模式和趋势。当应用于多变量、多源、状态变化和噪声时间序列数据时，此类方法不能很好地推广。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种高度通用的方法，该方法使用基于信息论的特征来识别多元时间序列数据中的模式并从中学习。为了演示所提出的方法，我们分析了人类活动数据的模式变化。对于具有随机状态转换的应用，基于马尔可夫链的香农熵、马尔可夫链的熵率、马尔可夫链的熵产生和马尔可夫链的冯诺依曼熵来开发特征。对于状态建模不适用的应用，我们使用五种熵变体，包括近似熵、增量熵、色散熵、相熵和斜率熵。结果表明，所提出的基于信息论的特征与基线模型相比，召回率、F1分数和准确率平均提高了23.01%，并且模型结构更简单，模型参数数量平均减少了18.75倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于信息论的多变量时间序列模式分析方法，以解决传统统计特征和概率学习方法在复杂数据中的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理多变量、多源、状态变化和噪声时间序列数据时泛化能力不足，需开发更通用的模式分析技术。
AI.method: 基于香农熵、马尔可夫链熵率、冯·诺依曼熵等信息论特征构建模型，针对不同场景采用近似熵、分散熵等五种熵变体进行模式识别。
AI.result: 实验显示该方法在召回率、F1分数和准确率上平均提升23.01%，且模型参数量平均减少18.75倍。
AI.conclusion: 信息论特征能有效提升时间序列模式分析性能，提供更简洁高效的解决方案。
