authors_text: Yonggang Jiang,Sagnik Mukhopadhyay
title: Finding a Small Vertex Cut on Distributed Networks
title_zh: 寻找分布式网络上的小顶点切割
abstract: We present an algorithm for distributed networks to efficiently find a small vertex cut in the CONGEST model. Given a positive integer $κ$, our algorithm can, with high probability, either find $κ$ vertices whose removal disconnects the network or return that such $κ$ vertices do not exist. Our algorithm takes $κ^3\cdot \tilde{O}(D+\sqrt{n})$ rounds, where $n$ is the number of vertices in the network and $D$ denotes the network's diameter. This implies $\tilde{O}(D+\sqrt{n})$ round complexity whenever $κ=\text{polylog}(n)$. Prior to our result, a bound of $\tilde{O}(D)$ is known only when $κ=1,2$ [Parter, Petruschka DISC'22]. For $κ\geq 3$, this bound can be obtained only by an $O(\log n)$-approximation algorithm [Censor-Hillel, Ghaffari, Kuhn PODC'14], and the only known exact algorithm takes $O\left((κΔD)^{O(κ)}\right)$ rounds, where $Δ$ is the maximum degree [Parter DISC'19]. Our result answers an open problem by Nanongkai, Saranurak, and Yingchareonthawornchai [STOC'19].
summary: We present an algorithm for distributed networks to efficiently find a small vertex cut in the CONGEST model. Given a positive integer $κ$, our algorithm can, with high probability, either find $κ$ vertices whose removal disconnects the network or return that such $κ$ vertices do not exist. Our algorithm takes $κ^3\cdot \tilde{O}(D+\sqrt{n})$ rounds, where $n$ is the number of vertices in the network and $D$ denotes the network's diameter. This implies $\tilde{O}(D+\sqrt{n})$ round complexity whenever $κ=\text{polylog}(n)$. Prior to our result, a bound of $\tilde{O}(D)$ is known only when $κ=1,2$ [Parter, Petruschka DISC'22]. For $κ\geq 3$, this bound can be obtained only by an $O(\log n)$-approximation algorithm [Censor-Hillel, Ghaffari, Kuhn PODC'14], and the only known exact algorithm takes $O\left((κΔD)^{O(κ)}\right)$ rounds, where $Δ$ is the maximum degree [Parter DISC'19]. Our result answers an open problem by Nanongkai, Saranurak, and Yingchareonthawornchai [STOC'19].
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种分布式网络算法，可以有效地找到 CONGEST 模型中的小顶点切割。给定正整数 $κ$，我们的算法可以以很高的概率找到删除后会断开网络的 $κ$ 顶点，或者返回此类 $κ$ 顶点不存在。我们的算法需要 $κ^3\cdot \tilde{O}(D+\sqrt{n})$ 轮，其中 $n$ 是网络中的顶点数量，$D$ 表示网络的直径。这意味着每当 $κ=\text{polylog}(n)$ 时，$\tilde{O}(D+\sqrt{n})$ 都会舍入复杂度。在我们的结果之前，仅当 $κ=1,2$ 时 $\tilde{O}(D)$ 的界限才已知[Parter, Petruschka DISC'22]。对于 $κ\geq 3$，只能通过 $O(\log n)$ 近似算法 [Censor-Hillel、Ghaffari、Kuhn PODC'14] 获得此界限，唯一已知的精确算法需要 $O\left((κΔD)^{O(κ)}\right)$ 轮，其中 $Δ$ 是最大度数 [Parter DISC'19]。我们的结果回答了 Nanongkai、Saranurak 和 Yingchareonthawornchai [STOC'19] 提出的一个悬而未决的问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在分布式网络中高效寻找小顶点割的算法，适用于CONGEST模型。
AI.motivation: 现有算法在处理较大κ值时时间复杂度较高，且缺乏精确算法，需改进效率与适用性。
AI.method: 设计基于CONGEST模型的算法，通过κ³·Õ(D+√n)轮次实现顶点割检测，结合概率方法与网络直径特性优化计算。
AI.result: 算法在κ为对数规模时达到Õ(D+√n)复杂度，优于此前仅适用于κ=1,2的Õ(D)界及近似算法，解决了STOC'19提出的开放问题。
AI.conclusion: 首次在多项式时间内实现精确顶点割检测，为分布式网络分割提供了更高效的解决方案。

search_text: Finding a Small Vertex Cut on Distributed Networks 寻找分布式网络上的小顶点切割 We present an algorithm for distributed networks to efficiently find a small vertex cut in the CONGEST model. Given a positive integer $κ$, our algorithm can, with high probability, either find $κ$ vertices whose removal disconnects the network or return that such $κ$ vertices do not exist. Our algorithm takes $κ^3\cdot \tilde{O}(D+\sqrt{n})$ rounds, where $n$ is the number of vertices in the network and $D$ denotes the network's diameter. This implies $\tilde{O}(D+\sqrt{n})$ round complexity whenever $κ=\text{polylog}(n)$. Prior to our result, a bound of $\tilde{O}(D)$ is known only when $κ=1,2$ [Parter, Petruschka DISC'22]. For $κ\geq 3$, this bound can be obtained only by an $O(\log n)$-approximation algorithm [Censor-Hillel, Ghaffari, Kuhn PODC'14], and the only known exact algorithm takes $O\left((κΔD)^{O(κ)}\right)$ rounds, where $Δ$ is the maximum degree [Parter DISC'19]. Our result answers an open problem by Nanongkai, Saranurak, and Yingchareonthawornchai [STOC'19]. 我们提出了一种分布式网络算法，可以有效地找到 CONGEST 模型中的小顶点切割。给定正整数 $κ$，我们的算法可以以很高的概率找到删除后会断开网络的 $κ$ 顶点，或者返回此类 $κ$ 顶点不存在。我们的算法需要 $κ^3\cdot \tilde{O}(D+\sqrt{n})$ 轮，其中 $n$ 是网络中的顶点数量，$D$ 表示网络的直径。这意味着每当 $κ=\text{polylog}(n)$ 时，$\tilde{O}(D+\sqrt{n})$ 都会舍入复杂度。在我们的结果之前，仅当 $κ=1,2$ 时 $\tilde{O}(D)$ 的界限才已知[Parter, Petruschka DISC'22]。对于 $κ\geq 3$，只能通过 $O(\log n)$ 近似算法 [Censor-Hillel、Ghaffari、Kuhn PODC'14] 获得此界限，唯一已知的精确算法需要 $O\left((κΔD)^{O(κ)}\right)$ 轮，其中 $Δ$ 是最大度数 [Parter DISC'19]。我们的结果回答了 Nanongkai、Saranurak 和 Yingchareonthawornchai [STOC'19] 提出的一个悬而未决的问题。 本文提出了一种在分布式网络中高效寻找小顶点割的算法，适用于CONGEST模型。 Yonggang Jiang,Sagnik Mukhopadhyay cs.DS

authors_text: Jason Xinyu Liu,Ziyi Yang,Ifrah Idrees,Sam Liang,Benjamin Schornstein,Stefanie Tellex,Ankit Shah
title: Grounding Complex Natural Language Commands for Temporal Tasks in Unseen Environments
title_zh: 为看不见的环境中的临时任务奠定复杂的自然语言命令的基础
abstract: Grounding navigational commands to linear temporal logic (LTL) leverages its unambiguous semantics for reasoning about long-horizon tasks and verifying the satisfaction of temporal constraints. Existing approaches require training data from the specific environment and landmarks that will be used in natural language to understand commands in those environments. We propose Lang2LTL, a modular system and a software package that leverages large language models (LLMs) to ground temporal navigational commands to LTL specifications in environments without prior language data. We comprehensively evaluate Lang2LTL for five well-defined generalization behaviors. Lang2LTL demonstrates the state-of-the-art ability of a single model to ground navigational commands to diverse temporal specifications in 21 city-scaled environments. Finally, we demonstrate a physical robot using Lang2LTL can follow 52 semantically diverse navigational commands in two indoor environments.
summary: Grounding navigational commands to linear temporal logic (LTL) leverages its unambiguous semantics for reasoning about long-horizon tasks and verifying the satisfaction of temporal constraints. Existing approaches require training data from the specific environment and landmarks that will be used in natural language to understand commands in those environments. We propose Lang2LTL, a modular system and a software package that leverages large language models (LLMs) to ground temporal navigational commands to LTL specifications in environments without prior language data. We comprehensively evaluate Lang2LTL for five well-defined generalization behaviors. Lang2LTL demonstrates the state-of-the-art ability of a single model to ground navigational commands to diverse temporal specifications in 21 city-scaled environments. Finally, we demonstrate a physical robot using Lang2LTL can follow 52 semantically diverse navigational commands in two indoor environments.
abstract_zh: 将导航命令基于线性时序逻辑 (LTL)，利用其明确的语义来推理长范围任务并验证时序约束的满足情况。现有方法需要来自特定环境和地标的训练数据，这些数据将用于自然语言中以理解这些环境中的命令。我们提出了 Lang2LTL，这是一个模块化系统和软件包，它利用大型语言模型 (LLM) 在没有先前语言数据的环境中将时间导航命令落实到 LTL 规范。我们全面评估 Lang2LTL 的五种明确的泛化行为。 Lang2LTL 展示了单一模型在 21 个城市规模环境中根据不同时间规范执行地面导航命令的最先进能力。最后，我们演示了使用 Lang2LTL 的物理机器人可以在两个室内环境中遵循 52 个语义不同的导航命令。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种名为Lang2LTL的模块化系统，利用大语言模型将自然语言导航指令转换为线性时序逻辑（LTL）规范，以在未见过的环境中执行复杂的时间任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖特定环境和地标的数据来理解导航指令，限制了其在新环境中的泛化能力。需要一种无需预先训练数据即可处理复杂时序任务的方法。
AI.method: 通过结合大型语言模型（LLMs）和时序逻辑推理，Lang2LTL直接将自然语言指令转换为LTL规范，无需依赖特定环境的先验数据。
AI.result: Lang2LTL在21个城市规模环境中实现了最先进的单模型泛化能力，并成功指导物理机器人执行52条语义多样的室内导航指令。
AI.conclusion: Lang2LTL证明了基于LLM的时序逻辑生成方法在复杂导航任务中的有效性，为跨环境的自主系统提供了通用解决方案。

authors_text: James Swedeen,Greg Droge,Randall Christensen
title: Fillet-based RRT*: A Rapid Convergence Implementation of RRT* for Curvature Constrained Vehicles
title_zh: 基于圆角的 RRT*：曲率受限车辆的 RRT* 快速收敛实现
comment: 53 pages, 23 figures, submitted to Journal of Intelligent and Robotic Systems
comments: 53 pages, 23 figures, submitted to Journal of Intelligent and Robotic Systems
abstract: Rapidly exploring random trees (RRTs) have proven effective in quickly finding feasible solutions to complex motion planning problems. RRT* is an extension of the RRT algorithm that provides probabilistic asymptotic optimality guarantees when using straight-line motion primitives. This work provides extensions to RRT and RRT* that employ fillets as motion primitives, allowing path curvature constraints to be considered when planning. Two fillets are developed, an arc-based fillet that uses circular arcs to generate paths that respect maximum curvature constraints and a spline-based fillet that uses Bezier curves to additionally respect curvature continuity requirements. Planning with these fillets is shown to far exceed the performance of RRT* using Dubin's path motion primitives, approaching the performance of planning with straight-line path primitives. Path sampling heuristics are also introduced to accelerate convergence for nonholonomic motion planning. Comparisons to established RRT* approaches are made using the Open Motion Planning Library (OMPL).
summary: Rapidly exploring random trees (RRTs) have proven effective in quickly finding feasible solutions to complex motion planning problems. RRT* is an extension of the RRT algorithm that provides probabilistic asymptotic optimality guarantees when using straight-line motion primitives. This work provides extensions to RRT and RRT* that employ fillets as motion primitives, allowing path curvature constraints to be considered when planning. Two fillets are developed, an arc-based fillet that uses circular arcs to generate paths that respect maximum curvature constraints and a spline-based fillet that uses Bezier curves to additionally respect curvature continuity requirements. Planning with these fillets is shown to far exceed the performance of RRT* using Dubin's path motion primitives, approaching the performance of planning with straight-line path primitives. Path sampling heuristics are also introduced to accelerate convergence for nonholonomic motion planning. Comparisons to established RRT* approaches are made using the Open Motion Planning Library (OMPL).
abstract_zh: 事实证明，快速探索随机树 (RRT) 可以有效地快速找到复杂运动规划问题的可行解决方案。 RRT* 是 RRT 算法的扩展，在使用直线运动基元时提供概率渐近最优性保证。这项工作提供了 RRT 和 RRT* 的扩展，使用圆角作为运动基元，允许在规划时考虑路径曲率约束。开发了两种圆角，一种是基于圆弧的圆角，它使用圆弧来生成遵守最大曲率约束的路径，另一种是基于样条线的圆角，它使用贝塞尔曲线来另外遵守曲率连续性要求。使用这些圆角进行规划的性能远远超过使用 Dubin 路径运动基元的 RRT* 的性能，接近使用直线路径基元进行规划的性能。还引入了路径采样启发法来加速非完整运动规划的收敛。使用开放运动规划库 (OMPL) 与现有的 RRT* 方法进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于圆角的RRT*算法，通过引入圆弧和样条曲线作为运动原语，解决曲率约束车辆的路径规划问题。
AI.motivation: 传统RRT*使用直线运动原语无法满足曲率约束，而Dubin路径虽考虑曲率但优化效率低，需改进算法以兼顾曲率约束与规划效率。
AI.method: 设计两种圆角运动原语（圆弧型与贝塞尔曲线型），结合路径采样启发式策略，通过OMPL库对比验证算法性能。
AI.result: 圆角RRT*在曲率约束下规划效率显著优于Dubin路径，接近直线路径的最优性能，且收敛速度更快。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效平衡了曲率约束与路径优化效率，为非完整约束车辆提供了一种快速收敛的路径规划方案。

tldr: 本文提出基于圆角的RRT*算法，通过引入圆弧和样条曲线作为运动原语，解决曲率约束车辆的路径规划问题。
motivation: 传统RRT*使用直线运动原语无法满足曲率约束，而Dubin路径虽考虑曲率但优化效率低，需改进算法以兼顾曲率约束与规划效率。

conclusion: 该方法有效平衡了曲率约束与路径优化效率，为非完整约束车辆提供了一种快速收敛的路径规划方案。
search_text: Fillet-based RRT*: A Rapid Convergence Implementation of RRT* for Curvature Constrained Vehicles 基于圆角的 RRT*：曲率受限车辆的 RRT* 快速收敛实现 Rapidly exploring random trees (RRTs) have proven effective in quickly finding feasible solutions to complex motion planning problems. RRT* is an extension of the RRT algorithm that provides probabilistic asymptotic optimality guarantees when using straight-line motion primitives. This work provides extensions to RRT and RRT* that employ fillets as motion primitives, allowing path curvature constraints to be considered when planning. Two fillets are developed, an arc-based fillet that uses circular arcs to generate paths that respect maximum curvature constraints and a spline-based fillet that uses Bezier curves to additionally respect curvature continuity requirements. Planning with these fillets is shown to far exceed the performance of RRT* using Dubin's path motion primitives, approaching the performance of planning with straight-line path primitives. Path sampling heuristics are also introduced to accelerate convergence for nonholonomic motion planning. Comparisons to established RRT* approaches are made using the Open Motion Planning Library (OMPL). 事实证明，快速探索随机树 (RRT) 可以有效地快速找到复杂运动规划问题的可行解决方案。 RRT* 是 RRT 算法的扩展，在使用直线运动基元时提供概率渐近最优性保证。这项工作提供了 RRT 和 RRT* 的扩展，使用圆角作为运动基元，允许在规划时考虑路径曲率约束。开发了两种圆角，一种是基于圆弧的圆角，它使用圆弧来生成遵守最大曲率约束的路径，另一种是基于样条线的圆角，它使用贝塞尔曲线来另外遵守曲率连续性要求。使用这些圆角进行规划的性能远远超过使用 Dubin 路径运动基元的 RRT* 的性能，接近使用直线路径基元进行规划的性能。还引入了路径采样启发法来加速非完整运动规划的收敛。使用开放运动规划库 (OMPL) 与现有的 RRT* 方法进行比较。 本文提出基于圆角的RRT*算法，通过引入圆弧和样条曲线作为运动原语，解决曲率约束车辆的路径规划问题。 James Swedeen,Greg Droge,Randall Christensen cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Weilin Cong,Si Zhang,Jian Kang,Baichuan Yuan,Hao Wu,Xin Zhou,Hanghang Tong,Mehrdad Mahdavi
title: Do We Really Need Complicated Model Architectures For Temporal Networks?
title_zh: 我们真的需要复杂的时态网络模型架构吗？
abstract: Recurrent neural network (RNN) and self-attention mechanism (SAM) are the de facto methods to extract spatial-temporal information for temporal graph learning. Interestingly, we found that although both RNN and SAM could lead to a good performance, in practice neither of them is always necessary. In this paper, we propose GraphMixer, a conceptually and technically simple architecture that consists of three components: (1) a link-encoder that is only based on multi-layer perceptrons (MLP) to summarize the information from temporal links, (2) a node-encoder that is only based on neighbor mean-pooling to summarize node information, and (3) an MLP-based link classifier that performs link prediction based on the outputs of the encoders. Despite its simplicity, GraphMixer attains an outstanding performance on temporal link prediction benchmarks with faster convergence and better generalization performance. These results motivate us to rethink the importance of simpler model architecture.
summary: Recurrent neural network (RNN) and self-attention mechanism (SAM) are the de facto methods to extract spatial-temporal information for temporal graph learning. Interestingly, we found that although both RNN and SAM could lead to a good performance, in practice neither of them is always necessary. In this paper, we propose GraphMixer, a conceptually and technically simple architecture that consists of three components: (1) a link-encoder that is only based on multi-layer perceptrons (MLP) to summarize the information from temporal links, (2) a node-encoder that is only based on neighbor mean-pooling to summarize node information, and (3) an MLP-based link classifier that performs link prediction based on the outputs of the encoders. Despite its simplicity, GraphMixer attains an outstanding performance on temporal link prediction benchmarks with faster convergence and better generalization performance. These results motivate us to rethink the importance of simpler model architecture.
abstract_zh: 循环神经网络（RNN）和自注意力机制（SAM）是为时间图学习提取时空信息的事实上的方法。有趣的是，我们发现虽然 RNN 和 SAM 都可以带来良好的性能，但实际上它们都不是必需的。在本文中，我们提出了 GraphMixer，一种概念和技术上简单的架构，由三个组件组成：（1）仅基于多层感知器（MLP）来总结时间链接信息的链接编码器，（2）仅基于邻居均值池来总结节点信息的节点编码器，以及（3）基于 MLP 的链接分类器，根据编码器的输出执行链接预测。尽管它很简单，但 GraphMixer 在时间链接预测基准上取得了出色的性能，具有更快的收敛速度和更好的泛化性能。这些结果促使我们重新思考更简单的模型架构的重要性。

AI.tldr: 探讨是否需要复杂模型架构处理时间网络，并提出简单有效的GraphMixer模型用于时间链接预测
AI.motivation: 质疑传统复杂模型（如RNN、SAM）的必要性，探索更简单架构在时间网络任务中的有效性
AI.method: 提出GraphMixer模型，包含基于MLP的link-encoder、邻居均值池化的node-encoder和MLP链接分类器，无需复杂结构
AI.result: 在时间链接预测基准中表现优异，收敛速度快且泛化性能优于复杂模型
AI.conclusion: 简单模型架构在时间网络任务中可能足够有效，挑战传统复杂模型的主导地位

authors_text: Lucia Ballerini
title: Particle Swarm Optimization in 3D Medical Image Registration: A Systematic Review
title_zh: 3D 医学图像配准中的粒子群优化：系统回顾
abstract: Medical image registration seeks to find an optimal spatial transformation that best aligns the underlying anatomical structures. These problems usually require the optimization of a similarity metric. Swarm Intelligence techniques are very effective and efficient optimization methods. This systematic review focuses on 3D medical image registration using Particle Swarm Optimization
summary: Medical image registration seeks to find an optimal spatial transformation that best aligns the underlying anatomical structures. These problems usually require the optimization of a similarity metric. Swarm Intelligence techniques are very effective and efficient optimization methods. This systematic review focuses on 3D medical image registration using Particle Swarm Optimization
abstract_zh: 医学图像配准旨在找到最能对齐底层解剖结构的最佳空间变换。这些问题通常需要优化相似性度量。群体智能技术是非常有效且高效的优化方法。本系统综述重点关注使用粒子群优化的 3D 医学图像配准

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了粒子群优化算法在三维医学图像配准中的应用。
AI.motivation: 医学图像配准需要高效优化方法以对齐解剖结构，而粒子群优化（PSO）作为群体智能技术具有高效性优势。
AI.method: 通过系统综述方法，分析现有文献中PSO在三维医学图像配准中的实现方式与优化效果。
AI.result: 总结了PSO在三维配准中的性能表现，验证了其在处理复杂变换和优化相似性度量方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: PSO为三维医学图像配准提供了可靠优化方案，未来需进一步探索其改进算法与临床应用结合。

authors_text: Angie Zhang,Olympia Walker,Kaci Nguyen,Jiajun Dai,Anqing Chen,Min Kyung Lee
title: Deliberating with AI: Improving Decision-Making for the Future through Participatory AI Design and Stakeholder Deliberation
title_zh: 人工智能审议：通过参与式人工智能设计和利益相关者审议改进未来决策
abstract: Research exploring how to support decision-making has often used machine learning to automate or assist human decisions. We take an alternative approach for improving decision-making, using machine learning to help stakeholders surface ways to improve and make fairer decision-making processes. We created "Deliberating with AI", a web tool that enables people to create and evaluate ML models in order to examine strengths and shortcomings of past decision-making and deliberate on how to improve future decisions. We apply this tool to a context of people selection, having stakeholders -- decision makers (faculty) and decision subjects (students) -- use the tool to improve graduate school admission decisions. Through our case study, we demonstrate how the stakeholders used the web tool to create ML models that they used as boundary objects to deliberate over organization decision-making practices. We share insights from our study to inform future research on stakeholder-centered participatory AI design and technology for organizational decision-making.
summary: Research exploring how to support decision-making has often used machine learning to automate or assist human decisions. We take an alternative approach for improving decision-making, using machine learning to help stakeholders surface ways to improve and make fairer decision-making processes. We created "Deliberating with AI", a web tool that enables people to create and evaluate ML models in order to examine strengths and shortcomings of past decision-making and deliberate on how to improve future decisions. We apply this tool to a context of people selection, having stakeholders -- decision makers (faculty) and decision subjects (students) -- use the tool to improve graduate school admission decisions. Through our case study, we demonstrate how the stakeholders used the web tool to create ML models that they used as boundary objects to deliberate over organization decision-making practices. We share insights from our study to inform future research on stakeholder-centered participatory AI design and technology for organizational decision-making.
abstract_zh: 探索如何支持决策的研究经常使用机器学习来自动化或辅助人类决策。我们采用另一种方法来改进决策，利用机器学习帮助利益相关者找到改进和制定更公平决策流程的方法。我们创建了“Deliberating with AI”，这是一种网络工具，使人们能够创建和评估 ML 模型，以便检查过去决策的优点和缺点，并思考如何改进未来的决策。我们将该工具应用于人员选择的背景下，让利益相关者——决策者（教师）和决策主体（学生）——使用该工具来改进研究生院的录取决策。通过我们的案例研究，我们展示了利益相关者如何使用网络工具创建机器学习模型，并将其用作边界对象来审议组织决策实践。我们分享研究中的见解，为未来以利益相关者为中心的参与式人工智能设计和组织决策技术的研究提供信息。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过参与式AI设计和利益相关者协商改进决策过程的方法，开发了名为'Deliberating with AI'的网络工具，并在研究生招生场景中验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注机器学习自动化决策，而本文认为应通过AI支持利益相关者参与，提升决策过程的公平性和改进空间。
AI.method: 开发'Deliberating with AI'工具，使利益相关者（如教职员工与学生）创建和评估机器学习模型，作为协商组织决策实践的边界对象。
AI.result: 案例研究表明，工具帮助利益相关者识别决策优缺点，并通过模型协商改进招生流程，为未来参与式AI设计提供实践洞察。
AI.conclusion: 通过工具促进多方参与和AI模型协商，可有效改进组织决策过程，为构建更公平的决策系统提供方法论参考。

tldr: 本文提出一种通过参与式AI设计和利益相关者协商改进决策过程的方法，开发了名为'Deliberating with AI'的网络工具，并在研究生招生场景中验证其有效性。
motivation: 现有研究多关注机器学习自动化决策，而本文认为应通过AI支持利益相关者参与，提升决策过程的公平性和改进空间。
method: 开发'Deliberating with AI'工具，使利益相关者（如教职员工与学生）创建和评估机器学习模型，作为协商组织决策实践的边界对象。
result: 案例研究表明，工具帮助利益相关者识别决策优缺点，并通过模型协商改进招生流程，为未来参与式AI设计提供实践洞察。
conclusion: 通过工具促进多方参与和AI模型协商，可有效改进组织决策过程，为构建更公平的决策系统提供方法论参考。
search_text: Deliberating with AI: Improving Decision-Making for the Future through Participatory AI Design and Stakeholder Deliberation 人工智能审议：通过参与式人工智能设计和利益相关者审议改进未来决策 Research exploring how to support decision-making has often used machine learning to automate or assist human decisions. We take an alternative approach for improving decision-making, using machine learning to help stakeholders surface ways to improve and make fairer decision-making processes. We created "Deliberating with AI", a web tool that enables people to create and evaluate ML models in order to examine strengths and shortcomings of past decision-making and deliberate on how to improve future decisions. We apply this tool to a context of people selection, having stakeholders -- decision makers (faculty) and decision subjects (students) -- use the tool to improve graduate school admission decisions. Through our case study, we demonstrate how the stakeholders used the web tool to create ML models that they used as boundary objects to deliberate over organization decision-making practices. We share insights from our study to inform future research on stakeholder-centered participatory AI design and technology for organizational decision-making. 探索如何支持决策的研究经常使用机器学习来自动化或辅助人类决策。我们采用另一种方法来改进决策，利用机器学习帮助利益相关者找到改进和制定更公平决策流程的方法。我们创建了“Deliberating with AI”，这是一种网络工具，使人们能够创建和评估 ML 模型，以便检查过去决策的优点和缺点，并思考如何改进未来的决策。我们将该工具应用于人员选择的背景下，让利益相关者——决策者（教师）和决策主体（学生）——使用该工具来改进研究生院的录取决策。通过我们的案例研究，我们展示了利益相关者如何使用网络工具创建机器学习模型，并将其用作边界对象来审议组织决策实践。我们分享研究中的见解，为未来以利益相关者为中心的参与式人工智能设计和组织决策技术的研究提供信息。 本文提出一种通过参与式AI设计和利益相关者协商改进决策过程的方法，开发了名为'Deliberating with AI'的网络工具，并在研究生招生场景中验证其有效性。 Angie Zhang,Olympia Walker,Kaci Nguyen,Jiajun Dai,Anqing Chen,Min Kyung Lee cs.HC

authors_text: Beomseok Kang,Biswadeep Chakraborty,Saibal Mukhopadhyay
title: Unsupervised 3D Object Learning through Neuron Activity aware Plasticity
title_zh: 通过神经元活动感知可塑性进行无监督 3D 对象学习
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2023
comments: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2023
abstract: We present an unsupervised deep learning model for 3D object classification. Conventional Hebbian learning, a well-known unsupervised model, suffers from loss of local features leading to reduced performance for tasks with complex geometric objects. We present a deep network with a novel Neuron Activity Aware (NeAW) Hebbian learning rule that dynamically switches the neurons to be governed by Hebbian learning or anti-Hebbian learning, depending on its activity. We analytically show that NeAW Hebbian learning relieves the bias in neuron activity, allowing more neurons to attend to the representation of the 3D objects. Empirical results show that the NeAW Hebbian learning outperforms other variants of Hebbian learning and shows higher accuracy over fully supervised models when training data is limited.
summary: We present an unsupervised deep learning model for 3D object classification. Conventional Hebbian learning, a well-known unsupervised model, suffers from loss of local features leading to reduced performance for tasks with complex geometric objects. We present a deep network with a novel Neuron Activity Aware (NeAW) Hebbian learning rule that dynamically switches the neurons to be governed by Hebbian learning or anti-Hebbian learning, depending on its activity. We analytically show that NeAW Hebbian learning relieves the bias in neuron activity, allowing more neurons to attend to the representation of the 3D objects. Empirical results show that the NeAW Hebbian learning outperforms other variants of Hebbian learning and shows higher accuracy over fully supervised models when training data is limited.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种用于 3D 对象分类的无监督深度学习模型。传统的赫布学习是一种众所周知的无监督模型，它会丢失局部特征，从而导致复杂几何对象任务的性能下降。我们提出了一个具有新颖的神经元活动感知（NeAW）赫布学习规则的深度网络，该规则根据其活动动态切换神经元以受赫布学习或反赫布学习控制。我们分析表明，NeAW Hebbian 学习消除了神经元活动的偏差，允许更多神经元关注 3D 对象的表示。实证结果表明，NeAW Hebbian 学习优于 Hebbian 学习的其他变体，并且在训练数据有限时比完全监督模型显示出更高的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督深度学习模型用于3D物体分类，通过改进Hebbian学习规则解决传统方法在复杂几何任务中的性能缺陷。
AI.motivation: 传统Hebbian学习因丢失局部特征导致处理复杂几何物体时性能下降，需改进学习机制以提升表征能力。
AI.method: 设计神经元活动感知（NeAW）Hebbian规则，根据神经元活动动态切换Hebbian/反Hebbian学习，缓解神经元活动偏差。
AI.result: NeAW方法在有限训练数据下优于其他Hebbian变体及全监督模型，分类准确率更高。
AI.conclusion: 动态调整神经元学习规则可有效提升无监督3D物体分类性能，尤其在数据稀缺场景表现突出。

authors_text: Guillaume Ducoffe,Laurent Feuilloley,Michel Habib,François Pitois
title: Pattern detection in ordered graphs
title_zh: 有序图中的模式检测
abstract: A popular way to define or characterize graph classes is via forbidden subgraphs or forbidden minors. These characterizations play a key role in graph theory, but they rarely lead to efficient algorithms to recognize these classes. In contrast, many essential graph classes can be recognized efficiently thanks to characterizations of the following form: there must exist an ordering of the vertices such that some ordered pattern does not appear, where a pattern is basically an ordered subgraph. These pattern characterizations have been studied for decades, but there have been recent efforts to better understand them systematically. In this paper, we focus on a simple problem at the core of this topic: given an ordered graph of size $n$, how fast can we detect whether a fixed pattern of size $k$ is present? Following the literature on graph classes recognition, we first look for patterns that can be detected in linear time. We prove, among other results, that almost all patterns on three vertices (which capture many interesting classes, such as interval, chordal, split, bipartite, and comparability graphs) fall in this category. Then, in a finer-grained complexity perspective, we prove conditional lower bounds for this problem. In particular we show that for a large family of patterns on four vertices it is unlikely that subquadratic algorithm exist. Finally, we define a parameter for patterns, the merge-width, and prove that for patterns of merge-width $t$, one can solve the problem in $O(n^{ct})$ for some constant~$c$. As a corollary, we get that detecting outerplanar patterns and other classes of patterns can be done in time independent of the size of the pattern.
summary: A popular way to define or characterize graph classes is via forbidden subgraphs or forbidden minors. These characterizations play a key role in graph theory, but they rarely lead to efficient algorithms to recognize these classes. In contrast, many essential graph classes can be recognized efficiently thanks to characterizations of the following form: there must exist an ordering of the vertices such that some ordered pattern does not appear, where a pattern is basically an ordered subgraph. These pattern characterizations have been studied for decades, but there have been recent efforts to better understand them systematically. In this paper, we focus on a simple problem at the core of this topic: given an ordered graph of size $n$, how fast can we detect whether a fixed pattern of size $k$ is present? Following the literature on graph classes recognition, we first look for patterns that can be detected in linear time. We prove, among other results, that almost all patterns on three vertices (which capture many interesting classes, such as interval, chordal, split, bipartite, and comparability graphs) fall in this category. Then, in a finer-grained complexity perspective, we prove conditional lower bounds for this problem. In particular we show that for a large family of patterns on four vertices it is unlikely that subquadratic algorithm exist. Finally, we define a parameter for patterns, the merge-width, and prove that for patterns of merge-width $t$, one can solve the problem in $O(n^{ct})$ for some constant~$c$. As a corollary, we get that detecting outerplanar patterns and other classes of patterns can be done in time independent of the size of the pattern.
abstract_zh: 定义或表征图类的一种流行方法是通过禁止子图或禁止子图。这些特征在图论中发挥着关键作用，但它们很少导致有效的算法来识别这些类。相反，由于以下形式的特征，许多基本图类可以被有效地识别：必须存在顶点的排序，使得某些有序模式不会出现，其中模式基本上是有序子图。这些模式表征已经被研究了几十年，但最近人们努力更好地系统地理解它们。在本文中，我们关注本主题核心的一个简单问题：给定大小为 $n$ 的有序图，我们能够多快地检测大小为 $k$ 的固定模式是否存在？根据有关图类识别的文献，我们首先寻找可以在线性时间内检测到的模式。除其他结果外，我们证明三个顶点上的几乎所有模式（捕获许多有趣的类，例如区间图、弦图、分裂图、二分图和可比图）都属于这一类别。然后，从更细粒度的复杂性角度来看，我们证明了该问题的条件下界。特别是，我们表明，对于四个顶点上的一大类模式，次二次算法不太可能存在。最后，我们为模式定义一个参数，即合并宽度，并证明对于合并宽度 $t$ 的模式，对于某个常量 ~$c$ 可以在 $O(n^{ct})$ 中解决问题。作为推论，我们发现检测外平面图案和其他类别的图案可以及时完成，而与图案的大小无关。

AI.tldr: 研究有序图中固定模式（模式即有序子图）的检测问题，即给定大小为n的有序图，检测其中是否包含大小为k的固定模式。
AI.motivation: 图类通常通过禁止子图或禁制子式来定义，但这些刻画很少能带来高效识别算法；而通过顶点排序和禁止有序模式的方式可以高效识别许多重要图类。本文旨在系统性地理解有序模式检测问题的计算复杂度。
AI.method: 本文从三个角度展开研究：首先寻找能在线性时间内检测的模式（如几乎所有三顶点模式）；其次从细粒度复杂度角度证明某些四顶点模式难以达到亚二次时间；最后定义模式参数"合并宽度（merge-width）"，并证明对于合并宽度为t的模式，可在O(n^{ct})时间内解决问题。
AI.result: 几乎所有三顶点模式可在线性时间内检测；大量四顶点模式在细粒度复杂度下难以存在亚二次算法；对于合并宽度为t的模式，存在O(n^{ct})的算法，且外平面模式等类别可在与模式大小无关的时间内完成检测。
AI.conclusion: 本文系统性地刻画了有序模式检测问题的复杂度边界，给出了线性可检测模式与条件困难模式的分类，并引入合并宽度参数为更复杂的模式检测提供了统一的算法框架。

Finally, we define a parameter for patterns, the merge-width, and prove that for patterns of merge-width $t$, one can solve the problem in $O(n^{ct})$ for some constant~$c$. As a corollary, we get that detecting outerplanar patterns and other classes of patterns can be done in time independent of the size of the pattern. 定义或表征图类的一种流行方法是通过禁止子图或禁止子图。这些特征在图论中发挥着关键作用，但它们很少导致有效的算法来识别这些类。相反，由于以下形式的特征，许多基本图类可以被有效地识别：必须存在顶点的排序，使得某些有序模式不会出现，其中模式基本上是有序子图。这些模式表征已经被研究了几十年，但最近人们努力更好地系统地理解它们。在本文中，我们关注本主题核心的一个简单问题：给定大小为 $n$ 的有序图，我们能够多快地检测大小为 $k$ 的固定模式是否存在？根据有关图类识别的文献，我们首先寻找可以在线性时间内检测到的模式。除其他结果外，我们证明三个顶点上的几乎所有模式（捕获许多有趣的类，例如区间图、弦图、分裂图、二分图和可比图）都属于这一类别。然后，从更细粒度的复杂性角度来看，我们证明了该问题的条件下界。特别是，我们表明，对于四个顶点上的一大类模式，次二次算法不太可能存在。最后，我们为模式定义一个参数，即合并宽度，并证明对于合并宽度 $t$ 的模式，对于某个常量 ~$c$ 可以在 $O(n^{ct})$ 中解决问题。作为推论，我们发现检测外平面图案和其他类别的图案可以及时完成，而与图案的大小无关。 研究有序图中固定模式（模式即有序子图）的检测问题，即给定大小为n的有序图，检测其中是否包含大小为k的固定模式。 Guillaume Ducoffe,Laurent Feuilloley,Michel Habib,François Pitois cs.DS,cs.DM

authors_text: Biswadeep Chakraborty,Saibal Mukhopadhyay
title: Heterogeneous Neuronal and Synaptic Dynamics for Spike-Efficient Unsupervised Learning: Theory and Design Principles
title_zh: 用于峰值效率无监督学习的异质神经元和突触动力学：理论和设计原则
abstract: This paper shows that the heterogeneity in neuronal and synaptic dynamics reduces the spiking activity of a Recurrent Spiking Neural Network (RSNN) while improving prediction performance, enabling spike-efficient (unsupervised) learning. We analytically show that the diversity in neurons' integration/relaxation dynamics improves an RSNN's ability to learn more distinct input patterns (higher memory capacity), leading to improved classification and prediction performance. We further prove that heterogeneous Spike-Timing-Dependent-Plasticity (STDP) dynamics of synapses reduce spiking activity but preserve memory capacity. The analytical results motivate Heterogeneous RSNN design using Bayesian optimization to determine heterogeneity in neurons and synapses to improve $\mathcal{E}$, defined as the ratio of spiking activity and memory capacity. The empirical results on time series classification and prediction tasks show that optimized HRSNN increases performance and reduces spiking activity compared to a homogeneous RSNN.
summary: This paper shows that the heterogeneity in neuronal and synaptic dynamics reduces the spiking activity of a Recurrent Spiking Neural Network (RSNN) while improving prediction performance, enabling spike-efficient (unsupervised) learning. We analytically show that the diversity in neurons' integration/relaxation dynamics improves an RSNN's ability to learn more distinct input patterns (higher memory capacity), leading to improved classification and prediction performance. We further prove that heterogeneous Spike-Timing-Dependent-Plasticity (STDP) dynamics of synapses reduce spiking activity but preserve memory capacity. The analytical results motivate Heterogeneous RSNN design using Bayesian optimization to determine heterogeneity in neurons and synapses to improve $\mathcal{E}$, defined as the ratio of spiking activity and memory capacity. The empirical results on time series classification and prediction tasks show that optimized HRSNN increases performance and reduces spiking activity compared to a homogeneous RSNN.
abstract_zh: 本文表明，神经元和突触动力学的异质性减少了循环尖峰神经网络（RSNN）的尖峰活动，同时提高了预测性能，从而实现尖峰高效（无监督）学习。我们分析表明，神经元整合/松弛动力学的多样性提高了 RSNN 学习更独特的输入模式（更高的记忆容量）的能力，从而提高了分类和预测性能。我们进一步证明，突触的异质尖峰时序依赖性可塑性（STDP）动力学减少了尖峰活动，但保留了记忆容量。分析结果激励异构 RSNN 设计使用贝叶斯优化来确定神经元和突触的异质性，以提高 $\mathcal{E}$（定义为尖峰活动与记忆容量的比率）。时间序列分类和预测任务的实证结果表明，与同质 RSNN 相比，优化的 HRSNN 提高了性能并减少了尖峰活动。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出通过引入神经元和突触动态的异质性，实现脉冲高效（无监督）学习的递归脉冲神经网络（RSNN）设计原理。
AI.motivation: 传统RSNN存在脉冲活动高、学习效率低的问题，异质性动态可能提升记忆容量并降低脉冲频率，从而优化无监督学习性能。
AI.method: 通过分析证明神经元积分/弛豫动态多样性与异质性STDP机制对记忆容量的影响，结合贝叶斯优化确定异质性参数，设计异质性RSNN（HRSNN）。
AI.result: 在时间序列分类与预测任务中，优化后的HRSNN相较同质性RSNN显著提升性能并降低脉冲活动。
AI.conclusion: 异质性RSNN通过平衡脉冲效率与记忆容量，为无监督学习提供了更优的理论框架与设计原则。

authors_text: Alan Papalia,Andrew Fishberg,Brendan W. O'Neill,Jonathan P. How,David M. Rosen,John J. Leonard
title: Certifiably Correct Range-Aided SLAM
title_zh: 可证明正确的范围辅助 SLAM
abstract: We present the first algorithm to efficiently compute certifiably optimal solutions to range-aided simultaneous localization and mapping (RA-SLAM) problems. Robotic navigation systems increasingly incorporate point-to-point ranging sensors, leading to state estimation problems in the form of RA-SLAM. However, the RA-SLAM problem is significantly more difficult to solve than traditional pose-graph SLAM: ranging sensor models introduce non-convexity and single range measurements do not uniquely determine the transform between the involved sensors. As a result, RA-SLAM inference is sensitive to initial estimates yet lacks reliable initialization techniques. Our approach, certifiably correct RA-SLAM (CORA), leverages a novel quadratically constrained quadratic programming (QCQP) formulation of RA-SLAM to relax the RA-SLAM problem to a semidefinite program (SDP). CORA solves the SDP efficiently using the Riemannian Staircase methodology; the SDP solution provides both (i) a lower bound on the RA-SLAM problem's optimal value, and (ii) an approximate solution of the RA-SLAM problem, which can be subsequently refined using local optimization. CORA applies to problems with arbitrary pose-pose, pose-landmark, and ranging measurements and, due to using convex relaxation, is insensitive to initialization. We evaluate CORA on several real-world problems. In contrast to state-of-the-art approaches, CORA is able to obtain high-quality solutions on all problems despite being initialized with random values. Additionally, we study the tightness of the SDP relaxation with respect to important problem parameters: the number of (i) robots, (ii) landmarks, and (iii) range measurements. These experiments demonstrate that the SDP relaxation is often tight and reveal relationships between graph connectivity and the tightness of the SDP relaxation.
summary: We present the first algorithm to efficiently compute certifiably optimal solutions to range-aided simultaneous localization and mapping (RA-SLAM) problems. Robotic navigation systems increasingly incorporate point-to-point ranging sensors, leading to state estimation problems in the form of RA-SLAM. However, the RA-SLAM problem is significantly more difficult to solve than traditional pose-graph SLAM: ranging sensor models introduce non-convexity and single range measurements do not uniquely determine the transform between the involved sensors. As a result, RA-SLAM inference is sensitive to initial estimates yet lacks reliable initialization techniques. Our approach, certifiably correct RA-SLAM (CORA), leverages a novel quadratically constrained quadratic programming (QCQP) formulation of RA-SLAM to relax the RA-SLAM problem to a semidefinite program (SDP). CORA solves the SDP efficiently using the Riemannian Staircase methodology; the SDP solution provides both (i) a lower bound on the RA-SLAM problem's optimal value, and (ii) an approximate solution of the RA-SLAM problem, which can be subsequently refined using local optimization. CORA applies to problems with arbitrary pose-pose, pose-landmark, and ranging measurements and, due to using convex relaxation, is insensitive to initialization. We evaluate CORA on several real-world problems. In contrast to state-of-the-art approaches, CORA is able to obtain high-quality solutions on all problems despite being initialized with random values. Additionally, we study the tightness of the SDP relaxation with respect to important problem parameters: the number of (i) robots, (ii) landmarks, and (iii) range measurements. These experiments demonstrate that the SDP relaxation is often tight and reveal relationships between graph connectivity and the tightness of the SDP relaxation.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了第一个算法，可以有效地计算范围辅助同步定位和建图（RA-SLAM）问题的可证明最佳解决方案。机器人导航系统越来越多地采用点对点测距传感器，从而导致 RA-SLAM 形式的状态估计问题。然而，RA-SLAM 问题比传统的位姿图 SLAM 更难解决：测距传感器模型引入了非凸性，并且单一测距测量不能唯一地确定所涉及传感器之间的变换。因此，RA-SLAM 推理对初始估计很敏感，但缺乏可靠的初始化技术。我们的方法可证明是正确的 RA-SLAM (CORA)，利用 RA-SLAM 的新颖二次约束二次规划 (QCQP) 公式将 RA-SLAM 问题放松为半定规划 (SDP)。 CORA 使用黎曼阶梯法有效求解 SDP； SDP 解决方案提供了 (i) RA-SLAM 问题最优值的下界，以及 (ii) RA-SLAM 问题的近似解，随后可以使用局部优化对其进行细化。 CORA 适用于任意姿势-姿势、姿势-地标和测距测量的问题，并且由于使用凸松弛，对初始化不敏感。我们根据几个现实问题评估 CORA。与最先进的方法相比，CORA 能够获得所有问题的高质量解决方案，尽管使用随机值进行初始化。此外，我们还研究了 SDP 松弛对于重要问题参数的严格性：(i) 机器人的数量、(ii) 地标和 (iii) 范围测量。这些实验表明，SDP 松弛通常是紧密的，并揭示了图连通性与 SDP 松弛的紧密度之间的关系。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效计算范围辅助SLAM（RA-SLAM）问题的可证明最优解的算法CORA。
AI.motivation: 传统RA-SLAM因范围传感器模型引入的非凸性和初始化敏感性，缺乏可靠解决方案，需解决初始化依赖和优化鲁棒性问题。
AI.method: 通过将RA-SLAM转化为半定规划（SDP）问题，结合Riemannian Staircase方法求解，提供最优值下界和近似解，并通过局部优化细化结果。
AI.result: CORA在随机初始化下均能获得高质量解，实验验证SDP松弛在机器人数量、地标数及范围测量数等参数下具有较高紧致性。
AI.conclusion: CORA通过凸松弛方法有效解决了RA-SLAM的初始化敏感性问题，为复杂场景提供鲁棒且可证明正确的SLAM解决方案。

These experiments demonstrate that the SDP relaxation is often tight and reveal relationships between graph connectivity and the tightness of the SDP relaxation. 我们提出了第一个算法，可以有效地计算范围辅助同步定位和建图（RA-SLAM）问题的可证明最佳解决方案。机器人导航系统越来越多地采用点对点测距传感器，从而导致 RA-SLAM 形式的状态估计问题。然而，RA-SLAM 问题比传统的位姿图 SLAM 更难解决：测距传感器模型引入了非凸性，并且单一测距测量不能唯一地确定所涉及传感器之间的变换。因此，RA-SLAM 推理对初始估计很敏感，但缺乏可靠的初始化技术。我们的方法可证明是正确的 RA-SLAM (CORA)，利用 RA-SLAM 的新颖二次约束二次规划 (QCQP) 公式将 RA-SLAM 问题放松为半定规划 (SDP)。 CORA 使用黎曼阶梯法有效求解 SDP； SDP 解决方案提供了 (i) RA-SLAM 问题最优值的下界，以及 (ii) RA-SLAM 问题的近似解，随后可以使用局部优化对其进行细化。 CORA 适用于任意姿势-姿势、姿势-地标和测距测量的问题，并且由于使用凸松弛，对初始化不敏感。我们根据几个现实问题评估 CORA。与最先进的方法相比，CORA 能够获得所有问题的高质量解决方案，尽管使用随机值进行初始化。此外，我们还研究了 SDP 松弛对于重要问题参数的严格性：(i) 机器人的数量、(ii) 地标和 (iii) 范围测量。这些实验表明，SDP 松弛通常是紧密的，并揭示了图连通性与 SDP 松弛的紧密度之间的关系。 本文提出一种高效计算范围辅助SLAM（RA-SLAM）问题的可证明最优解的算法CORA。 Alan Papalia,Andrew Fishberg,Brendan W. O'Neill,Jonathan P. How,David M. Rosen,John J. Leonard cs.RO

authors_text: Zineb Benhmidouch,Saad Moufid,Aissam Ait Omar
title: Kinematics and Dynamics Modeling of 7 Degrees of Freedom Human Lower Limb Using Dual Quaternions Algebra
title_zh: 使用对偶四元数代数对人体下肢 7 自由度进行运动学和动力学建模
abstract: Denavit and Hartenberg-based methods, such as Cardan, Fick, and Euler angles, describe the position and orientation of an end-effector in three-dimensional (3D) space. However, these methods have a significant drawback as they impose a well-defined rotation order, which can lead to the generation of unrealistic human postures in joint space. To address this issue, dual quaternions can be used for homogeneous transformations. Quaternions are known for their computational efficiency in representing rotations, but they cannot handle translations in 3D space. Dual numbers extend quaternions to dual quaternions, which can manage both rotations and translations. This paper exploits dual quaternion theory to provide a fast and accurate solution for the forward and inverse kinematics and the recursive Newton-Euler dynamics algorithm for a 7-degree-of-freedom (DOF) human lower limb in 3D space.
summary: Denavit and Hartenberg-based methods, such as Cardan, Fick, and Euler angles, describe the position and orientation of an end-effector in three-dimensional (3D) space. However, these methods have a significant drawback as they impose a well-defined rotation order, which can lead to the generation of unrealistic human postures in joint space. To address this issue, dual quaternions can be used for homogeneous transformations. Quaternions are known for their computational efficiency in representing rotations, but they cannot handle translations in 3D space. Dual numbers extend quaternions to dual quaternions, which can manage both rotations and translations. This paper exploits dual quaternion theory to provide a fast and accurate solution for the forward and inverse kinematics and the recursive Newton-Euler dynamics algorithm for a 7-degree-of-freedom (DOF) human lower limb in 3D space.
abstract_zh: 基于 Denavit 和 Hartenberg 的方法（例如卡丹角、菲克角和欧拉角）描述了三维 (3D) 空间中末端执行器的位置和方向。然而，这些方法有一个显着的缺点，因为它们强加了明确定义的旋转顺序，这可能导致在关节空间中生成不切实际的人体姿势。为了解决这个问题，可以使用对偶四元数进行齐次变换。四元数以其表示旋转的计算效率而闻名，但它们无法处理 3D 空间中的平移。对偶数将四元数扩展为双四元数，可以管理旋转和平移。本文利用对偶四元数理论为 3D 空间中 7 自由度 (DOF) 人体下肢的正向和逆向运动学以及递归牛顿-欧拉动力学算法提供快速准确的解。

AI.tldr: 本文利用双四元数代数建立7自由度人体下肢的运动学和动力学模型，解决传统方法在关节空间中生成不真实姿态的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统Denavit-Hartenberg方法（如卡丹角、菲克角、欧拉角）因强制旋转顺序可能导致人体姿态不真实，需寻找能同时处理旋转和平移的高效方法。
AI.method: 基于双四元数理论，结合牛顿-欧拉递归动力学算法，实现7自由度下肢的正逆运动学及动力学建模。
AI.result: 提出了一种快速准确的3D空间下肢运动学和动力学求解方法，克服了传统方法的旋转顺序限制问题。
AI.conclusion: 双四元数能有效处理三维空间中的旋转和平移，为复杂人体运动建模提供了更优的数学工具。

authors_text: Rodrigue de Schaetzen,Alexander Botros,Robert Gash,Kevin Murrant,Stephen L. Smith
title: Real-Time Navigation for Autonomous Surface Vehicles In Ice-Covered Waters
title_zh: 冰雪覆盖水域中自主水面车辆的实时导航
abstract: Vessel transit in ice-covered waters poses unique challenges in safe and efficient motion planning. When the concentration of ice is high, it may not be possible to find collision-free trajectories. Instead, ice can be pushed out of the way if it is small or if contact occurs near the edge of the ice. In this work, we propose a real-time navigation framework that minimizes collisions with ice and distance travelled by the vessel. We exploit a lattice-based planner with a cost that captures the ship interaction with ice. To address the dynamic nature of the environment, we plan motion in a receding horizon manner based on updated vessel and ice state information. Further, we present a novel planning heuristic for evaluating the cost-to-go, which is applicable to navigation in a channel without a fixed goal location. The performance of our planner is evaluated across several levels of ice concentration both in simulated and in real-world experiments.
summary: Vessel transit in ice-covered waters poses unique challenges in safe and efficient motion planning. When the concentration of ice is high, it may not be possible to find collision-free trajectories. Instead, ice can be pushed out of the way if it is small or if contact occurs near the edge of the ice. In this work, we propose a real-time navigation framework that minimizes collisions with ice and distance travelled by the vessel. We exploit a lattice-based planner with a cost that captures the ship interaction with ice. To address the dynamic nature of the environment, we plan motion in a receding horizon manner based on updated vessel and ice state information. Further, we present a novel planning heuristic for evaluating the cost-to-go, which is applicable to navigation in a channel without a fixed goal location. The performance of our planner is evaluated across several levels of ice concentration both in simulated and in real-world experiments.
abstract_zh: 船舶在冰雪覆盖的水域中航行对安全、高效的运动规划提出了独特的挑战。当冰浓度很高时，可能无法找到无碰撞的轨迹。相反，如果冰很小或者接触发生在冰边缘附近，则可以将其推开。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个实时导航框架，可以最大限度地减少与冰的碰撞和船舶行驶的距离。我们利用基于格子的规划器，其成本捕获了船舶与冰的相互作用。为了解决环境的动态性质，我们根据更新的船只和冰状态信息以地平线后退的方式规划运动。此外，我们提出了一种用于评估行驶成本的新颖规划启发式，适用于在没有固定目标位置的通道中导航。我们的规划器的性能是在模拟和现实实验中针对多个冰浓度水平进行评估的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于冰封水域自主水面船舶的实时导航框架，通过最小化碰撞和航行距离来解决冰层高浓度环境下的路径规划问题。
AI.motivation: 在冰封水域中，传统路径规划方法难以应对高浓度冰层的动态障碍物特性，需开发能实时处理冰-船交互并适应环境变化的导航策略。
AI.method: 基于格点规划器设计成本函数量化船体与冰的相互作用，结合滚动时域方法动态更新船舶与冰的状态信息，并提出适用于无固定目标通道的新型成本估算启发式算法。
AI.result: 在不同冰浓度的仿真与实地实验中验证了规划器的有效性，表明其能在保证安全的前提下实现高效路径规划。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过融合动态环境感知与优化规划算法，为冰封水域自主船舶提供了可行的实时导航解决方案。

authors_text: Savio Rozario,George Čevora
title: Explainable AI does not provide the explanations end-users are asking for
title_zh: 可解释的人工智能无法提供最终用户所要求的解释
abstract: Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) techniques are frequently required by users in many AI systems with the goal of understanding complex models, their associated predictions, and gaining trust. While suitable for some specific tasks during development, their adoption by organisations to enhance trust in machine learning systems has unintended consequences. In this paper we discuss XAI's limitations in deployment and conclude that transparency alongside with rigorous validation are better suited to gaining trust in AI systems.
summary: Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) techniques are frequently required by users in many AI systems with the goal of understanding complex models, their associated predictions, and gaining trust. While suitable for some specific tasks during development, their adoption by organisations to enhance trust in machine learning systems has unintended consequences. In this paper we discuss XAI's limitations in deployment and conclude that transparency alongside with rigorous validation are better suited to gaining trust in AI systems.
abstract_zh: 许多 AI 系统中的用户经常需要可解释的人工智能 (XAI) 技术，目的是理解复杂模型及其相关预测并获得信任。虽然适合开发过程中的某些特定任务，但组织采用它们来增强对机器学习系统的信任会产生意想不到的后果。在本文中，我们讨论了 XAI 在部署方面的局限性，并得出结论：透明度和严格的验证更适合赢得对 AI 系统的信任。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了可解释人工智能（XAI）在实际部署中的局限性，并提出透明度与严格验证更利于建立AI系统信任。
AI.motivation: 尽管XAI技术被广泛用于开发阶段，但其在组织实际应用中可能产生负面效果，需重新评估其有效性。
AI.method: 通过分析XAI技术的现有应用案例与局限性，结合对信任机制的理论探讨。
AI.result: 发现XAI在部署阶段难以满足终端用户需求，透明度与验证流程更能有效提升AI系统可信度。
AI.conclusion: 应优先通过系统透明度和严谨验证来建立AI信任，而非单纯依赖XAI解释技术。

ai_content.tldr: 本文探讨了可解释人工智能（XAI）在实际部署中的局限性，并提出透明度与严格验证更利于建立AI系统信任。

ai_content.method: 通过分析XAI技术的现有应用案例与局限性，结合对信任机制的理论探讨。

search_text: Explainable AI does not provide the explanations end-users are asking for 可解释的人工智能无法提供最终用户所要求的解释 Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) techniques are frequently required by users in many AI systems with the goal of understanding complex models, their associated predictions, and gaining trust. While suitable for some specific tasks during development, their adoption by organisations to enhance trust in machine learning systems has unintended consequences. In this paper we discuss XAI's limitations in deployment and conclude that transparency alongside with rigorous validation are better suited to gaining trust in AI systems. 许多 AI 系统中的用户经常需要可解释的人工智能 (XAI) 技术，目的是理解复杂模型及其相关预测并获得信任。虽然适合开发过程中的某些特定任务，但组织采用它们来增强对机器学习系统的信任会产生意想不到的后果。在本文中，我们讨论了 XAI 在部署方面的局限性，并得出结论：透明度和严格的验证更适合赢得对 AI 系统的信任。 本文探讨了可解释人工智能（XAI）在实际部署中的局限性，并提出透明度与严格验证更利于建立AI系统信任。 Savio Rozario,George Čevora cs.HC,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Christian Tominski,Michael Behrisch,Susanne Bleisch,Sara Irina Fabrikant,Eva Mayr,Silvia Miksch,Helen Purchase
title: Visualizing Uncertainty in Sets
title_zh: 可视化集合中的不确定性
abstract: Set visualization facilitates the exploration and analysis of set-type data. However, how sets should be visualized when the data is uncertain is still an open research challenge. To address the problem of depicting uncertainty in set visualization, we ask (i) which aspects of set type data can be affected by uncertainty and (ii) which characteristics of uncertainty influence the visualization design. We answer these research questions by first developing a conceptual framework that brings together (i) the information that is primarily relevant in sets (i.e., set membership, set attributes, and element attributes) and (ii) different plausible categories of (un)certainty (i.e., certainty, undefined uncertainty as a binary fact, and defined uncertainty as quantifiable measure). Based on the conceptual framework, we systematically discuss visualization examples of integrating uncertainty in set visualizations. We draw on existing knowledge about general uncertainty visualization and fill gaps where set-specific aspects have not yet been considered sufficiently.
summary: Set visualization facilitates the exploration and analysis of set-type data. However, how sets should be visualized when the data is uncertain is still an open research challenge. To address the problem of depicting uncertainty in set visualization, we ask (i) which aspects of set type data can be affected by uncertainty and (ii) which characteristics of uncertainty influence the visualization design. We answer these research questions by first developing a conceptual framework that brings together (i) the information that is primarily relevant in sets (i.e., set membership, set attributes, and element attributes) and (ii) different plausible categories of (un)certainty (i.e., certainty, undefined uncertainty as a binary fact, and defined uncertainty as quantifiable measure). Based on the conceptual framework, we systematically discuss visualization examples of integrating uncertainty in set visualizations. We draw on existing knowledge about general uncertainty visualization and fill gaps where set-specific aspects have not yet been considered sufficiently.
abstract_zh: 集合可视化有利于集合类型数据的探索和分析。然而，当数据不确定时如何可视化集合仍然是一个开放的研究挑战。为了解决在集合可视化中描述不确定性的问题，我们询问（i）集合类型数据的哪些方面会受到不确定性的影响，以及（ii）不确定性的哪些特征会影响可视化设计。我们通过首先开发一个概念框架来回答这些研究问题，该框架汇集了（i）主要与集合相关的信息（即集合成员资格、集合属性和元素属性）和（ii）不同合理的（非）确定性类别（即确定性、作为二元事实的未定义的不确定性以及将不确定性定义为可量化的度量）。基于概念框架，我们系统地讨论了在集合可视化中集成不确定性的可视化示例。我们利用有关一般不确定性可视化的现有知识，并填补尚未充分考虑特定集合方面的空白。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在集合可视化中如何表现不确定性问题，提出了一个概念框架并分析了可视化设计方法。
AI.motivation: 集合可视化在处理不确定数据时缺乏有效方法，现有研究未充分考虑集合特有属性与不确定性的结合。
AI.method: 构建包含集合成员关系、属性及不确定性分类的概念框架，结合现有不确定性可视化知识进行系统分析。
AI.result: 提出针对集合数据不确定性的可视化设计框架，并通过实例展示其在不同不确定性场景下的应用。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为集合可视化中的不确定性表达提供了理论指导，填补了集合特异性与不确定性结合的研究空白。

authors_text: Juexiao Zhou,Longxi Zhou,Di Wang,Xiaopeng Xu,Haoyang Li,Yuetan Chu,Wenkai Han,Xin Gao
title: Personalized and privacy-preserving federated heterogeneous medical image analysis with PPPML-HMI
title_zh: 使用 PPPML-HMI 进行个性化且保护隐私的联合异构医学图像分析
abstract: Heterogeneous data is endemic due to the use of diverse models and settings of devices by hospitals in the field of medical imaging. However, there are few open-source frameworks for federated heterogeneous medical image analysis with personalization and privacy protection simultaneously without the demand to modify the existing model structures or to share any private data. In this paper, we proposed PPPML-HMI, an open-source learning paradigm for personalized and privacy-preserving federated heterogeneous medical image analysis. To our best knowledge, personalization and privacy protection were achieved simultaneously for the first time under the federated scenario by integrating the PerFedAvg algorithm and designing our novel cyclic secure aggregation with the homomorphic encryption algorithm. To show the utility of PPPML-HMI, we applied it to a simulated classification task namely the classification of healthy people and patients from the RAD-ChestCT Dataset, and one real-world segmentation task namely the segmentation of lung infections from COVID-19 CT scans. For the real-world task, PPPML-HMI achieved $\sim$5\% higher Dice score on average compared to conventional FL under the heterogeneous scenario. Meanwhile, we applied the improved deep leakage from gradients to simulate adversarial attacks and showed the solid privacy-preserving capability of PPPML-HMI. By applying PPPML-HMI to both tasks with different neural networks, a varied number of users, and sample sizes, we further demonstrated the strong robustness of PPPML-HMI.
summary: Heterogeneous data is endemic due to the use of diverse models and settings of devices by hospitals in the field of medical imaging. However, there are few open-source frameworks for federated heterogeneous medical image analysis with personalization and privacy protection simultaneously without the demand to modify the existing model structures or to share any private data. In this paper, we proposed PPPML-HMI, an open-source learning paradigm for personalized and privacy-preserving federated heterogeneous medical image analysis. To our best knowledge, personalization and privacy protection were achieved simultaneously for the first time under the federated scenario by integrating the PerFedAvg algorithm and designing our novel cyclic secure aggregation with the homomorphic encryption algorithm. To show the utility of PPPML-HMI, we applied it to a simulated classification task namely the classification of healthy people and patients from the RAD-ChestCT Dataset, and one real-world segmentation task namely the segmentation of lung infections from COVID-19 CT scans. For the real-world task, PPPML-HMI achieved $\sim$5\% higher Dice score on average compared to conventional FL under the heterogeneous scenario. Meanwhile, we applied the improved deep leakage from gradients to simulate adversarial attacks and showed the solid privacy-preserving capability of PPPML-HMI. By applying PPPML-HMI to both tasks with different neural networks, a varied number of users, and sample sizes, we further demonstrated the strong robustness of PPPML-HMI.
abstract_zh: 由于医院在医学成像领域使用不​​同的模型和设备设置，异构数据普遍存在。然而，很少有开源框架可以同时实现个性化和隐私保护的联合异构医学图像分析，而不需要修改现有的模型结构或共享任何私有数据。在本文中，我们提出了 PPPML-HMI，这是一种用于个性化和隐私保护的联合异构医学图像分析的开源学习范例。据我们所知，通过集成PerFedAvg算法并使用同态加密算法设计新颖的循环安全聚合，首次在联邦场景下同时实现了个性化和隐私保护。为了展示 PPPML-HMI 的实用性，我们将其应用于一项模拟分类任务，即对 RAD-ChestCT 数据集中的健康人和患者进行分类，以及一项现实世界的分割任务，即对 COVID-19 CT 扫描中的肺部感染进行分割。对于现实世界的任务，PPPML-HMI 在异构场景下比传统 FL 平均获得了 $\sim$5\% 高的 Dice 分数。同时，我们应用改进的梯度深度泄漏来模拟对抗性攻击，并展示了 PPPML-HMI 强大的隐私保护能力。通过将 PPPML-HMI 应用到具有不同神经网络、不同数量的用户和样本大小的两个任务中，我们进一步证明了 PPPML-HMI 的强大鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PPPML-HMI框架，用于实现个性化和隐私保护的联邦异构医学图像分析。
AI.motivation: 医疗影像领域因设备和模型多样性导致数据异构，现有框架难以同时满足个性化、隐私保护且无需修改模型结构或共享数据的需求。
AI.method: 结合PerFedAvg算法与同态加密的循环安全聚合机制，设计开放学习范式PPPML-HMI，支持异构数据下的联邦学习。
AI.result: 在真实世界肺部感染分割任务中，Dice分数较传统联邦学习提升约5%，并通过深度梯度泄露模拟验证了隐私保护能力。
AI.conclusion: PPPML-HMI在异构场景下展现出鲁棒性，有效平衡了个性化、隐私保护与模型结构兼容性。

search_text: Personalized and privacy-preserving federated heterogeneous medical image analysis with PPPML-HMI 使用 PPPML-HMI 进行个性化且保护隐私的联合异构医学图像分析 Heterogeneous data is endemic due to the use of diverse models and settings of devices by hospitals in the field of medical imaging. However, there are few open-source frameworks for federated heterogeneous medical image analysis with personalization and privacy protection simultaneously without the demand to modify the existing model structures or to share any private data. In this paper, we proposed PPPML-HMI, an open-source learning paradigm for personalized and privacy-preserving federated heterogeneous medical image analysis. To our best knowledge, personalization and privacy protection were achieved simultaneously for the first time under the federated scenario by integrating the PerFedAvg algorithm and designing our novel cyclic secure aggregation with the homomorphic encryption algorithm. To show the utility of PPPML-HMI, we applied it to a simulated classification task namely the classification of healthy people and patients from the RAD-ChestCT Dataset, and one real-world segmentation task namely the segmentation of lung infections from COVID-19 CT scans. For the real-world task, PPPML-HMI achieved $\sim$5\% higher Dice score on average compared to conventional FL under the heterogeneous scenario. Meanwhile, we applied the improved deep leakage from gradients to simulate adversarial attacks and showed the solid privacy-preserving capability of PPPML-HMI. authors_text: Jyothi Rikabh Chand,Mathews Jacob
title: Plug-and-Play Deep Energy Model for Inverse problems
title_zh: 用于反问题的即插即用深度能量模型
abstract: We introduce a novel energy formulation for Plug- and-Play (PnP) image recovery. Traditional PnP methods that use a convolutional neural network (CNN) do not have an energy based formulation. The primary focus of this work is to introduce an energy-based PnP formulation, which relies on a CNN that learns the log of the image prior from training data. The score function is evaluated as the gradient of the energy model, which resembles a UNET with shared encoder and decoder weights. The proposed score function is thus constrained to a conservative vector field, which is the key difference with classical PnP models. The energy-based formulation offers algorithms with convergence guarantees, even when the learned score model is not a contraction. The relaxation of the contraction constraint allows the proposed model to learn more complex priors, thus offering improved performance over traditional PnP schemes. Our experiments in magnetic resonance image reconstruction demonstrates the improved performance offered by the proposed energy model over traditional PnP methods.
summary: We introduce a novel energy formulation for Plug- and-Play (PnP) image recovery. Traditional PnP methods that use a convolutional neural network (CNN) do not have an energy based formulation. The primary focus of this work is to introduce an energy-based PnP formulation, which relies on a CNN that learns the log of the image prior from training data. The score function is evaluated as the gradient of the energy model, which resembles a UNET with shared encoder and decoder weights. The proposed score function is thus constrained to a conservative vector field, which is the key difference with classical PnP models. The energy-based formulation offers algorithms with convergence guarantees, even when the learned score model is not a contraction. The relaxation of the contraction constraint allows the proposed model to learn more complex priors, thus offering improved performance over traditional PnP schemes. Our experiments in magnetic resonance image reconstruction demonstrates the improved performance offered by the proposed energy model over traditional PnP methods.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种用于即插即用 (PnP) 图像恢复的新颖能量公式。使用卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的传统 PnP 方法没有基于能量的公式。这项工作的主要重点是引入一种基于能量的 PnP 公式，该公式依赖于从训练数据先验图像的对数的 CNN。评分函数被评估为能量模型的梯度，类似于具有共享编码器和解码器权重的 UNET。因此，所提出的评分函数被限制在保守向量场，这是与经典 PnP 模型的主要区别。基于能量的公式为算法提供了收敛保证，即使学习到的分数模型不是收缩时也是如此。收缩约束的放松允许所提出的模型学习更复杂的先验，从而提供比传统 PnP 方案更高的性能。我们在磁共振图像重建方面的实验表明，所提出的能量模型比传统的 PnP 方法具有更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于能量的插即用（PnP）深度能量模型，用于解决逆问题中的图像恢复任务。
AI.motivation: 传统的PnP方法使用卷积神经网络（CNN）但缺乏基于能量的公式化，难以提供收敛性保证，且无法学习复杂先验。
AI.method: 本文引入一种基于能量的PnP公式，通过CNN学习图像先验的对数，并利用能量模型的梯度作为分数函数，该分数函数受限于保守向量场。
AI.result: 实验表明，该能量模型在磁共振图像重建任务中优于传统PnP方法，具有更好的性能。
AI.conclusion: 基于能量的PnP方法提供了收敛性保证，能够学习更复杂的先验，从而在图像恢复任务中表现更优。

authors_text: Liting Lyu,Zhifeng Wang,Haihong Yun,Zexue Yang,Ya Li
title: DKT-STDRL: Spatial and Temporal Representation Learning Enhanced Deep Knowledge Tracing for Learning Performance Prediction
title_zh: DKT-STDRL：时空表示学习增强深度知识追踪，用于学习性能预测
abstract: Knowledge tracing (KT) serves as a primary part of intelligent education systems. Most current KTs either rely on expert judgments or only exploit a single network structure, which affects the full expression of learning features. To adequately mine features of students' learning process, Deep Knowledge Tracing Based on Spatial and Temporal Deep Representation Learning for Learning Performance Prediction (DKT-STDRL) is proposed in this paper. DKT-STDRL extracts spatial features from students' learning history sequence, and then further extracts temporal features to extract deeper hidden information. Specifically, firstly, the DKT-STDRL model uses CNN to extract the spatial feature information of students' exercise sequences. Then, the spatial features are connected with the original students' exercise features as joint learning features. Then, the joint features are input into the BiLSTM part. Finally, the BiLSTM part extracts the temporal features from the joint learning features to obtain the prediction information of whether the students answer correctly at the next time step. Experiments on the public education datasets ASSISTment2009, ASSISTment2015, Synthetic-5, ASSISTchall, and Statics2011 prove that DKT-STDRL can achieve better prediction effects than DKT and CKT.

Most current KTs either rely on expert judgments or only exploit a single network structure, which affects the full expression of learning features. To adequately mine features of students' learning process, Deep Knowledge Tracing Based on Spatial and Temporal Deep Representation Learning for Learning Performance Prediction (DKT-STDRL) is proposed in this paper. DKT-STDRL extracts spatial features from students' learning history sequence, and then further extracts temporal features to extract deeper hidden information. Specifically, firstly, the DKT-STDRL model uses CNN to extract the spatial feature information of students' exercise sequences. Then, the spatial features are connected with the original students' exercise features as joint learning features. Then, the joint features are input into the BiLSTM part. Finally, the BiLSTM part extracts the temporal features from the joint learning features to obtain the prediction information of whether the students answer correctly at the next time step. Experiments on the public education datasets ASSISTment2009, ASSISTment2015, Synthetic-5, ASSISTchall, and Statics2011 prove that DKT-STDRL can achieve better prediction effects than DKT and CKT.
abstract_zh: 知识追踪（KT）是智能教育系统的重要组成部分。目前大多数KT要么依赖专家判断，要么仅利用单一网络结构，这影响了学习特征的充分表达。为了充分挖掘学生学习过程的特征，本文提出了基于时空深度表示学习的学习成绩预测深度知识追踪（DKT-STDRL）。 DKT-STDRL从学生的学习历史序列中提取空间特征，然后进一步提取时间特征以提取更深层次的隐藏信息。具体来说，首先，DKT-STDRL模型使用CNN提取学生练习序列的空间特征信息。然后，将空间特征与原始学生的练习特征连接起来作为联合学习特征。然后，将联合特征输入到 BiLSTM 部分。最后，BiLSTM部分从联合学习特征中提取时间特征，以获得学生在下一个时间步是否回答正确的预测信息。在公共教育数据集ASSISTment2009、ASSISTment2015、Synthetic-5、ASSISTchall和Statics2011上的实验证明DKT-STDRL可以取得比DKT和CKT更好的预测效果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DKT-STDRL模型，通过结合空间和时间特征表示学习，提升学习表现预测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有知识追踪方法依赖专家判断或单一网络结构，难以充分挖掘学生学习过程中的特征。
AI.method: 使用CNN提取学生练习序列的空间特征，与原始特征融合后输入BiLSTM提取时间特征，实现对下一时刻答题正确性的预测。
AI.result: 在ASSISTment2009、ASSISTment2015等公开数据集上，DKT-STDRL的预测效果优于DKT和CKT。
AI.conclusion: 融合空间与时间特征表示的学习方法能有效提升学习表现预测性能。

authors_text: Chen Guo,Tianjian Jiang,Xu Chen,Jie Song,Otmar Hilliges
title: Vid2Avatar: 3D Avatar Reconstruction from Videos in the Wild via Self-supervised Scene Decomposition
title_zh: Vid2Avatar：通过自监督场景分解从野外视频重建 3D 头像
abstract: We present Vid2Avatar, a method to learn human avatars from monocular in-the-wild videos. Reconstructing humans that move naturally from monocular in-the-wild videos is difficult. Solving it requires accurately separating humans from arbitrary backgrounds. Moreover, it requires reconstructing detailed 3D surface from short video sequences, making it even more challenging. Despite these challenges, our method does not require any groundtruth supervision or priors extracted from large datasets of clothed human scans, nor do we rely on any external segmentation modules. Instead, it solves the tasks of scene decomposition and surface reconstruction directly in 3D by modeling both the human and the background in the scene jointly, parameterized via two separate neural fields. Specifically, we define a temporally consistent human representation in canonical space and formulate a global optimization over the background model, the canonical human shape and texture, and per-frame human pose parameters. A coarse-to-fine sampling strategy for volume rendering and novel objectives are introduced for a clean separation of dynamic human and static background, yielding detailed and robust 3D human geometry reconstructions. We evaluate our methods on publicly available datasets and show improvements over prior art.
summary: We present Vid2Avatar, a method to learn human avatars from monocular in-the-wild videos. Reconstructing humans that move naturally from monocular in-the-wild videos is difficult. Solving it requires accurately separating humans from arbitrary backgrounds. Moreover, it requires reconstructing detailed 3D surface from short video sequences, making it even more challenging. Despite these challenges, our method does not require any groundtruth supervision or priors extracted from large datasets of clothed human scans, nor do we rely on any external segmentation modules. Instead, it solves the tasks of scene decomposition and surface reconstruction directly in 3D by modeling both the human and the background in the scene jointly, parameterized via two separate neural fields. Specifically, we define a temporally consistent human representation in canonical space and formulate a global optimization over the background model, the canonical human shape and texture, and per-frame human pose parameters. A coarse-to-fine sampling strategy for volume rendering and novel objectives are introduced for a clean separation of dynamic human and static background, yielding detailed and robust 3D human geometry reconstructions. We evaluate our methods on publicly available datasets and show improvements over prior art.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 Vid2Avatar，一种从单眼野外视频中学习人类头像的方法。从单眼野外视频中重建自然移动的人类是很困难的。解决这个问题需要准确地将人类与任意背景区分开来。此外，它需要从短视频序列中重建详细的 3D 表面，这使得它更具挑战性。尽管存在这些挑战，我们的方法不需要任何真实监督或从穿着人体扫描的大型数据集中提取的先验，也不依赖任何外部分割模块。相反，它通过对场景中的人和背景进行联合建模，并通过两个独立的神经场进行参数化，直接以 3D 方式解决场景分解和表面重建的任务。具体来说，我们在规范空间中定义时间一致的人体表示，并对背景模型、规范人体形状和纹理以及每帧人体姿势参数制定全局优化。引入了用于体积渲染的从粗到细的采样策略和新颖的目标，以清晰分离动态人体和静态背景，从而产生详细且稳健的 3D 人体几何重建。我们在公开可用的数据集上评估我们的方法，并展示相对于现有技术的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Vid2Avatar方法，通过自监督场景分解从野外单目视频中重建3D人体模型。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖标注数据或外部分割模块，难以处理复杂背景下的视频人体重建问题。
AI.method: 联合建模场景中的人体与背景，采用两个独立神经场参数化，通过全局优化实现时序一致的 canonical 空间人体表示与背景分离。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上验证了方法有效性，相较现有技术取得性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 无需外部数据或分割模块即可实现鲁棒的3D人体几何重建，推动了视频到虚拟人像的研究进展。

search_text: Vid2Avatar: 3D Avatar Reconstruction from Videos in the Wild via Self-supervised Scene Decomposition Vid2Avatar：通过自监督场景分解从野外视频重建 3D 头像 We present Vid2Avatar, a method to learn human avatars from monocular in-the-wild videos. Reconstructing humans that move naturally from monocular in-the-wild videos is difficult. Solving it requires accurately separating humans from arbitrary backgrounds. Moreover, it requires reconstructing detailed 3D surface from short video sequences, making it even more challenging. Despite these challenges, our method does not require any groundtruth supervision or priors extracted from large datasets of clothed human scans, nor do we rely on any external segmentation modules. Instead, it solves the tasks of scene decomposition and surface reconstruction directly in 3D by modeling both the human and the background in the scene jointly, parameterized via two separate neural fields. Specifically, we define a temporally consistent human representation in canonical space and formulate a global optimization over the background model, the canonical human shape and texture, and per-frame human pose parameters. A coarse-to-fine sampling strategy for volume rendering and novel objectives are introduced for a clean separation of dynamic human and static background, yielding detailed and robust 3D human geometry reconstructions. We evaluate our methods on publicly available datasets and show improvements over prior art. 我们提出了 Vid2Avatar，一种从单眼野外视频中学习人类头像的方法。从单眼野外视频中重建自然移动的人类是很困难的。解决这个问题需要准确地将人类与任意背景区分开来。此外，它需要从短视频序列中重建详细的 3D 表面，这使得它更具挑战性。尽管存在这些挑战，我们的方法不需要任何真实监督或从穿着人体扫描的大型数据集中提取的先验，也不依赖任何外部分割模块。相反，它通过对场景中的人和背景进行联合建模，并通过两个独立的神经场进行参数化，直接以 3D 方式解决场景分解和表面重建的任务。具体来说，我们在规范空间中定义时间一致的人体表示，并对背景模型、规范人体形状和纹理以及每帧人体姿势参数制定全局优化。引入了用于体积渲染的从粗到细的采样策略和新颖的目标，以清晰分离动态人体和静态背景，从而产生详细且稳健的 3D 人体几何重建。我们在公开可用的数据集上评估我们的方法，并展示相对于现有技术的改进。 本文提出Vid2Avatar方法，通过自监督场景分解从野外单目视频中重建3D人体模型。 Chen Guo,Tianjian Jiang,Xu Chen,Jie Song,Otmar Hilliges cs.CV

authors_text: Matej Pecháč,Michal Chovanec,Igor Farkaš
title: Self-supervised network distillation: an effective approach to exploration in sparse reward environments
title_zh: 自监督网络蒸馏：稀疏奖励环境中探索的有效方法
abstract: Reinforcement learning can solve decision-making problems and train an agent to behave in an environment according to a predesigned reward function. However, such an approach becomes very problematic if the reward is too sparse and so the agent does not come across the reward during the environmental exploration. The solution to such a problem may be to equip the agent with an intrinsic motivation that will provide informed exploration during which the agent is likely to also encounter external reward. Novelty detection is one of the promising branches of intrinsic motivation research. We present Self-supervised Network Distillation (SND), a class of intrinsic motivation algorithms based on the distillation error as a novelty indicator, where the predictor model and the target model are both trained. We adapted three existing self-supervised methods for this purpose and experimentally tested them on a set of ten environments that are considered difficult to explore. The results show that our approach achieves faster growth and higher external reward for the same training time compared to the baseline models, which implies improved exploration in a very sparse reward environment. In addition, the analytical methods we applied provide valuable explanatory insights into our proposed models.
summary: Reinforcement learning can solve decision-making problems and train an agent to behave in an environment according to a predesigned reward function. However, such an approach becomes very problematic if the reward is too sparse and so the agent does not come across the reward during the environmental exploration. The solution to such a problem may be to equip the agent with an intrinsic motivation that will provide informed exploration during which the agent is likely to also encounter external reward. Novelty detection is one of the promising branches of intrinsic motivation research. We present Self-supervised Network Distillation (SND), a class of intrinsic motivation algorithms based on the distillation error as a novelty indicator, where the predictor model and the target model are both trained. We adapted three existing self-supervised methods for this purpose and experimentally tested them on a set of ten environments that are considered difficult to explore. The results show that our approach achieves faster growth and higher external reward for the same training time compared to the baseline models, which implies improved exploration in a very sparse reward environment. In addition, the analytical methods we applied provide valuable explanatory insights into our proposed models.
abstract_zh: 强化学习可以解决决策问题并训练智能体根据预先设计的奖励函数在环境中表现。然而，如果奖励太稀疏并且代理在环境探索期间没有遇到奖励，这种方法就会变得非常有问题。这种问题的解决方案可能是为智能体配备内在动机，该动机将提供明智的探索，在此期间智能体也可能会遇到外部奖励。新颖性检测是内在动机研究中最有前途的分支之一。我们提出了自监督网络蒸馏（SND），一类基于蒸馏误差作为新颖性指标的内在动机算法，其中预测模型和目标模型都经过训练。为此，我们采用了三种现有的自我监督方法，并在十个被认为难以探索的环境中对它们进行了实验测试。结果表明，与基线模型相比，我们的方法在相同的训练时间内实现了更快的增长和更高的外部奖励，这意味着在非常稀疏的奖励环境中改进了探索。此外，我们应用的分析方法为我们提出的模型提供了有价值的解释性见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自监督网络蒸馏（SND）的内在动机算法，用于解决稀疏奖励环境下的探索难题。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习在稀疏奖励环境中难以有效探索，需通过内在动机引导代理主动发现奖励。新颖性检测作为内在动机的重要方向，可提升探索效率。
AI.method: 设计SND方法，利用蒸馏误差作为新颖性指标，同时训练预测模型与目标模型，并适配三种自监督方法，在十个复杂环境中进行实验验证。
AI.result: 相比基线模型，SND在相同训练时间内实现更快成长速度和更高外部奖励，表明其在稀疏奖励环境中显著提升了探索效率。
AI.conclusion: SND通过自监督网络蒸馏有效解决了稀疏奖励探索问题，且所用分析方法为模型提供了有价值的解释性洞察。

authors_text: Cristian Muñoz,Sara Zannone,Umar Mohammed,Adriano Koshiyama
title: Uncovering Bias in Face Generation Models
title_zh: 揭示人脸生成模型中的偏差
abstract: Recent advancements in GANs and diffusion models have enabled the creation of high-resolution, hyper-realistic images. However, these models may misrepresent certain social groups and present bias. Understanding bias in these models remains an important research question, especially for tasks that support critical decision-making and could affect minorities. The contribution of this work is a novel analysis covering architectures and embedding spaces for fine-grained understanding of bias over three approaches: generators, attribute modifier, and post-processing bias mitigators. This work shows that generators suffer from bias across all social groups with attribute preferences such as between 75%-85% for whiteness and 60%-80% for the female gender (for all trained CelebA models) and low probabilities of generating children and older men. Modifier and mitigators work as post-processor and change the generator performance. For instance, attribute channel perturbation strategies modify the embedding spaces. We quantify the influence of this change on group fairness by measuring the impact on image quality and group features. Specifically, we use the Fréchet Inception Distance (FID), the Face Matching Error and the Self-Similarity score. For Interfacegan, we analyze one and two attribute channel perturbations and examine the effect on the fairness distribution and the quality of the image. Finally, we analyzed the post-processing bias mitigators, which are the fastest and most computationally efficient way to mitigate bias. We find that these mitigation techniques show similar results on KL divergence and FID score, however, self-similarity scores show a different feature concentration on the new groups of the data distribution. The weaknesses and ongoing challenges described in this work must be considered in the pursuit of creating fair and unbiased face generation models.
summary: Recent advancements in GANs and diffusion models have enabled the creation of high-resolution, hyper-realistic images. However, these models may misrepresent certain social groups and present bias. Understanding bias in these models remains an important research question, especially for tasks that support critical decision-making and could affect minorities. The contribution of this work is a novel analysis covering architectures and embedding spaces for fine-grained understanding of bias over three approaches: generators, attribute modifier, and post-processing bias mitigators. This work shows that generators suffer from bias across all social groups with attribute preferences such as between 75%-85% for whiteness and 60%-80% for the female gender (for all trained CelebA models) and low probabilities of generating children and older men. Modifier and mitigators work as post-processor and change the generator performance. For instance, attribute channel perturbation strategies modify the embedding spaces. We quantify the influence of this change on group fairness by measuring the impact on image quality and group features. Specifically, we use the Fréchet Inception Distance (FID), the Face Matching Error and the Self-Similarity score. For Interfacegan, we analyze one and two attribute channel perturbations and examine the effect on the fairness distribution and the quality of the image. Finally, we analyzed the post-processing bias mitigators, which are the fastest and most computationally efficient way to mitigate bias. We find that these mitigation techniques show similar results on KL divergence and FID score, however, self-similarity scores show a different feature concentration on the new groups of the data distribution. The weaknesses and ongoing challenges described in this work must be considered in the pursuit of creating fair and unbiased face generation models.
abstract_zh: GAN 和扩散模型的最新进展使得能够创建高分辨率、超现实的图像。然而，这些模型可能会歪曲某些社会群体并存在偏见。了解这些模型中的偏见仍然是一个重要的研究问题，特别是对于支持关键决策并可能影响少数群体的任务。这项工作的贡献是一种新颖的分析，涵盖了架构和嵌入空间，以便对三种方法的偏差进行细粒度的理解：生成器、属性修改器和后处理偏差缓解器。这项工作表明，生成器在所有具有属性偏好的社会群体中都存在偏见，例如白人的偏好在 75%-85% 之间，女性的偏好在 60%-80% 之间（对于所有受过训练的 CelebA 模型），并且生成儿童和老年男性的概率较低。修改器和缓解器充当后处理器并改变生成器的性能。例如，属性通道扰动策略修改嵌入空间。我们通过测量对图像质量和群体特征的影响来量化这种变化对群体公平性的影响。具体来说，我们使用 Fréchet 起始距离 (FID)、人脸匹配误差和自相似度得分。对于 Interfacegan，我们分析了一个和两个属性通道扰动，并检查对公平性分布和图像质量的影响。最后，我们分析了后处理偏差缓解器，这是减轻偏差最快且计算效率最高的方法。我们发现这些缓解技术在 KL 散度和 FID 分数上显示出相似的结果，但是，自相似性分数在新的数据分布组上显示出不同的特征集中度。在追求创建公平和公正的面部生成模型时，必须考虑这项工作中描述的弱点和持续的挑战。

AI.tldr: 该论文分析了人脸生成模型中的偏见问题，通过生成器、属性修饰器和后处理偏见缓解器三种方法进行细粒度研究。
AI.motivation: 生成对抗网络（GAN）和扩散模型虽能生成高质量图像，但可能对特定社会群体产生偏见，影响涉及少数群体的关键决策任务。
AI.method: 通过分析生成器结构、属性修饰器的嵌入空间扰动以及后处理偏见缓解器，结合FID、人脸匹配误差和自相似性评分等指标量化偏见影响。
AI.result: 生成器在肤色（75%-85%）和女性性别（60%-80%）上存在显著偏好，儿童和老年男性生成概率低；后处理方法能有效缓解偏见但改变数据分布特征。
AI.conclusion: 需综合考虑生成器设计与后处理技术的局限性，持续推进公平无偏见的人脸生成模型研究。

We find that these mitigation techniques show similar results on KL divergence and FID score, however, self-similarity scores show a different feature concentration on the new groups of the data distribution.
