GAN 和扩散模型的最新进展使得能够创建高分辨率、超现实的图像。然而，这些模型可能会歪曲某些社会群体并存在偏见。了解这些模型中的偏见仍然是一个重要的研究问题，特别是对于支持关键决策并可能影响少数群体的任务。这项工作的贡献是一种新颖的分析，涵盖了架构和嵌入空间，以便对三种方法的偏差进行细粒度的理解：生成器、属性修改器和后处理偏差缓解器。这项工作表明，生成器在所有具有属性偏好的社会群体中都存在偏见，例如白人的偏好在 75%-85% 之间，女性的偏好在 60%-80% 之间（对于所有受过训练的 CelebA 模型），并且生成儿童和老年男性的概率较低。修改器和缓解器充当后处理器并改变生成器的性能。例如，属性通道扰动策略修改嵌入空间。我们通过测量对图像质量和群体特征的影响来量化这种变化对群体公平性的影响。具体来说，我们使用 Fréchet 起始距离 (FID)、人脸匹配误差和自相似度得分。对于 Interfacegan，我们分析了一个和两个属性通道扰动，并检查对公平性分布和图像质量的影响。最后，我们分析了后处理偏差缓解器，这是减轻偏差最快且计算效率最高的方法。我们发现这些缓解技术在 KL 散度和 FID 分数上显示出相似的结果，但是，自相似性分数在新的数据分布组上显示出不同的特征集中度。在追求创建公平和公正的面部生成模型时，必须考虑这项工作中描述的弱点和持续的挑战。 该论文分析了人脸生成模型中的偏见问题，通过生成器、属性修饰器和后处理偏见缓解器三种方法进行细粒度研究。 Cristian Muñoz,Sara Zannone,Umar Mohammed,Adriano Koshiyama cs.CV,stat.ML

authors_text: Md Shamimul Islam,A. J. M. Akhtarujjaman Joha,Md Nur Hossain,Sohaib Abdullah,Ibrahim Elwarfalli,Md Mahedi Hasan
title: Word level Bangla Sign Language Dataset for Continuous BSL Recognition
title_zh: 用于连续 BSL 识别的字级孟加拉手语数据集
abstract: An robust sign language recognition system can greatly alleviate communication barriers, particularly for people who struggle with verbal communication. This is crucial for human growth and progress as it enables the expression of thoughts, feelings, and ideas. However, sign recognition is a complex task that faces numerous challenges such as same gesture patterns for multiple signs, lighting, clothing, carrying conditions, and the presence of large poses, as well as illumination discrepancies across different views. Additionally, the absence of an extensive Bangla sign language video dataset makes it even more challenging to operate recognition systems, particularly when utilizing deep learning techniques. In order to address this issue, firstly, we created a large-scale dataset called the MVBSL-W50, which comprises 50 isolated words across 13 categories. Secondly, we developed an attention-based Bi-GRU model that captures the temporal dynamics of pose information for individuals communicating through sign language. The proposed model utilizes human pose information, which has shown to be successful in analyzing sign language patterns. By focusing solely on movement information and disregarding body appearance and environmental factors, the model is simplified and can achieve a speedier performance. The accuracy of the model is reported to be 85.64%.
summary: An robust sign language recognition system can greatly alleviate communication barriers, particularly for people who struggle with verbal communication. This is crucial for human growth and progress as it enables the expression of thoughts, feelings, and ideas. However, sign recognition is a complex task that faces numerous challenges such as same gesture patterns for multiple signs, lighting, clothing, carrying conditions, and the presence of large poses, as well as illumination discrepancies across different views. Additionally, the absence of an extensive Bangla sign language video dataset makes it even more challenging to operate recognition systems, particularly when utilizing deep learning techniques. In order to address this issue, firstly, we created a large-scale dataset called the MVBSL-W50, which comprises 50 isolated words across 13 categories. Secondly, we developed an attention-based Bi-GRU model that captures the temporal dynamics of pose information for individuals communicating through sign language. The proposed model utilizes human pose information, which has shown to be successful in analyzing sign language patterns. By focusing solely on movement information and disregarding body appearance and environmental factors, the model is simplified and can achieve a speedier performance. The accuracy of the model is reported to be 85.64%.
abstract_zh: 强大的手语识别系统可以极大地缓解沟通障碍，特别是对于那些难以进行口头交流的人来说。这对于人类的成长和进步至关重要，因为它能够表达思想、情感和想法。然而，标志识别是一项复杂的任务，面临着许多挑战，例如多个标志的相同手势模式、照明、服装、携带条件、大姿势的存在，以及不同视图之间的照明差异。此外，缺乏广泛的孟加拉手语视频数据集使得操作识别系统变得更加困难，特别是在利用深度学习技术时。为了解决这个问题，我们首先创建了一个名为 MVBSL-W50 的大型数据集，其中包含 13 个类别的 50 个孤立词。其次，我们开发了一种基于注意力的 Bi-GRU 模型，该模型可以捕获通过手语进行交流的个体的姿势信息的时间动态。所提出的模型利用人体姿势信息，该信息在分析手语模式方面已被证明是成功的。通过仅关注运动信息而忽略身体外观和环境因素，模型被简化并且可以实现更快的性能。据报道，该模型的准确率为 85.64%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为MVBSL-W50的孟加拉语手语数据集，并开发基于注意力机制的双向门控循环单元（Bi-GRU）模型，用于连续孟加拉语手语识别。
AI.motivation: 手语识别面临手势模式相似、光照条件差异及缺乏大规模孟加拉语手语数据集等挑战，制约了深度学习技术的应用。本文旨在通过构建数据集和优化模型解决这些问题。
AI.method: 构建包含50个孤立词的MVBSL-W50数据集，开发基于人体姿态信息的注意力机制Bi-GRU模型，仅关注运动信息以简化模型并提升效率。
AI.result: 提出的模型在测试中达到85.64%的识别准确率。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过数据集和模型设计有效提升了孟加拉语手语识别性能，为后续研究提供了基础，但仍需更多数据或技术优化以进一步提高准确率。

authors_text: Yifei Xin,Xiulian Peng,Yan Lu
title: Improving Speech Enhancement via Event-based Query
title_zh: 通过基于事件的查询改进语音增强
abstract: Existing deep learning based speech enhancement (SE) methods either use blind end-to-end training or explicitly incorporate speaker embedding or phonetic information into the SE network to enhance speech quality. In this paper, we perceive speech and noises as different types of sound events and propose an event-based query method for SE. Specifically, representative speech embeddings that can discriminate speech with noises are first pre-trained with the sound event detection (SED) task. The embeddings are then clustered into fixed golden speech queries to assist the SE network to enhance the speech from noisy audio. The golden speech queries can be obtained offline and generalizable to different SE datasets and networks. Therefore, little extra complexity is introduced and no enrollment is needed for each speaker. Experimental results show that the proposed method yields significant gains compared with baselines and the golden queries are well generalized to different datasets.
summary: Existing deep learning based speech enhancement (SE) methods either use blind end-to-end training or explicitly incorporate speaker embedding or phonetic information into the SE network to enhance speech quality. In this paper, we perceive speech and noises as different types of sound events and propose an event-based query method for SE. Specifically, representative speech embeddings that can discriminate speech with noises are first pre-trained with the sound event detection (SED) task. The embeddings are then clustered into fixed golden speech queries to assist the SE network to enhance the speech from noisy audio. The golden speech queries can be obtained offline and generalizable to different SE datasets and networks. Therefore, little extra complexity is introduced and no enrollment is needed for each speaker. Experimental results show that the proposed method yields significant gains compared with baselines and the golden queries are well generalized to different datasets.
abstract_zh: 现有的基于深度学习的语音增强（SE）方法要么使用盲端对端训练，要么明确地将说话者嵌入或语音信息合并到SE网络中以增强语音质量。在本文中，我们将语音和噪声视为不同类型的声音事件，并提出了一种基于事件的 SE 查询方法。具体来说，首先使用声音事件检测（SED）任务对可以区分语音和噪声的代表性语音嵌入进行预训练。然后，嵌入会聚集成固定的黄金语音查询，以帮助 SE 网络增强噪声音频中的语音。黄金语音查询可以离线获取，并可推广到不同的 SE 数据集和网络。因此，几乎没有引入额外的复杂性，并且不需要为每个演讲者进行注册。实验结果表明，与基线相比，所提出的方法产生了显着的收益，并且黄金查询可以很好地推广到不同的数据集。

AI.tldr: 通过基于事件的查询方法提升语音增强效果
AI.motivation: 现有语音增强方法依赖盲训练或需显式整合说话人信息，存在泛化性差或复杂度高的问题
AI.method: 预训练区分语音与噪音的声学事件嵌入，聚类生成通用黄金语音查询辅助SE网络，无需离线注册与额外复杂度
AI.result: 相较基线方法显著提升语音增强性能，黄金查询在不同数据集间具有良好泛化能力
AI.conclusion: 事件驱动的查询机制有效提升语音增强效果，且具备跨数据集与网络的通用性优势

authors_text: Chaoyi Wu,Xiaoman Zhang,Yanfeng Wang,Ya Zhang,Weidi Xie
title: K-Diag: Knowledge-enhanced Disease Diagnosis in Radiographic Imaging
title_zh: K-Diag：放射成像中的知识增强疾病诊断
abstract: In this paper, we consider the problem of disease diagnosis. Unlike the conventional learning paradigm that treats labels independently, we propose a knowledge-enhanced framework, that enables training visual representation with the guidance of medical domain knowledge. In particular, we make the following contributions: First, to explicitly incorporate experts' knowledge, we propose to learn a neural representation for the medical knowledge graph via contrastive learning, implicitly establishing relations between different medical concepts. Second, while training the visual encoder, we keep the parameters of the knowledge encoder frozen and propose to learn a set of prompt vectors for efficient adaptation. Third, we adopt a Transformer-based disease-query module for cross-model fusion, which naturally enables explainable diagnosis results via cross attention. To validate the effectiveness of our proposed framework, we conduct thorough experiments on three x-ray imaging datasets across different anatomy structures, showing our model is able to exploit the implicit relations between diseases/findings, thus is beneficial to the commonly encountered problem in the medical domain, namely, long-tailed and zero-shot recognition, which conventional methods either struggle or completely fail to realize.
summary: In this paper, we consider the problem of disease diagnosis. Unlike the conventional learning paradigm that treats labels independently, we propose a knowledge-enhanced framework, that enables training visual representation with the guidance of medical domain knowledge. In particular, we make the following contributions: First, to explicitly incorporate experts' knowledge, we propose to learn a neural representation for the medical knowledge graph via contrastive learning, implicitly establishing relations between different medical concepts. Second, while training the visual encoder, we keep the parameters of the knowledge encoder frozen and propose to learn a set of prompt vectors for efficient adaptation. Third, we adopt a Transformer-based disease-query module for cross-model fusion, which naturally enables explainable diagnosis results via cross attention. To validate the effectiveness of our proposed framework, we conduct thorough experiments on three x-ray imaging datasets across different anatomy structures, showing our model is able to exploit the implicit relations between diseases/findings, thus is beneficial to the commonly encountered problem in the medical domain, namely, long-tailed and zero-shot recognition, which conventional methods either struggle or completely fail to realize.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们考虑疾病诊断的问题。与独立处理标签的传统学习范式不同，我们提出了一个知识增强框架，可以在医学领域知识的指导下训练视觉表示。具体来说，我们做出了以下贡献：首先，为了明确地结合专家的知识，我们建议通过对比学习来学习医学知识图的神经表示，隐式地建立不同医学概念之间的关系。其次，在训练视觉编码器时，我们保持知识编码器的参数冻结，并建议学习一组提示向量以实现有效的适应。第三，我们采用基于 Transformer 的疾病查询模块进行跨模型融合，这自然可以通过交叉注意力实现可解释的诊断结果。为了验证我们提出的框架的有效性，我们对不同解剖结构的三个 X 射线成像数据集进行了彻底的实验，表明我们的模型能够利用疾病/发现之间的隐含关系，从而有益于医学领域常见的问题，即长尾和零样本识别，而传统方法要么难以实现，要么完全无法实现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出K-Diag框架，通过整合医学领域知识提升放射影像中的疾病诊断效果。
AI.motivation: 传统方法独立处理标签，难以应对医学领域中长尾分布和零样本识别问题。
AI.method: 构建医学知识图谱的对比学习表示，冻结知识编码器参数并学习提示向量，采用Transformer模块实现跨模态融合与可解释诊断。
AI.result: 在三个不同解剖结构的X光数据集上验证，模型能有效利用疾病间的隐式关系，提升长尾和零样本识别性能。
AI.conclusion: 知识增强框架通过显式整合医学先验知识，有效解决了医疗领域常见的诊断难题。

search_text: K-Diag: Knowledge-enhanced Disease Diagnosis in Radiographic Imaging K-Diag：放射成像中的知识增强疾病诊断 In this paper, we consider the problem of disease diagnosis. Unlike the conventional learning paradigm that treats labels independently, we propose a knowledge-enhanced framework, that enables training visual representation with the guidance of medical domain knowledge. In particular, we make the following contributions: First, to explicitly incorporate experts' knowledge, we propose to learn a neural representation for the medical knowledge graph via contrastive learning, implicitly establishing relations between different medical concepts. Second, while training the visual encoder, we keep the parameters of the knowledge encoder frozen and propose to learn a set of prompt vectors for efficient adaptation. Third, we adopt a Transformer-based disease-query module for cross-model fusion, which naturally enables explainable diagnosis results via cross attention. To validate the effectiveness of our proposed framework, we conduct thorough experiments on three x-ray imaging datasets across different anatomy structures, showing our model is able to exploit the implicit relations between diseases/findings, thus is beneficial to the commonly encountered problem in the medical domain, namely, long-tailed and zero-shot recognition, which conventional methods either struggle or completely fail to realize. 在本文中，我们考虑疾病诊断的问题。与独立处理标签的传统学习范式不同，我们提出了一个知识增强框架，可以在医学领域知识的指导下训练视觉表示。具体来说，我们做出了以下贡献：首先，为了明确地结合专家的知识，我们建议通过对比学习来学习医学知识图的神经表示，隐式地建立不同医学概念之间的关系。其次，在训练视觉编码器时，我们保持知识编码器的参数冻结，并建议学习一组提示向量以实现有效的适应。第三，我们采用基于 Transformer 的疾病查询模块进行跨模型融合，这自然可以通过交叉注意力实现可解释的诊断结果。为了验证我们提出的框架的有效性，我们对不同解剖结构的三个 X 射线成像数据集进行了彻底的实验，表明我们的模型能够利用疾病/发现之间的隐含关系，从而有益于医学领域常见的问题，即长尾和零样本识别，而传统方法要么难以实现，要么完全无法实现。 本文提出K-Diag框架，通过整合医学领域知识提升放射影像中的疾病诊断效果。 Chaoyi Wu,Xiaoman Zhang,Yanfeng Wang,Ya Zhang,Weidi Xie cs.CV

authors_text: Omri Puny,Derek Lim,Bobak T. Kiani,Haggai Maron,Yaron Lipman
title: Equivariant Polynomials for Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: 图神经网络的等变多项式
abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNN) are inherently limited in their expressive power. Recent seminal works (Xu et al., 2019; Morris et al., 2019b) introduced the Weisfeiler-Lehman (WL) hierarchy as a measure of expressive power. Although this hierarchy has propelled significant advances in GNN analysis and architecture developments, it suffers from several significant limitations. These include a complex definition that lacks direct guidance for model improvement and a WL hierarchy that is too coarse to study current GNNs. This paper introduces an alternative expressive power hierarchy based on the ability of GNNs to calculate equivariant polynomials of a certain degree. As a first step, we provide a full characterization of all equivariant graph polynomials by introducing a concrete basis, significantly generalizing previous results. Each basis element corresponds to a specific multi-graph, and its computation over some graph data input corresponds to a tensor contraction problem. Second, we propose algorithmic tools for evaluating the expressiveness of GNNs using tensor contraction sequences, and calculate the expressive power of popular GNNs. Finally, we enhance the expressivity of common GNN architectures by adding polynomial features or additional operations / aggregations inspired by our theory. These enhanced GNNs demonstrate state-of-the-art results in experiments across multiple graph learning benchmarks.
summary: Graph Neural Networks (GNN) are inherently limited in their expressive power. Recent seminal works (Xu et al., 2019; Morris et al., 2019b) introduced the Weisfeiler-Lehman (WL) hierarchy as a measure of expressive power. Although this hierarchy has propelled significant advances in GNN analysis and architecture developments, it suffers from several significant limitations. These include a complex definition that lacks direct guidance for model improvement and a WL hierarchy that is too coarse to study current GNNs. This paper introduces an alternative expressive power hierarchy based on the ability of GNNs to calculate equivariant polynomials of a certain degree. As a first step, we provide a full characterization of all equivariant graph polynomials by introducing a concrete basis, significantly generalizing previous results. Each basis element corresponds to a specific multi-graph, and its computation over some graph data input corresponds to a tensor contraction problem. Second, we propose algorithmic tools for evaluating the expressiveness of GNNs using tensor contraction sequences, and calculate the expressive power of popular GNNs. Finally, we enhance the expressivity of common GNN architectures by adding polynomial features or additional operations / aggregations inspired by our theory. These enhanced GNNs demonstrate state-of-the-art results in experiments across multiple graph learning benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）的表达能力本质上是有限的。最近的开创性著作（Xu 等人，2019；Morris 等人，2019b）引入了 Weisfeiler-Lehman (WL) 层次结构作为表达能力的衡量标准。尽管这种层次结构推动了 GNN 分析和架构开发的重大进步，但它仍存在一些重大限制。其中包括缺乏对模型改进的直接指导的复杂定义，以及过于粗糙而无法研究当前 GNN 的 WL 层次结构。本文介绍了一种基于 GNN 计算一定次数等变多项式的能力的替代表达能力层次结构。作为第一步，我们通过引入具体的基础来提供所有等变图多项式的完整表征，显着地概括了先前的结果。每个基本元素对应于一个特定的多重图，其对某些图数据输入的计算对应于张量收缩问题。其次，我们提出了使用张量收缩序列评估 GNN 表达能力的算法工具，并计算了流行 GNN 的表达能力。最后，我们通过添加多项式特征或受我们理论启发的附加操作/聚合来增强常见 GNN 架构的表达能力。这些增强的 GNN 在多个图学习基准的实验中展示了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于等变多项式的图神经网络（GNN）表达能力分层体系，通过构建多项式基并设计张量收缩算法提升GNN性能。
AI.motivation: 现有Weisfeiler-Lehman分层体系存在定义复杂且粒度过粗的缺陷，难以有效指导GNN模型优化与表达能力分析。
AI.method: 1) 构建等变图多项式基，建立多图与张量收缩问题的对应关系；2) 设计基于张量收缩序列的GNN表达性评估工具；3) 通过添加多项式特征或聚合操作增强GNN架构。
AI.result: 改进后的GNN在多个图学习基准测试中取得最先进实验结果，验证了等变多项式理论的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 等变多项式分层体系为GNN表达能力分析提供了更精细的理论框架，并可通过算法工具指导模型优化。

authors_text: Dominik Dürrschnabel,Gerd Stumme
title: Greedy Discovery of Ordinal Factors
title_zh: 序数因子的贪婪发现
abstract: In large datasets, it is hard to discover and analyze structure. It is thus common to introduce tags or keywords for the items. In applications, such datasets are then filtered based on these tags. Still, even medium-sized datasets with a few tags result in complex and for humans hard-to-navigate systems. In this work, we adopt the method of ordinal factor analysis to address this problem. An ordinal factor arranges a subset of the tags in a linear order based on their underlying structure. A complete ordinal factorization, which consists of such ordinal factors, precisely represents the original dataset. Based on such an ordinal factorization, we provide a way to discover and explain relationships between different items and attributes in the dataset. However, computing even just one ordinal factor of high cardinality is computationally complex. We thus propose the greedy algorithm in this work. This algorithm extracts ordinal factors using already existing fast algorithms developed in formal concept analysis. Then, we leverage to propose a comprehensive way to discover relationships in the dataset. We furthermore introduce a distance measure based on the representation emerging from the ordinal factorization to discover similar items. To evaluate the method, we conduct a case study on different datasets.
summary: In large datasets, it is hard to discover and analyze structure. It is thus common to introduce tags or keywords for the items. In applications, such datasets are then filtered based on these tags. Still, even medium-sized datasets with a few tags result in complex and for humans hard-to-navigate systems. In this work, we adopt the method of ordinal factor analysis to address this problem. An ordinal factor arranges a subset of the tags in a linear order based on their underlying structure. A complete ordinal factorization, which consists of such ordinal factors, precisely represents the original dataset. Based on such an ordinal factorization, we provide a way to discover and explain relationships between different items and attributes in the dataset. However, computing even just one ordinal factor of high cardinality is computationally complex. We thus propose the greedy algorithm in this work. This algorithm extracts ordinal factors using already existing fast algorithms developed in formal concept analysis. Then, we leverage to propose a comprehensive way to discover relationships in the dataset. We furthermore introduce a distance measure based on the representation emerging from the ordinal factorization to discover similar items. To evaluate the method, we conduct a case study on different datasets.
abstract_zh: 在大型数据集中，很难发现和分析结构。因此，为项目引入标签或关键字是很常见的。在应用程序中，然后根据这些标签过滤此类数据集。尽管如此，即使是带有几个标签的中型数据集也会导致复杂且人类难以导航的系统。在这项工作中，我们采用序数因素分析的方法来解决这个问题。序数因子根据标签的底层结构按线性顺序排列标签的子集。由这些序数因子组成的完整序数分解精确地表示了原始数据集。基于这种序数分解，我们提供了一种发现和解释数据集中不同项目和属性之间关系的方法。然而，即使只计算高基数的一个序数因子在计算上也是复杂的。因此，我们在这项工作中提出了贪婪算法。该算法使用在形式概念分析中开发的现有快速算法来提取序数因子。然后，我们提出一种全面的方法来发现数据集中的关系。我们还引入了一种基于序数分解中出现的表示的距离度量，以发现相似的项目。为了评估该方法，我们对不同的数据集进行了案例研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种贪心算法，通过序数因子分析方法对大规模数据集进行结构化表示，以简化数据导航并发现项与属性间的关系。
AI.motivation: 现有标签体系在处理中等规模数据集时仍会导致复杂且难以导航的系统，需更高效的方法揭示数据潜在结构。
AI.method: 基于形式概念分析的快速算法，设计贪心算法提取序数因子，并引入基于序数因子分解的相似性度量方法。
AI.result: 通过不同数据集的案例研究验证了该方法在发现数据关系和简化导航方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为大规模数据集提供了高效的序数结构分析框架，能够有效揭示项与属性间的潜在关联。

search_text: Greedy Discovery of Ordinal Factors 序数因子的贪婪发现 In large datasets, it is hard to discover and analyze structure. It is thus common to introduce tags or keywords for the items. In applications, such datasets are then filtered based on these tags. Still, even medium-sized datasets with a few tags result in complex and for humans hard-to-navigate systems. In this work, we adopt the method of ordinal factor analysis to address this problem. An ordinal factor arranges a subset of the tags in a linear order based on their underlying structure. A complete ordinal factorization, which consists of such ordinal factors, precisely represents the original dataset. Based on such an ordinal factorization, we provide a way to discover and explain relationships between different items and attributes in the dataset. However, computing even just one ordinal factor of high cardinality is computationally complex. We thus propose the greedy algorithm in this work. This algorithm extracts ordinal factors using already existing fast algorithms developed in formal concept analysis. Then, we leverage to propose a comprehensive way to discover relationships in the dataset. We furthermore introduce a distance measure based on the representation emerging from the ordinal factorization to discover similar items. To evaluate the method, we conduct a case study on different datasets. 在大型数据集中，很难发现和分析结构。因此，为项目引入标签或关键字是很常见的。在应用程序中，然后根据这些标签过滤此类数据集。尽管如此，即使是带有几个标签的中型数据集也会导致复杂且人类难以导航的系统。在这项工作中，我们采用序数因素分析的方法来解决这个问题。序数因子根据标签的底层结构按线性顺序排列标签的子集。由这些序数因子组成的完整序数分解精确地表示了原始数据集。基于这种序数分解，我们提供了一种发现和解释数据集中不同项目和属性之间关系的方法。然而，即使只计算高基数的一个序数因子在计算上也是复杂的。因此，我们在这项工作中提出了贪婪算法。该算法使用在形式概念分析中开发的现有快速算法来提取序数因子。然后，我们提出一种全面的方法来发现数据集中的关系。我们还引入了一种基于序数分解中出现的表示的距离度量，以发现相似的项目。为了评估该方法，我们对不同的数据集进行了案例研究。 本文提出一种贪心算法，通过序数因子分析方法对大规模数据集进行结构化表示，以简化数据导航并发现项与属性间的关系。 Dominik Dürrschnabel,Gerd Stumme cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.LO

authors_text: Zhenjia Xu,Zhou Xian,Xingyu Lin,Cheng Chi,Zhiao Huang,Chuang Gan,Shuran Song
title: RoboNinja: Learning an Adaptive Cutting Policy for Multi-Material Objects
title_zh: RoboNinja：学习多材料物体的自适应切割策略
abstract: We introduce RoboNinja, a learning-based cutting system for multi-material objects (i.e., soft objects with rigid cores such as avocados or mangos). In contrast to prior works using open-loop cutting actions to cut through single-material objects (e.g., slicing a cucumber), RoboNinja aims to remove the soft part of an object while preserving the rigid core, thereby maximizing the yield. To achieve this, our system closes the perception-action loop by utilizing an interactive state estimator and an adaptive cutting policy. The system first employs sparse collision information to iteratively estimate the position and geometry of an object's core and then generates closed-loop cutting actions based on the estimated state and a tolerance value. The "adaptiveness" of the policy is achieved through the tolerance value, which modulates the policy's conservativeness when encountering collisions, maintaining an adaptive safety distance from the estimated core. Learning such cutting skills directly on a real-world robot is challenging. Yet, existing simulators are limited in simulating multi-material objects or computing the energy consumption during the cutting process. To address this issue, we develop a differentiable cutting simulator that supports multi-material coupling and allows for the generation of optimized trajectories as demonstrations for policy learning. Furthermore, by using a low-cost force sensor to capture collision feedback, we were able to successfully deploy the learned model in real-world scenarios, including objects with diverse core geometries and soft materials.
summary: We introduce RoboNinja, a learning-based cutting system for multi-material objects (i.e., soft objects with rigid cores such as avocados or mangos). In contrast to prior works using open-loop cutting actions to cut through single-material objects (e.g., slicing a cucumber), RoboNinja aims to remove the soft part of an object while preserving the rigid core, thereby maximizing the yield. To achieve this, our system closes the perception-action loop by utilizing an interactive state estimator and an adaptive cutting policy. The system first employs sparse collision information to iteratively estimate the position and geometry of an object's core and then generates closed-loop cutting actions based on the estimated state and a tolerance value. The "adaptiveness" of the policy is achieved through the tolerance value, which modulates the policy's conservativeness when encountering collisions, maintaining an adaptive safety distance from the estimated core. Learning such cutting skills directly on a real-world robot is challenging. Yet, existing simulators are limited in simulating multi-material objects or computing the energy consumption during the cutting process. To address this issue, we develop a differentiable cutting simulator that supports multi-material coupling and allows for the generation of optimized trajectories as demonstrations for policy learning. Furthermore, by using a low-cost force sensor to capture collision feedback, we were able to successfully deploy the learned model in real-world scenarios, including objects with diverse core geometries and soft materials.
abstract_zh: 我们推出了 RoboNinja，这是一种基于学习的多材料物体切割系统（即具有刚性核心的软物体，如鳄梨或芒果）。与之前使用开环切割动作来切割单一材料物体（例如切片黄瓜）的作品相比，RoboNinja 的目标是去除物体的柔软部分，同时保留刚性核心，从而最大限度地提高产量。为了实现这一目标，我们的系统通过利用交互式状态估计器和自适应切割策略来关闭感知-行动循环。该系统首先利用稀疏碰撞信息迭代地估计物体核心的位置和几何形状，然后根据估计的状态和公差值生成闭环切割动作。策略的“自适应”是通过容差值来实现的，它在遇到碰撞时调节策略的保守性，与估计的核心保持自适应安全距离。直接在现实世界的机器人上学习此类切割技能具有挑战性。然而，现有的模拟器在模拟多材料物体或计算切割过程中的能耗方面受到限制。为了解决这个问题，我们开发了一种可微分切割模拟器，它支持多材料耦合，并允许生成优化轨迹作为策略学习的演示。此外，通过使用低成本力传感器捕获碰撞反馈，我们能够在现实场景中成功部署学习模型，包括具有不同核心几何形状和软材料的物体。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RoboNinja系统，通过学习自适应切割策略，实现对多材料物体（如牛油果）的精准切割，保留硬质核心并最大化产量。
AI.motivation: 传统开环切割方法难以处理多材料物体的复杂结构，无法在去除软质部分的同时保护硬质核心，需闭环控制与自适应策略应对碰撞不确定性。
AI.method: 结合交互式状态估计器与自适应切割策略，利用稀疏碰撞信息迭代估计核心位置；开发可微分切割模拟器生成优化轨迹，并通过低成本力传感器实现现实场景部署。
AI.result: 成功在真实环境中应用模型，处理了多种核心几何形状和软材料物体，验证了自适应策略与模拟器的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过闭环感知-动作循环与可微分模拟器结合，解决了多材料切割的现实挑战，为复杂物体操作提供了新方法。

authors_text: Yilun Du,Conor Durkan,Robin Strudel,Joshua B. Tenenbaum,Sander Dieleman,Rob Fergus,Jascha Sohl-Dickstein,Arnaud Doucet,Will Grathwohl
title: Reduce, Reuse, Recycle: Compositional Generation with Energy-Based Diffusion Models and MCMC
title_zh: 减少、再利用、循环利用：使用基于能量的扩散模型和 MCMC 进行组合生成
abstract: Since their introduction, diffusion models have quickly become the prevailing approach to generative modeling in many domains. They can be interpreted as learning the gradients of a time-varying sequence of log-probability density functions. This interpretation has motivated classifier-based and classifier-free guidance as methods for post-hoc control of diffusion models. In this work, we build upon these ideas using the score-based interpretation of diffusion models, and explore alternative ways to condition, modify, and reuse diffusion models for tasks involving compositional generation and guidance. In particular, we investigate why certain types of composition fail using current techniques and present a number of solutions. We conclude that the sampler (not the model) is responsible for this failure and propose new samplers, inspired by MCMC, which enable successful compositional generation. Further, we propose an energy-based parameterization of diffusion models which enables the use of new compositional operators and more sophisticated, Metropolis-corrected samplers. Intriguingly we find these samplers lead to notable improvements in compositional generation across a wide set of problems such as classifier-guided ImageNet modeling and compositional text-to-image generation.
summary: Since their introduction, diffusion models have quickly become the prevailing approach to generative modeling in many domains. They can be interpreted as learning the gradients of a time-varying sequence of log-probability density functions. This interpretation has motivated classifier-based and classifier-free guidance as methods for post-hoc control of diffusion models. In this work, we build upon these ideas using the score-based interpretation of diffusion models, and explore alternative ways to condition, modify, and reuse diffusion models for tasks involving compositional generation and guidance. In particular, we investigate why certain types of composition fail using current techniques and present a number of solutions. We conclude that the sampler (not the model) is responsible for this failure and propose new samplers, inspired by MCMC, which enable successful compositional generation. Further, we propose an energy-based parameterization of diffusion models which enables the use of new compositional operators and more sophisticated, Metropolis-corrected samplers. Intriguingly we find these samplers lead to notable improvements in compositional generation across a wide set of problems such as classifier-guided ImageNet modeling and compositional text-to-image generation.
abstract_zh: 自推出以来，扩散模型已迅速成为许多领域生成建模的流行方法。它们可以被解释为学习对数概率密度函数的时变序列的梯度。这种解释激发了基于分类器和无分类器的指导作为扩散模型事后控制的方法。在这项工作中，我们基于这些想法，使用扩散模型的基于分数的解释，并探索为涉及构图生成和指导的任务条件、修改和重用扩散模型的替代方法。特别是，我们研究了为什么某些类型的组合物使用当前技术会失败，并提出了许多解决方案。我们得出的结论是，采样器（而不是模型）要对这种失败负责，并受 MCMC 启发，提出了新的采样器，以实现成功的合成生成。此外，我们提出了一种基于能量的扩散模型参数化，可以使用新的组合算子和更复杂的 Metropolis 校正采样器。有趣的是，我们发现这些采样器在一系列广泛的问题上带来了组合生成的显着改进，例如分类器引导的 ImageNet 建模和组合文本到图像生成。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于能量函数的扩散模型参数化方法，并结合MCMC采样器，以解决组合生成任务中的失败问题。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型在生成任务中表现出色，但当前技术在组合生成任务中存在局限性，需要改进采样器和模型参数化以实现更有效的生成。
AI.method: 论文基于分数匹配的扩散模型解释，提出了一种能量函数参数化方法，并设计了受MCMC启发的新采样器，以支持组合生成和更复杂的采样操作。
AI.result: 新采样器显著提升了组合生成任务的性能，包括分类器引导的ImageNet建模和文本到图像生成。
AI.conclusion: 组合生成任务的失败主要归因于采样器而非模型本身，基于能量函数的参数化和MCMC启发的采样器能够有效解决这一问题。

This interpretation has motivated classifier-based and classifier-free guidance as methods for post-hoc control of diffusion models. In this work, we build upon these ideas using the score-based interpretation of diffusion models, and explore alternative ways to condition, modify, and reuse diffusion models for tasks involving compositional generation and guidance. In particular, we investigate why certain types of composition fail using current techniques and present a number of solutions. We conclude that the sampler (not the model) is responsible for this failure and propose new samplers, inspired by MCMC, which enable successful compositional generation. Further, we propose an energy-based parameterization of diffusion models which enables the use of new compositional operators and more sophisticated, Metropolis-corrected samplers. Intriguingly we find these samplers lead to notable improvements in compositional generation across a wide set of problems such as classifier-guided ImageNet modeling and compositional text-to-image generation. 自推出以来，扩散模型已迅速成为许多领域生成建模的流行方法。它们可以被解释为学习对数概率密度函数的时变序列的梯度。这种解释激发了基于分类器和无分类器的指导作为扩散模型事后控制的方法。在这项工作中，我们基于这些想法，使用扩散模型的基于分数的解释，并探索为涉及构图生成和指导的任务条件、修改和重用扩散模型的替代方法。特别是，我们研究了为什么某些类型的组合物使用当前技术会失败，并提出了许多解决方案。我们得出的结论是，采样器（而不是模型）要对这种失败负责，并受 MCMC 启发，提出了新的采样器，以实现成功的合成生成。此外，我们提出了一种基于能量的扩散模型参数化，可以使用新的组合算子和更复杂的 Metropolis 校正采样器。有趣的是，我们发现这些采样器在一系列广泛的问题上带来了组合生成的显着改进，例如分类器引导的 ImageNet 建模和组合文本到图像生成。 该论文提出了一种基于能量函数的扩散模型参数化方法，并结合MCMC采样器，以解决组合生成任务中的失败问题。 Yilun Du,Conor Durkan,Robin Strudel,Joshua B. Tenenbaum,Sander Dieleman,Rob Fergus,Jascha Sohl-Dickstein,Arnaud Doucet,Will Grathwohl cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV,stat.ML

authors_text: Tianhe Yu,Ted Xiao,Austin Stone,Jonathan Tompson,Anthony Brohan,Su Wang,Jaspiar Singh,Clayton Tan,Dee M,Jodilyn Peralta,Brian Ichter,Karol Hausman,Fei Xia
title: Scaling Robot Learning with Semantically Imagined Experience
title_zh: 通过语义想象体验扩展机器人学习
abstract: Recent advances in robot learning have shown promise in enabling robots to perform a variety of manipulation tasks and generalize to novel scenarios. One of the key contributing factors to this progress is the scale of robot data used to train the models. To obtain large-scale datasets, prior approaches have relied on either demonstrations requiring high human involvement or engineering-heavy autonomous data collection schemes, both of which are challenging to scale. To mitigate this issue, we propose an alternative route and leverage text-to-image foundation models widely used in computer vision and natural language processing to obtain meaningful data for robot learning without requiring additional robot data. We term our method Robot Learning with Semantically Imagened Experience (ROSIE). Specifically, we make use of the state of the art text-to-image diffusion models and perform aggressive data augmentation on top of our existing robotic manipulation datasets via inpainting various unseen objects for manipulation, backgrounds, and distractors with text guidance. Through extensive real-world experiments, we show that manipulation policies trained on data augmented this way are able to solve completely unseen tasks with new objects and can behave more robustly w.r.t. novel distractors. In addition, we find that we can improve the robustness and generalization of high-level robot learning tasks such as success detection through training with the diffusion-based data augmentation. The project's website and videos can be found at diffusion-rosie.github.io
summary: Recent advances in robot learning have shown promise in enabling robots to perform a variety of manipulation tasks and generalize to novel scenarios. One of the key contributing factors to this progress is the scale of robot data used to train the models. To mitigate this issue, we propose an alternative route and leverage text-to-image foundation models widely used in computer vision and natural language processing to obtain meaningful data for robot learning without requiring additional robot data. We term our method Robot Learning with Semantically Imagened Experience (ROSIE). Specifically, we make use of the state of the art text-to-image diffusion models and perform aggressive data augmentation on top of our existing robotic manipulation datasets via inpainting various unseen objects for manipulation, backgrounds, and distractors with text guidance. Through extensive real-world experiments, we show that manipulation policies trained on data augmented this way are able to solve completely unseen tasks with new objects and can behave more robustly w.r.t. novel distractors. In addition, we find that we can improve the robustness and generalization of high-level robot learning tasks such as success detection through training with the diffusion-based data augmentation. The project's website and videos can be found at diffusion-rosie.github.io
abstract_zh: 机器人学习的最新进展显示出使机器人能够执行各种操作任务并推广到新场景的希望。这一进展的关键因素之一是用于训练模型的机器人数据的规模。为了获得大规模数据集，先前的方法要么依赖于需要高度人工参与的演示，要么依赖于工程量大的自主数据收集方案，这两种方案都难以扩展。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种替代途径，并利用计算机视觉和自然语言处理中广泛使用的文本到图像基础模型来获取用于机器人学习的有意义的数据，而无需额外的机器人数据。我们将我们的方法称为具有语义图像体验的机器人学习（ROSIE）。具体来说，我们利用最先进的文本到图像扩散模型，并通过在文本指导下修复各种看不见的操作对象、背景和干扰物，在现有的机器人操作数据集之上执行积极的数据增强。通过广泛的现实世界实验，我们表明，以这种方式增强的数据训练的操纵策略能够使用新对象解决完全看不见的任务，并且可以表现得更稳健。新颖的干扰因素。此外，我们发现我们可以通过基于扩散的数据增强进行训练来提高高级机器人学习任务的鲁棒性和泛化性，例如成功检测。该项目的网站和视频可以在diffusion-rosie.github.io 找到

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过语义生成的图像数据增强机器人学习，无需额外机器人数据即可提升其泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统机器人学习依赖人工演示或复杂自主数据收集，难以扩展。需寻找无需额外机器人数据的替代方案以提升学习效率。
AI.method: 利用文本到图像扩散模型，通过文本引导对现有数据集进行语义 inpainting 增强，生成包含新物体、背景和干扰项的合成数据。
AI.result: 增强数据训练的策略能解决全新任务，对新干扰项更鲁棒，并提升高层任务（如成功检测）的泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: 语义生成数据可有效扩展机器人学习规模，无需额外机器人数据即可提升模型鲁棒性与泛化能力。

authors_text: Lujia Jin,Shi Zhao,Lei Zhu,Qian Chen,Yanye Lu
title: One-Pot Multi-Frame Denoising
title_zh: 一锅多帧去噪
comment: Accepted at BMVC 2022 as a Spotlight
comments: Accepted at BMVC 2022 as a Spotlight
abstract: The performance of learning-based denoising largely depends on clean supervision. However, it is difficult to obtain clean images in many scenes. On the contrary, the capture of multiple noisy frames for the same field of view is available and often natural in real life. Therefore, it is necessary to avoid the restriction of clean labels and make full use of noisy data for model training. So we propose an unsupervised learning strategy named one-pot denoising (OPD) for multi-frame images. OPD is the first proposed unsupervised multi-frame denoising (MFD) method. Different from the traditional supervision schemes including both supervised Noise2Clean (N2C) and unsupervised Noise2Noise (N2N), OPD executes mutual supervision among all of the multiple frames, which gives learning more diversity of supervision and allows models to mine deeper into the correlation among frames. N2N has also been proved to be actually a simplified case of the proposed OPD. From the perspectives of data allocation and loss function, two specific implementations, random coupling (RC) and alienation loss (AL), are respectively provided to accomplish OPD during model training. In practice, our experiments demonstrate that OPD behaves as the SOTA unsupervised denoising method and is comparable to supervised N2C methods for synthetic Gaussian and Poisson noise, and real-world optical coherence tomography (OCT) speckle noise.
summary: The performance of learning-based denoising largely depends on clean supervision. However, it is difficult to obtain clean images in many scenes. On the contrary, the capture of multiple noisy frames for the same field of view is available and often natural in real life. Therefore, it is necessary to avoid the restriction of clean labels and make full use of noisy data for model training. So we propose an unsupervised learning strategy named one-pot denoising (OPD) for multi-frame images. OPD is the first proposed unsupervised multi-frame denoising (MFD) method. Different from the traditional supervision schemes including both supervised Noise2Clean (N2C) and unsupervised Noise2Noise (N2N), OPD executes mutual supervision among all of the multiple frames, which gives learning more diversity of supervision and allows models to mine deeper into the correlation among frames. N2N has also been proved to be actually a simplified case of the proposed OPD. From the perspectives of data allocation and loss function, two specific implementations, random coupling (RC) and alienation loss (AL), are respectively provided to accomplish OPD during model training. In practice, our experiments demonstrate that OPD behaves as the SOTA unsupervised denoising method and is comparable to supervised N2C methods for synthetic Gaussian and Poisson noise, and real-world optical coherence tomography (OCT) speckle noise.
abstract_zh: 基于学习的去噪的性能很大程度上取决于干净的监督。然而，在许多场景中很难获得清晰的图像。相反，在现实生活中，可以捕获同一视场的多个噪声帧，并且通常很自然。因此，需要避免干净标签的限制，充分利用噪声数据进行模型训练。因此，我们提出了一种针对多帧图像的无监督学习策略，称为一锅去噪（OPD）。 OPD是第一个提出的无监督多帧去噪（MFD）方法。与传统的监督方案（包括有监督的Noise2Clean（N2C）和无监督的Noise2Noise（N2N））不同，OPD在所有多个帧之间执行相互监督，这使得学习的监督更加多样化，并允许模型更深入地挖掘帧之间的相关性。 N2N 也被证明实际上是所提出的 OPD 的简化情况。从数据分配和损失函数的角度，分别提供了随机耦合（RC）和异化损失（AL）两种具体实现来完成模型训练时的OPD。在实践中，我们的实验表明，OPD 的行为类似于 SOTA 无监督去噪方法，并且与合成高斯和泊松噪声以及现实世界光学相干断层扫描 (OCT) 散斑噪声的监督 N2C 方法相当。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需干净标签的多帧去噪方法OPD，通过多帧噪声图像的相互监督实现去噪。
AI.motivation: 基于学习的去噪方法依赖干净标签，但实际场景中获取干净图像困难，而多帧噪声图像更易获得。
AI.method: 提出无监督学习策略OPD，通过多帧间的相互监督学习，包含随机配对（RC）和异化损失（AL）两种实现方式。
AI.result: OPD在合成高斯/泊松噪声及真实OCT散斑噪声中达到SOTA无监督去噪效果，性能接近监督方法N2C。
AI.conclusion: OPD通过多帧互监督有效利用噪声数据，为无监督去噪提供了新思路并验证了优越性。

authors_text: Kévin Planolles,Marc Chaumont,Frédéric Comby
title: A study on the invariance in security whatever the dimension of images for the steganalysis by deep-learning
title_zh: 通过深度学习进行隐写分析的无论图像维度如何的安全不变性研究
comment: PAPER ACCEPTED TO IEEE ICASSP'2023, GREEK ISLAND OF RHODES, 4-10 JUNE 2023. FAQ can be found there https://www.lirmm.fr/~chaumont/publications/QA-ICASSP2023.pdf
comments: PAPER ACCEPTED TO IEEE ICASSP'2023, GREEK ISLAND OF RHODES, 4-10 JUNE 2023. FAQ can be found there https://www.lirmm.fr/~chaumont/publications/QA-ICASSP2023.pdf
abstract: In this paper, we study the performance invariance of convolutional neural networks when confronted with variable image sizes in the context of a more "wild steganalysis". First, we propose two algorithms and definitions for a fine experimental protocol with datasets owning "similar difficulty" and "similar security". The "smart crop 2" algorithm allows the introduction of the Nearly Nested Image Datasets (NNID) that ensure "a similar difficulty" between various datasets, and a dichotomous research algorithm allows a "similar security". Second, we show that invariance does not exist in state-of-the-art architectures. We also exhibit a difference in behavior depending on whether we test on images larger or smaller than the training images. Finally, based on the experiments, we propose to use the dilated convolution which leads to an improvement of a state-of-the-art architecture.
summary: In this paper, we study the performance invariance of convolutional neural networks when confronted with variable image sizes in the context of a more "wild steganalysis". First, we propose two algorithms and definitions for a fine experimental protocol with datasets owning "similar difficulty" and "similar security". The "smart crop 2" algorithm allows the introduction of the Nearly Nested Image Datasets (NNID) that ensure "a similar difficulty" between various datasets, and a dichotomous research algorithm allows a "similar security". Second, we show that invariance does not exist in state-of-the-art architectures. We also exhibit a difference in behavior depending on whether we test on images larger or smaller than the training images. Finally, based on the experiments, we propose to use the dilated convolution which leads to an improvement of a state-of-the-art architecture.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了在更“疯狂的隐写分析”背景下，面对可变图像大小时卷积神经网络的性能不变性。首先，我们为具有“相似难度”和“相似安全性”的数据集的良好实验协议提出了两种算法和定义。 “智能裁剪2”算法允许引入近嵌套图像数据集（NNID），确保各种数据集之间“相似的难度”，而二分研究算法则允许“相似的安全性”。其次，我们证明最先进的架构中不存在不变性。我们还表现出行为上的差异，具体取决于我们测试的图像是否大于或小于训练图像。最后，根据实验，我们建议使用扩张卷积，从而改进最先进的架构。

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了卷积神经网络在面对不同尺寸图像时的性能不变性问题，特别是在野性隐写分析场景下的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习隐写分析模型在处理不同尺寸图像时可能存在性能差异，影响其实际应用中的安全性与可靠性。
AI.method: 提出'智能裁剪2'算法生成近嵌套图像数据集（NNID）以确保数据集难度相似，并设计二分法研究算法保证安全级别一致；通过实验对比不同图像尺寸下的模型表现。
AI.result: 实验表明主流架构不存在尺寸不变性，模型在测试图像尺寸与训练图像尺寸不匹配时表现显著差异；引入空洞卷积可提升现有架构性能。
AI.conclusion: 图像尺寸变化会显著影响隐写分析模型性能，采用空洞卷积的改进架构能有效提升跨尺寸场景下的分析效果。

search_text: A study on the invariance in security whatever the dimension of images for the steganalysis by deep-learning 通过深度学习进行隐写分析的无论图像维度如何的安全不变性研究 In this paper, we study the performance invariance of convolutional neural networks when confronted with variable image sizes in the context of a more "wild steganalysis". First, we propose two algorithms and definitions for a fine experimental protocol with datasets owning "similar difficulty" and "similar security". The "smart crop 2" algorithm allows the introduction of the Nearly Nested Image Datasets (NNID) that ensure "a similar difficulty" between various datasets, and a dichotomous research algorithm allows a "similar security". Second, we show that invariance does not exist in state-of-the-art architectures. We also exhibit a difference in behavior depending on whether we test on images larger or smaller than the training images. Finally, based on the experiments, we propose to use the dilated convolution which leads to an improvement of a state-of-the-art architecture. 在本文中，我们研究了在更“疯狂的隐写分析”背景下，面对可变图像大小时卷积神经网络的性能不变性。首先，我们为具有“相似难度”和“相似安全性”的数据集的良好实验协议提出了两种算法和定义。 “智能裁剪2”算法允许引入近嵌套图像数据集（NNID），确保各种数据集之间“相似的难度”，而二分研究算法则允许“相似的安全性”。其次，我们证明最先进的架构中不存在不变性。我们还表现出行为上的差异，具体取决于我们测试的图像是否大于或小于训练图像。最后，根据实验，我们建议使用扩张卷积，从而改进最先进的架构。 本研究探讨了卷积神经网络在面对不同尺寸图像时的性能不变性问题，特别是在野性隐写分析场景下的表现。 Kévin Planolles,Marc Chaumont,Frédéric Comby cs.CV,cs.CR

authors_text: Deepak Raina,Kashish Verma,SH Chandrashekhara,Subir Kumar Saha
title: Slim U-Net: Efficient Anatomical Feature Preserving U-net Architecture for Ultrasound Image Segmentation
title_zh: Slim U-Net：用于超声图像分割的有效解剖特征保留 U-net 架构
comment: Accepted in 9th ACM International Conference on Biomedical and Bioinformatics Engineering (ICBBE) 2022 http://www.icbbe.com/
comments: Accepted in 9th ACM International Conference on Biomedical and Bioinformatics Engineering (ICBBE) 2022 http://www.icbbe.com/
abstract: We investigate the applicability of U-Net based models for segmenting Urinary Bladder (UB) in male pelvic view UltraSound (US) images. The segmentation of UB in the US image aids radiologists in diagnosing the UB. However, UB in US images has arbitrary shapes, indistinct boundaries and considerably large inter- and intra-subject variability, making segmentation a quite challenging task. Our study of the state-of-the-art (SOTA) segmentation network, U-Net, for the problem reveals that it often fails to capture the salient characteristics of UB due to the varying shape and scales of anatomy in the noisy US image. Also, U-net has an excessive number of trainable parameters, reporting poor computational efficiency during training. We propose a Slim U-Net to address the challenges of UB segmentation. Slim U-Net proposes to efficiently preserve the salient features of UB by reshaping the structure of U-Net using a less number of 2D convolution layers in the contracting path, in order to preserve and impose them on expanding path. To effectively distinguish the blurred boundaries, we propose a novel annotation methodology, which includes the background area of the image at the boundary of a marked region of interest (RoI), thereby steering the model's attention towards boundaries. In addition, we suggested a combination of loss functions for network training in the complex segmentation of UB. The experimental results demonstrate that Slim U-net is statistically superior to U-net for UB segmentation. The Slim U-net further decreases the number of trainable parameters and training time by 54% and 57.7%, respectively, compared to the standard U-Net, without compromising the segmentation accuracy.
summary: We investigate the applicability of U-Net based models for segmenting Urinary Bladder (UB) in male pelvic view UltraSound (US) images. The segmentation of UB in the US image aids radiologists in diagnosing the UB. However, UB in US images has arbitrary shapes, indistinct boundaries and considerably large inter- and intra-subject variability, making segmentation a quite challenging task. Our study of the state-of-the-art (SOTA) segmentation network, U-Net, for the problem reveals that it often fails to capture the salient characteristics of UB due to the varying shape and scales of anatomy in the noisy US image. Also, U-net has an excessive number of trainable parameters, reporting poor computational efficiency during training. We propose a Slim U-Net to address the challenges of UB segmentation. Slim U-Net proposes to efficiently preserve the salient features of UB by reshaping the structure of U-Net using a less number of 2D convolution layers in the contracting path, in order to preserve and impose them on expanding path. To effectively distinguish the blurred boundaries, we propose a novel annotation methodology, which includes the background area of the image at the boundary of a marked region of interest (RoI), thereby steering the model's attention towards boundaries. In addition, we suggested a combination of loss functions for network training in the complex segmentation of UB. The experimental results demonstrate that Slim U-net is statistically superior to U-net for UB segmentation. The Slim U-net further decreases the number of trainable parameters and training time by 54% and 57.7%, respectively, compared to the standard U-Net, without compromising the segmentation accuracy.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了基于 U-Net 的模型在男性骨盆视图超声 (US) 图像中分割膀胱 (UB) 的适用性。美国图像中 UB 的分割有助于放射科医生诊断 UB。然而，US 图像中的 UB 具有任意形状、不明显的边界以及相当大的对象间和对象内变异性，使得分割成为一项相当具有挑战性的任务。我们针对该问题对最先进 (SOTA) 分割网络 U-Net 的研究表明，由于嘈杂的 US 图像中解剖结构的形状和尺度不同，它常常无法捕获 UB 的显着特征。此外，U-net 的可训练参数过多，导致训练期间的计算效率较差。我们提出了 Slim U-Net 来解决 UB 分割的挑战。 Slim U-Net 提出通过在收缩路径中使用较少数量的 2D 卷积层重塑 U-Net 的结构来有效地保留 UB 的显着特征，以便保留它们并将其强加在扩展路径上。为了有效地区分模糊边界，我们提出了一种新颖的标注方法，该方法将图像的背景区域包含在标记的感兴趣区域（RoI）的边界处，从而将模型的注意力转向边界。此外，我们建议在UB的复杂分割中结合损失函数进行网络训练。实验结果表明，Slim U-net 在 UB 分割方面在统计上优于 U-net。与标准 U-Net 相比，Slim U-net 进一步将可训练参数数量和训练时间分别减少了 54% 和 57.7%，且不影响分割精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的Slim U-Net架构，用于超声图像中尿 bladder 的分割，以解决传统U-Net参数过多和分割效果不佳的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统U-Net在超声图像中因尿 bladder 形状多变、边界模糊及噪声干扰导致分割效果差，且参数过多影响计算效率。
AI.method: 通过减少收缩路径中的2D卷积层数量优化U-Net结构，并引入包含背景区域的边界标注方法及组合损失函数以提升边界区分能力。
AI.result: Slim U-Net相比标准U-Net减少54%参数量和57.7%训练时间，同时保持分割精度，实验验证其在UB分割任务中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: Slim U-Net在保持分割精度的前提下显著提升了计算效率，为超声图像分割提供了更高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Olivier Rukundo
title: Evaluation of Extra Pixel Interpolation with Mask Processing for Medical Image Segmentation with Deep Learning
title_zh: 使用深度学习进行医学图像分割的掩模处理的额外像素插值的评估
abstract: Current mask processing operations rely on interpolation algorithms that do not produce extra pixels, such as nearest neighbor (NN) interpolation, as opposed to algorithms that do produce extra pixels, like bicubic (BIC) or bilinear (BIL) interpolation. In our previous study, the author proposed an alternative approach to NN-based mask processing and evaluated its effects on deep learning training outcomes. In this study, the author evaluated the effects of both BIC-based image and mask processing and BIC-and-NN-based image and mask processing versus NN-based image and mask processing. The evaluation revealed that the BIC-BIC model/network was an 8.9578 % (with image size 256 x 256) and a 1.0496 % (with image size 384 x 384) increase of the NN-NN network compared to the NN-BIC network which was an 8.3127 % (with image size 256 x 256) and a 0.2887 % (with image size 384 x 384) increase of the NN-NN network.
summary: Current mask processing operations rely on interpolation algorithms that do not produce extra pixels, such as nearest neighbor (NN) interpolation, as opposed to algorithms that do produce extra pixels, like bicubic (BIC) or bilinear (BIL) interpolation. In our previous study, the author proposed an alternative approach to NN-based mask processing and evaluated its effects on deep learning training outcomes. In this study, the author evaluated the effects of both BIC-based image and mask processing and BIC-and-NN-based image and mask processing versus NN-based image and mask processing. The evaluation revealed that the BIC-BIC model/network was an 8.9578 % (with image size 256 x 256) and a 1.0496 % (with image size 384 x 384) increase of the NN-NN network compared to the NN-BIC network which was an 8.3127 % (with image size 256 x 256) and a 0.2887 % (with image size 384 x 384) increase of the NN-NN network.
abstract_zh: 当前的掩模处理操作依赖于不产生额外像素的插值算法，例如最近邻（NN）插值，而不是产生额外像素的算法，例如双三次（BIC）或双线性（BIL）插值。在我们之前的研究中，作者提出了一种基于神经网络的掩模处理的替代方法，并评估了其对深度学习训练结果的影响。在本研究中，作者评估了基于 BIC 的图像和掩模处理以及基于 BIC 和 NN 的图像和掩模处理与基于 NN 的图像和掩模处理的效果。评估结果显示，与 NN-BIC 网络相比，BIC-BIC 模型/网络的 NN-NN 网络分别提高了 8.9578%（图像尺寸为 256 x 256）和 1.0496%（图像尺寸为 384 x 384），NN-BIC 网络分别提高了 8.3127%（图像尺寸为 256 x 256）和 0.2887%。 （图像尺寸为384 x 384）增加NN-NN网络。

In our previous study, the author proposed an alternative approach to NN-based mask processing and evaluated its effects on deep learning training outcomes. In this study, the author evaluated the effects of both BIC-based image and mask processing and BIC-and-NN-based image and mask processing versus NN-based image and mask processing. authors_text: Wei Tang,Kangning Cui,Raymond H. Chan
title: A Global and Patch-wise Contrastive Loss for Accurate Automated Exudate Detection
title_zh: 用于准确自动渗出液检测的全局和分片对比损失
comment: 8 pages, 3 figures, 2 tables. To appear in ISBI 2024
comments: 8 pages, 3 figures, 2 tables. To appear in ISBI 2024
abstract: Diabetic retinopathy (DR) is a leading global cause of blindness. Early detection of hard exudates plays a crucial role in identifying DR, which aids in treating diabetes and preventing vision loss. However, the unique characteristics of hard exudates, ranging from their inconsistent shapes to indistinct boundaries, pose significant challenges to existing segmentation techniques. To address these issues, we present a novel supervised contrastive learning framework to optimize hard exudate segmentation. Specifically, we introduce a patch-wise density contrasting scheme to distinguish between areas with varying lesion concentrations, and therefore improve the model's proficiency in segmenting small lesions. To handle the ambiguous boundaries, we develop a discriminative edge inspection module to dynamically analyze the pixels that lie around the boundaries and accurately delineate the exudates. Upon evaluation using the IDRiD dataset and comparison with state-of-the-art frameworks, our method exhibits its effectiveness and shows potential for computer-assisted hard exudate detection. The code to replicate experiments is available at github.com/wetang7/HECL/.
summary: Diabetic retinopathy (DR) is a leading global cause of blindness. Early detection of hard exudates plays a crucial role in identifying DR, which aids in treating diabetes and preventing vision loss. However, the unique characteristics of hard exudates, ranging from their inconsistent shapes to indistinct boundaries, pose significant challenges to existing segmentation techniques. To address these issues, we present a novel supervised contrastive learning framework to optimize hard exudate segmentation. Specifically, we introduce a patch-wise density contrasting scheme to distinguish between areas with varying lesion concentrations, and therefore improve the model's proficiency in segmenting small lesions. To handle the ambiguous boundaries, we develop a discriminative edge inspection module to dynamically analyze the pixels that lie around the boundaries and accurately delineate the exudates. Upon evaluation using the IDRiD dataset and comparison with state-of-the-art frameworks, our method exhibits its effectiveness and shows potential for computer-assisted hard exudate detection. The code to replicate experiments is available at github.com/wetang7/HECL/.
abstract_zh: 糖尿病视网膜病变（DR）是全球导致失明的主要原因。早期检测硬渗出物在识别 DR 中起着至关重要的作用，这有助于治疗糖尿病和预防视力丧失。然而，硬渗出物的独特特征，从不一致的形状到模糊的边界，对现有的分割技术提出了重大挑战。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的监督对比学习框架来优化硬渗出物分割。具体来说，我们引入了一种逐块密度对比方案来区分具有不同病变浓度的区域，从而提高模型分割小病变的熟练程度。为了处理模糊的边界，我们开发了一个判别性边缘检查模块来动态分析边界周围的像素并准确地描绘出渗出物。使用 IDRiD 数据集进行评估并与最先进的框架进行比较后，我们的方法展示了其有效性并显示了计算机辅助硬渗出物检测的潜力。复制实验的代码可在 github.com/wetang7/HECL/ 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合全局与块级对比损失的新框架，用于提高糖尿病视网膜病变中硬性渗出物的自动检测准确性。
AI.motivation: 硬性渗出物形状不规则且边界模糊，现有分割方法难以有效处理，而早期检测对预防视力丧失至关重要。
AI.method: 引入块级密度对比方案区分病变浓度区域，并设计判别性边缘检测模块动态分析边界像素，提升小病灶分割能力。
AI.result: 在IDRiD数据集上验证，方法优于现有先进框架，证明其在计算机辅助渗出物检测中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过对比学习优化分割性能，为糖尿病视网膜病变的自动化检测提供了新思路和工具。

authors_text: Guangyao Zheng,Samson Zhou,Vladimir Braverman,Michael A. Jacobs,Vishwa S. Parekh
title: Selective experience replay compression using coresets for lifelong deep reinforcement learning in medical imaging
title_zh: 使用核心集进行选择性经验回放压缩，以实现医学成像中的终身深度强化学习
abstract: Selective experience replay is a popular strategy for integrating lifelong learning with deep reinforcement learning. Selective experience replay aims to recount selected experiences from previous tasks to avoid catastrophic forgetting. Furthermore, selective experience replay based techniques are model agnostic and allow experiences to be shared across different models. However, storing experiences from all previous tasks make lifelong learning using selective experience replay computationally very expensive and impractical as the number of tasks increase. To that end, we propose a reward distribution-preserving coreset compression technique for compressing experience replay buffers stored for selective experience replay. We evaluated the coreset compression technique on the brain tumor segmentation (BRATS) dataset for the task of ventricle localization and on the whole-body MRI for localization of left knee cap, left kidney, right trochanter, left lung, and spleen. The coreset lifelong learning models trained on a sequence of 10 different brain MR imaging environments demonstrated excellent performance localizing the ventricle with a mean pixel error distance of 12.93 for the compression ratio of 10x. In comparison, the conventional lifelong learning model localized the ventricle with a mean pixel distance of 10.87. Similarly, the coreset lifelong learning models trained on whole-body MRI demonstrated no significant difference (p=0.28) between the 10x compressed coreset lifelong learning models and conventional lifelong learning models for all the landmarks. The mean pixel distance for the 10x compressed models across all the landmarks was 25.30, compared to 19.24 for the conventional lifelong learning models. Our results demonstrate that the potential of the coreset-based ERB compression method for compressing experiences without a significant drop in performance.
summary: Selective experience replay is a popular strategy for integrating lifelong learning with deep reinforcement learning. Selective experience replay aims to recount selected experiences from previous tasks to avoid catastrophic forgetting. Furthermore, selective experience replay based techniques are model agnostic and allow experiences to be shared across different models. However, storing experiences from all previous tasks make lifelong learning using selective experience replay computationally very expensive and impractical as the number of tasks increase. To that end, we propose a reward distribution-preserving coreset compression technique for compressing experience replay buffers stored for selective experience replay. We evaluated the coreset compression technique on the brain tumor segmentation (BRATS) dataset for the task of ventricle localization and on the whole-body MRI for localization of left knee cap, left kidney, right trochanter, left lung, and spleen. The coreset lifelong learning models trained on a sequence of 10 different brain MR imaging environments demonstrated excellent performance localizing the ventricle with a mean pixel error distance of 12.93 for the compression ratio of 10x. In comparison, the conventional lifelong learning model localized the ventricle with a mean pixel distance of 10.87. Similarly, the coreset lifelong learning models trained on whole-body MRI demonstrated no significant difference (p=0.28) between the 10x compressed coreset lifelong learning models and conventional lifelong learning models for all the landmarks. The mean pixel distance for the 10x compressed models across all the landmarks was 25.30, compared to 19.24 for the conventional lifelong learning models. Our results demonstrate that the potential of the coreset-based ERB compression method for compressing experiences without a significant drop in performance.
abstract_zh: 选择性经验重播是将终身学习与深度强化学习相结合的流行策略。选择性经验重播旨在重述之前任务中选定的经验，以避免灾难性遗忘。此外，基于选择性经验重放的技术与模型无关，并且允许在不同模型之间共享经验。然而，随着任务数量的增加，存储所有先前任务的经验使得使用选择性经验重放的终身学习在计算上非常昂贵且不切实际。为此，我们提出了一种保留奖励分配的核心集压缩技术，用于压缩为选择性体验重放而存储的经验重放缓冲区。我们在脑肿瘤分割 (BRATS) 数据集上评估了用于心室定位任务的核心集压缩技术，以及在全身 MRI 上评估用于定位左膝盖、左肾、右转子、左肺和脾脏的核心集压缩技术。在 10 个不同的大脑 MR 成像环境序列上训练的核心集终身学习模型表现出出色的脑室定位性能，在 10 倍压缩比下，平均像素误差距离为 12.93。相比之下，传统的终身学习模型以平均像素距离 10.87 定位心室。同样，在全身 MRI 上训练的核心集终身学习模型表明，对于所有地标，10 倍压缩核心集终身学习模型与传统终身学习模型之间没有显着差异 (p=0.28)。所有地标上 10 倍压缩模型的平均像素距离为 25.30，而传统终身学习模型的平均像素距离为 19.24。我们的结果证明了基于核心集的 ERB 压缩方法在压缩体验而不显着降低性能方面的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于核心集的选择性经验回放压缩技术，用于解决医学影像终身深度强化学习中经验存储成本高的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统选择性经验回放方法需存储所有任务经验，导致计算成本随任务数量增加而剧增，亟需高效压缩方案。
AI.method: 设计奖励分布保持的核心集压缩算法，对经验回放缓冲区进行压缩，减少存储需求同时保留关键信息。
AI.result: 在脑肿瘤分割和全身MRI定位任务中，10倍压缩模型的平均像素误差分别达到12.93和25.30，与传统方法差异无统计学意义（p=0.28）。
AI.conclusion: 核心集压缩方法可有效降低经验存储开销，在保持模型性能的前提下支持医学影像终身学习任务。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于核心集的选择性经验回放压缩技术，用于解决医学影像终身深度强化学习中经验存储成本高的问题。
motivation: 传统选择性经验回放方法需存储所有任务经验，导致计算成本随任务数量增加而剧增，亟需高效压缩方案。
method: 设计奖励分布保持的核心集压缩算法，对经验回放缓冲区进行压缩，减少存储需求同时保留关键信息。
result: 在脑肿瘤分割和全身MRI定位任务中，10倍压缩模型的平均像素误差分别达到12.93和25.30，与传统方法差异无统计学意义（p=0.28）。
conclusion: 核心集压缩方法可有效降低经验存储开销，在保持模型性能的前提下支持医学影像终身学习任务。
search_text: Selective experience replay compression using coresets for lifelong deep reinforcement learning in medical imaging 使用核心集进行选择性经验回放压缩，以实现医学成像中的终身深度强化学习 Selective experience replay is a popular strategy for integrating lifelong learning with deep reinforcement learning. Selective experience replay aims to recount selected experiences from previous tasks to avoid catastrophic forgetting. Furthermore, selective experience replay based techniques are model agnostic and allow experiences to be shared across different models. However, storing experiences from all previous tasks make lifelong learning using selective experience replay computationally very expensive and impractical as the number of tasks increase. To that end, we propose a reward distribution-preserving coreset compression technique for compressing experience replay buffers stored for selective experience replay. We evaluated the coreset compression technique on the brain tumor segmentation (BRATS) dataset for the task of ventricle localization and on the whole-body MRI for localization of left knee cap, left kidney, right trochanter, left lung, and spleen. The coreset lifelong learning models trained on a sequence of 10 different brain MR imaging environments demonstrated excellent performance localizing the ventricle with a mean pixel error distance of 12.93 for the compression ratio of 10x. In comparison, the conventional lifelong learning model localized the ventricle with a mean pixel distance of 10.87. Similarly, the coreset lifelong learning models trained on whole-body MRI demonstrated no significant difference (p=0.28) between the 10x compressed coreset lifelong learning models and conventional lifelong learning models for all the landmarks. The mean pixel distance for the 10x compressed models across all the landmarks was 25.30, compared to 19.24 for the conventional lifelong learning models. Our results demonstrate that the potential of the coreset-based ERB compression method for compressing experiences without a significant drop in performance. 选择性经验重播是将终身学习与深度强化学习相结合的流行策略。选择性经验重播旨在重述之前任务中选定的经验，以避免灾难性遗忘。此外，基于选择性经验重放的技术与模型无关，并且允许在不同模型之间共享经验。然而，随着任务数量的增加，存储所有先前任务的经验使得使用选择性经验重放的终身学习在计算上非常昂贵且不切实际。为此，我们提出了一种保留奖励分配的核心集压缩技术，用于压缩为选择性体验重放而存储的经验重放缓冲区。我们在脑肿瘤分割 (BRATS) 数据集上评估了用于心室定位任务的核心集压缩技术，以及在全身 MRI 上评估用于定位左膝盖、左肾、右转子、左肺和脾脏的核心集压缩技术。在 10 个不同的大脑 MR 成像环境序列上训练的核心集终身学习模型表现出出色的脑室定位性能，在 10 倍压缩比下，平均像素误差距离为 12.93。相比之下，传统的终身学习模型以平均像素距离 10.87 定位心室。同样，在全身 MRI 上训练的核心集终身学习模型表明，对于所有地标，10 倍压缩核心集终身学习模型与传统终身学习模型之间没有显着差异 (p=0.28)。所有地标上 10 倍压缩模型的平均像素距离为 25.30，而传统终身学习模型的平均像素距离为 19.24。我们的结果证明了基于核心集的 ERB 压缩方法在压缩体验而不显着降低性能方面的潜力。 本文提出一种基于核心集的选择性经验回放压缩技术，用于解决医学影像终身深度强化学习中经验存储成本高的问题。 Guangyao Zheng,Samson Zhou,Vladimir Braverman,Michael A. Jacobs,Vishwa S. Parekh cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Marvin Hofer,Daniel Obraczka,Alieh Saeedi,Hanna Köpcke,Erhard Rahm
title: Construction of Knowledge Graphs: State and Challenges
title_zh: 知识图的构建：现状与挑战
abstract: With knowledge graphs (KGs) at the center of numerous applications such as recommender systems and question answering, the need for generalized pipelines to construct and continuously update such KGs is increasing. While the individual steps that are necessary to create KGs from unstructured (e.g. text) and structured data sources (e.g. databases) are mostly well-researched for their one-shot execution, their adoption for incremental KG updates and the interplay of the individual steps have hardly been investigated in a systematic manner so far. In this work, we first discuss the main graph models for KGs and introduce the major requirement for future KG construction pipelines. Next, we provide an overview of the necessary steps to build high-quality KGs, including cross-cutting topics such as metadata management, ontology development, and quality assurance. We then evaluate the state of the art of KG construction w.r.t the introduced requirements for specific popular KGs as well as some recent tools and strategies for KG construction. Finally, we identify areas in need of further research and improvement.
summary: With knowledge graphs (KGs) at the center of numerous applications such as recommender systems and question answering, the need for generalized pipelines to construct and continuously update such KGs is increasing. While the individual steps that are necessary to create KGs from unstructured (e.g. text) and structured data sources (e.g. databases) are mostly well-researched for their one-shot execution, their adoption for incremental KG updates and the interplay of the individual steps have hardly been investigated in a systematic manner so far. In this work, we first discuss the main graph models for KGs and introduce the major requirement for future KG construction pipelines. Next, we provide an overview of the necessary steps to build high-quality KGs, including cross-cutting topics such as metadata management, ontology development, and quality assurance. We then evaluate the state of the art of KG construction w.r.t the introduced requirements for specific popular KGs as well as some recent tools and strategies for KG construction. Finally, we identify areas in need of further research and improvement.
abstract_zh: 随着知识图谱（KG）成为推荐系统和问答系统等众多应用的核心，对构建和持续更新此类知识图谱的通用管道的需求正在不断增加。虽然从非结构化（例如文本）和结构化数据源（例如数据库）创建知识图谱所需的各个步骤大多都对其一次性执行进行了充分研究，但迄今为止，它们对增量知识图谱更新的采用以及各个步骤的相互作用几乎没有以系统的方式进行研究。在这项工作中，我们首先讨论 KG 的主要图模型，并介绍未来 KG 构建管道的主要要求。接下来，我们概述了构建高质量知识图谱的必要步骤，包括元数据管理、本体开发和质量保证等跨领域主题。然后，我们根据特定流行 KG 的引入要求以及 KG 构建的一些最新工具和策略来评估 KG 构建的最新技术。最后，我们确定了需要进一步研究和改进的领域。

AI.tldr: 本文讨论了知识图谱构建的现状与挑战，分析了现有流程的不足并提出未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 知识图谱在多个应用中至关重要，但现有研究对增量更新及步骤间协同的系统性探索不足。
AI.method: 概述知识图谱构建步骤，评估主流工具与技术，分析典型知识图谱的实现情况。
AI.result: 总结了构建流程的核心需求，指出现有工具在动态更新与质量保障方面的局限性。
AI.conclusion: 需进一步研究增量更新机制与跨步骤协同优化方法以提升知识图谱构建效率与质量。

authors_text: Pranav Kadam,Hardik Prajapati,Min Zhang,Jintang Xue,Shan Liu,C. -C. Jay Kuo
title: S3I-PointHop: SO(3)-Invariant PointHop for 3D Point Cloud Classification
title_zh: S3I-PointHop：用于 3D 点云分类的 SO(3)-不变 PointHop
abstract: Many point cloud classification methods are developed under the assumption that all point clouds in the dataset are well aligned with the canonical axes so that the 3D Cartesian point coordinates can be employed to learn features. When input point clouds are not aligned, the classification performance drops significantly. In this work, we focus on a mathematically transparent point cloud classification method called PointHop, analyze its reason for failure due to pose variations, and solve the problem by replacing its pose dependent modules with rotation invariant counterparts. The proposed method is named SO(3)-Invariant PointHop (or S3I-PointHop in short). We also significantly simplify the PointHop pipeline using only one single hop along with multiple spatial aggregation techniques. The idea of exploiting more spatial information is novel. Experiments on the ModelNet40 dataset demonstrate the superiority of S3I-PointHop over traditional PointHop-like methods.
summary: Many point cloud classification methods are developed under the assumption that all point clouds in the dataset are well aligned with the canonical axes so that the 3D Cartesian point coordinates can be employed to learn features. When input point clouds are not aligned, the classification performance drops significantly. In this work, we focus on a mathematically transparent point cloud classification method called PointHop, analyze its reason for failure due to pose variations, and solve the problem by replacing its pose dependent modules with rotation invariant counterparts. The proposed method is named SO(3)-Invariant PointHop (or S3I-PointHop in short). We also significantly simplify the PointHop pipeline using only one single hop along with multiple spatial aggregation techniques. The idea of exploiting more spatial information is novel. Experiments on the ModelNet40 dataset demonstrate the superiority of S3I-PointHop over traditional PointHop-like methods.
abstract_zh: 许多点云分类方法都是在假设数据集中的所有点云与规范轴良好对齐的情况下开发的，以便可以利用 3D 笛卡尔点坐标来学习特征。当输入点云未对齐时，分类性能显着下降。在这项工作中，我们专注于一种称为 PointHop 的数学上透明的点云分类方法，分析其由于位姿变化而失败的原因，并通过用旋转不变的对应模块替换其位姿相关模块来解决问题。所提出的方法被命名为SO(3)-Invariant PointHop（或简称S3I-PointHop）。我们还仅使用一跳以及多种空间聚合技术来显着简化 PointHop 管道。利用更多空间信息的想法是新颖的。 ModelNet40 数据集上的实验证明了 S3I-PointHop 相对于传统的类似 PointHop 方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为S3I-PointHop的3D点云分类方法，通过引入SO(3)不变性解决点云姿态变化导致的分类性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 传统点云分类方法假设点云与坐标轴对齐，当输入点云未对齐时分类性能显著下降，需开发对姿态变化鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 将PointHop中依赖姿态的模块替换为旋转不变模块，简化为单次跳跃结构并结合多尺度空间聚合技术，增强空间信息利用。
AI.result: 在ModelNet40数据集上，S3I-PointHop优于传统PointHop类方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过SO(3)不变性设计和空间信息增强，S3I-PointHop有效解决了姿态变化问题，为点云分类提供了新思路。

authors_text: Qiyuan Fu
title: Snake and Snake Robot Locomotion in Complex, 3-D Terrain
title_zh: 蛇和蛇机器人在复杂的 3D 地形中的运动
comment: This is a dissertation submitted to and accepted by Johns Hopkins University in conformity with the requirements for the degree of Doctor of Philosophy
comments: This is a dissertation submitted to and accepted by Johns Hopkins University in conformity with the requirements for the degree of Doctor of Philosophy
abstract: Snakes can traverse almost all types of environments by bending their elongate bodies in 3-D to interact with the terrain. Similarly, a snake robot is a promising platform to perform critical tasks in various environments. Understanding how 3-D body bending effectively interacts with the terrain for propulsion and stability can not only inform how snakes traverse natural environments, but also allow snake robots to achieve similar performance. How snakes and snake robots move on flat surfaces has been understood well. However, such ideal terrain is rare in natural environments and little was understood about how to generate propulsion and maintain stability in 3-D terrain, except for some studies on arboreal snake locomotion and on robots using geometric planning. To bridge the knowledge gap, we integrated animal experiments and robotic studies in three representative environments: a large smooth step, an uneven arena of blocks of large height variation, and large bumps. We discovered that vertical body bending induces stability challenges but can generate large propulsion. When traversing a large smooth step, a snake robot is challenged by roll instability that increases with the amplitude of vertical bending. The instability can be reduced by body compliance that statistically improves body-terrain contact. Despite this, vertical body bending can potentially allow snakes to push against terrain for propulsion, as demonstrated by corn snakes traversing an uneven arena. A snake robot can generate large propulsion like this if contact is well maintained. Contact feedback control can help accommodate perturbations such as novel terrain geometry or excessive external forces by improving contact. Our findings provide insights into how snakes and snake robots can use vertical body bending for efficient and versatile traversal of the 3-D world stably.
summary: Snakes can traverse almost all types of environments by bending their elongate bodies in 3-D to interact with the terrain. Similarly, a snake robot is a promising platform to perform critical tasks in various environments. How snakes and snake robots move on flat surfaces has been understood well. However, such ideal terrain is rare in natural environments and little was understood about how to generate propulsion and maintain stability in 3-D terrain, except for some studies on arboreal snake locomotion and on robots using geometric planning. To bridge the knowledge gap, we integrated animal experiments and robotic studies in three representative environments: a large smooth step, an uneven arena of blocks of large height variation, and large bumps. We discovered that vertical body bending induces stability challenges but can generate large propulsion. When traversing a large smooth step, a snake robot is challenged by roll instability that increases with the amplitude of vertical bending. The instability can be reduced by body compliance that statistically improves body-terrain contact. Despite this, vertical body bending can potentially allow snakes to push against terrain for propulsion, as demonstrated by corn snakes traversing an uneven arena. A snake robot can generate large propulsion like this if contact is well maintained. Contact feedback control can help accommodate perturbations such as novel terrain geometry or excessive external forces by improving contact. Our findings provide insights into how snakes and snake robots can use vertical body bending for efficient and versatile traversal of the 3-D world stably.
abstract_zh: 蛇可以通过在 3D 中弯曲细长的身体来与地形互动，从而穿越几乎所有类型的环境。同样，蛇形机器人是一个有前途的平台，可以在各种环境中执行关键任务。了解 3D 身体弯曲如何有效地与地形相互作用以获得推进力和稳定性，不仅可以了解蛇如何穿越自然环境，还可以让蛇机器人实现类似的性能。蛇和蛇形机器人如何在平坦的表面上移动已经众所周知。然而，这样的理想地形在自然环境中很少见，除了一些关于树栖蛇运动和使用几何规划的机器人的研究外，人们对如何在 3D 地形中产生推进力和保持稳定性知之甚少。为了弥补知识差距，我们在三个代表性环境中整合了动物实验和机器人研究：一个大的光滑台阶、一个由大高度变化的块组成的不平坦的竞技场和大的颠簸。我们发现身体垂直弯曲会带来稳定性挑战，但会产生巨大的推力。当穿过一个大的光滑台阶时，蛇形机器人会面临滚动不稳定性的挑战，滚动不稳定性随着垂直弯曲的幅度而增加。身体顺应性可以减少不稳定性，从统计上来说，身体顺应性可以改善身体与地形的接触。尽管如此，垂直的身体弯曲可能会让蛇推动地形以获得推进力，正如玉米蛇穿越不平坦的竞技场所证明的那样。如果保持良好的接触，蛇形机器人可以产生如此大的推力。接触反馈控制可以通过改善接触来帮助适应扰动，例如新颖的地形几何形状或过度的外力。我们的研究结果提供了关于蛇和蛇机器人如何利用垂直身体弯曲来稳定、高效、多功能地穿越 3D 世界的见解。

AI.tldr: 研究蛇类和蛇形机器人在复杂三维地形中的运动机制，探索垂直身体弯曲对推进力和稳定性的影
AI.motivation: 尽管蛇类在平坦地形的运动已被理解，但自然环境中复杂三维地形的运动机制尚不清楚，需为蛇形机器人提供稳定高效的运动策略
AI.method: 通过动物实验与机器人研究结合，在三种典型地形（大台阶、高低不平的方块场、大凸起）中测试垂直身体弯曲的运动效果
AI.result: 垂直弯曲可产生大推进力但导致稳定性挑战，通过身体柔性和接触反馈控制可改善接触并缓解失稳问题
AI.conclusion: 垂直身体弯曲为蛇类和蛇形机器人提供高效三维地形穿越方案，需平衡推进力与稳定性控制

search_text: Snake and Snake Robot Locomotion in Complex, 3-D Terrain 蛇和蛇机器人在复杂的 3D 地形中的运动 Snakes can traverse almost all types of environments by bending their elongate bodies in 3-D to interact with the terrain. Similarly, a snake robot is a promising platform to perform critical tasks in various environments. Understanding how 3-D body bending effectively interacts with the terrain for propulsion and stability can not only inform how snakes traverse natural environments, but also allow snake robots to achieve similar performance. How snakes and snake robots move on flat surfaces has been understood well. However, such ideal terrain is rare in natural environments and little was understood about how to generate propulsion and maintain stability in 3-D terrain, except for some studies on arboreal snake locomotion and on robots using geometric planning. To bridge the knowledge gap, we integrated animal experiments and robotic studies in three representative environments: a large smooth step, an uneven arena of blocks of large height variation, and large bumps. We discovered that vertical body bending induces stability challenges but can generate large propulsion. When traversing a large smooth step, a snake robot is challenged by roll instability that increases with the amplitude of vertical bending. The instability can be reduced by body compliance that statistically improves body-terrain contact. Despite this, vertical body bending can potentially allow snakes to push against terrain for propulsion, as demonstrated by corn snakes traversing an uneven arena. A snake robot can generate large propulsion like this if contact is well maintained. Contact feedback control can help accommodate perturbations such as novel terrain geometry or excessive external forces by improving contact. Our findings provide insights into how snakes and snake robots can use vertical body bending for efficient and versatile traversal of the 3-D world stably. 蛇可以通过在 3D 中弯曲细长的身体来与地形互动，从而穿越几乎所有类型的环境。同样，蛇形机器人是一个有前途的平台，可以在各种环境中执行关键任务。了解 3D 身体弯曲如何有效地与地形相互作用以获得推进力和稳定性，不仅可以了解蛇如何穿越自然环境，还可以让蛇机器人实现类似的性能。蛇和蛇形机器人如何在平坦的表面上移动已经众所周知。然而，这样的理想地形在自然环境中很少见，除了一些关于树栖蛇运动和使用几何规划的机器人的研究外，人们对如何在 3D 地形中产生推进力和保持稳定性知之甚少。为了弥补知识差距，我们在三个代表性环境中整合了动物实验和机器人研究：一个大的光滑台阶、一个由大高度变化的块组成的不平坦的竞技场和大的颠簸。我们发现身体垂直弯曲会带来稳定性挑战，但会产生巨大的推力。当穿过一个大的光滑台阶时，蛇形机器人会面临滚动不稳定性的挑战，滚动不稳定性随着垂直弯曲的幅度而增加。身体顺应性可以减少不稳定性，从统计上来说，身体顺应性可以改善身体与地形的接触。尽管如此，垂直的身体弯曲可能会让蛇推动地形以获得推进力，正如玉米蛇穿越不平坦的竞技场所证明的那样。如果保持良好的接触，蛇形机器人可以产生如此大的推力。接触反馈控制可以通过改善接触来帮助适应扰动，例如新颖的地形几何形状或过度的外力。我们的研究结果提供了关于蛇和蛇机器人如何利用垂直身体弯曲来稳定、高效、多功能地穿越 3D 世界的见解。 研究蛇类和蛇形机器人在复杂三维地形中的运动机制，探索垂直身体弯曲对推进力和稳定性的影 Qiyuan Fu physics.bio-ph,cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Ngoc Long Nguyen,Jérémy Anger,Lara Raad,Bruno Galerne,Gabriele Facciolo
title: On The Role of Alias and Band-Shift for Sentinel-2 Super-Resolution
title_zh: 论 Alias 和 Band-Shift 在 Sentinel-2 超分辨率中的作用
abstract: In this work, we study the problem of single-image super-resolution (SISR) of Sentinel-2 imagery. We show that thanks to its unique sensor specification, namely the inter-band shift and alias, that deep-learning methods are able to recover fine details. By training a model using a simple $L_1$ loss, results are free of hallucinated details. For this study, we build a dataset of pairs of images Sentinel-2/PlanetScope to train and evaluate our super-resolution (SR) model.
summary: In this work, we study the problem of single-image super-resolution (SISR) of Sentinel-2 imagery. We show that thanks to its unique sensor specification, namely the inter-band shift and alias, that deep-learning methods are able to recover fine details. By training a model using a simple $L_1$ loss, results are free of hallucinated details. For this study, we build a dataset of pairs of images Sentinel-2/PlanetScope to train and evaluate our super-resolution (SR) model.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们研究了 Sentinel-2 图像的单图像超分辨率 (SISR) 问题。我们证明，由于其独特的传感器规格，即带间偏移和混叠，深度学习方法能够恢复精细的细节。通过使用简单的 $L_1$ 损失训练模型，结果不会出现幻觉细节。在本研究中，我们构建了 Sentinel-2/PlanetScope 图像对的数据集来训练和评估我们的超分辨率 (SR) 模型。

AI.tldr: 研究利用Sentinel-2卫星图像的波段偏移和别名效应，通过深度学习实现高分辨率图像重建。
AI.motivation: 传统超分辨率方法未能有效利用Sentinel-2传感器的波段偏移和别名特性，导致细节恢复不足，需探索更有效的深度学习方法。
AI.method: 采用基于L1损失的深度学习模型，结合Sentinel-2与PlanetScope图像对数据集进行训练，利用波段偏移和别名效应恢复细节。
AI.result: 实验表明，模型能有效恢复Sentinel-2图像的细节，且避免了传统方法中常见的虚假细节生成问题。
AI.conclusion: 证明了Sentinel-2传感器的波段偏移和别名效应在超分辨率中的关键作用，且基于L1损失的模型能有效避免细节幻觉。
