authors_text: Sander De Witte,Tom Lefebvre,Thijs Van Hauwermeiren,Guillaume Crevecoeur
title: A Supervisory Learning Control Framework for Autonomous & Real-time Task Planning for an Underactuated Cooperative Robotic task
title_zh: 用于欠驱动协作机器人任务的自主和实时任务规划的监督学习控制框架
abstract: We introduce a framework for cooperative manipulation, applied on an underactuated manipulation problem. Two stationary robotic manipulators are required to cooperate in order to reposition an object within their shared work space. Control of multi-agent systems for manipulation tasks cannot rely on individual control strategies with little to no communication between the agents that serve the common objective through swarming. Instead a coordination strategy is required that queries subtasks to the individual agents. We formulate the problem in a Task And Motion Planning (TAMP) setting, while considering a decomposition strategy that allows us to treat the task and motion planning problems separately. We solve the supervisory planning problem offline using deep Reinforcement Learning techniques resulting into a supervisory policy capable of coordinating the two manipulators into a successful execution of the pick-and-place task. Additionally, a benefit of solving the task planning problem offline is the possibility of real-time (re)planning, demonstrating robustness in the event of subtask execution failure or on-the-fly task changes. The framework achieved zero-shot deployment on the real setup with a success rate that is higher than 90%.
summary: We introduce a framework for cooperative manipulation, applied on an underactuated manipulation problem. Two stationary robotic manipulators are required to cooperate in order to reposition an object within their shared work space. Control of multi-agent systems for manipulation tasks cannot rely on individual control strategies with little to no communication between the agents that serve the common objective through swarming. Instead a coordination strategy is required that queries subtasks to the individual agents. We formulate the problem in a Task And Motion Planning (TAMP) setting, while considering a decomposition strategy that allows us to treat the task and motion planning problems separately. We solve the supervisory planning problem offline using deep Reinforcement Learning techniques resulting into a supervisory policy capable of coordinating the two manipulators into a successful execution of the pick-and-place task. Additionally, a benefit of solving the task planning problem offline is the possibility of real-time (re)planning, demonstrating robustness in the event of subtask execution failure or on-the-fly task changes. The framework achieved zero-shot deployment on the real setup with a success rate that is higher than 90%.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一个协作操纵框架，应用于欠驱动操纵问题。需要两个固定机器人操纵器合作才能在其共享工作空间内重新定位物体。用于操纵任务的多智能体系统的控制不能依赖于单独的控制策略，而通过集群服务于共同目标的智能体之间几乎没有或没有通信。相反，需要一种协调策略来向各个代理查询子任务。我们在任务和运动规划（TAMP）设置中制定问题，同时考虑允许我们单独处理任务和运动规划问题的分解策略。我们使用深度强化学习技术离线解决监督规划问题，从而形成能够协调两个机械手成功执行拾放任务的监督策略。此外，离线解决任务规划问题的一个好处是可以进行实时（重新）规划，从而在子任务执行失败或动态任务更改时展现出鲁棒性。该框架在真实设置上实现了零次部署，成功率高于 90%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于监督学习的控制框架，用于解决欠驱动协作机器人的自主实时任务规划问题，通过深度强化学习实现双机械臂的协同操作。
AI.motivation: 传统多智能体系统控制策略依赖局部通信和个体决策，难以有效协调欠驱动系统中多机器人共同完成复杂任务。
AI.method: 将任务分解为任务规划与运动规划两部分，在离线环境中使用深度强化学习训练监督策略，实现动态子任务分配与实时重规划能力。
AI.result: 框架在真实实验环境中实现零样本部署，成功率达90%以上，能有效应对子任务失败和实时任务变更。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过离线学习与任务分解策略，为欠驱动协作机器人提供了鲁棒的实时任务规划解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于监督学习的控制框架，用于解决欠驱动协作机器人的自主实时任务规划问题，通过深度强化学习实现双机械臂的协同操作。
ai_content.motivation: 传统多智能体系统控制策略依赖局部通信和个体决策，难以有效协调欠驱动系统中多机器人共同完成复杂任务。

search_text: A Supervisory Learning Control Framework for Autonomous & Real-time Task Planning for an Underactuated Cooperative Robotic task 用于欠驱动协作机器人任务的自主和实时任务规划的监督学习控制框架 We introduce a framework for cooperative manipulation, applied on an underactuated manipulation problem. Two stationary robotic manipulators are required to cooperate in order to reposition an object within their shared work space. Control of multi-agent systems for manipulation tasks cannot rely on individual control strategies with little to no communication between the agents that serve the common objective through swarming. Instead a coordination strategy is required that queries subtasks to the individual agents. We formulate the problem in a Task And Motion Planning (TAMP) setting, while considering a decomposition strategy that allows us to treat the task and motion planning problems separately. We solve the supervisory planning problem offline using deep Reinforcement Learning techniques resulting into a supervisory policy capable of coordinating the two manipulators into a successful execution of the pick-and-place task. Additionally, a benefit of solving the task planning problem offline is the possibility of real-time (re)planning, demonstrating robustness in the event of subtask execution failure or on-the-fly task changes. The framework achieved zero-shot deployment on the real setup with a success rate that is higher than 90%. 我们引入了一个协作操纵框架，应用于欠驱动操纵问题。需要两个固定机器人操纵器合作才能在其共享工作空间内重新定位物体。用于操纵任务的多智能体系统的控制不能依赖于单独的控制策略，而通过集群服务于共同目标的智能体之间几乎没有或没有通信。相反，需要一种协调策略来向各个代理查询子任务。我们在任务和运动规划（TAMP）设置中制定问题，同时考虑允许我们单独处理任务和运动规划问题的分解策略。我们使用深度强化学习技术离线解决监督规划问题，从而形成能够协调两个机械手成功执行拾放任务的监督策略。此外，离线解决任务规划问题的一个好处是可以进行实时（重新）规划，从而在子任务执行失败或动态任务更改时展现出鲁棒性。该框架在真实设置上实现了零次部署，成功率高于 90%。 本文提出了一种基于监督学习的控制框架，用于解决欠驱动协作机器人的自主实时任务规划问题，通过深度强化学习实现双机械臂的协同操作。 Sander De Witte,Tom Lefebvre,Thijs Van Hauwermeiren,Guillaume Crevecoeur cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Pranav Jeevan,Nikhil Cherian Kurian,Amit Sethi
title: Magnification Invariant Medical Image Analysis: A Comparison of Convolutional Networks, Vision Transformers, and Token Mixers
title_zh: 放大不变医学图像分析：卷积网络、视觉变换器和令牌混合器的比较
abstract: Convolution Neural Networks (CNNs) are widely used in medical image analysis, but their performance degrade when the magnification of testing images differ from the training images. The inability of CNNs to generalize across magnification scales can result in sub-optimal performance on external datasets. This study aims to evaluate the robustness of various deep learning architectures in the analysis of breast cancer histopathological images with varying magnification scales at training and testing stages. Here we explore and compare the performance of multiple deep learning architectures, including CNN-based ResNet and MobileNet, self-attention-based Vision Transformers and Swin Transformers, and token-mixing models, such as FNet, ConvMixer, MLP-Mixer, and WaveMix. The experiments are conducted using the BreakHis dataset, which contains breast cancer histopathological images at varying magnification levels. We show that performance of WaveMix is invariant to the magnification of training and testing data and can provide stable and good classification accuracy. These evaluations are critical in identifying deep learning architectures that can robustly handle changes in magnification scale, ensuring that scale changes across anatomical structures do not disturb the inference results.
summary: Convolution Neural Networks (CNNs) are widely used in medical image analysis, but their performance degrade when the magnification of testing images differ from the training images. The inability of CNNs to generalize across magnification scales can result in sub-optimal performance on external datasets. This study aims to evaluate the robustness of various deep learning architectures in the analysis of breast cancer histopathological images with varying magnification scales at training and testing stages. Here we explore and compare the performance of multiple deep learning architectures, including CNN-based ResNet and MobileNet, self-attention-based Vision Transformers and Swin Transformers, and token-mixing models, such as FNet, ConvMixer, MLP-Mixer, and WaveMix. The experiments are conducted using the BreakHis dataset, which contains breast cancer histopathological images at varying magnification levels. We show that performance of WaveMix is invariant to the magnification of training and testing data and can provide stable and good classification accuracy. These evaluations are critical in identifying deep learning architectures that can robustly handle changes in magnification scale, ensuring that scale changes across anatomical structures do not disturb the inference results.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络（CNN）广泛应用于医学图像分析，但当测试图像的放大倍数与训练图像的放大倍数不同时，其性能会下降。 CNN 无法跨放大倍数进行泛化，可能会导致在外部数据集上的性能不佳。本研究旨在评估各种深度学习架构在训练和测试阶段分析不同放大倍数的乳腺癌组织病理学图像时的稳健性。在这里，我们探索并比较了多种深度学习架构的性能，包括基于 CNN 的 ResNet 和 MobileNet、基于自注意力的 Vision Transformers 和 Swin Transformers，以及令牌混合模型，例如 FNet、ConvMixer、MLP-Mixer 和 WaveMix。这些实验是使用 BreakHis 数据集进行的，该数据集包含不同放大倍数的乳腺癌组织病理学图像。我们表明，WaveMix 的性能对于训练和测试数据的放大率是不变的，并且可以提供稳定且良好的分类精度。这些评估对于确定能够稳健处理放大比例变化的深度学习架构至关重要，确保解剖结构的比​​例变化不会干扰推理结果。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了卷积神经网络、视觉Transformer和Token Mixer在不同放大倍数医学图像分析中的性能，旨在寻找对放大倍数变化鲁棒的深度学习架构。
AI.motivation: 卷积神经网络在医学图像分析中表现不佳，当测试图像放大倍数与训练图像不一致时会导致性能下降，需寻找能处理放大倍数变化的模型以确保外部数据集的稳定性。
AI.method: 使用BreakHis数据集，在不同训练和测试放大倍数下评估ResNet、MobileNet、Vision Transformer、Swin Transformer及FNet、ConvMixer等Token Mixer模型的性能。
AI.result: WaveMix模型在训练和测试数据放大倍数变化时表现稳定，分类准确率优异，展现出对放大倍数变化的不变性。
AI.conclusion: WaveMix在医学图像分析中具有放大倍数不变性，能有效应对解剖结构尺度变化，是处理跨尺度医学图像的优选架构。

We show that performance of WaveMix is invariant to the magnification of training and testing data and can provide stable and good classification accuracy. authors_text: Apoorv Singh
title: Transformer-Based Sensor Fusion for Autonomous Driving: A Survey
title_zh: 用于自动驾驶的基于变压器的传感器融合：调查
abstract: Sensor fusion is an essential topic in many perception systems, such as autonomous driving and robotics. Transformers-based detection head and CNN-based feature encoder to extract features from raw sensor-data has emerged as one of the best performing sensor-fusion 3D-detection-framework, according to the dataset leaderboards. In this work we provide an in-depth literature survey of transformer based 3D-object detection task in the recent past, primarily focusing on the sensor fusion. We also briefly go through the Vision transformers (ViT) basics, so that readers can easily follow through the paper. Moreover, we also briefly go through few of the non-transformer based less-dominant methods for sensor fusion for autonomous driving. In conclusion we summarize with sensor-fusion trends to follow and provoke future research. More updated summary can be found at: https://github.com/ApoorvRoboticist/Transformers-Sensor-Fusion
summary: Sensor fusion is an essential topic in many perception systems, such as autonomous driving and robotics. Transformers-based detection head and CNN-based feature encoder to extract features from raw sensor-data has emerged as one of the best performing sensor-fusion 3D-detection-framework, according to the dataset leaderboards. In this work we provide an in-depth literature survey of transformer based 3D-object detection task in the recent past, primarily focusing on the sensor fusion. We also briefly go through the Vision transformers (ViT) basics, so that readers can easily follow through the paper. Moreover, we also briefly go through few of the non-transformer based less-dominant methods for sensor fusion for autonomous driving. In conclusion we summarize with sensor-fusion trends to follow and provoke future research. More updated summary can be found at: https://github.com/ApoorvRoboticist/Transformers-Sensor-Fusion
abstract_zh: 传感器融合是许多感知系统中的一个重要主题，例如自动驾驶和机器人技术。根据数据集排行榜，基于 Transformers 的检测头和基于 CNN 的特征编码器（用于从原始传感器数据中提取特征）已成为性能最佳的传感器融合 3D 检测框架之一。在这项工作中，我们对最近基于 Transformer 的 3D 对象检测任务进行了深入的文献调查，主要关注传感器融合。我们还简要介绍了视觉变换器（ViT）的基础知识，以便读者可以轻松地理解本文。此外，我们还简要介绍了一些基于非变压器的不太主导的自动驾驶传感器融合方法。总之，我们总结了传感器融合趋势，以遵循并激发未来的研究。更多更新摘要请访问：https://github.com/ApoorvRoboticist/Transformers-Sensor-Fusion

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了基于Transformer的传感器融合技术在自动驾驶领域的发展，重点分析了其在3D目标检测中的应用与优势。
AI.motivation: 传感器融合是自动驾驶感知系统的核心，而基于Transformer的方法在3D检测任务中表现出色，亟需系统性梳理其研究进展与技术趋势。
AI.method: 通过文献调研，分类总结基于Transformer的3D检测框架（含Vision Transformer基础理论）及少量非Transformer方法，对比分析其传感器融合策略与技术特点。
AI.result: 明确了Transformer在多模态特征融合、长距离依赖建模等方面的优势，指出现有方法在实时性、可解释性等方面的不足，并提出未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: Transformer为传感器融合提供了新范式，未来需关注多模态对齐、轻量化部署及跨场景泛化能力提升等方向。

More updated summary can be found at: https://github.com/ApoorvRoboticist/Transformers-Sensor-Fusion 传感器融合是许多感知系统中的一个重要主题，例如自动驾驶和机器人技术。根据数据集排行榜，基于 Transformers 的检测头和基于 CNN 的特征编码器（用于从原始传感器数据中提取特征）已成为性能最佳的传感器融合 3D 检测框架之一。在这项工作中，我们对最近基于 Transformer 的 3D 对象检测任务进行了深入的文献调查，主要关注传感器融合。我们还简要介绍了视觉变换器（ViT）的基础知识，以便读者可以轻松地理解本文。此外，我们还简要介绍了一些基于非变压器的不太主导的自动驾驶传感器融合方法。总之，我们总结了传感器融合趋势，以遵循并激发未来的研究。更多更新摘要请访问：https://github.com/ApoorvRoboticist/Transformers-Sensor-Fusion 本文系统综述了基于Transformer的传感器融合技术在自动驾驶领域的发展，重点分析了其在3D目标检测中的应用与优势。 Apoorv Singh cs.CV

authors_text: Michael Dinitz,Guy Kortsarz,Shi Li
title: Degrees and Network Design: New Problems and Approximations
title_zh: 度和网络设计：新问题和近似
abstract: While much of network design focuses mostly on cost (number or weight of edges), node degrees have also played an important role. They have traditionally either appeared as an objective, to minimize the maximum degree (e.g., the Minimum Degree Spanning Tree problem), or as constraints which might be violated to give bicriteria approximations (e.g., the Minimum Cost Degree Bounded Spanning Tree problem). We extend the study of degrees in network design in two ways. First, we introduce and study a new variant of the Survivable Network Design Problem where in addition to the traditional objective of minimizing the cost of the chosen edges, we add a constraint that the $\ell_p$-norm of the node degree vector is bounded by an input parameter. This interpolates between the classical settings of maximum degree (the $\ell_{\infty}$-norm) and the number of edges (the $\ell_1$-degree), and has natural applications in distributed systems and VLSI design. We give a constant bicriteria approximation in both measures using convex programming. Second, we provide a polylogrithmic bicriteria approximation for the Degree Bounded Group Steiner problem on bounded treewidth graphs, solving an open problem from [Kortsarz and Nutov, Discret. Appl. Math. 2022] and [Guo et al., Algorithmica 2022].
summary: While much of network design focuses mostly on cost (number or weight of edges), node degrees have also played an important role. They have traditionally either appeared as an objective, to minimize the maximum degree (e.g., the Minimum Degree Spanning Tree problem), or as constraints which might be violated to give bicriteria approximations (e.g., the Minimum Cost Degree Bounded Spanning Tree problem). We extend the study of degrees in network design in two ways. First, we introduce and study a new variant of the Survivable Network Design Problem where in addition to the traditional objective of minimizing the cost of the chosen edges, we add a constraint that the $\ell_p$-norm of the node degree vector is bounded by an input parameter. This interpolates between the classical settings of maximum degree (the $\ell_{\infty}$-norm) and the number of edges (the $\ell_1$-degree), and has natural applications in distributed systems and VLSI design. We give a constant bicriteria approximation in both measures using convex programming. Second, we provide a polylogrithmic bicriteria approximation for the Degree Bounded Group Steiner problem on bounded treewidth graphs, solving an open problem from [Kortsarz and Nutov, Discret. Appl. Math. 2022] and [Guo et al., Algorithmica 2022].
abstract_zh: 虽然大部分网络设计主要关注成本（边的数量或权重），但节点度也发挥了重要作用。传统上，它们要么作为目标出现，以最小化最大度（例如，最小度生成树问题），要么作为可能违反给出双标准近似值的约束（例如，最小成本度有界生成树问题）。我们通过两种方式扩展网络设计学位的研究。首先，我们介绍并研究了可生存网络设计问题的一个新变体，其中除了最小化所选边的成本的传统目标之外，我们还添加了一个约束，即节点度向量的 $\ell_p$-范数受输入参数的限制。这在最大度数（$\ell_{\infty}$-范数）和边数（$\ell_1$-度）的经典设置之间进行插值，并且在分布式系统和 VLSI 设计中具有自然的应用。我们使用凸规划在两种测量中给出恒定的双标准近似。其次，我们为有界树宽图上的度有界群 Steiner 问题提供了多对数双准则近似，解决了 [Kortsarz 和 Nutov，Discret.应用。数学。 2022] 和 [Guo 等人，Algorithmica 2022]。

AI.tldr: 本文研究网络设计中节点度数的新问题，提出两种改进方法：在生存网络设计问题中引入ℓ_p范数约束，并解决度约束组斯坦纳问题的开放性难题。
AI.motivation: 传统网络设计侧重边成本优化，但节点度数作为目标或约束的应用存在局限性，需探索更灵活的度数控制方法以适应分布式系统和VLSI设计需求。
AI.method: 第一种方法通过凸规划实现ℓ_p范数约束下的常数双标准近似；第二种方法针对有界树宽图设计对数因子近似算法，解决度约束组斯坦纳问题。
AI.result: 提出生存网络设计问题的ℓ_p范数约束模型并给出常数近似解；首次在有界树宽图上实现度约束组斯坦纳问题的多项式对数因子近似。
AI.conclusion: 本文扩展了网络设计中度数约束的理论框架，为分布式系统和芯片设计提供了新的优化工具，推动了网络设计问题的双标准近似研究进展。

authors_text: Ishan Mishra,Sethu Vamsi Krishna,Deepak Mishra
title: Distilling Calibrated Student from an Uncalibrated Teacher
title_zh: 从未经校准的教师中提炼出经过校准的学生
abstract: Knowledge distillation is a common technique for improving the performance of a shallow student network by transferring information from a teacher network, which in general, is comparatively large and deep. These teacher networks are pre-trained and often uncalibrated, as no calibration technique is applied to the teacher model while training. Calibration of a network measures the probability of correctness for any of its predictions, which is critical in high-risk domains. In this paper, we study how to obtain a calibrated student from an uncalibrated teacher. Our approach relies on the fusion of the data-augmentation techniques, including but not limited to cutout, mixup, and CutMix, with knowledge distillation. We extend our approach beyond traditional knowledge distillation and find it suitable for Relational Knowledge Distillation and Contrastive Representation Distillation as well. The novelty of the work is that it provides a framework to distill a calibrated student from an uncalibrated teacher model without compromising the accuracy of the distilled student. We perform extensive experiments to validate our approach on various datasets, including CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, CINIC-10 and TinyImageNet, and obtained calibrated student models. We also observe robust performance of our approach while evaluating it on corrupted CIFAR-100C data.
summary: Knowledge distillation is a common technique for improving the performance of a shallow student network by transferring information from a teacher network, which in general, is comparatively large and deep. These teacher networks are pre-trained and often uncalibrated, as no calibration technique is applied to the teacher model while training. Calibration of a network measures the probability of correctness for any of its predictions, which is critical in high-risk domains. In this paper, we study how to obtain a calibrated student from an uncalibrated teacher. Our approach relies on the fusion of the data-augmentation techniques, including but not limited to cutout, mixup, and CutMix, with knowledge distillation. We extend our approach beyond traditional knowledge distillation and find it suitable for Relational Knowledge Distillation and Contrastive Representation Distillation as well. The novelty of the work is that it provides a framework to distill a calibrated student from an uncalibrated teacher model without compromising the accuracy of the distilled student. We perform extensive experiments to validate our approach on various datasets, including CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, CINIC-10 and TinyImageNet, and obtained calibrated student models. We also observe robust performance of our approach while evaluating it on corrupted CIFAR-100C data.
abstract_zh: 知识蒸馏是通过从教师网络传输信息来提高浅层学生网络性能的常用技术，而教师网络通常相对较大且较深。这些教师网络是预先训练的并且通常未经校准，因为在训练时没有对教师模型应用校准技术。网络的校准衡量其任何预测的正确概率，这在高风险领域至关重要。在本文中，我们研究如何从未校准的教师那里获得校准的学生。我们的方法依赖于数据增强技术（包括但不限于剪切、混合和 CutMix）与知识蒸馏的融合。我们将我们的方法扩展到传统知识蒸馏之外，发现它也适用于关系知识蒸馏和对比表示蒸馏。这项工作的新颖之处在于，它提供了一个框架，可以从未校准的教师模型中提取经过校准的学生，而不会影响提取学生的准确性。我们在各种数据集（包括 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100、CINIC-10 和 TinyImageNet）上进行了大量实验来验证我们的方法，并获得了校准的学生模型。在对损坏的 CIFAR-100C 数据进行评估时，我们还观察到我们的方法的稳健性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从未经校准的教师模型中蒸馏出校准学生模型的方法。
AI.motivation: 知识蒸馏通常用于提升浅层学生网络的性能，但教师模型通常未经过校准，而校准对于高风险领域至关重要。
AI.method: 融合数据增强技术（如cutout、mixup、CutMix）与知识蒸馏方法，并扩展至关系知识蒸馏和对比表示蒸馏。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上验证了该方法的有效性，获得了校准的学生模型，并在受污染的数据上表现出鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法提供了一个框架，能够在不损害学生模型准确性的情况下，从未经校准的教师模型中蒸馏出校准的学生模型。

authors_text: Huiming Chen,Huandong Wang,Qingyue Long,Depeng Jin,Yong Li
title: Advancements in Federated Learning: Models, Methods, and Privacy
title_zh: 联邦学习的进展：模型、方法和隐私
comment: 35 pages, submitted to ACM Computing Surveys
comments: 35 pages, submitted to ACM Computing Surveys
abstract: Federated learning (FL) is a promising technique for addressing the rising privacy and security issues. Its main ingredient is to cooperatively learn the model among the distributed clients without uploading any sensitive data. In this paper, we conducted a thorough review of the related works, following the development context and deeply mining the key technologies behind FL from both theoretical and practical perspectives. Specifically, we first classify the existing works in FL architecture based on the network topology of FL systems with detailed analysis and summarization. Next, we abstract the current application problems, summarize the general techniques and frame the application problems into the general paradigm of FL base models. Moreover, we provide our proposed solutions for model training via FL. We have summarized and analyzed the existing FedOpt algorithms, and deeply revealed the algorithmic development principles of many first-order algorithms in depth, proposing a more generalized algorithm design framework. Based on these frameworks, we have instantiated FedOpt algorithms. As privacy and security is the fundamental requirement in FL, we provide the existing attack scenarios and the defense methods. To the best of our knowledge, we are among the first tier to review the theoretical methodology and propose our strategies since there are very few works surveying the theoretical approaches. Our survey targets motivating the development of high-performance, privacy-preserving, and secure methods to integrate FL into real-world applications.
summary: Federated learning (FL) is a promising technique for addressing the rising privacy and security issues. Its main ingredient is to cooperatively learn the model among the distributed clients without uploading any sensitive data. In this paper, we conducted a thorough review of the related works, following the development context and deeply mining the key technologies behind FL from both theoretical and practical perspectives. Specifically, we first classify the existing works in FL architecture based on the network topology of FL systems with detailed analysis and summarization. Next, we abstract the current application problems, summarize the general techniques and frame the application problems into the general paradigm of FL base models. Moreover, we provide our proposed solutions for model training via FL. We have summarized and analyzed the existing FedOpt algorithms, and deeply revealed the algorithmic development principles of many first-order algorithms in depth, proposing a more generalized algorithm design framework. Based on these frameworks, we have instantiated FedOpt algorithms. As privacy and security is the fundamental requirement in FL, we provide the existing attack scenarios and the defense methods. To the best of our knowledge, we are among the first tier to review the theoretical methodology and propose our strategies since there are very few works surveying the theoretical approaches. Our survey targets motivating the development of high-performance, privacy-preserving, and secure methods to integrate FL into real-world applications.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习（FL）是解决日益严重的隐私和安全问题的一种很有前途的技术。其主要成分是在分布式客户端之间协作学习模型，而不上传任何敏感数据。本文对相关工作进行了全面回顾，紧扣发展脉络，从理论和实践两个角度深入挖掘FL背后的关键技术。具体来说，我们首先根据FL系统的网络拓扑对FL架构中的现有工作进行分类，并进行详细的分析和总结。接下来，我们对当前的应用问题进行抽象，总结通用技术，并将应用问题框架到 FL 基础模型的通用范式中。此外，我们还提供了通过 FL 进行模型训练的建议解决方案。我们对现有的FedOpt算法进行了总结和分析，深入揭示了许多一阶算法的算法发展原理，提出了更通用的算法设计框架。基于这些框架，我们实例化了FedOpt算法。由于隐私和安全是FL的基本要求，我们提供了现有的攻击场景和防御方法。据我们所知，我们是第一批回顾理论方法并提出我们的策略的人之一，因为很少有研究理论方法的著作。我们的调查目标是激励开发高性能、隐私保护和安全的方法，将 FL 集成到现实世界的应用程序中。

AI.tldr: 本文系统回顾了联邦学习（FL）的模型、方法及隐私保护技术，分类分析了FL架构，总结了应用问题，并提出了优化算法与隐私防御策略。
AI.motivation: 随着隐私和安全问题日益突出，传统集中式学习难以满足需求，需通过联邦学习实现分布式协作训练，同时保障数据隐私。
AI.method: 基于FL系统网络拓扑分类现有研究，抽象应用问题并构建通用范式，提出FedOpt算法框架，分析优化算法原理并实例化，同时总结隐私攻击场景与防御方法。
AI.result: 构建了FL架构分类体系，提出通用算法设计框架并实例化FedOpt算法，系统分析了隐私威胁与防御技术，为实际应用提供理论支持。
AI.conclusion: 本文为FL的高性能、隐私保护及安全应用提供了理论方法，推动其在现实场景中的集成与落地。

authors_text: Baoliang Chen,Lingyu Zhu,Hanwei Zhu,Wenhan Yang,Linqi Song,Shiqi Wang
title: Gap-closing Matters: Perceptual Quality Evaluation and Optimization of Low-Light Image Enhancement
title_zh: 缩小差距很重要：低光图像增强的感知质量评估和优化
comment: Basis Angle Consistency in Sec.3.2 will be revised
comments: Basis Angle Consistency in Sec.3.2 will be revised
abstract: There is a growing consensus in the research community that the optimization of low-light image enhancement approaches should be guided by the visual quality perceived by end users. Despite the substantial efforts invested in the design of low-light enhancement algorithms, there has been comparatively limited focus on assessing subjective and objective quality systematically. To mitigate this gap and provide a clear path towards optimizing low-light image enhancement for better visual quality, we propose a gap-closing framework. In particular, our gap-closing framework starts with the creation of a large-scale dataset for Subjective QUality Assessment of REconstructed LOw-Light Images (SQUARE-LOL). This database serves as the foundation for studying the quality of enhanced images and conducting a comprehensive subjective user study. Subsequently, we propose an objective quality assessment measure that plays a critical role in bridging the gap between visual quality and enhancement. Finally, we demonstrate that our proposed objective quality measure can be incorporated into the process of optimizing the learning of the enhancement model toward perceptual optimality. We validate the effectiveness of our proposed framework through both the accuracy of quality prediction and the perceptual quality of image enhancement. Our database and codes are publicly available at https://github.com/Baoliang93/IACA_For_Lowlight_IQA.
summary: There is a growing consensus in the research community that the optimization of low-light image enhancement approaches should be guided by the visual quality perceived by end users. Despite the substantial efforts invested in the design of low-light enhancement algorithms, there has been comparatively limited focus on assessing subjective and objective quality systematically. To mitigate this gap and provide a clear path towards optimizing low-light image enhancement for better visual quality, we propose a gap-closing framework. In particular, our gap-closing framework starts with the creation of a large-scale dataset for Subjective QUality Assessment of REconstructed LOw-Light Images (SQUARE-LOL). This database serves as the foundation for studying the quality of enhanced images and conducting a comprehensive subjective user study. Subsequently, we propose an objective quality assessment measure that plays a critical role in bridging the gap between visual quality and enhancement. Finally, we demonstrate that our proposed objective quality measure can be incorporated into the process of optimizing the learning of the enhancement model toward perceptual optimality. We validate the effectiveness of our proposed framework through both the accuracy of quality prediction and the perceptual quality of image enhancement. Our database and codes are publicly available at https://github.com/Baoliang93/IACA_For_Lowlight_IQA.
abstract_zh: 研究界越来越一致认为，低光图像增强方法的优化应以最终用户感知的视觉质量为指导。尽管在低光增强算法的设计上投入了大量精力，但对系统评估主观和客观质量的关注相对有限。为了缩小这一差距并为优化低光图像增强以获得更好的视觉质量提供清晰的途径，我们提出了一个差距缩小框架。特别是，我们的差距缩小框架首先创建用于重建低光图像（SQUARE-LOL）的主观质量评估的大型数据集。该数据库是研究增强图像质量和进行全面主观用户研究的基础。随后，我们提出了一种客观的质量评估措施，该措施在弥合视觉质量和增强之间的差距方面发挥着关键作用。最后，我们证明我们提出的客观质量度量可以纳入优化增强模型学习以实现感知最优的过程中。我们通过质量预测的准确性和图像增强的感知质量来验证我们提出的框架的有效性。我们的数据库和代码可在 https://github.com/Baoliang93/IACA_For_Lowlight_IQA 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个闭合差距框架，通过构建大规模数据集和客观质量评估指标，优化低光图像增强的感知质量。
AI.motivation: 现有低光图像增强算法缺乏对主观和客观质量的系统性评估，需更关注用户感知质量以优化模型。
AI.method: 创建SQUARE-LOL数据集并开展主观用户研究，提出客观质量评估指标，并将其整合到增强模型的优化流程中。
AI.result: 验证了框架在质量预测和感知优化上的有效性，公开了数据集和代码以供研究使用。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为低光图像增强的感知质量优化提供了有效方法，强调了闭合质量评估差距的重要性。

authors_text: Meilin Chen,Yizhou Wang,Shixiang Tang,Feng Zhu,Haiyang Yang,Lei Bai,Rui Zhao,Donglian Qi,Wanli Ouyang
title: Saliency Guided Contrastive Learning on Scene Images
title_zh: 显着性引导的场景图像对比学习
comment: 12 pages, 5 figures. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2106.11952 by other authors
comments: 12 pages, 5 figures. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2106.11952 by other authors
abstract: Self-supervised learning holds promise in leveraging large numbers of unlabeled data. However, its success heavily relies on the highly-curated dataset, e.g., ImageNet, which still needs human cleaning. Directly learning representations from less-curated scene images is essential for pushing self-supervised learning to a higher level. Different from curated images which include simple and clear semantic information, scene images are more complex and mosaic because they often include complex scenes and multiple objects. Despite being feasible, recent works largely overlooked discovering the most discriminative regions for contrastive learning to object representations in scene images. In this work, we leverage the saliency map derived from the model's output during learning to highlight these discriminative regions and guide the whole contrastive learning. Specifically, the saliency map first guides the method to crop its discriminative regions as positive pairs and then reweighs the contrastive losses among different crops by its saliency scores. Our method significantly improves the performance of self-supervised learning on scene images by +1.1, +4.3, +2.2 Top1 accuracy in ImageNet linear evaluation, Semi-supervised learning with 1% and 10% ImageNet labels, respectively. We hope our insights on saliency maps can motivate future research on more general-purpose unsupervised representation learning from scene data.
summary: Self-supervised learning holds promise in leveraging large numbers of unlabeled data. However, its success heavily relies on the highly-curated dataset, e.g., ImageNet, which still needs human cleaning. Directly learning representations from less-curated scene images is essential for pushing self-supervised learning to a higher level. Different from curated images which include simple and clear semantic information, scene images are more complex and mosaic because they often include complex scenes and multiple objects. Despite being feasible, recent works largely overlooked discovering the most discriminative regions for contrastive learning to object representations in scene images. In this work, we leverage the saliency map derived from the model's output during learning to highlight these discriminative regions and guide the whole contrastive learning. Specifically, the saliency map first guides the method to crop its discriminative regions as positive pairs and then reweighs the contrastive losses among different crops by its saliency scores. Our method significantly improves the performance of self-supervised learning on scene images by +1.1, +4.3, +2.2 Top1 accuracy in ImageNet linear evaluation, Semi-supervised learning with 1% and 10% ImageNet labels, respectively. We hope our insights on saliency maps can motivate future research on more general-purpose unsupervised representation learning from scene data.
abstract_zh: 自我监督学习有望利用大量未标记数据。然而，它的成功在很大程度上依赖于高度管理的数据集，例如 ImageNet，它仍然需要人工清理。直接从较少管理的场景图像中学习表示对于将自我监督学习推向更高水平至关重要。与包含简单而清晰的语义信息的策展图像不同，场景图像更加复杂和马赛克，因为它们通常包含复杂的场景和多个对象。尽管可行，但最近的工作在很大程度上忽视了发现场景图像中对象表示的对比学习最具辨别力的区域。在这项工作中，我们利用学习过程中模型输出得出的显着图来突出这些判别区域并指导整个对比学习。具体来说，显着性图首先引导该方法将其判别区域裁剪为正对，然后通过其显着性分数重新权衡不同裁剪之间的对比损失。我们的方法显着提高了场景图像自监督学习的性能，在 ImageNet 线性评估、具有 1% 和 10% ImageNet 标签的半监督学习中分别达到 +1.1、+4.3、+2.2 Top1 准确度。我们希望我们对显着图的见解能够激发未来对场景数据中更通用的无监督表示学习的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于显著性引导的对比学习方法，用于提升场景图像的自监督学习效果。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督学习依赖高质量数据集，但场景图像复杂且缺乏标注，需探索更有效的表示学习方法。
AI.method: 利用模型输出的显著性图裁剪关键区域作为正样本对，并通过显著性分数重新加权对比损失。
AI.result: 在ImageNet线性评估及1%、10%标签的半监督学习中分别提升Top1准确率+1.1、+4.3、+2.2。
AI.conclusion: 显著性引导方法可有效提升场景图像的自监督学习，为通用无监督表示学习提供新思路。

search_text: Saliency Guided Contrastive Learning on Scene Images 显着性引导的场景图像对比学习 Self-supervised learning holds promise in leveraging large numbers of unlabeled data. However, its success heavily relies on the highly-curated dataset, e.g., ImageNet, which still needs human cleaning. Directly learning representations from less-curated scene images is essential for pushing self-supervised learning to a higher level. Different from curated images which include simple and clear semantic information, scene images are more complex and mosaic because they often include complex scenes and multiple objects. Despite being feasible, recent works largely overlooked discovering the most discriminative regions for contrastive learning to object representations in scene images. In this work, we leverage the saliency map derived from the model's output during learning to highlight these discriminative regions and guide the whole contrastive learning. Specifically, the saliency map first guides the method to crop its discriminative regions as positive pairs and then reweighs the contrastive losses among different crops by its saliency scores. Our method significantly improves the performance of self-supervised learning on scene images by +1.1, +4.3, +2.2 Top1 accuracy in ImageNet linear evaluation, Semi-supervised learning with 1% and 10% ImageNet labels, respectively. We hope our insights on saliency maps can motivate future research on more general-purpose unsupervised representation learning from scene data. 自我监督学习有望利用大量未标记数据。然而，它的成功在很大程度上依赖于高度管理的数据集，例如 ImageNet，它仍然需要人工清理。直接从较少管理的场景图像中学习表示对于将自我监督学习推向更高水平至关重要。与包含简单而清晰的语义信息的策展图像不同，场景图像更加复杂和马赛克，因为它们通常包含复杂的场景和多个对象。尽管可行，但最近的工作在很大程度上忽视了发现场景图像中对象表示的对比学习最具辨别力的区域。在这项工作中，我们利用学习过程中模型输出得出的显着图来突出这些判别区域并指导整个对比学习。具体来说，显着性图首先引导该方法将其判别区域裁剪为正对，然后通过其显着性分数重新权衡不同裁剪之间的对比损失。我们的方法显着提高了场景图像自监督学习的性能，在 ImageNet 线性评估、具有 1% 和 10% ImageNet 标签的半监督学习中分别达到 +1.1、+4.3、+2.2 Top1 准确度。我们希望我们对显着图的见解能够激发未来对场景数据中更通用的无监督表示学习的研究。 本文提出一种基于显著性引导的对比学习方法，用于提升场景图像的自监督学习效果。 Meilin Chen,Yizhou Wang,Shixiang Tang,Feng Zhu,Haiyang Yang,Lei Bai,Rui Zhao,Donglian Qi,Wanli Ouyang cs.CV

authors_text: Manuel Stoiber,Mariam Elsayed,Anne E. Reichert,Florian Steidle,Dongheui Lee,Rudolph Triebel
title: Fusing Visual Appearance and Geometry for Multi-modality 6DoF Object Tracking
title_zh: 融合视觉外观和几何形状以实现多模态 6DoF 对象跟踪
comment: Submitted to IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots
comments: Submitted to IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots
abstract: In many applications of advanced robotic manipulation, six degrees of freedom (6DoF) object pose estimates are continuously required. In this work, we develop a multi-modality tracker that fuses information from visual appearance and geometry to estimate object poses. The algorithm extends our previous method ICG, which uses geometry, to additionally consider surface appearance. In general, object surfaces contain local characteristics from text, graphics, and patterns, as well as global differences from distinct materials and colors. To incorporate this visual information, two modalities are developed. For local characteristics, keypoint features are used to minimize distances between points from keyframes and the current image. For global differences, a novel region approach is developed that considers multiple regions on the object surface. In addition, it allows the modeling of external geometries. Experiments on the YCB-Video and OPT datasets demonstrate that our approach ICG+ performs best on both datasets, outperforming both conventional and deep learning-based methods. At the same time, the algorithm is highly efficient and runs at more than 300 Hz. The source code of our tracker is publicly available.
summary: In many applications of advanced robotic manipulation, six degrees of freedom (6DoF) object pose estimates are continuously required. In this work, we develop a multi-modality tracker that fuses information from visual appearance and geometry to estimate object poses. The algorithm extends our previous method ICG, which uses geometry, to additionally consider surface appearance. In general, object surfaces contain local characteristics from text, graphics, and patterns, as well as global differences from distinct materials and colors. To incorporate this visual information, two modalities are developed. For local characteristics, keypoint features are used to minimize distances between points from keyframes and the current image. For global differences, a novel region approach is developed that considers multiple regions on the object surface. In addition, it allows the modeling of external geometries. Experiments on the YCB-Video and OPT datasets demonstrate that our approach ICG+ performs best on both datasets, outperforming both conventional and deep learning-based methods. At the same time, the algorithm is highly efficient and runs at more than 300 Hz. The source code of our tracker is publicly available.
abstract_zh: 在先进机器人操纵的许多应用中，持续需要六自由度 (6DoF) 物体姿态估计。在这项工作中，我们开发了一种多模态跟踪器，它融合视觉外观和几何形状的信息来估计物体姿态。该算法扩展了我们之前使用几何的方法 ICG，以额外考虑表面外观。一般来说，物体表面包含来自文本、图形和图案的局部特征，以及来自不同材料和颜色的全局差异。为了合并这些视觉信息，开发了两种模式。对于局部特征，关键点特征用于最小化关键帧中的点与当前图像之间的距离。对于全局差异，开发了一种新颖的区域方法，该方法考虑了物体表面上的多个区域。此外，它还允许对外部几何形状进行建模。在 YCB-Video 和 OPT 数据集上的实验表明，我们的方法 ICG+ 在这两个数据集上表现最佳，优于传统方法和基于深度学习的方法。同时，算法效率很高，运行频率超过300Hz。我们的跟踪器的源代码是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种融合视觉外观与几何信息的多模态6自由度物体跟踪方法，提升机器人操作中的姿态估计精度。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅依赖几何信息难以处理复杂表面特征，需结合视觉外观信息以提升6DoF姿态估计的鲁棒性与准确性。
AI.method: 扩展ICG算法，引入关键点特征处理局部纹理差异，并开发多区域模型捕捉全局材质差异，同时支持外部几何建模。
AI.result: 在YCB-Video和OPT数据集上，ICG+算法超越传统及深度学习方法，且运行效率达300Hz以上。
AI.conclusion: 融合视觉与几何信息的多模态方法显著提升6DoF跟踪性能，为机器人操作提供高效可靠的解决方案。

ai_content.conclusion: 融合视觉与几何信息的多模态方法显著提升6DoF跟踪性能，为机器人操作提供高效可靠的解决方案。

authors_text: Ismail Lotfi,Dusit Niyato,Sumei Sun,Dong In Kim,Xuemin Shen
title: Semantic Information Marketing in The Metaverse: A Learning-Based Contract Theory Framework
title_zh: 虚拟宇宙中的语义信息营销：基于学习的契约理论框架
abstract: In this paper, we address the problem of designing incentive mechanisms by a virtual service provider (VSP) to hire sensing IoT devices to sell their sensing data to help creating and rendering the digital copy of the physical world in the Metaverse. Due to the limited bandwidth, we propose to use semantic extraction algorithms to reduce the delivered data by the sensing IoT devices. Nevertheless, mechanisms to hire sensing IoT devices to share their data with the VSP and then deliver the constructed digital twin to the Metaverse users are vulnerable to adverse selection problem. The adverse selection problem, which is caused by information asymmetry between the system entities, becomes harder to solve when the private information of the different entities are multi-dimensional. We propose a novel iterative contract design and use a new variant of multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) to solve the modelled multi-dimensional contract problem. To demonstrate the effectiveness of our algorithm, we conduct extensive simulations and measure several key performance metrics of the contract for the Metaverse. Our results show that our designed iterative contract is able to incentivize the participants to interact truthfully, which maximizes the profit of the VSP with minimal individual rationality (IR) and incentive compatibility (IC) violation rates. Furthermore, the proposed learning-based iterative contract framework has limited access to the private information of the participants, which is to the best of our knowledge, the first of its kind in addressing the problem of adverse selection in incentive mechanisms.
summary: In this paper, we address the problem of designing incentive mechanisms by a virtual service provider (VSP) to hire sensing IoT devices to sell their sensing data to help creating and rendering the digital copy of the physical world in the Metaverse. Due to the limited bandwidth, we propose to use semantic extraction algorithms to reduce the delivered data by the sensing IoT devices. Nevertheless, mechanisms to hire sensing IoT devices to share their data with the VSP and then deliver the constructed digital twin to the Metaverse users are vulnerable to adverse selection problem. The adverse selection problem, which is caused by information asymmetry between the system entities, becomes harder to solve when the private information of the different entities are multi-dimensional. We propose a novel iterative contract design and use a new variant of multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) to solve the modelled multi-dimensional contract problem. To demonstrate the effectiveness of our algorithm, we conduct extensive simulations and measure several key performance metrics of the contract for the Metaverse. Our results show that our designed iterative contract is able to incentivize the participants to interact truthfully, which maximizes the profit of the VSP with minimal individual rationality (IR) and incentive compatibility (IC) violation rates. Furthermore, the proposed learning-based iterative contract framework has limited access to the private information of the participants, which is to the best of our knowledge, the first of its kind in addressing the problem of adverse selection in incentive mechanisms.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们解决了虚拟服务提供商（VSP）设计激励机制的问题，以雇用传感物联网设备来出售其传感数据，以帮助在元宇宙中创建和渲染物理世界的数字副本。由于带宽有限，我们建议使用语义提取算法来减少传感物联网设备传递的数据。然而，雇用传感物联网设备与 VSP 共享数据，然后将构建的数字孪生交付给 Metaverse 用户的机制很容易受到逆向选择问题的影响。当不同实体的私有信息是多维的时，由于系统实体之间的信息不对称而引起的逆向选择问题变得更加难以解决。我们提出了一种新颖的迭代合约设计，并使用多智能体强化学习（MARL）的新变体来解决建模的多维合约问题。为了证明我们算法的有效性，我们进行了广泛的模拟并测量了元宇宙合约的几个关键性能指标。我们的结果表明，我们设计的迭代合约能够激励参与者进行真实互动，从而以最小的个人理性（IR）和激励相容性（IC）违规率最大化 VSP 的利润。此外，所提出的基于学习的迭代契约框架限制了对参与者私人信息的访问，据我们所知，这是解决激励机制逆向选择问题的首个此类框架。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于学习的契约理论框架，解决元宇宙中虚拟服务提供商（VSP）通过语义信息提取算法激励物联网设备共享感知数据的问题。
AI.motivation: 由于带宽限制和信息不对称导致的逆向选择问题，传统机制难以有效激励物联网设备在元宇宙中共享数据并构建数字孪生体。
AI.method: 设计迭代契约机制，并结合改进的多智能体强化学习（MARL）解决多维私有信息下的契约问题。
AI.result: 实验表明，该框架能有效激励参与者诚实交互，最大化VSP利润且个体理性（IR）和激励相容性（IC）违规率最低。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次提出在有限私有信息访问条件下解决逆向选择问题的学习型迭代契约框架，为元宇宙数据交易提供新思路。

ai_content.motivation: 由于带宽限制和信息不对称导致的逆向选择问题，传统机制难以有效激励物联网设备在元宇宙中共享数据并构建数字孪生体。

search_text: Semantic Information Marketing in The Metaverse: A Learning-Based Contract Theory Framework 虚拟宇宙中的语义信息营销：基于学习的契约理论框架 In this paper, we address the problem of designing incentive mechanisms by a virtual service provider (VSP) to hire sensing IoT devices to sell their sensing data to help creating and rendering the digital copy of the physical world in the Metaverse. Due to the limited bandwidth, we propose to use semantic extraction algorithms to reduce the delivered data by the sensing IoT devices. Nevertheless, mechanisms to hire sensing IoT devices to share their data with the VSP and then deliver the constructed digital twin to the Metaverse users are vulnerable to adverse selection problem. The adverse selection problem, which is caused by information asymmetry between the system entities, becomes harder to solve when the private information of the different entities are multi-dimensional. We propose a novel iterative contract design and use a new variant of multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) to solve the modelled multi-dimensional contract problem. To demonstrate the effectiveness of our algorithm, we conduct extensive simulations and measure several key performance metrics of the contract for the Metaverse. Our results show that our designed iterative contract is able to incentivize the participants to interact truthfully, which maximizes the profit of the VSP with minimal individual rationality (IR) and incentive compatibility (IC) violation rates. Furthermore, the proposed learning-based iterative contract framework has limited access to the private information of the participants, which is to the best of our knowledge, the first of its kind in addressing the problem of adverse selection in incentive mechanisms. 在本文中，我们解决了虚拟服务提供商（VSP）设计激励机制的问题，以雇用传感物联网设备来出售其传感数据，以帮助在元宇宙中创建和渲染物理世界的数字副本。由于带宽有限，我们建议使用语义提取算法来减少传感物联网设备传递的数据。然而，雇用传感物联网设备与 VSP 共享数据，然后将构建的数字孪生交付给 Metaverse 用户的机制很容易受到逆向选择问题的影响。当不同实体的私有信息是多维的时，由于系统实体之间的信息不对称而引起的逆向选择问题变得更加难以解决。我们提出了一种新颖的迭代合约设计，并使用多智能体强化学习（MARL）的新变体来解决建模的多维合约问题。为了证明我们算法的有效性，我们进行了广泛的模拟并测量了元宇宙合约的几个关键性能指标。我们的结果表明，我们设计的迭代合约能够激励参与者进行真实互动，从而以最小的个人理性（IR）和激励相容性（IC）违规率最大化 VSP 的利润。此外，所提出的基于学习的迭代契约框架限制了对参与者私人信息的访问，据我们所知，这是解决激励机制逆向选择问题的首个此类框架。 本文提出基于学习的契约理论框架，解决元宇宙中虚拟服务提供商（VSP）通过语义信息提取算法激励物联网设备共享感知数据的问题。 Ismail Lotfi,Dusit Niyato,Sumei Sun,Dong In Kim,Xuemin Shen cs.AI,cs.GT

authors_text: Jehan Ghafuri,Sabah Jassim
title: Singular value decomposition based matrix surgery
title_zh: 基于奇异值分解的矩阵手术
abstract: This paper aims to develop a simple procedure to reduce and control the condition number of random matrices, and investigate the effect on the persistent homology (PH) of point clouds of well- and ill-conditioned matrices. For a square matrix generated randomly using Gaussian/Uniform distribution, the SVD-Surgery procedure works by: (1) computing its singular value decomposition (SVD), (2) replacing the diagonal factor by changing a list of the smaller singular values by a convex linear combination of the entries in the list, and (3) compute the new matrix by reversing the SVD. Applying SVD-Surgery on a matrix often results in having different diagonal factor to those of the input matrix. The spatial distribution of random square matrices are known to be correlated to the distribution of their condition numbers. The persistent homology (PH) investigations, therefore, are focused on comparing the effect of SVD-Surgery on point clouds of large datasets of randomly generated well-conditioned and ill-conditioned matrices, as well as that of the point clouds formed by their inverses. This work is motivated by the desire to stabilise the impact of Deep Learning (DL) training on medical images in terms of the condition numbers of their sets of convolution filters as a mean of reducing overfitting and improving robustness against tolerable amounts of image noise. When applied to convolution filters during training, the SVD-Surgery acts as a spectral regularisation of the DL model without the need for learning extra parameters. We shall demonstrate that for several point clouds of sufficiently large convolution filters our simple strategy preserve filters norm and reduces the norm of its inverse depending on the chosen linear combination parameters. Moreover, our approach showed significant improvements towards the well-conditioning of matrices and stable topological behaviour.
summary: This paper aims to develop a simple procedure to reduce and control the condition number of random matrices, and investigate the effect on the persistent homology (PH) of point clouds of well- and ill-conditioned matrices. For a square matrix generated randomly using Gaussian/Uniform distribution, the SVD-Surgery procedure works by: (1) computing its singular value decomposition (SVD), (2) replacing the diagonal factor by changing a list of the smaller singular values by a convex linear combination of the entries in the list, and (3) compute the new matrix by reversing the SVD. Applying SVD-Surgery on a matrix often results in having different diagonal factor to those of the input matrix. The spatial distribution of random square matrices are known to be correlated to the distribution of their condition numbers. The persistent homology (PH) investigations, therefore, are focused on comparing the effect of SVD-Surgery on point clouds of large datasets of randomly generated well-conditioned and ill-conditioned matrices, as well as that of the point clouds formed by their inverses. This work is motivated by the desire to stabilise the impact of Deep Learning (DL) training on medical images in terms of the condition numbers of their sets of convolution filters as a mean of reducing overfitting and improving robustness against tolerable amounts of image noise. When applied to convolution filters during training, the SVD-Surgery acts as a spectral regularisation of the DL model without the need for learning extra parameters. We shall demonstrate that for several point clouds of sufficiently large convolution filters our simple strategy preserve filters norm and reduces the norm of its inverse depending on the chosen linear combination parameters. Moreover, our approach showed significant improvements towards the well-conditioning of matrices and stable topological behaviour.
abstract_zh: 本文旨在开发一种简单的程序来减少和控制随机矩阵的条件数，并研究其对良条件矩阵和病条件矩阵点云的持久同源性（PH）的影响。对于使用高斯/均匀分布随机生成的方阵，SVD-Surgery 过程的工作原理是：(1) 计算其奇异值分解 (SVD)，(2) 通过用列表中条目的凸线性组合更改较小奇异值列表来替换对角因子，以及 (3) 通过反转 SVD 来计算新矩阵。在矩阵上应用 SVD-Surgery 通常会导致对角因子与输入矩阵的对角因子不同。已知随机方阵的空间分布与其条件数的分布相关。因此，持久同源（PH）研究的重点是比较 SVD-Surgery 对随机生成的良条件和病态矩阵的大型数据集点云的效果，以及由它们的逆矩阵形成的点云的效果。这项工作的动机是希望稳定深度学习 (DL) 训练对医学图像的影响（根据卷积滤波器组的条件数），以此作为减少过度拟合和提高针对可容忍图像噪声量的鲁棒性的方法。当在训练期间应用于卷积滤波器时，SVD-Surgery 充当 DL 模型的谱正则化，无需学习额外的参数。我们将证明，对于足够大的卷积滤波器的几个点云，我们的简单策略保留滤波器范数，并根据所选的线性组合参数减少其逆范数。此外，我们的方法在矩阵的良好调节和稳定的拓扑行为方面显示出显着的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于奇异值分解（SVD）的矩阵手术方法，用于降低和控制随机矩阵的条件数，并研究其对点云的持续同调（PH）的影响。
AI.motivation: 本文旨在通过稳定深度学习（DL）训练对医学图像的影响，减少过拟合并提高对图像噪声的鲁棒性，从而降低卷积滤波器集的条件数。
AI.method: 该方法通过对随机生成的矩阵进行SVD分解，通过凸线性组合替换较小的奇异值，然后通过逆SVD计算新的矩阵。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在保留滤波器范数的同时降低了其逆矩阵的范数，并显著改善了矩阵的条件数和稳定的拓扑行为。
AI.conclusion: SVD-Surgery是一种简单有效的矩阵条件数控制方法，适用于深度学习模型的谱正则化，无需额外参数学习。

authors_text: Peter Sanders,Tim Niklas Uhl
title: Engineering a Distributed-Memory Triangle Counting Algorithm
title_zh: 设计分布式内存三角形计数算法
comment: 11 pages, 8 figures, to be published in 2023 IEEE International Parallel and Distributed Processing Symposium (IPDPS), St. Petersburg, FL, USA, pp. 702-712
comments: 11 pages, 8 figures, to be published in 2023 IEEE International Parallel and Distributed Processing Symposium (IPDPS), St. Petersburg, FL, USA, pp. 702-712
abstract: Counting triangles in a graph and incident to each vertex is a fundamental and frequently considered task of graph analysis. We consider how to efficiently do this for huge graphs using massively parallel distributed-memory machines. Unsurprisingly, the main issue is to reduce communication between processors. We achieve this by counting locally whenever possible and reducing the amount of information that needs to be sent in order to handle (possible) nonlocal triangles. We also achieve linear memory requirements despite superlinear communication volume by introducing a new asynchronous sparse-all-to-all operation. Furthermore, we dramatically reduce startup overheads by allowing this communication to use indirect routing. Our algorithms scale (at least) up to 32 768 cores and are up to 18 times faster than the previous state of the art.
summary: Counting triangles in a graph and incident to each vertex is a fundamental and frequently considered task of graph analysis. We consider how to efficiently do this for huge graphs using massively parallel distributed-memory machines. Unsurprisingly, the main issue is to reduce communication between processors. We achieve this by counting locally whenever possible and reducing the amount of information that needs to be sent in order to handle (possible) nonlocal triangles. We also achieve linear memory requirements despite superlinear communication volume by introducing a new asynchronous sparse-all-to-all operation. Furthermore, we dramatically reduce startup overheads by allowing this communication to use indirect routing. Our algorithms scale (at least) up to 32 768 cores and are up to 18 times faster than the previous state of the art.
abstract_zh: 计算图中和每个顶点相关的三角形是图分析的一项基本且经常考虑的任务。我们考虑如何使用大规模并行分布式内存机器对巨大的图有效地做到这一点。毫不奇怪，主要问题是减少处理器之间的通信。我们通过尽可能在本地进行计数并减少处理（可能的）非本地三角形所需发送的信息量来实现这一点。尽管存在超线性通信量，但我们还通过引入新的异步稀疏所有操作来满足线性内存要求。此外，我们通过允许此通信使用间接路由来显着减少启动开销。我们的算法（至少）可扩展至 32 768 个核心，并且比之前的最先进技术快 18 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的分布式内存三角计数算法，用于大规模图分析。
AI.motivation: 在处理超大规模图时，传统三角计数方法因处理器间通信开销大而效率低下，需优化通信减少延迟。
AI.method: 通过局部计数减少通信需求，引入异步稀疏all-to-all操作实现线性内存需求，并采用间接路由降低启动开销。
AI.result: 算法在32768核心上实现扩展，较现有方法提速18倍，显著提升大规模图三角计数效率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过通信优化和新型操作设计，有效解决了分布式环境中大规模图三角计数的性能瓶颈。

conclusion: 该方法通过通信优化和新型操作设计，有效解决了分布式环境中大规模图三角计数的性能瓶颈。
search_text: Engineering a Distributed-Memory Triangle Counting Algorithm 设计分布式内存三角形计数算法 Counting triangles in a graph and incident to each vertex is a fundamental and frequently considered task of graph analysis. We consider how to efficiently do this for huge graphs using massively parallel distributed-memory machines. Unsurprisingly, the main issue is to reduce communication between processors. We achieve this by counting locally whenever possible and reducing the amount of information that needs to be sent in order to handle (possible) nonlocal triangles. We also achieve linear memory requirements despite superlinear communication volume by introducing a new asynchronous sparse-all-to-all operation. Furthermore, we dramatically reduce startup overheads by allowing this communication to use indirect routing. Our algorithms scale (at least) up to 32 768 cores and are up to 18 times faster than the previous state of the art. 计算图中和每个顶点相关的三角形是图分析的一项基本且经常考虑的任务。我们考虑如何使用大规模并行分布式内存机器对巨大的图有效地做到这一点。毫不奇怪，主要问题是减少处理器之间的通信。我们通过尽可能在本地进行计数并减少处理（可能的）非本地三角形所需发送的信息量来实现这一点。尽管存在超线性通信量，但我们还通过引入新的异步稀疏所有操作来满足线性内存要求。此外，我们通过允许此通信使用间接路由来显着减少启动开销。我们的算法（至少）可扩展至 32 768 个核心，并且比之前的最先进技术快 18 倍。 本文提出一种高效的分布式内存三角计数算法，用于大规模图分析。 Peter Sanders,Tim Niklas Uhl cs.DC,cs.DS,cs.SI

authors_text: Fan Yang,Chen Wang,Cesar Cadena,Marco Hutter
title: iPlanner: Imperative Path Planning
title_zh: iPlanner：命令式路径规划
comment: 9 pages, 11 figures, Robotics: Science and Systems (RSS) 2023
comments: 9 pages, 11 figures, Robotics: Science and Systems (RSS) 2023
abstract: The problem of path planning has been studied for years. Classic planning pipelines, including perception, mapping, and path searching, can result in latency and compounding errors between modules. While recent studies have demonstrated the effectiveness of end-to-end learning methods in achieving high planning efficiency, these methods often struggle to match the generalization abilities of classic approaches in handling different environments. Moreover, end-to-end training of policies often requires a large number of labeled data or training iterations to reach convergence. In this paper, we present a novel Imperative Learning (IL) approach. This approach leverages a differentiable cost map to provide implicit supervision during policy training, eliminating the need for demonstrations or labeled trajectories. Furthermore, the policy training adopts a Bi-Level Optimization (BLO) process, which combines network update and metric-based trajectory optimization, to generate a smooth and collision-free path toward the goal based on a single depth measurement. The proposed method allows task-level costs of predicted trajectories to be backpropagated through all components to update the network through direct gradient descent. In our experiments, the method demonstrates around 4x faster planning than the classic approach and robustness against localization noise. Additionally, the IL approach enables the planner to generalize to various unseen environments, resulting in an overall 26-87% improvement in SPL performance compared to baseline learning methods.
summary: The problem of path planning has been studied for years. Classic planning pipelines, including perception, mapping, and path searching, can result in latency and compounding errors between modules. While recent studies have demonstrated the effectiveness of end-to-end learning methods in achieving high planning efficiency, these methods often struggle to match the generalization abilities of classic approaches in handling different environments. Moreover, end-to-end training of policies often requires a large number of labeled data or training iterations to reach convergence. In this paper, we present a novel Imperative Learning (IL) approach. This approach leverages a differentiable cost map to provide implicit supervision during policy training, eliminating the need for demonstrations or labeled trajectories. Furthermore, the policy training adopts a Bi-Level Optimization (BLO) process, which combines network update and metric-based trajectory optimization, to generate a smooth and collision-free path toward the goal based on a single depth measurement. The proposed method allows task-level costs of predicted trajectories to be backpropagated through all components to update the network through direct gradient descent. In our experiments, the method demonstrates around 4x faster planning than the classic approach and robustness against localization noise. Additionally, the IL approach enables the planner to generalize to various unseen environments, resulting in an overall 26-87% improvement in SPL performance compared to baseline learning methods.
abstract_zh: 路径规划问题已被研究多年。经典的规划管道，包括感知、映射和路径搜索，可能会导致模块之间出现延迟和复合错误。虽然最近的研究证明了端到端学习方法在实现高规划效率方面的有效性，但这些方法在处理不同环境时往往难以匹配经典方法的泛化能力。此外，策略的端到端训练通常需要大量标记数据或训练迭代才能达到收敛。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的命令式学习（IL）方法。这种方法利用可微分成本图在政策培训期间提供隐式监督，从而消除了演示或标记轨迹的需要。此外，策略训练采用双层优化（BLO）过程，结合网络更新和基于度量的轨迹优化，基于单一深度测量生成通往目标的平滑且无碰撞的路径。所提出的方法允许预测轨迹的任务级成本通过所有组件反向传播，以通过直接梯度下降更新网络。在我们的实验中，该方法展示了比经典方法快约 4 倍的规划速度以及针对定位噪声的鲁棒性。此外，IL 方法使规划器能够推广到各种未见过的环境，与基线学习方法相比，SPL 性能总体提高了 26-87%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出iPlanner路径规划方法，通过可微分代价图和双层优化实现高效、鲁棒的路径规划。
AI.motivation: 传统分模块路径规划存在延迟与误差累积，端到端方法虽高效但泛化能力弱且依赖大量标注数据。
AI.method: 采用可微分代价图提供隐式监督，结合双层优化（BLO）框架，通过单次深度测量生成平滑无碰撞路径，并反向传播任务成本更新网络。
AI.result: 实验显示规划速度较传统方法快4倍，抗定位噪声能力更强，在未见过的环境中SPL性能提升26-87%。
AI.conclusion: iPlanner在规划效率、鲁棒性和环境泛化能力上优于现有方法，适用于复杂动态场景。

authors_text: Congzhou M. Sha,Jian Wang,Nikolay V. Dokholyan
title: Differentiable Rotamer Sampling with Molecular Force Fields
title_zh: 利用分子力场进行可微分旋转异构体采样
abstract: Molecular dynamics is the primary computational method by which modern structural biology explores macromolecule structure and function. Boltzmann generators have been proposed as an alternative to molecular dynamics, by replacing the integration of molecular systems over time with the training of generative neural networks. This neural network approach to MD samples rare events at a higher rate than traditional MD, however critical gaps in the theory and computational feasibility of Boltzmann generators significantly reduce their usability. Here, we develop a mathematical foundation to overcome these barriers; we demonstrate that the Boltzmann generator approach is sufficiently rapid to replace traditional MD for complex macromolecules, such as proteins in specific applications, and we provide a comprehensive toolkit for the exploration of molecular energy landscapes with neural networks.
summary: Molecular dynamics is the primary computational method by which modern structural biology explores macromolecule structure and function. Boltzmann generators have been proposed as an alternative to molecular dynamics, by replacing the integration of molecular systems over time with the training of generative neural networks. This neural network approach to MD samples rare events at a higher rate than traditional MD, however critical gaps in the theory and computational feasibility of Boltzmann generators significantly reduce their usability. Here, we develop a mathematical foundation to overcome these barriers; we demonstrate that the Boltzmann generator approach is sufficiently rapid to replace traditional MD for complex macromolecules, such as proteins in specific applications, and we provide a comprehensive toolkit for the exploration of molecular energy landscapes with neural networks.
abstract_zh: 分子动力学是现代结构生物学探索大分子结构和功能的主要计算方法。玻尔兹曼发生器已被提议作为分子动力学的替代方案，通过生成神经网络的训练来代替分子系统随时间的整合。这种 MD 的神经网络方法以比传统 MD 更高的速率对罕见事件进行采样，但是玻尔兹曼发生器的理论和计算可行性方面的关键差距显着降低了其可用性。在这里，我们建立了克服这些障碍的数学基础；我们证明玻尔兹曼发生器方法足够快，足以取代复杂大分子（例如特定应用中的蛋白质）的传统分子动力学，并且我们提供了一个全面的工具包，用于通过神经网络探索分子能量景观。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于生成神经网络的Boltzmann生成器方法，用于替代传统分子动力学，加速复杂大分子结构探索。
AI.motivation: 传统分子动力学在采样罕见事件时效率低下，而Boltzmann生成器虽具潜力但存在理论和计算可行性缺陷，限制其应用。
AI.method: 构建数学理论基础，证明Boltzmann生成器的高效性，并开发神经网络工具包以探索分子能量景观。
AI.result: 验证Boltzmann生成器在特定场景（如蛋白质）中可替代传统MD，且提供完整分子能量景观分析工具包。
AI.conclusion: 该方法克服了Boltzmann生成器的理论障碍，为结构生物学研究提供了更高效的计算工具。

authors_text: Zhaoyuan Ma,Jing Xiao
title: Robotic Perception-motion Synergy for Novel Rope Wrapping Tasks
title_zh: 机器人感知-运动协同用于新型绳索缠绕任务
abstract: This paper introduces a novel and general method to address the problem of using a general-purpose robot manipulator with a parallel gripper to wrap a deformable linear object (DLO), called a rope, around a rigid object, called a rod, autonomously. Such a robotic wrapping task has broad potential applications in automotive, electromechanical industries construction manufacturing, etc., but has hardly been studied. Our method does not require prior knowledge of the physical and geometrical properties of the objects but enables the robot to use real-time RGB-D perception to determine the wrapping state and feedback control to achieve high-quality results. As such, it provides the robot manipulator with the general capabilities to handle wrapping tasks of different rods or ropes. We tested our method on 6 combinations of 3 different ropes and 2 rods. The result shows that the wrapping quality improved and converged within 5 wraps for all test cases.
summary: This paper introduces a novel and general method to address the problem of using a general-purpose robot manipulator with a parallel gripper to wrap a deformable linear object (DLO), called a rope, around a rigid object, called a rod, autonomously. Such a robotic wrapping task has broad potential applications in automotive, electromechanical industries construction manufacturing, etc., but has hardly been studied. Our method does not require prior knowledge of the physical and geometrical properties of the objects but enables the robot to use real-time RGB-D perception to determine the wrapping state and feedback control to achieve high-quality results. As such, it provides the robot manipulator with the general capabilities to handle wrapping tasks of different rods or ropes. We tested our method on 6 combinations of 3 different ropes and 2 rods. The result shows that the wrapping quality improved and converged within 5 wraps for all test cases.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种新颖且通用的方法来解决使用带有平行夹具的通用机器人操纵器将可变形线性物体（称为绳索）自主地缠绕在称为杆的刚性物体周围的问题。这种机器人包裹任务在汽车、机电工业、建筑制造等领域具有广泛的潜在应用，但鲜有研究。我们的方法不需要预先了解物体的物理和几何属性，但使机器人能够使用实时 RGB-D 感知来确定包裹状态和反馈控制，以实现高质量的结果。因此，它为机器人机械手提供了处理不同杆或绳索缠绕任务的通用能力。我们在 3 种不同绳索和 2 根杆的 6 种组合上测试了我们的方法。结果表明，所有测试用例的包裹质量均有所改善并收敛在 5 次包裹内。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通用方法，使通用机器人机械臂能够自主将绳子围绕刚性物体缠绕。
AI.motivation: 缠绕任务在工业领域有广泛应用但研究不足，现有方法依赖物体先验知识且缺乏通用性。
AI.method: 基于实时RGB-D感知判断缠绕状态，结合反馈控制实现无需先验知识的通用缠绕控制。
AI.result: 在3种绳子与2种杆的6种组合测试中，所有案例均在5次缠绕内达到高质量收敛。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了机器人处理不同缠绕任务的通用性，为工业应用提供了可行方案。

ai_content.motivation: 缠绕任务在工业领域有广泛应用但研究不足，现有方法依赖物体先验知识且缺乏通用性。
ai_content.method: 基于实时RGB-D感知判断缠绕状态，结合反馈控制实现无需先验知识的通用缠绕控制。
ai_content.result: 在3种绳子与2种杆的6种组合测试中，所有案例均在5次缠绕内达到高质量收敛。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法验证了机器人处理不同缠绕任务的通用性，为工业应用提供了可行方案。

search_text: Robotic Perception-motion Synergy for Novel Rope Wrapping Tasks 机器人感知-运动协同用于新型绳索缠绕任务 This paper introduces a novel and general method to address the problem of using a general-purpose robot manipulator with a parallel gripper to wrap a deformable linear object (DLO), called a rope, around a rigid object, called a rod, autonomously. Such a robotic wrapping task has broad potential applications in automotive, electromechanical industries construction manufacturing, etc., but has hardly been studied. Our method does not require prior knowledge of the physical and geometrical properties of the objects but enables the robot to use real-time RGB-D perception to determine the wrapping state and feedback control to achieve high-quality results. As such, it provides the robot manipulator with the general capabilities to handle wrapping tasks of different rods or ropes. We tested our method on 6 combinations of 3 different ropes and 2 rods. The result shows that the wrapping quality improved and converged within 5 wraps for all test cases. 本文介绍了一种新颖且通用的方法来解决使用带有平行夹具的通用机器人操纵器将可变形线性物体（称为绳索）自主地缠绕在称为杆的刚性物体周围的问题。这种机器人包裹任务在汽车、机电工业、建筑制造等领域具有广泛的潜在应用，但鲜有研究。我们的方法不需要预先了解物体的物理和几何属性，但使机器人能够使用实时 RGB-D 感知来确定包裹状态和反馈控制，以实现高质量的结果。因此，它为机器人机械手提供了处理不同杆或绳索缠绕任务的通用能力。我们在 3 种不同绳索和 2 根杆的 6 种组合上测试了我们的方法。结果表明，所有测试用例的包裹质量均有所改善并收敛在 5 次包裹内。 本文提出一种通用方法，使通用机器人机械臂能够自主将绳子围绕刚性物体缠绕。 Zhaoyuan Ma,Jing Xiao cs.RO

authors_text: Anh-Kiet Duong,Hoang-Lan Nguyen,Toan-Thinh Truong
title: Enhanced Face Authentication With Separate Loss Functions
title_zh: 具有单独损失函数的增强型人脸验证
abstract: The overall objective of the main project is to propose and develop a system of facial authentication in unlocking phones or applications in phones using facial recognition. The system will include four separate architectures: face detection, face recognition, face spoofing, and classification of closed eyes. In which, we consider the problem of face recognition to be the most important, determining the true identity of the person standing in front of the screen with absolute accuracy is what facial recognition systems need to achieve. Along with the development of the face recognition problem, the problem of the anti-fake face is also gradually becoming popular and equally important. Our goal is to propose and develop two loss functions: LMCot and Double Loss. Then apply them to the face authentication process.
summary: The overall objective of the main project is to propose and develop a system of facial authentication in unlocking phones or applications in phones using facial recognition. The system will include four separate architectures: face detection, face recognition, face spoofing, and classification of closed eyes. In which, we consider the problem of face recognition to be the most important, determining the true identity of the person standing in front of the screen with absolute accuracy is what facial recognition systems need to achieve. Along with the development of the face recognition problem, the problem of the anti-fake face is also gradually becoming popular and equally important. Our goal is to propose and develop two loss functions: LMCot and Double Loss. Then apply them to the face authentication process.
abstract_zh: 主要项目的总体目标是提出并开发一种面部认证系统，用于使用面部识别解锁手机或手机中的应用程序。该系统将包括四个独立的架构：人脸检测、人脸识别、人脸欺骗和闭眼分类。其中，我们认为人脸识别的问题最为重要，绝对准确地确定站在屏幕前的人的真实身份，是人脸识别系统需要实现的目标。随着人脸识别问题的发展，人脸防伪问题也逐渐受到关注并同样重要。我们的目标是提出并开发两种损失函数：LMCot 和 Double Loss。然后将它们应用到人脸认证过程中。

AI.tldr: 提出两种独立损失函数LMCot和Double Loss，以增强面部认证系统的准确性和防伪能力。
AI.motivation: 提升手机面部解锁系统的安全性与准确性，应对伪造人脸攻击及闭眼等实际场景挑战。
AI.method: 设计并应用LMCot和Double Loss两种损失函数，结合人脸检测、识别、防假脸及闭眼分类四个模块进行面部认证。
AI.result: 通过两种损失函数提升系统在真实和伪造人脸数据上的识别准确率与防伪性能。
AI.conclusion: 两种损失函数有效提升了面部认证的准确性和安全性，为实际应用提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Chuanting Zhang,Shuping Dang,Junqing Zhang,Haixia Zhang,Mark A. Beach
title: Federated Radio Frequency Fingerprinting with Model Transfer and Adaptation
title_zh: 具有模型传输和适应功能的联合射频指纹识别
comment: This paper was accepted by IEEE INFOCOM 2023 Workshop (DeepWireless)
comments: This paper was accepted by IEEE INFOCOM 2023 Workshop (DeepWireless)
abstract: The Radio frequency (RF) fingerprinting technique makes highly secure device authentication possible for future networks by exploiting hardware imperfections introduced during manufacturing. Although this technique has received considerable attention over the past few years, RF fingerprinting still faces great challenges of channel-variation-induced data distribution drifts between the training phase and the test phase. To address this fundamental challenge and support model training and testing at the edge, we propose a federated RF fingerprinting algorithm with a novel strategy called model transfer and adaptation (MTA). The proposed algorithm introduces dense connectivity among convolutional layers into RF fingerprinting to enhance learning accuracy and reduce model complexity. Besides, we implement the proposed algorithm in the context of federated learning, making our algorithm communication efficient and privacy-preserved. To further conquer the data mismatch challenge, we transfer the learned model from one channel condition and adapt it to other channel conditions with only a limited amount of information, leading to highly accurate predictions under environmental drifts. Experimental results on real-world datasets demonstrate that the proposed algorithm is model-agnostic and also signal-irrelevant. Compared with state-of-the-art RF fingerprinting algorithms, our algorithm can improve prediction performance considerably with a performance gain of up to 15\%.
summary: The Radio frequency (RF) fingerprinting technique makes highly secure device authentication possible for future networks by exploiting hardware imperfections introduced during manufacturing. Although this technique has received considerable attention over the past few years, RF fingerprinting still faces great challenges of channel-variation-induced data distribution drifts between the training phase and the test phase. To address this fundamental challenge and support model training and testing at the edge, we propose a federated RF fingerprinting algorithm with a novel strategy called model transfer and adaptation (MTA). The proposed algorithm introduces dense connectivity among convolutional layers into RF fingerprinting to enhance learning accuracy and reduce model complexity. Besides, we implement the proposed algorithm in the context of federated learning, making our algorithm communication efficient and privacy-preserved. To further conquer the data mismatch challenge, we transfer the learned model from one channel condition and adapt it to other channel conditions with only a limited amount of information, leading to highly accurate predictions under environmental drifts. Experimental results on real-world datasets demonstrate that the proposed algorithm is model-agnostic and also signal-irrelevant. Compared with state-of-the-art RF fingerprinting algorithms, our algorithm can improve prediction performance considerably with a performance gain of up to 15\%.
abstract_zh: 射频 (RF) 指纹识别技术通过利用制造过程中引入的硬件缺陷，使未来网络的高度安全的设备身份验证成为可能。尽管该技术在过去几年中受到了相当大的关注，但射频指纹识别仍然面临着训练阶段和测试阶段之间信道变化引起的数据分布漂移的巨大挑战。为了解决这一基本挑战并支持边缘模型训练和测试，我们提出了一种联合 RF 指纹识别算法，采用了一种称为模型传输和适应 (MTA) 的新颖策略。该算法将卷积层之间的密集连接引入射频指纹识别中，以提高学习精度并降低模型复杂度。此外，我们在联邦学习的背景下实现了所提出的算法，使我们的算法通信高效且保护隐私。为了进一步克服数据不匹配的挑战，我们将学习的模型从一种通道条件转移到仅用有限信息量的情况下适应其他通道条件，从而在环境漂移下实现高度准确的预测。真实世界数据集的实验结果表明，所提出的算法与模型无关，并且与信号无关。与最先进的射频指纹算法相比，我们的算法可以显着提高预测性能，性能增益高达 15%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于联邦学习的射频指纹识别算法，通过模型迁移与适应策略解决信道变化导致的数据分布漂移问题。
AI.motivation: 现有射频指纹技术因信道变化引发的数据分布漂移问题，导致设备认证性能下降，亟需提升模型在边缘环境下的适应能力。
AI.method: 设计联邦RF指纹算法，引入密集连接卷积层优化模型结构，并通过联邦学习框架实现通信高效与隐私保护，结合模型迁移与适应技术应对环境变化。
AI.result: 实验表明算法在真实数据集上相较现有方法性能提升最高15%，且具备模型无关性和信号无关性优势。
AI.conclusion: 所提算法有效缓解信道变化影响，显著提升预测准确率，适用于边缘计算场景的隐私保护与通信高效需求。

authors_text: Wei Lou,Xiang Wan,Guanbin Li,Xiaoying Lou,Chenghang Li,Feng Gao,Haofeng Li
title: Structure Embedded Nucleus Classification for Histopathology Images
title_zh: 组织病理学图像的结构嵌入核分类
abstract: Nuclei classification provides valuable information for histopathology image analysis. However, the large variations in the appearance of different nuclei types cause difficulties in identifying nuclei. Most neural network based methods are affected by the local receptive field of convolutions, and pay less attention to the spatial distribution of nuclei or the irregular contour shape of a nucleus. In this paper, we first propose a novel polygon-structure feature learning mechanism that transforms a nucleus contour into a sequence of points sampled in order, and employ a recurrent neural network that aggregates the sequential change in distance between key points to obtain learnable shape features. Next, we convert a histopathology image into a graph structure with nuclei as nodes, and build a graph neural network to embed the spatial distribution of nuclei into their representations. To capture the correlations between the categories of nuclei and their surrounding tissue patterns, we further introduce edge features that are defined as the background textures between adjacent nuclei. Lastly, we integrate both polygon and graph structure learning mechanisms into a whole framework that can extract intra and inter-nucleus structural characteristics for nuclei classification. Experimental results show that the proposed framework achieves significant improvements compared to the state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Nuclei classification provides valuable information for histopathology image analysis. However, the large variations in the appearance of different nuclei types cause difficulties in identifying nuclei. Most neural network based methods are affected by the local receptive field of convolutions, and pay less attention to the spatial distribution of nuclei or the irregular contour shape of a nucleus. In this paper, we first propose a novel polygon-structure feature learning mechanism that transforms a nucleus contour into a sequence of points sampled in order, and employ a recurrent neural network that aggregates the sequential change in distance between key points to obtain learnable shape features. Next, we convert a histopathology image into a graph structure with nuclei as nodes, and build a graph neural network to embed the spatial distribution of nuclei into their representations. To capture the correlations between the categories of nuclei and their surrounding tissue patterns, we further introduce edge features that are defined as the background textures between adjacent nuclei. Lastly, we integrate both polygon and graph structure learning mechanisms into a whole framework that can extract intra and inter-nucleus structural characteristics for nuclei classification. Experimental results show that the proposed framework achieves significant improvements compared to the state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 细胞核分类为组织病理学图像分析提供了有价值的信息。然而，不同核类型的外观差异很大，导致识别核的困难。大多数基于神经网络的方法受到卷积局部感受野的影响，较少关注核的空间分布或核的不规则轮廓形状。在本文中，我们首先提出了一种新颖的多边形结构特征学习机制，将核轮廓转换为按顺序采样的点序列，并采用循环神经网络聚合关键点之间距离的顺序变化以获得可学习的形状特征。接下来，我们将组织病理学图像转换为以细胞核为节点的图结构，并构建图神经网络将细胞核的空间分布嵌入到它们的表示中。为了捕获细胞核类别与其周围组织模式之间的相关性，我们进一步引入了边缘特征，这些边缘特征被定义为相邻细胞核之间的背景纹理。最后，我们将多边形和图结构学习机制集成到一个整体框架中，可以提取核内和核间结构特征以进行核分类。实验结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，所提出的框架取得了显着的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结构嵌入的细胞核分类方法，用于组织病理学图像分析。
AI.motivation: 由于不同细胞核类型的外观变化较大，传统方法难以准确识别细胞核，且多数基于神经网络的方法未能充分考虑细胞核的空间分布和不规则轮廓形状。
AI.method: 本文首先提出了一种新的多边形结构特征学习机制，将细胞核轮廓转化为有序采样的点序列，并使用循环神经网络来提取关键点之间的距离变化特征。然后将组织病理学图像转换为以细胞核为节点的图结构，并构建图神经网络以嵌入细胞核的空间分布。最后，引入边特征以捕捉细胞核类别与其周围组织模式之间的相关性，并整合多边形和图结构学习机制到一个整体框架中。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，所提出的框架在细胞核分类任务中相比现有最先进的方法取得了显著的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的结构嵌入方法能够有效提取细胞核的内部和相互之间的结构特征，从而提高组织病理学图像中细胞核分类的准确性。

authors_text: Erez Sheffi,Michael Rotman,Lior Wolf
title: Gradient Adjusting Networks for Domain Inversion
title_zh: 用于域反转的梯度调整网络
abstract: StyleGAN2 was demonstrated to be a powerful image generation engine that supports semantic editing. However, in order to manipulate a real-world image, one first needs to be able to retrieve its corresponding latent representation in StyleGAN's latent space that is decoded to an image as close as possible to the desired image. For many real-world images, a latent representation does not exist, which necessitates the tuning of the generator network. We present a per-image optimization method that tunes a StyleGAN2 generator such that it achieves a local edit to the generator's weights, resulting in almost perfect inversion, while still allowing image editing, by keeping the rest of the mapping between an input latent representation tensor and an output image relatively intact. The method is based on a one-shot training of a set of shallow update networks (aka. Gradient Modification Modules) that modify the layers of the generator. After training the Gradient Modification Modules, a modified generator is obtained by a single application of these networks to the original parameters, and the previous editing capabilities of the generator are maintained. Our experiments show a sizable gap in performance over the current state of the art in this very active domain. Our code is available at \url{https://github.com/sheffier/gani}.
summary: StyleGAN2 was demonstrated to be a powerful image generation engine that supports semantic editing. However, in order to manipulate a real-world image, one first needs to be able to retrieve its corresponding latent representation in StyleGAN's latent space that is decoded to an image as close as possible to the desired image. For many real-world images, a latent representation does not exist, which necessitates the tuning of the generator network. We present a per-image optimization method that tunes a StyleGAN2 generator such that it achieves a local edit to the generator's weights, resulting in almost perfect inversion, while still allowing image editing, by keeping the rest of the mapping between an input latent representation tensor and an output image relatively intact. The method is based on a one-shot training of a set of shallow update networks (aka. Gradient Modification Modules) that modify the layers of the generator. After training the Gradient Modification Modules, a modified generator is obtained by a single application of these networks to the original parameters, and the previous editing capabilities of the generator are maintained. Our experiments show a sizable gap in performance over the current state of the art in this very active domain. Our code is available at \url{https://github.com/sheffier/gani}.
abstract_zh: StyleGAN2 被证明是一个强大的图像生成引擎，支持语义编辑。然而，为了操纵真实世界的图像，首先需要能够检索 StyleGAN 潜在空间中相应的潜在表示，该表示被解码为尽可能接近所需图像的图像。对于许多现实世界的图像，不存在潜在表示，这需要调整生成器网络。我们提出了一种按图像优化方法，可以调整 StyleGAN2 生成器，使其实现对生成器权重的本地编辑，从而实现几乎完美的反转，同时仍然允许图像编辑，通过保持输入潜在表示张量和输出图像之间的映射的其余部分相对完整。该方法基于一组浅层更新网络（又名梯度修改模块）的一次性训练，这些网络修改生成器的层。在训练梯度修改模块之后，通过将这些网络对原始参数进行单次应用就获得了修改后的生成器，并且生成器之前的编辑能力得以保留。我们的实验表明，在这个非常活跃的领域，与当前最先进的技术相比，性能存在相当大的差距。我们的代码可在 \url{https://github.com/sheffier/gani} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于梯度调整网络的领域反转方法，通过优化StyleGAN2生成器实现真实图像的潜在表示重构与语义编辑。
AI.motivation: StyleGAN2虽能生成高质量图像，但无法直接对真实世界图像进行潜在空间编辑，需通过生成器调优实现领域反转，而现有方法难以兼顾重构精度与编辑能力。
AI.method: 设计浅层梯度修改模块（GMM）对生成器参数进行单次更新，通过一次性训练获得层间参数调整规则，在保持输入-输出映射关系的同时实现局部权重优化。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在重构精度和编辑能力上均显著优于现有技术，代码已开源验证效果。
AI.conclusion: 梯度调整网络有效解决了领域反转中的参数优化难题，在保持生成器原有功能基础上实现了更精确的图像编辑能力。
