authors_text: Prashant Bhat,Bahram Zonooz,Elahe Arani
title: Task-Aware Information Routing from Common Representation Space in Lifelong Learning
title_zh: 终身学习中公共表示空间的任务感知信息路由
comment: Accepted as a conference paper at ICLR 2023
comments: Accepted as a conference paper at ICLR 2023
abstract: Intelligent systems deployed in the real world suffer from catastrophic forgetting when exposed to a sequence of tasks. Humans, on the other hand, acquire, consolidate, and transfer knowledge between tasks that rarely interfere with the consolidated knowledge. Accompanied by self-regulated neurogenesis, continual learning in the brain is governed by a rich set of neurophysiological processes that harbor different types of knowledge, which are then integrated by conscious processing. Thus, inspired by the Global Workspace Theory of conscious information access in the brain, we propose TAMiL, a continual learning method that entails task-attention modules to capture task-specific information from the common representation space. We employ simple, undercomplete autoencoders to create a communication bottleneck between the common representation space and the global workspace, allowing only the task-relevant information to the global workspace, thus greatly reducing task interference. Experimental results show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art rehearsal-based and dynamic sparse approaches and bridges the gap between fixed capacity and parameter isolation approaches while being scalable. We also show that our method effectively mitigates catastrophic forgetting while being well-calibrated with reduced task-recency bias.
summary: Intelligent systems deployed in the real world suffer from catastrophic forgetting when exposed to a sequence of tasks. Humans, on the other hand, acquire, consolidate, and transfer knowledge between tasks that rarely interfere with the consolidated knowledge. Accompanied by self-regulated neurogenesis, continual learning in the brain is governed by a rich set of neurophysiological processes that harbor different types of knowledge, which are then integrated by conscious processing. Thus, inspired by the Global Workspace Theory of conscious information access in the brain, we propose TAMiL, a continual learning method that entails task-attention modules to capture task-specific information from the common representation space. We employ simple, undercomplete autoencoders to create a communication bottleneck between the common representation space and the global workspace, allowing only the task-relevant information to the global workspace, thus greatly reducing task interference. Experimental results show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art rehearsal-based and dynamic sparse approaches and bridges the gap between fixed capacity and parameter isolation approaches while being scalable. We also show that our method effectively mitigates catastrophic forgetting while being well-calibrated with reduced task-recency bias.
abstract_zh: 现实世界中部署的智能系统在执行一系列任务时会遭受灾难性的遗忘。另一方面，人类在很少干扰巩固的知识的任务之间获取、巩固和转移知识。伴随着自我调节的神经发生，大脑中的持续学习受到一系列丰富的神经生理过程的控制，这些过程包含不同类型的知识，然后通过意识处理进行整合。因此，受大脑有意识信息访问的全局工作空间理论的启发，我们提出了 TAMiL，一种持续学习方法，它需要任务注意模块来从公共表示空间捕获特定于任务的信息。我们采用简单的、不完整的自动编码器在公共表示空间和全局工作空间之间创建通信瓶颈，只允许与任务相关的信息到达全局工作空间，从而大大减少任务干扰。实验结果表明，我们的方法优于最先进的基于排练的动态稀疏方法，并弥合了固定容量和参数隔离方法之间的差距，同时具有可扩展性。我们还表明，我们的方法有效地减轻了灾难性遗忘，同时经过良好校准，减少了任务新近度偏差。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为TAMiL的终身学习方法，通过任务感知的信息路由机制解决智能系统在连续任务序列中的灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 现实中的智能系统在学习新任务时容易遗忘旧知识（灾难性遗忘），而人类能通过神经生理机制有效整合跨任务知识，现有方法在容量固定与参数隔离间存在性能差距。
AI.method: 受大脑全局工作空间理论启发，设计任务注意力模块从公共表示空间提取任务特异性信息，并利用欠完备自编码器构建通信瓶颈，仅传递任务相关知识至全局工作空间。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在性能上超越基于回放和动态稀疏的最先进算法，同时缓解灾难性遗忘并减少任务近期偏差，且具有可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: TAMiL通过模拟大脑知识整合机制，为终身学习提供了兼顾知识保留与任务适应性的有效解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出一种名为TAMiL的终身学习方法，通过任务感知的信息路由机制解决智能系统在连续任务序列中的灾难性遗忘问题。
motivation: 现实中的智能系统在学习新任务时容易遗忘旧知识（灾难性遗忘），而人类能通过神经生理机制有效整合跨任务知识，现有方法在容量固定与参数隔离间存在性能差距。
method: 受大脑全局工作空间理论启发，设计任务注意力模块从公共表示空间提取任务特异性信息，并利用欠完备自编码器构建通信瓶颈，仅传递任务相关知识至全局工作空间。
result: 实验表明该方法在性能上超越基于回放和动态稀疏的最先进算法，同时缓解灾难性遗忘并减少任务近期偏差，且具有可扩展性。
conclusion: TAMiL通过模拟大脑知识整合机制，为终身学习提供了兼顾知识保留与任务适应性的有效解决方案。
search_text: Task-Aware Information Routing from Common Representation Space in Lifelong Learning 终身学习中公共表示空间的任务感知信息路由 Intelligent systems deployed in the real world suffer from catastrophic forgetting when exposed to a sequence of tasks. Humans, on the other hand, acquire, consolidate, and transfer knowledge between tasks that rarely interfere with the consolidated knowledge. Accompanied by self-regulated neurogenesis, continual learning in the brain is governed by a rich set of neurophysiological processes that harbor different types of knowledge, which are then integrated by conscious processing. Thus, inspired by the Global Workspace Theory of conscious information access in the brain, we propose TAMiL, a continual learning method that entails task-attention modules to capture task-specific information from the common representation space. We employ simple, undercomplete autoencoders to create a communication bottleneck between the common representation space and the global workspace, allowing only the task-relevant information to the global workspace, thus greatly reducing task interference. Experimental results show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art rehearsal-based and dynamic sparse approaches and bridges the gap between fixed capacity and parameter isolation approaches while being scalable. We also show that our method effectively mitigates catastrophic forgetting while being well-calibrated with reduced task-recency bias. 现实世界中部署的智能系统在执行一系列任务时会遭受灾难性的遗忘。另一方面，人类在很少干扰巩固的知识的任务之间获取、巩固和转移知识。伴随着自我调节的神经发生，大脑中的持续学习受到一系列丰富的神经生理过程的控制，这些过程包含不同类型的知识，然后通过意识处理进行整合。因此，受大脑有意识信息访问的全局工作空间理论的启发，我们提出了 TAMiL，一种持续学习方法，它需要任务注意模块来从公共表示空间捕获特定于任务的信息。我们采用简单的、不完整的自动编码器在公共表示空间和全局工作空间之间创建通信瓶颈，只允许与任务相关的信息到达全局工作空间，从而大大减少任务干扰。实验结果表明，我们的方法优于最先进的基于排练的动态稀疏方法，并弥合了固定容量和参数隔离方法之间的差距，同时具有可扩展性。我们还表明，我们的方法有效地减轻了灾难性遗忘，同时经过良好校准，减少了任务新近度偏差。 本文提出一种名为TAMiL的终身学习方法，通过任务感知的信息路由机制解决智能系统在连续任务序列中的灾难性遗忘问题。 Prashant Bhat,Bahram Zonooz,Elahe Arani cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Fahad Sarfraz,Elahe Arani,Bahram Zonooz
title: Error Sensitivity Modulation based Experience Replay: Mitigating Abrupt Representation Drift in Continual Learning
title_zh: 基于错误敏感度调制的经验重放：减轻持续学习中的突然表示漂移
comment: Accepted as a conference paper at ICLR 2023
comments: Accepted as a conference paper at ICLR 2023
abstract: Humans excel at lifelong learning, as the brain has evolved to be robust to distribution shifts and noise in our ever-changing environment. Deep neural networks (DNNs), however, exhibit catastrophic forgetting and the learned representations drift drastically as they encounter a new task. This alludes to a different error-based learning mechanism in the brain. Unlike DNNs, where learning scales linearly with the magnitude of the error, the sensitivity to errors in the brain decreases as a function of their magnitude. To this end, we propose \textit{ESMER} which employs a principled mechanism to modulate error sensitivity in a dual-memory rehearsal-based system. Concretely, it maintains a memory of past errors and uses it to modify the learning dynamics so that the model learns more from small consistent errors compared to large sudden errors. We also propose \textit{Error-Sensitive Reservoir Sampling} to maintain episodic memory, which leverages the error history to pre-select low-loss samples as candidates for the buffer, which are better suited for retaining information. Empirical results show that ESMER effectively reduces forgetting and abrupt drift in representations at the task boundary by gradually adapting to the new task while consolidating knowledge. Remarkably, it also enables the model to learn under high levels of label noise, which is ubiquitous in real-world data streams.
summary: Humans excel at lifelong learning, as the brain has evolved to be robust to distribution shifts and noise in our ever-changing environment. Deep neural networks (DNNs), however, exhibit catastrophic forgetting and the learned representations drift drastically as they encounter a new task. This alludes to a different error-based learning mechanism in the brain. Unlike DNNs, where learning scales linearly with the magnitude of the error, the sensitivity to errors in the brain decreases as a function of their magnitude. To this end, we propose \textit{ESMER} which employs a principled mechanism to modulate error sensitivity in a dual-memory rehearsal-based system. Concretely, it maintains a memory of past errors and uses it to modify the learning dynamics so that the model learns more from small consistent errors compared to large sudden errors. We also propose \textit{Error-Sensitive Reservoir Sampling} to maintain episodic memory, which leverages the error history to pre-select low-loss samples as candidates for the buffer, which are better suited for retaining information. Empirical results show that ESMER effectively reduces forgetting and abrupt drift in representations at the task boundary by gradually adapting to the new task while consolidating knowledge. Remarkably, it also enables the model to learn under high levels of label noise, which is ubiquitous in real-world data streams.
abstract_zh: 人类擅长终身学习，因为大脑已经进化到对不断变化的环境中的分布变化和噪音具有鲁棒性。然而，深度神经网络 (DNN) 会表现出灾难性的遗忘，并且当遇到新任务时，学习到的表示会急剧变化。这暗示了大脑中不同的基于错误的学习机制。与 DNN 不同的是，DNN 的学习能力与错误的大小呈线性关系，而大脑对错误的敏感度会随着错误大小的变化而降低。为此，我们提出 \textit{ESMER}，它采用一种原理机制来调节基于双内存排练的系统中的错误敏感性。具体来说，它保留对过去错误的记忆，并用它来修改学习动态，以便与大的突发错误相比，模型从小的一致错误中学到更多。我们还提出 \textit{Error-Sensitive Reservoir Sampling} 来维护情景记忆，它利用错误历史记录来预先选择低损耗样本作为缓冲区的候选者，这些样本更适合保留信息。实证结果表明，ESMER 通过在巩固知识的同时逐渐适应新任务，有效减少了任务边界处表征的遗忘和突然漂移。值得注意的是，它还使模型能够在高水平的标签噪声下学习，而这种噪声在现实世界的数据流中无处不在。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于误差敏感性调节的经验回放方法（ESMER），旨在缓解持续学习中的表示突变问题。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在持续学习中易出现灾难性遗忘和表示突变，而人类大脑通过降低对大误差的敏感性实现鲁棒学习，启发了误差敏感性调节机制的设计。
AI.method: ESMER采用双记忆回放系统，通过存储历史误差动态调节学习过程，使模型更关注小而一致的误差；并提出误差敏感的水库抽样方法，筛选低损失样本构建记忆缓冲区。
AI.result: 实验表明ESMER有效减少了任务边界处的遗忘和表示突变，在高标签噪声环境下仍能保持良好学习性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过模拟生物误差敏感机制，ESMER为持续学习提供了新的表示稳定性保障方法，提升了模型在动态数据流中的适应能力。

authors_text: Shakeel A. Sheikh,Md Sahidullah,Fabrice Hirsch,Slim Ouni
title: Advancing Stuttering Detection via Data Augmentation, Class-Balanced Loss and Multi-Contextual Deep Learning
title_zh: 通过数据增强、类平衡损失和多上下文深度学习推进口吃检测
comment: Accepted in IEEE Journal of Biomedical Health Informatics 2023
comments: Accepted in IEEE Journal of Biomedical Health Informatics 2023
abstract: Stuttering is a neuro-developmental speech impairment characterized by uncontrolled utterances (interjections) and core behaviors (blocks, repetitions, and prolongations), and is caused by the failure of speech sensorimotors. Due to its complex nature, stuttering detection (SD) is a difficult task. If detected at an early stage, it could facilitate speech therapists to observe and rectify the speech patterns of persons who stutter (PWS). The stuttered speech of PWS is usually available in limited amounts and is highly imbalanced. To this end, we address the class imbalance problem in the SD domain via a multibranching (MB) scheme and by weighting the contribution of classes in the overall loss function, resulting in a huge improvement in stuttering classes on the SEP-28k dataset over the baseline (StutterNet). To tackle data scarcity, we investigate the effectiveness of data augmentation on top of a multi-branched training scheme. The augmented training outperforms the MB StutterNet (clean) by a relative margin of 4.18% in macro F1-score (F1). In addition, we propose a multi-contextual (MC) StutterNet, which exploits different contexts of the stuttered speech, resulting in an overall improvement of 4.48% in F 1 over the single context based MB StutterNet. Finally, we have shown that applying data augmentation in the cross-corpora scenario can improve the overall SD performance by a relative margin of 13.23% in F1 over the clean training.
summary: Stuttering is a neuro-developmental speech impairment characterized by uncontrolled utterances (interjections) and core behaviors (blocks, repetitions, and prolongations), and is caused by the failure of speech sensorimotors. Due to its complex nature, stuttering detection (SD) is a difficult task. If detected at an early stage, it could facilitate speech therapists to observe and rectify the speech patterns of persons who stutter (PWS). The stuttered speech of PWS is usually available in limited amounts and is highly imbalanced. To this end, we address the class imbalance problem in the SD domain via a multibranching (MB) scheme and by weighting the contribution of classes in the overall loss function, resulting in a huge improvement in stuttering classes on the SEP-28k dataset over the baseline (StutterNet). To tackle data scarcity, we investigate the effectiveness of data augmentation on top of a multi-branched training scheme. The augmented training outperforms the MB StutterNet (clean) by a relative margin of 4.18% in macro F1-score (F1). In addition, we propose a multi-contextual (MC) StutterNet, which exploits different contexts of the stuttered speech, resulting in an overall improvement of 4.48% in F 1 over the single context based MB StutterNet. Finally, we have shown that applying data augmentation in the cross-corpora scenario can improve the overall SD performance by a relative margin of 13.23% in F1 over the clean training.
abstract_zh: 口吃是一种神经发育性言语障碍，其特征是不受控制的话语（感叹词）和核心行为（阻塞、重复和延长），是由言语感觉运动障碍引起的。由于其复杂性，口吃检测（SD）是一项艰巨的任务。如果及早发现，可以帮助言语治疗师观察和纠正口吃者 (PWS) 的言语模式。 PWS 的口吃言语通常数量有限且高度不平衡。为此，我们通过多分支（MB）方案并通过在整体损失函数中加权类别的贡献来解决SD域中的类别不平衡问题，从而使SEP-28k数据集上的口吃类别相对于基线（StutterNet）有了巨大的改善。为了解决数据稀缺问题，我们研究了多分支训练方案之上的数据增强的有效性。增强训练在宏观 F1 分数 (F1) 中比 MB StutterNet (clean) 的性能高出 4.18%。此外，我们提出了一种多上下文（MC）StutterNet，它利用了口吃语音的不同上下文，与基于单上下文的 MB StutterNet 相比，F 1 总体提高了 4.48％。最后，我们证明，在跨语料库场景中应用数据增强可以将 F1 中的总体 SD 性能比干净训练提高 13.23%。

AI.tldr: 本文通过数据增强、类别平衡损失和多上下文深度学习方法提升口吃检测的准确率。
AI.motivation: 口吃检测面临数据不平衡和样本稀缺问题，传统方法难以有效识别早期口吃特征，影响语音治疗干预。
AI.method: 提出多分支网络结合类别平衡损失解决类别不平衡，采用数据增强缓解样本稀缺，并设计多上下文StutterNet模型融合不同语音上下文信息。
AI.result: 在SEP-28k数据集上，数据增强使宏F1提升4.18%，多上下文模型提升4.48%，跨语料场景下F1相对提升13.23%。
AI.conclusion: 多技术联合应用显著提升口吃检测性能，为早期筛查和语音治疗提供可靠工具。

result: 在SEP-28k数据集上，数据增强使宏F1提升4.18%，多上下文模型提升4.48%，跨语料场景下F1相对提升13.23%。
conclusion: 多技术联合应用显著提升口吃检测性能，为早期筛查和语音治疗提供可靠工具。
search_text: Advancing Stuttering Detection via Data Augmentation, Class-Balanced Loss and Multi-Contextual Deep Learning 通过数据增强、类平衡损失和多上下文深度学习推进口吃检测 Stuttering is a neuro-developmental speech impairment characterized by uncontrolled utterances (interjections) and core behaviors (blocks, repetitions, and prolongations), and is caused by the failure of speech sensorimotors. Due to its complex nature, stuttering detection (SD) is a difficult task. If detected at an early stage, it could facilitate speech therapists to observe and rectify the speech patterns of persons who stutter (PWS). The stuttered speech of PWS is usually available in limited amounts and is highly imbalanced. To this end, we address the class imbalance problem in the SD domain via a multibranching (MB) scheme and by weighting the contribution of classes in the overall loss function, resulting in a huge improvement in stuttering classes on the SEP-28k dataset over the baseline (StutterNet). To tackle data scarcity, we investigate the effectiveness of data augmentation on top of a multi-branched training scheme. The augmented training outperforms the MB StutterNet (clean) by a relative margin of 4.18% in macro F1-score (F1). In addition, we propose a multi-contextual (MC) StutterNet, which exploits different contexts of the stuttered speech, resulting in an overall improvement of 4.48% in F 1 over the single context based MB StutterNet. Finally, we have shown that applying data augmentation in the cross-corpora scenario can improve the overall SD performance by a relative margin of 13.23% in F1 over the clean training. 口吃是一种神经发育性言语障碍，其特征是不受控制的话语（感叹词）和核心行为（阻塞、重复和延长），是由言语感觉运动障碍引起的。由于其复杂性，口吃检测（SD）是一项艰巨的任务。如果及早发现，可以帮助言语治疗师观察和纠正口吃者 (PWS) 的言语模式。 PWS 的口吃言语通常数量有限且高度不平衡。为此，我们通过多分支（MB）方案并通过在整体损失函数中加权类别的贡献来解决SD域中的类别不平衡问题，从而使SEP-28k数据集上的口吃类别相对于基线（StutterNet）有了巨大的改善。为了解决数据稀缺问题，我们研究了多分支训练方案之上的数据增强的有效性。增强训练在宏观 F1 分数 (F1) 中比 MB StutterNet (clean) 的性能高出 4.18%。此外，我们提出了一种多上下文（MC）StutterNet，它利用了口吃语音的不同上下文，与基于单上下文的 MB StutterNet 相比，F 1 总体提高了 4.48％。最后，我们证明，在跨语料库场景中应用数据增强可以将 F1 中的总体 SD 性能比干净训练提高 13.23%。 本文通过数据增强、类别平衡损失和多上下文深度学习方法提升口吃检测的准确率。 Shakeel A. Sheikh,Md Sahidullah,Fabrice Hirsch,Slim Ouni cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Monika Henzinger,A. R. Sricharan,Teresa Anna Steiner
title: Differentially Private Continual Release of Histograms and Related Queries
title_zh: 差分隐私持续发布直方图和相关查询
abstract: We study privately releasing column sums of a $d$-dimensional table with entries from a universe $χ$ undergoing $T$ row updates, called histogram under continual release. Our mechanisms give better additive $\ell_\infty$-error than existing mechanisms for a large class of queries and input streams. Our first contribution is an output-sensitive mechanism in the insertions-only model ($χ= \{0,1\}$) for maintaining (i) the histogram or (ii) queries that do not require maintaining the entire histogram, such as the maximum or minimum column sum, the median, or any quantiles. The mechanism has an additive error of $O(d\log^2 (dq^*)+\log T)$ whp, where $q^*$ is the maximum output value over all time steps on this dataset. The mechanism does not require $q^*$ as input. This breaks the $Ω(d \log T)$ bound of prior work when $q^* \ll T$. Our second contribution is a mechanism for the turnstile model that admits negative entry updates ($χ= \{-1, 0,1\}$). This mechanism has an additive error of $O(d \log^2 (dK) + \log T)$ whp, where $K$ is the number of times two consecutive data rows differ, and the mechanism does not require $K$ as input. This is useful when monitoring inputs that only vary under unusual circumstances. For $d=1$ this gives the first private mechanism with error $O(\log^2 K + \log T)$ for continual counting in the turnstile model, improving on the $O(\log^2 n + \log T)$ error bound by Dwork et al. [ASIACRYPT 2015], where $n$ is the number of ones in the stream, as well as allowing negative entries, while Dwork et al. [ASIACRYPT 2015] can only handle nonnegative entries ($χ=\{0,1\}$).

Our mechanisms give better additive $\ell_\infty$-error than existing mechanisms for a large class of queries and input streams. The mechanism has an additive error of $O(d\log^2 (dq^*)+\log T)$ whp, where $q^*$ is the maximum output value over all time steps on this dataset. The mechanism does not require $q^*$ as input. This breaks the $Ω(d \log T)$ bound of prior work when $q^* \ll T$. Our second contribution is a mechanism for the turnstile model that admits negative entry updates ($χ= \{-1, 0,1\}$). This mechanism has an additive error of $O(d \log^2 (dK) + \log T)$ whp, where $K$ is the number of times two consecutive data rows differ, and the mechanism does not require $K$ as input. This is useful when monitoring inputs that only vary under unusual circumstances. For $d=1$ this gives the first private mechanism with error $O(\log^2 K + \log T)$ for continual counting in the turnstile model, improving on the $O(\log^2 n + \log T)$ error bound by Dwork et al. [ASIACRYPT 2015], where $n$ is the number of ones in the stream, as well as allowing negative entries, while Dwork et al. [ASIACRYPT 2015] can only handle nonnegative entries ($χ=\{0,1\}$).
abstract_zh: 我们研究私下发布 $d$ 维表的列总和，其中包含来自宇宙 $χ$ 的条目，进行 $T$ 行更新，称为持续发布下的直方图。对于一大类查询和输入流，我们的机制比现有机制提供更好的附加 $\ell_\infty$-error。我们的第一个贡献是仅插入模型 ($χ= \{0,1\}$) 中的输出敏感机制，用于维护 (i) 直方图或 (ii) 不需要维护整个直方图的查询，例如最大或最小列总和、中位数或任何分位数。该机制的附加误差为 $O(d\log^2 (dq^*)+\log T)$ whp，其中 $q^*$ 是该数据集上所有时间步长的最大输出值。该机制不需要 $q^*$ 作为输入。当 $q^* \ll T$ 时，这打破了先前工作的 $Ω(d \log T)$ 界限。我们的第二个贡献是十字转门模型的机制，它允许负条目更新（$χ= \{-1, 0,1\}$）。该机制的附加误差为 $O(d \log^2 (dK) + \log T)$ whp，其中 $K$ 是两个连续数据行不同的次数，并且该机制不需要 $K$ 作为输入。当监视仅在异常情况下变化的输入时，这非常有用。对于 $d=1$，这给出了第一个带有错误 $O(\log^2 K + \log T)$ 的私有机制，用于在旋转门模型中连续计数，改进了 Dwork 等人限制的 $O(\log^2 n + \log T)$ 错误。 [ASIACRYPT 2015]，其中 $n$ 是流中的数量，并且允许负条目，而 Dwork 等人。 [ASIACRYPT 2015] 只能处理非负条目 ($χ=\{0,1\}$)。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在差分隐私框架下持续发布直方图及关联查询的方法，针对动态更新的数据表，提出新的机制以降低加性误差。
AI.motivation: 现有机制在持续更新场景下误差较大，尤其当最大输出值远小于更新次数时，且难以处理负值更新，需改进误差界和适用性。
AI.method: 提出输出敏感机制，适用于仅插入模型和允许负值的turnstile模型，通过动态调整噪声注入策略，无需预知最大输出值或更新差异次数。
AI.result: 在仅插入模型下，误差界为O(d log²(dq*) + log T)，突破Ω(d log T)下界；在turnstile模型下，误差为O(d log²(dK) + log T)，支持负值更新，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的机制在差分隐私下实现了更优的误差界，适用于动态更新的数据流，尤其在最大输出值或更新差异次数较小时表现更佳，扩展了隐私保护的应用范围。

authors_text: Lingxiao Huang,Shaofeng H. -C. Jiang,Jianing Lou
title: The Power of Uniform Sampling for $k$-Median
title_zh: $k$ 中位数均匀采样的威力
abstract: We study the power of uniform sampling for $k$-Median in various metric spaces. We relate the query complexity for approximating $k$-Median, to a key parameter of the dataset, called the balancedness $β\in (0, 1]$ (with $1$ being perfectly balanced). We show that any algorithm must make $Ω(1 / β)$ queries to the point set in order to achieve $O(1)$-approximation for $k$-Median. This particularly implies existing constructions of coresets, a popular data reduction technique, cannot be query-efficient. On the other hand, we show a simple uniform sample of $\mathrm{poly}(k ε^{-1} β^{-1})$ points suffices for $(1 + ε)$-approximation for $k$-Median for various metric spaces, which nearly matches the lower bound. We conduct experiments to verify that in many real datasets, the balancedness parameter is usually well bounded, and that the uniform sampling performs consistently well even for the case with moderately large balancedness, which justifies that uniform sampling is indeed a viable approach for solving $k$-Median.
summary: We study the power of uniform sampling for $k$-Median in various metric spaces. We relate the query complexity for approximating $k$-Median, to a key parameter of the dataset, called the balancedness $β\in (0, 1]$ (with $1$ being perfectly balanced). We show that any algorithm must make $Ω(1 / β)$ queries to the point set in order to achieve $O(1)$-approximation for $k$-Median. This particularly implies existing constructions of coresets, a popular data reduction technique, cannot be query-efficient. On the other hand, we show a simple uniform sample of $\mathrm{poly}(k ε^{-1} β^{-1})$ points suffices for $(1 + ε)$-approximation for $k$-Median for various metric spaces, which nearly matches the lower bound. We conduct experiments to verify that in many real datasets, the balancedness parameter is usually well bounded, and that the uniform sampling performs consistently well even for the case with moderately large balancedness, which justifies that uniform sampling is indeed a viable approach for solving $k$-Median.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了各种度量空间中 $k$-中位数的均匀采样的功效。我们将近似 $k$-Median 的查询复杂性与数据集的一个关键参数联系起来，称为平衡性 $β\in (0, 1]$ （其中 $1$ 完全平衡）。我们表明，任何算法都必须对点集进行 $Ω(1 / β)$ 查询，才能实现 $k$-Median 的 $O(1)$ 近似。这特别意味着现有的核心集结构（一种流行的数据缩减技术）无法实现查询高效。另一方面，我们展示了 $\mathrm{poly}(k ε^{-1} β^{-1})$ 点的简单均匀样本足以满足各种度量空间的 $k$-Median 的 $(1 + ε)$ 近似，这几乎与下界匹配。我们进行实验来验证在许多实际数据集中，平衡性参数通常是有界的，并且均匀采样即使在中等大的情况下也能始终表现良好。平衡性，这证明均匀采样确实是解决 $k$-Median 问题的可行方法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了均匀采样在$k$-Median问题中的有效性，通过引入平衡性参数$β$分析其查询复杂度，并提出基于均匀采样的近似算法。
AI.motivation: 现有$k$-Median算法在处理大规模数据时效率低下，而核心集（coreset）方法存在查询效率不足的问题，需探索更高效的采样方法。
AI.method: 理论分析查询复杂度与平衡性参数$β$的关系，提出需$Ω(1/β)$次查询；设计基于均匀采样的$(1+ε)$-近似算法，样本复杂度为$\\mathrm{poly}(k ε^{-1} β^{-1})$，并进行实验验证。
AI.result: 证明了任何算法需至少$Ω(1/β)$次查询以达到常数近似比；均匀采样方法在多项式样本下可达到$(1+ε)$-近似，实验表明实际数据中$β$通常有界且采样效果良好。
AI.conclusion: 当数据集平衡性参数$β$有界时，均匀采样是解决$k$-Median问题的高效可行方法，理论分析与实验结果一致。

motivation: 现有$k$-Median算法在处理大规模数据时效率低下，而核心集（coreset）方法存在查询效率不足的问题，需探索更高效的采样方法。
method: 理论分析查询复杂度与平衡性参数$β$的关系，提出需$Ω(1/β)$次查询；设计基于均匀采样的$(1+ε)$-近似算法，样本复杂度为$\\mathrm{poly}(k ε^{-1} β^{-1})$，并进行实验验证。
result: 证明了任何算法需至少$Ω(1/β)$次查询以达到常数近似比；均匀采样方法在多项式样本下可达到$(1+ε)$-近似，实验表明实际数据中$β$通常有界且采样效果良好。
conclusion: 当数据集平衡性参数$β$有界时，均匀采样是解决$k$-Median问题的高效可行方法，理论分析与实验结果一致。
search_text: The Power of Uniform Sampling for $k$-Median $k$ 中位数均匀采样的威力 We study the power of uniform sampling for $k$-Median in various metric spaces. We relate the query complexity for approximating $k$-Median, to a key parameter of the dataset, called the balancedness $β\in (0, 1]$ (with $1$ being perfectly balanced). We show that any algorithm must make $Ω(1 / β)$ queries to the point set in order to achieve $O(1)$-approximation for $k$-Median. This particularly implies existing constructions of coresets, a popular data reduction technique, cannot be query-efficient. On the other hand, we show a simple uniform sample of $\mathrm{poly}(k ε^{-1} β^{-1})$ points suffices for $(1 + ε)$-approximation for $k$-Median for various metric spaces, which nearly matches the lower bound. We conduct experiments to verify that in many real datasets, the balancedness parameter is usually well bounded, and that the uniform sampling performs consistently well even for the case with moderately large balancedness, which justifies that uniform sampling is indeed a viable approach for solving $k$-Median. 我们研究了各种度量空间中 $k$-中位数的均匀采样的功效。我们将近似 $k$-Median 的查询复杂性与数据集的一个关键参数联系起来，称为平衡性 $β\in (0, 1]$ （其中 $1$ 完全平衡）。我们表明，任何算法都必须对点集进行 $Ω(1 / β)$ 查询，才能实现 $k$-Median 的 $O(1)$ 近似。这特别意味着现有的核心集结构（一种流行的数据缩减技术）无法实现查询高效。另一方面，我们展示了 $\mathrm{poly}(k ε^{-1} β^{-1})$ 点的简单均匀样本足以满足各种度量空间的 $k$-Median 的 $(1 + ε)$ 近似，这几乎与下界匹配。我们进行实验来验证在许多实际数据集中，平衡性参数通常是有界的，并且均匀采样即使在中等大的情况下也能始终表现良好。平衡性，这证明均匀采样确实是解决 $k$-Median 问题的可行方法。 本文研究了均匀采样在$k$-Median问题中的有效性，通过引入平衡性参数$β$分析其查询复杂度，并提出基于均匀采样的近似算法。 Lingxiao Huang,Shaofeng H. -C. Jiang,Jianing Lou cs.DS

authors_text: Rongfeng Wei
title: Visual Watermark Removal Based on Deep Learning
title_zh: 基于深度学习的视觉水印去除
abstract: In recent years as the internet age continues to grow, sharing images on social media has become a common occurrence. In certain cases, watermarks are used as protection for the ownership of the image, however, in more cases, one may wish to remove these watermark images to get the original image without obscuring. In this work, we proposed a deep learning method based technique for visual watermark removal. Inspired by the strong image translation performance of the U-structure, an end-to-end deep neural network model named AdvancedUnet is proposed to extract and remove the visual watermark simultaneously. On the other hand, we embed some effective RSU module instead of the common residual block used in UNet, which increases the depth of the whole architecture without significantly increasing the computational cost. The deep-supervised hybrid loss guides the network to learn the transformation between the input image and the ground truth in a multi-scale and three-level hierarchy. Comparison experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method.
summary: In recent years as the internet age continues to grow, sharing images on social media has become a common occurrence. In certain cases, watermarks are used as protection for the ownership of the image, however, in more cases, one may wish to remove these watermark images to get the original image without obscuring. In this work, we proposed a deep learning method based technique for visual watermark removal. Inspired by the strong image translation performance of the U-structure, an end-to-end deep neural network model named AdvancedUnet is proposed to extract and remove the visual watermark simultaneously. On the other hand, we embed some effective RSU module instead of the common residual block used in UNet, which increases the depth of the whole architecture without significantly increasing the computational cost. The deep-supervised hybrid loss guides the network to learn the transformation between the input image and the ground truth in a multi-scale and three-level hierarchy. Comparison experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method.
abstract_zh: 近年来，随着互联网时代的不断发展，在社交媒体上分享图像已成为常见现象。在某些情况下，水印被用来保护图像的所有权，然而，在更多情况下，人们可能希望删除这些水印图像以获得不模糊的原始图像。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于深度学习方法的视觉水印去除技术。受U型结构强大的图像翻译性能的启发，提出了一种名为AdvancedUnet的端到端深度神经网络模型来同时提取和去除视觉水印。另一方面，我们嵌入了一些有效的RSU模块，而不是UNet中使用的常见残差块，这在不显着增加计算成本的情况下增加了整个架构的深度。深度监督混合损失引导网络在多尺度和三级层次结构中学习输入图像和地面实况之间的转换。对比实验证明了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的视觉水印去除方法，通过改进的U型网络结构实现水印的自动识别与移除。
AI.motivation: 随着社交媒体图像共享的普及，用户需要有效去除图像水印以获取原始内容，而传统方法存在效率和效果不足的问题。
AI.method: 设计了AdvancedUnet模型，在U型结构基础上引入RSU模块替代残差块，并采用多尺度三级深度监督混合损失函数指导网络学习。
AI.result: 实验结果表明该方法在水印去除任务中优于现有技术，能够有效保留原始图像内容并消除水印痕迹。
AI.conclusion: 通过改进网络结构和损失函数设计，提出的深度学习方法实现了高效的视觉水印去除，为图像内容恢复提供了新思路。

authors_text: Jun Lu
title: Bayesian Matrix Decomposition and Applications
title_zh: 贝叶斯矩阵分解及应用
abstract: The sole aim of this book is to give a self-contained introduction to concepts and mathematical tools in Bayesian matrix decomposition in order to seamlessly introduce matrix decomposition techniques and their applications in subsequent sections. However, we clearly realize our inability to cover all the useful and interesting results concerning Bayesian matrix decomposition and given the paucity of scope to present this discussion, e.g., the separated analysis of variational inference for conducting the optimization. We refer the reader to literature in the field of Bayesian analysis for a more detailed introduction to the related fields. This book is primarily a summary of purpose, significance of important Bayesian matrix decomposition methods, e.g., real-valued decomposition, nonnegative matrix factorization, Bayesian interpolative decomposition, and the origin and complexity of the methods which shed light on their applications. The mathematical prerequisite is a first course in statistics and linear algebra. Other than this modest background, the development is self-contained, with rigorous proof provided throughout.
summary: The sole aim of this book is to give a self-contained introduction to concepts and mathematical tools in Bayesian matrix decomposition in order to seamlessly introduce matrix decomposition techniques and their applications in subsequent sections. However, we clearly realize our inability to cover all the useful and interesting results concerning Bayesian matrix decomposition and given the paucity of scope to present this discussion, e.g., the separated analysis of variational inference for conducting the optimization. We refer the reader to literature in the field of Bayesian analysis for a more detailed introduction to the related fields. This book is primarily a summary of purpose, significance of important Bayesian matrix decomposition methods, e.g., real-valued decomposition, nonnegative matrix factorization, Bayesian interpolative decomposition, and the origin and complexity of the methods which shed light on their applications. The mathematical prerequisite is a first course in statistics and linear algebra. Other than this modest background, the development is self-contained, with rigorous proof provided throughout.
abstract_zh: 本书的唯一目的是对贝叶斯矩阵分解中的概念和数学工具进行独立介绍，以便在后续章节中无缝介绍矩阵分解技术及其应用。然而，我们清楚地意识到我们无法涵盖有关贝叶斯矩阵分解的所有有用且有趣的结果，并且考虑到呈现此讨论的范围有限，例如，用于进行优化的变分推理的单独分析。我们建议读者参考贝叶斯分析领域的文献，以获得相关领域的更详细介绍。本书主要总结了重要的贝叶斯矩阵分解方法的目的、意义，例如实值分解、非负矩阵分解、贝叶斯插值分解，以及这些方法的起源和复杂性，阐明了它们的应用。数学先决条件是统计学和线性代数的第一门课程。除了这个朴素的背景之外，该开发是独立的，自始至终都提供了严格的证明。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在提供贝叶斯矩阵分解方法及其应用的自包含介绍，重点总结关键方法的数学原理与复杂性。
AI.motivation: 为具备基础统计学和线性代数知识的读者提供贝叶斯矩阵分解技术的系统性概述，弥补现有文献中对该领域方法论的分散讨论。
AI.method: 通过总结实值分解、非负矩阵分解等核心方法，结合数学证明与复杂性分析，并引用领域文献补充变分推断等进阶内容。
AI.result: 构建了贝叶斯矩阵分解方法的理论框架，明确了各方法的起源与适用场景，为后续应用研究奠定基础。
AI.conclusion: 本书成功提炼了贝叶斯矩阵分解的核心思想与技术路径，但受限于篇幅未能全面覆盖所有相关研究方向。

authors_text: Zhiguo Fu,Tianyu Liu,Xiongxin Yang
title: Approximability of the Four-Vertex Model
title_zh: 四顶点模型的逼近性
abstract: We study the approximability of the four-vertex model, a special case of the six-vertex model.We prove that, despite being NP-hard to approximate in the worst case, the four-vertex model admits a fully polynomial randomized approximation scheme (FPRAS) when the input satisfies certain linear equation system over GF(2).The FPRAS is given by a Markov chain known as the worm process, whose state space and rapid mixing rely on the solution of the linear equation system. This is the first attempt to design an FPRAS for the six-vertex model with unwindable constraint functions.Additionally, we explore the applications of this technique on planar graphs, providing efficient sampling algorithms.
summary: We study the approximability of the four-vertex model, a special case of the six-vertex model.We prove that, despite being NP-hard to approximate in the worst case, the four-vertex model admits a fully polynomial randomized approximation scheme (FPRAS) when the input satisfies certain linear equation system over GF(2).The FPRAS is given by a Markov chain known as the worm process, whose state space and rapid mixing rely on the solution of the linear equation system. This is the first attempt to design an FPRAS for the six-vertex model with unwindable constraint functions.Additionally, we explore the applications of this technique on planar graphs, providing efficient sampling algorithms.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了四顶点模型的逼近性，这是六顶点模型的一个特例。我们证明，尽管在最坏情况下是NP难逼近的，但当输入满足GF(2)上的某些线性方程组时，四顶点模型承认完全多项式随机逼近方案（FPRAS）。FPRAS由称为蠕虫过程的马尔可夫链给出，其状态空间和快速混合依赖于线性方程组的解。这是首次尝试为具有不可展开约束函数的六顶点模型设计 FPRAS。此外，我们探索了该技术在平面图上的应用，提供了高效的采样算法。

AI.tldr: 研究四顶点模型的可近似性，设计适用于特定条件的FPRAS算法。
AI.motivation: 六顶点模型的计算复杂性高，但特定条件下可能存在高效近似方法，需探索其可行性。
AI.method: 基于虫过程马尔可夫链，结合GF(2)线性方程组的解，构建快速混合的状态空间。
AI.result: 在满足线性方程组条件下，四顶点模型存在FPRAS，且首次应用于六顶点模型，平面图采样算法高效。
AI.conclusion: 通过虫过程与线性代数结合，为六顶点模型提供新近似方法，并拓展至平面图应用，推动相关领域算法发展。

search_text: Approximability of the Four-Vertex Model 四顶点模型的逼近性 We study the approximability of the four-vertex model, a special case of the six-vertex model.We prove that, despite being NP-hard to approximate in the worst case, the four-vertex model admits a fully polynomial randomized approximation scheme (FPRAS) when the input satisfies certain linear equation system over GF(2).The FPRAS is given by a Markov chain known as the worm process, whose state space and rapid mixing rely on the solution of the linear equation system. This is the first attempt to design an FPRAS for the six-vertex model with unwindable constraint functions.Additionally, we explore the applications of this technique on planar graphs, providing efficient sampling algorithms. 我们研究了四顶点模型的逼近性，这是六顶点模型的一个特例。我们证明，尽管在最坏情况下是NP难逼近的，但当输入满足GF(2)上的某些线性方程组时，四顶点模型承认完全多项式随机逼近方案（FPRAS）。FPRAS由称为蠕虫过程的马尔可夫链给出，其状态空间和快速混合依赖于线性方程组的解。这是首次尝试为具有不可展开约束函数的六顶点模型设计 FPRAS。此外，我们探索了该技术在平面图上的应用，提供了高效的采样算法。 研究四顶点模型的可近似性，设计适用于特定条件的FPRAS算法。 Zhiguo Fu,Tianyu Liu,Xiongxin Yang cs.CC,cs.DS

authors_text: Seyedsaman Emami,Gonzalo Martínez-Muñoz
title: A Gradient Boosting Approach for Training Convolutional and Deep Neural Networks
title_zh: 用于训练卷积和深度神经网络的梯度提升方法
abstract: Deep learning has revolutionized the computer vision and image classification domains. In this context Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) based architectures are the most widely applied models. In this article, we introduced two procedures for training Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) and Deep Neural Network based on Gradient Boosting (GB), namely GB-CNN and GB-DNN. These models are trained to fit the gradient of the loss function or pseudo-residuals of previous models. At each iteration, the proposed method adds one dense layer to an exact copy of the previous deep NN model. The weights of the dense layers trained on previous iterations are frozen to prevent over-fitting, permitting the model to fit the new dense as well as to fine-tune the convolutional layers (for GB-CNN) while still utilizing the information already learned. Through extensive experimentation on different 2D-image classification and tabular datasets, the presented models show superior performance in terms of classification accuracy with respect to standard CNN and Deep-NN with the same architectures.
summary: Deep learning has revolutionized the computer vision and image classification domains. In this context Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) based architectures are the most widely applied models. In this article, we introduced two procedures for training Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) and Deep Neural Network based on Gradient Boosting (GB), namely GB-CNN and GB-DNN. These models are trained to fit the gradient of the loss function or pseudo-residuals of previous models. At each iteration, the proposed method adds one dense layer to an exact copy of the previous deep NN model. The weights of the dense layers trained on previous iterations are frozen to prevent over-fitting, permitting the model to fit the new dense as well as to fine-tune the convolutional layers (for GB-CNN) while still utilizing the information already learned. Through extensive experimentation on different 2D-image classification and tabular datasets, the presented models show superior performance in terms of classification accuracy with respect to standard CNN and Deep-NN with the same architectures.
abstract_zh: 深度学习彻底改变了计算机视觉和图像分类领域。在这种情况下，基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的架构是应用最广泛的模型。在本文中，我们介绍了两种基于梯度提升（GB）训练卷积神经网络（CNN）和深度神经网络的过程，即 GB-CNN 和 GB-DNN。这些模型经过训练以适应损失函数的梯度或先前模型的伪残差。在每次迭代中，所提出的方法都会向先前深度神经网络模型的精确副本添加一个密集层。在先前迭代中训练的密集层的权重被冻结以防止过度拟合，从而允许模型适应新的密集层并微调卷积层（对于 GB-CNN），同时仍然利用已经学习的信息。通过对不同的 2D 图像分类和表格数据集进行广泛的实验，所提出的模型在分类精度方面表现出相对于具有相同架构的标准 CNN 和 Deep-NN 的优越性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于梯度提升的GB-CNN和GB-DNN方法，通过迭代添加全连接层并冻结权重，提升卷积神经网络和深度神经网络的分类性能。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在图像分类领域广泛应用，但传统CNN/DNN存在过拟合风险，需更有效的训练策略以提高准确率。
AI.method: 在每次迭代中复制前序模型并添加全连接层，冻结已有层权重仅训练新增层与卷积层，通过拟合损失梯度或伪残差优化模型。
AI.result: 在2D图像分类和表格数据集实验中，GB-CNN/GB-DNN相比标准CNN/DNN取得更高分类准确率。
AI.conclusion: 梯度提升结合CNN/DNN的训练方式能有效提升模型性能，同时通过权重冻结机制缓解过拟合问题。

search_text: A Gradient Boosting Approach for Training Convolutional and Deep Neural Networks 用于训练卷积和深度神经网络的梯度提升方法 Deep learning has revolutionized the computer vision and image classification domains. In this context Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) based architectures are the most widely applied models. In this article, we introduced two procedures for training Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) and Deep Neural Network based on Gradient Boosting (GB), namely GB-CNN and GB-DNN. These models are trained to fit the gradient of the loss function or pseudo-residuals of previous models. At each iteration, the proposed method adds one dense layer to an exact copy of the previous deep NN model. The weights of the dense layers trained on previous iterations are frozen to prevent over-fitting, permitting the model to fit the new dense as well as to fine-tune the convolutional layers (for GB-CNN) while still utilizing the information already learned. Through extensive experimentation on different 2D-image classification and tabular datasets, the presented models show superior performance in terms of classification accuracy with respect to standard CNN and Deep-NN with the same architectures. 深度学习彻底改变了计算机视觉和图像分类领域。在这种情况下，基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的架构是应用最广泛的模型。在本文中，我们介绍了两种基于梯度提升（GB）训练卷积神经网络（CNN）和深度神经网络的过程，即 GB-CNN 和 GB-DNN。这些模型经过训练以适应损失函数的梯度或先前模型的伪残差。在每次迭代中，所提出的方法都会向先前深度神经网络模型的精确副本添加一个密集层。在先前迭代中训练的密集层的权重被冻结以防止过度拟合，从而允许模型适应新的密集层并微调卷积层（对于 GB-CNN），同时仍然利用已经学习的信息。通过对不同的 2D 图像分类和表格数据集进行广泛的实验，所提出的模型在分类精度方面表现出相对于具有相同架构的标准 CNN 和 Deep-NN 的优越性能。 本文提出基于梯度提升的GB-CNN和GB-DNN方法，通过迭代添加全连接层并冻结权重，提升卷积神经网络和深度神经网络的分类性能。 Seyedsaman Emami,Gonzalo Martínez-Muñoz cs.CV

authors_text: Chengxi Zeng,Xinyu Yang,David Smithard,Majid Mirmehdi,Alberto M Gambaruto,Tilo Burghardt
title: Video-SwinUNet: Spatio-temporal Deep Learning Framework for VFSS Instance Segmentation
title_zh: 视频-SwinUNet：VFSS实例分割的时空深度学习框架
abstract: This paper presents a deep learning framework for medical video segmentation. Convolution neural network (CNN) and transformer-based methods have achieved great milestones in medical image segmentation tasks due to their incredible semantic feature encoding and global information comprehension abilities. However, most existing approaches ignore a salient aspect of medical video data - the temporal dimension. Our proposed framework explicitly extracts features from neighbouring frames across the temporal dimension and incorporates them with a temporal feature blender, which then tokenises the high-level spatio-temporal feature to form a strong global feature encoded via a Swin Transformer. The final segmentation results are produced via a UNet-like encoder-decoder architecture. Our model outperforms other approaches by a significant margin and improves the segmentation benchmarks on the VFSS2022 dataset, achieving a dice coefficient of 0.8986 and 0.8186 for the two datasets tested. Our studies also show the efficacy of the temporal feature blending scheme and cross-dataset transferability of learned capabilities. Code and models are fully available at https://github.com/SimonZeng7108/Video-SwinUNet.
summary: This paper presents a deep learning framework for medical video segmentation. Convolution neural network (CNN) and transformer-based methods have achieved great milestones in medical image segmentation tasks due to their incredible semantic feature encoding and global information comprehension abilities. However, most existing approaches ignore a salient aspect of medical video data - the temporal dimension. Our proposed framework explicitly extracts features from neighbouring frames across the temporal dimension and incorporates them with a temporal feature blender, which then tokenises the high-level spatio-temporal feature to form a strong global feature encoded via a Swin Transformer. The final segmentation results are produced via a UNet-like encoder-decoder architecture. Our model outperforms other approaches by a significant margin and improves the segmentation benchmarks on the VFSS2022 dataset, achieving a dice coefficient of 0.8986 and 0.8186 for the two datasets tested. Our studies also show the efficacy of the temporal feature blending scheme and cross-dataset transferability of learned capabilities. Code and models are fully available at https://github.com/SimonZeng7108/Video-SwinUNet.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种用于医疗视频分割的深度学习框架。卷积神经网络（CNN）和基于 Transformer 的方法凭借其令人难以置信的语义特征编码和全局信息理解能力，在医学图像分割任务中取得了巨大的里程碑。然而，大多数现有方法忽略了医学视频数据的一个显着方面——时间维​​度。我们提出的框架显式地从时间维度上的相邻帧中提取特征，并将它们与时间特征混合器合并，然后对高级时空特征进行标记，以形成通过 Swin Transformer 编码的强大全局特征。最终的分割结果是通过类似 UNet 的编码器-解码器架构产生的。我们的模型显着优于其他方法，并改进了 VFSS2022 数据集的分割基准，测试的两个数据集的骰子系数分别为 0.8986 和 0.8186。我们的研究还表明了时间特征混合方案的有效性和学习能力的跨数据集可转移性。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/SimonZeng7108/Video-SwinUNet 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Video-SwinUNet的深度学习框架，用于医学视频的VFSS实例分割任务。
AI.motivation: 现有医学视频分割方法大多忽略了时间维度信息，而时间特征对视频分析至关重要。
AI.method: 通过时序特征混合器提取相邻帧的时序特征，结合Swin Transformer进行全局特征编码，最终采用UNet-like编码-解码结构实现分割。
AI.result: 在VFSS2022数据集上达到0.8986和0.8186的Dice系数，显著优于其他方法，并验证了时序特征融合的有效性及跨数据集迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过显式建模时序信息，在医学视频分割任务中取得 state-of-the-art 结果，代码已开源。

authors_text: Mark Runciman,Enrico Franco,James Avery,Ferdinando Rodriguez y Baena,George Mylonas
title: Model Based Position Control of Soft Hydraulic Actuators
title_zh: 基于模型的软液压执行器位置控制
comment: Final Version of Paper, updated figures and discussion. Accepted for IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation ICRA 2023
comments: Final Version of Paper, updated figures and discussion. Accepted for IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation ICRA 2023
abstract: In this article, we investigate the model based position control of soft hydraulic actuators arranged in an antagonistic pair. A dynamical model of the system is constructed by employing the port-Hamiltonian formulation. A control algorithm is designed with an energy shaping approach which accounts for the pressure dynamics of the fluid. A nonlinear observer is included to compensate the effect of unknown external forces. Simulations demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach, and experiments achieve positioning accuracy of 0.043 mm with a standard deviation of 0.033 mm in the presence of constant external forces up to 1 N.
summary: In this article, we investigate the model based position control of soft hydraulic actuators arranged in an antagonistic pair. A dynamical model of the system is constructed by employing the port-Hamiltonian formulation. A control algorithm is designed with an energy shaping approach which accounts for the pressure dynamics of the fluid. A nonlinear observer is included to compensate the effect of unknown external forces. Simulations demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach, and experiments achieve positioning accuracy of 0.043 mm with a standard deviation of 0.033 mm in the presence of constant external forces up to 1 N.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了布置在对抗对中的软液压执行器的基于模型的位置控制。采用波特哈密尔顿公式构建了系统的动力学模型。控制算法采用能量整形方法设计，该方法考虑了流体的压力动态。包括非线性观测器以补偿未知外力的影响。仿真证明了该方法的有效性，实验在恒定外力高达 1 N 的情况下实现了 0.043 mm 的定位精度，标准偏差为 0.033 mm。

AI.motivation: 软液压执行器在复杂环境下易受外部干扰影响，传统控制方法难以兼顾精度与鲁棒性，需开发新型控制策略。
AI.method: 采用端口哈密顿方法建立系统动力学模型，结合能量塑形控制算法与非线性观测器补偿未知外部力扰动。
AI.result: 实验表明，在1N恒定外力干扰下，定位精度达0.043mm（标准差0.033mm），验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过模型驱动与观测器协同，显著提升了软液压执行器在外部扰动下的控制精度与稳定性。

authors_text: Hongyu Liu,Xintong Han,Chengbin Jin,Lihui Qian,Huawei Wei,Zhe Lin,Faqiang Wang,Haoye Dong,Yibing Song,Jia Xu,Qifeng Chen
title: Human MotionFormer: Transferring Human Motions with Vision Transformers
title_zh: Human MotionFormer：使用视觉变压器传输人体运动
abstract: Human motion transfer aims to transfer motions from a target dynamic person to a source static one for motion synthesis. An accurate matching between the source person and the target motion in both large and subtle motion changes is vital for improving the transferred motion quality. In this paper, we propose Human MotionFormer, a hierarchical ViT framework that leverages global and local perceptions to capture large and subtle motion matching, respectively. It consists of two ViT encoders to extract input features (i.e., a target motion image and a source human image) and a ViT decoder with several cascaded blocks for feature matching and motion transfer. In each block, we set the target motion feature as Query and the source person as Key and Value, calculating the cross-attention maps to conduct a global feature matching. Further, we introduce a convolutional layer to improve the local perception after the global cross-attention computations. This matching process is implemented in both warping and generation branches to guide the motion transfer. During training, we propose a mutual learning loss to enable the co-supervision between warping and generation branches for better motion representations. Experiments show that our Human MotionFormer sets the new state-of-the-art performance both qualitatively and quantitatively. Project page: \url{https://github.com/KumapowerLIU/Human-MotionFormer}
summary: Human motion transfer aims to transfer motions from a target dynamic person to a source static one for motion synthesis. An accurate matching between the source person and the target motion in both large and subtle motion changes is vital for improving the transferred motion quality. In this paper, we propose Human MotionFormer, a hierarchical ViT framework that leverages global and local perceptions to capture large and subtle motion matching, respectively. It consists of two ViT encoders to extract input features (i.e., a target motion image and a source human image) and a ViT decoder with several cascaded blocks for feature matching and motion transfer. In each block, we set the target motion feature as Query and the source person as Key and Value, calculating the cross-attention maps to conduct a global feature matching. Further, we introduce a convolutional layer to improve the local perception after the global cross-attention computations. This matching process is implemented in both warping and generation branches to guide the motion transfer. During training, we propose a mutual learning loss to enable the co-supervision between warping and generation branches for better motion representations. Experiments show that our Human MotionFormer sets the new state-of-the-art performance both qualitatively and quantitatively. Project page: \url{https://github.com/KumapowerLIU/Human-MotionFormer}
abstract_zh: 人体运动迁移旨在将运动从目标动态人转移到源静态人以进行运动合成。无论是大的还是细微的运动变化，源人物和目标运动之间的准确匹配对于提高传输的运动质量至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了 Human MotionFormer，这是一种分层 ViT 框架，它利用全局和局部感知分别捕获大的和细微的运动匹配。它由两个用于提取输入特征（即目标运动图像和源人体图像）的 ViT 编码器和一个具有多个级联块的 ViT 解码器组成，用于特征匹配和运动传输。在每个块中，我们将目标运动特征设置为Query，将源人物设置为Key和Value，计算交叉注意力图以进行全局特征匹配。此外，我们引入了一个卷积层来改善全局交叉注意力计算后的局部感知。该匹配过程在变形和生成分支中实现，以指导运动传递。在训练过程中，我们提出了相互学习损失，以实现扭曲和生成分支之间的共同监督，以获得更好的运动表示。实验表明，我们的 Human MotionFormer 在定性和定量上都设定了新的最先进的性能。项目页面：\url{https://github.com/KumapowerLIU/Human-MotionFormer}

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于视觉Transformer的层次化框架Human MotionFormer，用于将目标动态人物的运动转移到源静态人物上，以实现高质量的运动合成。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理大规模和细微运动变化时难以实现源人物与目标运动的精确匹配，影响运动转移质量。需通过全局与局部感知结合来提升匹配精度。
AI.method: 采用双ViT编码器提取目标运动图像和源人物图像特征，通过ViT解码器中的级联模块进行特征匹配与运动转移。每个模块中以目标运动特征为Query，源人物为Key和Value计算跨注意力图，并引入卷积层增强局部感知。训练时通过互学习损失实现 warp 和 generation 分支的协同监督。
AI.result: 在定性和定量实验中均达到最新状态-of-the-art性能，项目页面提供实现代码。
AI.conclusion: 通过层次化ViT框架与全局-局部感知结合，有效捕捉运动细节，互学习机制进一步优化运动表示，为人体运动转移任务提供新思路。

authors_text: Xiaoyue Wan,Zhuo Chen,Xu Zhao
title: View Consistency Aware Holistic Triangulation for 3D Human Pose Estimation
title_zh: 查看用于 3D 人体姿势估计的一致性感知整体三角测量
comment: 8 pages, 6 figures, currently under review at Computer Vision and Image Understanding (CVIU) journal
comments: 8 pages, 6 figures, currently under review at Computer Vision and Image Understanding (CVIU) journal
abstract: The rapid development of multi-view 3D human pose estimation (HPE) is attributed to the maturation of monocular 2D HPE and the geometry of 3D reconstruction. However, 2D detection outliers in occluded views due to neglect of view consistency, and 3D implausible poses due to lack of pose coherence, remain challenges. To solve this, we introduce a Multi-View Fusion module to refine 2D results by establishing view correlations. Then, Holistic Triangulation is proposed to infer the whole pose as an entirety, and anatomy prior is injected to maintain the pose coherence and improve the plausibility. Anatomy prior is extracted by PCA whose input is skeletal structure features, which can factor out global context and joint-by-joint relationship from abstract to concrete. Benefiting from the closed-form solution, the whole framework is trained end-to-end. Our method outperforms the state of the art in both precision and plausibility which is assessed by a new metric.
summary: The rapid development of multi-view 3D human pose estimation (HPE) is attributed to the maturation of monocular 2D HPE and the geometry of 3D reconstruction. However, 2D detection outliers in occluded views due to neglect of view consistency, and 3D implausible poses due to lack of pose coherence, remain challenges. To solve this, we introduce a Multi-View Fusion module to refine 2D results by establishing view correlations. Then, Holistic Triangulation is proposed to infer the whole pose as an entirety, and anatomy prior is injected to maintain the pose coherence and improve the plausibility. Anatomy prior is extracted by PCA whose input is skeletal structure features, which can factor out global context and joint-by-joint relationship from abstract to concrete. Benefiting from the closed-form solution, the whole framework is trained end-to-end. Our method outperforms the state of the art in both precision and plausibility which is assessed by a new metric.
abstract_zh: 多视角3D人体姿态估计（HPE）的快速发展归功于单目2D HPE和3D重建几何的成熟。然而，由于忽视视图一致性而导致的遮挡视图中的 2D 检测异常值以及由于缺乏姿势一致性而导致的 3D 不可信姿势仍然是挑战。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了多视图融合模块，通过建立视图关联来细化 2D 结果。然后，提出整体三角测量来将整个姿势推断为一个整体，并注入解剖学先验以保持姿势的一致性并提高合理性。解剖学先验是通过PCA提取的，其输入是骨骼结构特征，可以分解出从抽象到具体的全局上下文和逐关节关系。受益于封闭式解决方案，整个框架都是端到端训练的。我们的方法在精确度和合理性方面均优于现有技术，这是通过新指标评估的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于视图一致性感知的整体三角化方法，用于改进多视角3D人体姿态估计，解决遮挡视图中的2D检测异常和3D姿态不合理问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在遮挡视图中易产生2D检测异常，且缺乏姿态一致性导致3D重建结果不合理，需通过视图关联与解剖先验提升精度与合理性。
AI.method: 引入多视角融合模块修正2D检测结果，提出整体三角化方法结合解剖先验（通过PCA提取骨骼结构特征），以端到端方式优化全局姿态一致性。
AI.result: 在精度和合理性评估指标上超越现有最优方法，验证了视图一致性约束与解剖先验的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过视图关联优化与解剖先验注入，所提方法有效解决了多视角3D姿态估计中的关键挑战，为后续研究提供新思路。

search_text: View Consistency Aware Holistic Triangulation for 3D Human Pose Estimation 查看用于 3D 人体姿势估计的一致性感知整体三角测量 The rapid development of multi-view 3D human pose estimation (HPE) is attributed to the maturation of monocular 2D HPE and the geometry of 3D reconstruction. However, 2D detection outliers in occluded views due to neglect of view consistency, and 3D implausible poses due to lack of pose coherence, remain challenges. To solve this, we introduce a Multi-View Fusion module to refine 2D results by establishing view correlations. Then, Holistic Triangulation is proposed to infer the whole pose as an entirety, and anatomy prior is injected to maintain the pose coherence and improve the plausibility. Anatomy prior is extracted by PCA whose input is skeletal structure features, which can factor out global context and joint-by-joint relationship from abstract to concrete. Benefiting from the closed-form solution, the whole framework is trained end-to-end. Our method outperforms the state of the art in both precision and plausibility which is assessed by a new metric. 多视角3D人体姿态估计（HPE）的快速发展归功于单目2D HPE和3D重建几何的成熟。然而，由于忽视视图一致性而导致的遮挡视图中的 2D 检测异常值以及由于缺乏姿势一致性而导致的 3D 不可信姿势仍然是挑战。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了多视图融合模块，通过建立视图关联来细化 2D 结果。然后，提出整体三角测量来将整个姿势推断为一个整体，并注入解剖学先验以保持姿势的一致性并提高合理性。解剖学先验是通过PCA提取的，其输入是骨骼结构特征，可以分解出从抽象到具体的全局上下文和逐关节关系。受益于封闭式解决方案，整个框架都是端到端训练的。我们的方法在精确度和合理性方面均优于现有技术，这是通过新指标评估的。 本文提出一种基于视图一致性感知的整体三角化方法，用于改进多视角3D人体姿态估计，解决遮挡视图中的2D检测异常和3D姿态不合理问题。 Xiaoyue Wan,Zhuo Chen,Xu Zhao cs.CV

authors_text: Gen Luo,Yiyi Zhou,Lei Jin,Xiaoshuai Sun,Rongrong Ji
title: Towards End-to-end Semi-supervised Learning for One-stage Object Detection
title_zh: 迈向单阶段目标检测的端到端半监督学习
abstract: Semi-supervised object detection (SSOD) is a research hot spot in computer vision, which can greatly reduce the requirement for expensive bounding-box annotations. Despite great success, existing progress mainly focuses on two-stage detection networks like FasterRCNN, while the research on one-stage detectors is often ignored. In this paper, we focus on the semi-supervised learning for the advanced and popular one-stage detection network YOLOv5. Compared with Faster-RCNN, the implementation of YOLOv5 is much more complex, and the various training techniques used in YOLOv5 can also reduce the benefit of SSOD. In addition to this challenge, we also reveal two key issues in one-stage SSOD, which are low-quality pseudo-labeling and multi-task optimization conflict, respectively. To address these issues, we propose a novel teacher-student learning recipe called OneTeacher with two innovative designs, namely Multi-view Pseudo-label Refinement (MPR) and Decoupled Semi-supervised Optimization (DSO). In particular, MPR improves the quality of pseudo-labels via augmented-view refinement and global-view filtering, and DSO handles the joint optimization conflicts via structure tweaks and task-specific pseudo-labeling. In addition, we also carefully revise the implementation of YOLOv5 to maximize the benefits of SSOD, which is also shared with the existing SSOD methods for fair comparison. To validate OneTeacher, we conduct extensive experiments on COCO and Pascal VOC. The extensive experiments show that OneTeacher can not only achieve superior performance than the compared methods, e.g., 15.0% relative AP gains over Unbiased Teacher, but also well handle the key issues in one-stage SSOD. Our source code is available at: https://github.com/luogen1996/OneTeacher.
summary: Semi-supervised object detection (SSOD) is a research hot spot in computer vision, which can greatly reduce the requirement for expensive bounding-box annotations. Despite great success, existing progress mainly focuses on two-stage detection networks like FasterRCNN, while the research on one-stage detectors is often ignored. In this paper, we focus on the semi-supervised learning for the advanced and popular one-stage detection network YOLOv5. Compared with Faster-RCNN, the implementation of YOLOv5 is much more complex, and the various training techniques used in YOLOv5 can also reduce the benefit of SSOD. In addition to this challenge, we also reveal two key issues in one-stage SSOD, which are low-quality pseudo-labeling and multi-task optimization conflict, respectively. To address these issues, we propose a novel teacher-student learning recipe called OneTeacher with two innovative designs, namely Multi-view Pseudo-label Refinement (MPR) and Decoupled Semi-supervised Optimization (DSO). In particular, MPR improves the quality of pseudo-labels via augmented-view refinement and global-view filtering, and DSO handles the joint optimization conflicts via structure tweaks and task-specific pseudo-labeling. In addition, we also carefully revise the implementation of YOLOv5 to maximize the benefits of SSOD, which is also shared with the existing SSOD methods for fair comparison. To validate OneTeacher, we conduct extensive experiments on COCO and Pascal VOC. The extensive experiments show that OneTeacher can not only achieve superior performance than the compared methods, e.g., 15.0% relative AP gains over Unbiased Teacher, but also well handle the key issues in one-stage SSOD. Our source code is available at: https://github.com/luogen1996/OneTeacher.
abstract_zh: 半监督目标检测（SSOD）是计算机视觉领域的一个研究热点，它可以大大减少对昂贵的边界框注释的需求。尽管取得了巨大成功，但现有进展主要集中在像 FasterRCNN 这样的两级检测网络，而对一级检测器的研究往往被忽视。在本文中，我们重点关注先进且流行的单阶段检测网络 YOLOv5 的半监督学习。与Faster-RCNN相比，YOLOv5的实现要复杂得多，并且YOLOv5中使用的各种训练技术也会降低SSOD的收益。除了这一挑战之外，我们还揭示了单阶段 SSOD 中的两个关键问题，分别是低质量伪标签和多任务优化冲突。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种名为 OneTeacher 的新型师生学习方案，它具有两个创新设计，即多视图伪标签细化（MPR）和解耦半监督优化（DSO）。特别是，MPR 通过增强视图细化和全局视图过滤来提高伪标签的质量，DSO 通过结构调整和特定于任务的伪标签来处理联合优化冲突。此外，我们还仔细修改了YOLOv5的实现，以最大限度地发挥SSOD的好处，这也与现有的SSOD方法共享，以进行公平比较。为了验证 OneTeacher，我们对 COCO 和 Pascal VOC 进行了广泛的实验。大量实验表明，OneTeacher 不仅可以实现比对比方法更优越的性能，例如比 Unbiased Teacher 获得 15.0% 的相对 AP 增益，而且可以很好地处理一阶段 SSOD 中的关键问题。我们的源代码位于：https://github.com/luogen1996/OneTeacher。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种面向YOLOv5的端到端半监督学习方法OneTeacher，解决单阶段目标检测中的伪标签质量低和多任务优化冲突问题。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督目标检测研究主要聚焦于两阶段检测器（如Faster R-CNN），而忽视了更复杂且流行的单阶段检测器（如YOLOv5）的优化需求。
AI.method: 设计OneTeacher框架，包含多视角伪标签优化（MPR）和解耦半监督优化（DSO）模块，通过增强视图精炼、全局视图过滤及任务特定伪标签策略提升模型性能。
AI.result: 在COCO和Pascal VOC数据集上实验表明，OneTeacher相比Unbiased Teacher方法实现15.0%的相对AP提升，有效解决单阶段半监督检测的关键问题。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为单阶段检测器的半监督学习提供新思路，通过结构改进和优化策略设计，显著提升模型性能并推动相关研究进展。

authors_text: Mashaan Alshammari,Masahiro Takatsuka
title: Approximate spectral clustering density-based similarity for noisy datasets
title_zh: 噪声数据集的基于近似谱聚类密度的相似性
abstract: Approximate spectral clustering (ASC) was developed to overcome heavy computational demands of spectral clustering (SC). It maintains SC ability in predicting non-convex clusters. Since it involves a preprocessing step, ASC defines new similarity measures to assign weights on graph edges. Connectivity matrix (CONN) is an efficient similarity measure to construct graphs for ASC. It defines the weight between two vertices as the number of points assigned to them during vector quantization training. However, this relationship is undirected, where it is not clear which of the vertices is contributing more to that edge. Also, CONN could be tricked by noisy density between clusters. We defined a directed version of CONN, named DCONN, to get insights on vertices contributions to edges. Also, we provided filtering schemes to ensure CONN edges are highlighting potential clusters. Experiments reveal that the proposed filtering was highly efficient when noise cannot be tolerated by CONN.
summary: Approximate spectral clustering (ASC) was developed to overcome heavy computational demands of spectral clustering (SC). It maintains SC ability in predicting non-convex clusters. Since it involves a preprocessing step, ASC defines new similarity measures to assign weights on graph edges. Connectivity matrix (CONN) is an efficient similarity measure to construct graphs for ASC. It defines the weight between two vertices as the number of points assigned to them during vector quantization training. However, this relationship is undirected, where it is not clear which of the vertices is contributing more to that edge. Also, CONN could be tricked by noisy density between clusters. We defined a directed version of CONN, named DCONN, to get insights on vertices contributions to edges. Also, we provided filtering schemes to ensure CONN edges are highlighting potential clusters. Experiments reveal that the proposed filtering was highly efficient when noise cannot be tolerated by CONN.
abstract_zh: 近似谱聚类 (ASC) 的开发是为了克服谱聚类 (SC) 繁重的计算需求。它保持了 SC 预测非凸簇的能力。由于涉及预处理步骤，ASC 定义了新的相似性度量来分配图边缘的权重。连接矩阵 (CONN) 是构建 ASC 图的有效相似性度量。它将两个顶点之间的权重定义为矢量量化训练期间分配给它们的点数。然而，这种关系是无向的，不清楚哪个顶点对该边的贡献更大。此外，CONN 可能会被簇之间的噪声密度所欺骗。我们定义了 CONN 的有向版本，名为 DCONN，以深入了解顶点对边的贡献。此外，我们还提供了过滤方案，以确保 CONN 边缘突出显示潜在的集群。实验表明，当 CONN 无法容忍噪声时，所提出的滤波非常有效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于密度的定向连接矩阵（DCONN）和过滤方案，以改进近似谱聚类（ASC）在噪声数据集中的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统ASC方法在处理噪声数据时存在连接矩阵（CONN）无法明确节点贡献度及易受簇间密度干扰的问题，需改进以提升鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计定向连接矩阵DCONN以量化节点对边的贡献，并引入过滤机制剔除噪声干扰的边，优化图结构构建过程。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提过滤方案在噪声不可容忍场景下显著提升了ASC的聚类效率与准确性。
AI.conclusion: DCONN与过滤方案有效增强了ASC对噪声数据的适应性，为复杂数据集的非凸聚类提供了更可靠的解决方案。

ai_content.conclusion: DCONN与过滤方案有效增强了ASC对噪声数据的适应性，为复杂数据集的非凸聚类提供了更可靠的解决方案。

search_text: Approximate spectral clustering density-based similarity for noisy datasets 噪声数据集的基于近似谱聚类密度的相似性 Approximate spectral clustering (ASC) was developed to overcome heavy computational demands of spectral clustering (SC). It maintains SC ability in predicting non-convex clusters. Since it involves a preprocessing step, ASC defines new similarity measures to assign weights on graph edges. Connectivity matrix (CONN) is an efficient similarity measure to construct graphs for ASC. It defines the weight between two vertices as the number of points assigned to them during vector quantization training. However, this relationship is undirected, where it is not clear which of the vertices is contributing more to that edge. Also, CONN could be tricked by noisy density between clusters. We defined a directed version of CONN, named DCONN, to get insights on vertices contributions to edges. Also, we provided filtering schemes to ensure CONN edges are highlighting potential clusters. Experiments reveal that the proposed filtering was highly efficient when noise cannot be tolerated by CONN. 近似谱聚类 (ASC) 的开发是为了克服谱聚类 (SC) 繁重的计算需求。它保持了 SC 预测非凸簇的能力。由于涉及预处理步骤，ASC 定义了新的相似性度量来分配图边缘的权重。连接矩阵 (CONN) 是构建 ASC 图的有效相似性度量。它将两个顶点之间的权重定义为矢量量化训练期间分配给它们的点数。然而，这种关系是无向的，不清楚哪个顶点对该边的贡献更大。此外，CONN 可能会被簇之间的噪声密度所欺骗。我们定义了 CONN 的有向版本，名为 DCONN，以深入了解顶点对边的贡献。此外，我们还提供了过滤方案，以确保 CONN 边缘突出显示潜在的集群。实验表明，当 CONN 无法容忍噪声时，所提出的滤波非常有效。 本文提出了一种基于密度的定向连接矩阵（DCONN）和过滤方案，以改进近似谱聚类（ASC）在噪声数据集中的性能。 Mashaan Alshammari,Masahiro Takatsuka cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.IR,cs.NE

authors_text: Mashaan Alshammari,Masahiro Takatsuka
title: Approximate spectral clustering with eigenvector selection and self-tuned $k$
title_zh: 通过特征向量选择和自调整 $k$ 进行近似谱聚类
abstract: The recently emerged spectral clustering surpasses conventional clustering methods by detecting clusters of any shape without the convexity assumption. Unfortunately, with a computational complexity of $O(n^3)$, it was infeasible for multiple real applications, where $n$ could be large. This stimulates researchers to propose the approximate spectral clustering (ASC). However, most of ASC methods assumed that the number of clusters $k$ was known. In practice, manual setting of $k$ could be subjective or time consuming. The proposed algorithm has two relevance metrics for estimating $k$ in two vital steps of ASC. One for selecting the eigenvectors spanning the embedding space, and the other to discover the number of clusters in that space. The algorithm used a growing neural gas (GNG) approximation, GNG is superior in preserving input data topology. The experimental setup demonstrates the efficiency of the proposed algorithm and its ability to compete with similar methods where $k$ was set manually.

In practice, manual setting of $k$ could be subjective or time consuming. The proposed algorithm has two relevance metrics for estimating $k$ in two vital steps of ASC. One for selecting the eigenvectors spanning the embedding space, and the other to discover the number of clusters in that space. The algorithm used a growing neural gas (GNG) approximation, GNG is superior in preserving input data topology. The experimental setup demonstrates the efficiency of the proposed algorithm and its ability to compete with similar methods where $k$ was set manually.
abstract_zh: 最近出现的谱聚类通过检测任何形状的聚类而无需凸性假设，从而超越了传统的聚类方法。不幸的是，计算复杂度为 $O(n^3)$，对于多个实际应用程序来说是不可行的，其中 $n$ 可能很大。这促使研究人员提出近似谱聚类（ASC）。然而，大多数 ASC 方法都假设簇的数量 $k$ 是已知的。实际上，手动设置 $k$ 可能是主观的或耗时的。所提出的算法有两个相关性度量，用于估计 ASC 两个重要步骤中的 $k$。一个用于选择跨越嵌入空间的特征向量，另一个用于发现该空间中的簇的数量。该算法使用了生长神经气体（GNG）近似，GNG 在保留输入数据拓扑方面具有优越性。实验设置证明了所提出算法的效率及其与手动设置 $k$ 的类似方法竞争的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自适应确定聚类数k的近似谱聚类方法，通过特征向量选择和拓扑保持的神经气体算法解决大规模数据聚类问题。
AI.motivation: 传统谱聚类计算复杂度高且需预设聚类数k，而现有近似方法仍依赖人工设定k值，缺乏自动适应性。
AI.method: 设计两种相关性度量指标：1) 用于选择嵌入空间特征向量；2) 用于确定聚类数。结合生长神经气体(GNG)算法保持数据拓扑结构。
AI.result: 实验表明该算法在效率和聚类性能上可与人工设定k值的同类方法竞争，且无需先验k值。
AI.conclusion: 通过自动估计k值和拓扑保持机制，该方法提升了近似谱聚类在实际应用中的可行性和准确性。

authors_text: Mashaan Alshammari,John Stavrakakis,Masahiro Takatsuka
title: Refining a $k$-nearest neighbor graph for a computationally efficient spectral clustering
title_zh: 细化 $k$ 最近邻图以实现计算高效的谱聚类
abstract: Spectral clustering became a popular choice for data clustering for its ability of uncovering clusters of different shapes. However, it is not always preferable over other clustering methods due to its computational demands. One of the effective ways to bypass these computational demands is to perform spectral clustering on a subset of points (data representatives) then generalize the clustering outcome, this is known as approximate spectral clustering (ASC). ASC uses sampling or quantization to select data representatives. This makes it vulnerable to 1) performance inconsistency (since these methods have a random step either in initialization or training), 2) local statistics loss (because the pairwise similarities are extracted from data representatives instead of data points). We proposed a refined version of $k$-nearest neighbor graph, in which we keep data points and aggressively reduce number of edges for computational efficiency. Local statistics were exploited to keep the edges that do not violate the intra-cluster distances and nullify all other edges in the $k$-nearest neighbor graph. We also introduced an optional step to automatically select the number of clusters $C$. The proposed method was tested on synthetic and real datasets. Compared to ASC methods, the proposed method delivered a consistent performance despite significant reduction of edges.
summary: Spectral clustering became a popular choice for data clustering for its ability of uncovering clusters of different shapes. However, it is not always preferable over other clustering methods due to its computational demands. One of the effective ways to bypass these computational demands is to perform spectral clustering on a subset of points (data representatives) then generalize the clustering outcome, this is known as approximate spectral clustering (ASC). ASC uses sampling or quantization to select data representatives. This makes it vulnerable to 1) performance inconsistency (since these methods have a random step either in initialization or training), 2) local statistics loss (because the pairwise similarities are extracted from data representatives instead of data points). We proposed a refined version of $k$-nearest neighbor graph, in which we keep data points and aggressively reduce number of edges for computational efficiency. Local statistics were exploited to keep the edges that do not violate the intra-cluster distances and nullify all other edges in the $k$-nearest neighbor graph. We also introduced an optional step to automatically select the number of clusters $C$. The proposed method was tested on synthetic and real datasets. Compared to ASC methods, the proposed method delivered a consistent performance despite significant reduction of edges.
abstract_zh: 谱聚类因其发现不同形状的聚类的能力而成为数据聚类的流行选择。然而，由于其计算需求，它并不总是比其他聚类方法更可取。绕过这些计算需求的有效方法之一是对点子集（数据代表）执行谱聚类，然后概括聚类结果，这称为近似谱聚类 (ASC)。 ASC 使用采样或量化来选择数据代表。这使得它容易受到以下影响：1）性能不一致（因为这些方法在初始化或训练中具有随机步骤），2）局部统计丢失（因为成对相似性是从数据代表而不是数据点中提取的）。我们提出了 $k$-最近邻图的改进版本，其中我们保留数据点并积极减少边数以提高计算效率。利用本地统计数据来保留不违反簇内距离的边，并取消 $k$ 最近邻图中的所有其他边。我们还引入了一个可选步骤来自动选择簇 $C$ 的数量。所提出的方法在合成数据集和真实数据集上进行了测试。与 ASC 方法相比，尽管边缘显着减少，但所提出的方法仍提供了一致的性能。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种改进的k近邻图方法，以在保持聚类性能的同时提高谱聚类的计算效率。
AI.motivation: 谱聚类虽能发现不同形状的聚类，但计算成本高。现有近似谱聚类方法存在性能不一致和局部统计信息丢失的问题，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过保留数据点并减少边数优化k近邻图，利用局部统计信息保留不违反类内距离的边，同时引入自动选择聚类数目的可选步骤。
AI.result: 在合成和真实数据集上，该方法在显著减少边数的情况下仍保持稳定性能，优于现有近似谱聚类方法。
AI.conclusion: 改进后的k近邻图在降低计算复杂度的同时保持聚类准确性，为谱聚类提供了更高效的实现方案。

authors_text: Katrin Casel,Tobias Friedrich,Martin Schirneck,Simon Wietheger
title: Fair Correlation Clustering in Forests
title_zh: 森林中的公平相关聚类
abstract: The study of algorithmic fairness received growing attention recently. This stems from the awareness that bias in the input data for machine learning systems may result in discriminatory outputs. For clustering tasks, one of the most central notions of fairness is the formalization by Chierichetti, Kumar, Lattanzi, and Vassilvitskii [NeurIPS 2017]. A clustering is said to be fair, if each cluster has the same distribution of manifestations of a sensitive attribute as the whole input set. This is motivated by various applications where the objects to be clustered have sensitive attributes that should not be over- or underrepresented. We discuss the applicability of this fairness notion to Correlation Clustering. The existing literature on the resulting Fair Correlation Clustering problem either presents approximation algorithms with poor approximation guarantees or severely limits the possible distributions of the sensitive attribute (often only two manifestations with a 1:1 ratio are considered). Our goal is to understand if there is hope for better results in between these two extremes. To this end, we consider restricted graph classes which allow us to characterize the distributions of sensitive attributes for which this form of fairness is tractable from a complexity point of view. While existing work on Fair Correlation Clustering gives approximation algorithms, we focus on exact solutions and investigate whether there are efficiently solvable instances. The unfair version of Correlation Clustering is trivial on forests, but adding fairness creates a surprisingly rich picture of complexities. We give an overview of the distributions and types of forests where Fair Correlation Clustering turns from tractable to intractable. The most surprising insight to us is the fact that the cause of the hardness of Fair Correlation Clustering is not the strictness of the fairness condition.
summary: The study of algorithmic fairness received growing attention recently. This stems from the awareness that bias in the input data for machine learning systems may result in discriminatory outputs. For clustering tasks, one of the most central notions of fairness is the formalization by Chierichetti, Kumar, Lattanzi, and Vassilvitskii [NeurIPS 2017]. A clustering is said to be fair, if each cluster has the same distribution of manifestations of a sensitive attribute as the whole input set. This is motivated by various applications where the objects to be clustered have sensitive attributes that should not be over- or underrepresented. We discuss the applicability of this fairness notion to Correlation Clustering. The existing literature on the resulting Fair Correlation Clustering problem either presents approximation algorithms with poor approximation guarantees or severely limits the possible distributions of the sensitive attribute (often only two manifestations with a 1:1 ratio are considered). Our goal is to understand if there is hope for better results in between these two extremes. To this end, we consider restricted graph classes which allow us to characterize the distributions of sensitive attributes for which this form of fairness is tractable from a complexity point of view. While existing work on Fair Correlation Clustering gives approximation algorithms, we focus on exact solutions and investigate whether there are efficiently solvable instances. The unfair version of Correlation Clustering is trivial on forests, but adding fairness creates a surprisingly rich picture of complexities. We give an overview of the distributions and types of forests where Fair Correlation Clustering turns from tractable to intractable. The most surprising insight to us is the fact that the cause of the hardness of Fair Correlation Clustering is not the strictness of the fairness condition.
abstract_zh: 算法公平性的研究近年来受到越来越多的关注。这源于人们认识到机器学习系统输入数据的偏差可能会导致歧视性的输出。对于聚类任​​务，公平性最核心的概念之一是 Chierichetti、Kumar、Lattanzi 和 Vassilvitskii 的形式化 [NeurIPS 2017]。如果每个聚类具有与整个输入集相同的敏感属性表现分布，则称聚类是公平的。这是由各种应用程序推动的，其中要聚类的对象具有敏感属性，不应过度或低估这些属性。我们讨论这种公平概念对相关聚类的适用性。关于由此产生的公平相关聚类问题的现有文献要么提出近似保证较差的近似算法，要么严重限制敏感属性的可能分布（通常只考虑比例为 1:1 的两种表现形式）。我们的目标是了解在这两个极端之间是否有希望获得更好的结果。为此，我们考虑受限图类，它使我们能够表征敏感属性的分布，从复杂性的角度来看，这种形式的公平性是易于处理的。虽然公平相关聚类的现有工作提供了近似算法，但我们专注于精确解决方案并研究是否存在有效可解决的实例。相关聚类的不公平版本对于森林来说是微不足道的，但增加公平性会产生令人惊讶的丰富复杂性。我们概述了公平相关聚类从易于处理变为棘手的森林的分布和类型。对我们来说最令人惊讶的见解是，公平相关聚类的难度并不是公平条件的严格性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在森林图中实现公平相关聚类的可行性，分析不同敏感属性分布下的计算复杂性。
AI.motivation: 现有公平相关聚类算法存在近似比差或敏感属性分布限制过严的问题，需探索中间可行解。
AI.method: 通过限制图类（森林）分析敏感属性分布的可处理性，聚焦精确解而非近似算法。
AI.result: 发现特定敏感属性分布与森林结构会导致问题从可解到不可解，且复杂性根源并非公平条件严格性。
AI.conclusion: 公平相关聚类的难度取决于敏感属性分布与图结构，而非单纯由公平约束强度决定。

authors_text: Guangyuan Shi,Qimai Li,Wenlong Zhang,Jiaxin Chen,Xiao-Ming Wu
title: Recon: Reducing Conflicting Gradients from the Root for Multi-Task Learning
title_zh: Recon：从多任务学习的根源减少冲突梯度
comment: Accepted as a conference paper at ICLR 2023
comments: Accepted as a conference paper at ICLR 2023
abstract: A fundamental challenge for multi-task learning is that different tasks may conflict with each other when they are solved jointly, and a cause of this phenomenon is conflicting gradients during optimization. Recent works attempt to mitigate the influence of conflicting gradients by directly altering the gradients based on some criteria. However, our empirical study shows that ``gradient surgery'' cannot effectively reduce the occurrence of conflicting gradients. In this paper, we take a different approach to reduce conflicting gradients from the root. In essence, we investigate the task gradients w.r.t. each shared network layer, select the layers with high conflict scores, and turn them to task-specific layers. Our experiments show that such a simple approach can greatly reduce the occurrence of conflicting gradients in the remaining shared layers and achieve better performance, with only a slight increase in model parameters in many cases. Our approach can be easily applied to improve various state-of-the-art methods including gradient manipulation methods and branched architecture search methods. Given a network architecture (e.g., ResNet18), it only needs to search for the conflict layers once, and the network can be modified to be used with different methods on the same or even different datasets to gain performance improvement. The source code is available at https://github.com/moukamisama/Recon.
summary: A fundamental challenge for multi-task learning is that different tasks may conflict with each other when they are solved jointly, and a cause of this phenomenon is conflicting gradients during optimization. Recent works attempt to mitigate the influence of conflicting gradients by directly altering the gradients based on some criteria. However, our empirical study shows that ``gradient surgery'' cannot effectively reduce the occurrence of conflicting gradients. In this paper, we take a different approach to reduce conflicting gradients from the root. In essence, we investigate the task gradients w.r.t. each shared network layer, select the layers with high conflict scores, and turn them to task-specific layers. Our experiments show that such a simple approach can greatly reduce the occurrence of conflicting gradients in the remaining shared layers and achieve better performance, with only a slight increase in model parameters in many cases. Our approach can be easily applied to improve various state-of-the-art methods including gradient manipulation methods and branched architecture search methods. Given a network architecture (e.g., ResNet18), it only needs to search for the conflict layers once, and the network can be modified to be used with different methods on the same or even different datasets to gain performance improvement. The source code is available at https://github.com/moukamisama/Recon.
abstract_zh: 多任务学习的一个基本挑战是，不同的任务在共同解决时可能会相互冲突，而造成这种现象的一个原因是优化过程中的梯度冲突。最近的工作试图通过根据某些标准直接改变梯度来减轻冲突梯度的影响。然而，我们的实证研究表明“梯度手术”并不能有效减少梯度冲突的发生。在本文中，我们采用不同的方法从根源上减少冲突梯度。本质上，我们研究任务梯度。每个共享网络层，选择冲突分数高的层，并将它们转变为特定于任务的层。我们的实验表明，这种简单的方法可以大大减少剩余共享层中梯度冲突的发生，并获得更好的性能，而在许多情况下只需要稍微增加模型参数。我们的方法可以很容易地应用于改进各种最先进的方法，包括梯度操纵方法和分支架构搜索方法。给定一个网络架构（例如ResNet18），它只需要搜索一次冲突层，并且可以修改网络以在相同甚至不同的数据集上使用不同的方法来获得性能改进。源代码可在 https://github.com/moukamisama/Recon 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Recon方法，通过从网络层根源减少多任务学习中的冲突梯度问题。
AI.motivation: 现有梯度手术方法无法有效缓解多任务学习中任务间的梯度冲突，需从根源解决冲突梯度问题。
AI.method: 分析各共享层的任务梯度，筛选高冲突层并转换为任务专用层，仅需一次搜索即可适配不同方法与数据集。
AI.result: 显著降低剩余共享层的冲突梯度，在多数情况下仅轻微增加参数即可提升性能，兼容多种先进方法。
AI.conclusion: Recon通过结构化改造网络层有效解决梯度冲突，为多任务学习提供通用且高效的改进方案。
