authors_text: Marine Collery,Philippe Bonnard,François Fages,Remy Kusters
title: Neural-based classification rule learning for sequential data
title_zh: 基于神经的序列数据分类规则学习
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2023
comments: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2023
abstract: Discovering interpretable patterns for classification of sequential data is of key importance for a variety of fields, ranging from genomics to fraud detection or more generally interpretable decision-making. In this paper, we propose a novel differentiable fully interpretable method to discover both local and global patterns (i.e. catching a relative or absolute temporal dependency) for rule-based binary classification. It consists of a convolutional binary neural network with an interpretable neural filter and a training strategy based on dynamically-enforced sparsity. We demonstrate the validity and usefulness of the approach on synthetic datasets and on an open-source peptides dataset. Key to this end-to-end differentiable method is that the expressive patterns used in the rules are learned alongside the rules themselves.
summary: Discovering interpretable patterns for classification of sequential data is of key importance for a variety of fields, ranging from genomics to fraud detection or more generally interpretable decision-making. In this paper, we propose a novel differentiable fully interpretable method to discover both local and global patterns (i.e. catching a relative or absolute temporal dependency) for rule-based binary classification. It consists of a convolutional binary neural network with an interpretable neural filter and a training strategy based on dynamically-enforced sparsity. We demonstrate the validity and usefulness of the approach on synthetic datasets and on an open-source peptides dataset. Key to this end-to-end differentiable method is that the expressive patterns used in the rules are learned alongside the rules themselves.
abstract_zh: 发现序列数据分类的可解释模式对于从基因组学到欺诈检测或更普遍的可解释决策等各个领域都至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的可微分完全可解释方法，用于发现基于规则的二元分类的局部和全局模式（即捕获相对或绝对时间依赖性）。它由具有可解释神经滤波器的卷积二元神经网络和基于动态强制稀疏性的训练策略组成。我们在合成数据集和开源肽数据集上证明了该方法的有效性和实用性。这种端到端可微分方法的关键在于，规则中使用的表达模式是与规则本身一起学习的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经网络的可解释规则学习方法，用于序列数据的二元分类任务。
AI.motivation: 序列数据分类需要可解释的模式发现，传统方法难以兼顾模型性能与规则可解释性。
AI.method: 设计包含可解释神经滤波器的卷积二值神经网络，结合动态强制稀疏性训练策略，同步学习规则与模式表达。
AI.result: 在合成数据集和肽数据集验证中，方法有效捕捉时空依赖关系并保持规则可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 该端到端可微方法实现了规则与模式的联合学习，在需解释性的应用场景中具有实用价值。

search_text: Neural-based classification rule learning for sequential data 基于神经的序列数据分类规则学习 Discovering interpretable patterns for classification of sequential data is of key importance for a variety of fields, ranging from genomics to fraud detection or more generally interpretable decision-making. In this paper, we propose a novel differentiable fully interpretable method to discover both local and global patterns (i.e. catching a relative or absolute temporal dependency) for rule-based binary classification. It consists of a convolutional binary neural network with an interpretable neural filter and a training strategy based on dynamically-enforced sparsity. We demonstrate the validity and usefulness of the approach on synthetic datasets and on an open-source peptides dataset. Key to this end-to-end differentiable method is that the expressive patterns used in the rules are learned alongside the rules themselves. 发现序列数据分类的可解释模式对于从基因组学到欺诈检测或更普遍的可解释决策等各个领域都至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的可微分完全可解释方法，用于发现基于规则的二元分类的局部和全局模式（即捕获相对或绝对时间依赖性）。它由具有可解释神经滤波器的卷积二元神经网络和基于动态强制稀疏性的训练策略组成。我们在合成数据集和开源肽数据集上证明了该方法的有效性和实用性。这种端到端可微分方法的关键在于，规则中使用的表达模式是与规则本身一起学习的。 本文提出一种基于神经网络的可解释规则学习方法，用于序列数据的二元分类任务。 Marine Collery,Philippe Bonnard,François Fages,Remy Kusters cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Yu Guo,Ryan Wen Liu,Jingxiang Qu,Yuxu Lu,Fenghua Zhu,Yisheng Lv
title: Asynchronous Trajectory Matching-Based Multimodal Maritime Data Fusion for Vessel Traffic Surveillance in Inland Waterways
title_zh: 基于异步轨迹匹配的多模态海事数据融合在内河船舶交通监控中的应用
abstract: The automatic identification system (AIS) and video cameras have been widely exploited for vessel traffic surveillance in inland waterways. The AIS data could provide the vessel identity and dynamic information on vessel position and movements. In contrast, the video data could describe the visual appearances of moving vessels, but without knowing the information on identity, position and movements, etc. To further improve vessel traffic surveillance, it becomes necessary to fuse the AIS and video data to simultaneously capture the visual features, identity and dynamic information for the vessels of interest. However, traditional data fusion methods easily suffer from several potential limitations, e.g., asynchronous messages, missing data, random outliers, etc. In this work, we first extract the AIS- and video-based vessel trajectories, and then propose a deep learning-enabled asynchronous trajectory matching method (named DeepSORVF) to fuse the AIS-based vessel information with the corresponding visual targets. In addition, by combining the AIS- and video-based movement features, we also present a prior knowledge-driven anti-occlusion method to yield accurate and robust vessel tracking results under occlusion conditions. To validate the efficacy of our DeepSORVF, we have also constructed a new benchmark dataset (termed FVessel) for vessel detection, tracking, and data fusion. It consists of many videos and the corresponding AIS data collected in various weather conditions and locations. The experimental results have demonstrated that our method is capable of guaranteeing high-reliable data fusion and anti-occlusion vessel tracking.
summary: The automatic identification system (AIS) and video cameras have been widely exploited for vessel traffic surveillance in inland waterways. The AIS data could provide the vessel identity and dynamic information on vessel position and movements. In contrast, the video data could describe the visual appearances of moving vessels, but without knowing the information on identity, position and movements, etc. To further improve vessel traffic surveillance, it becomes necessary to fuse the AIS and video data to simultaneously capture the visual features, identity and dynamic information for the vessels of interest. However, traditional data fusion methods easily suffer from several potential limitations, e.g., asynchronous messages, missing data, random outliers, etc. In this work, we first extract the AIS- and video-based vessel trajectories, and then propose a deep learning-enabled asynchronous trajectory matching method (named DeepSORVF) to fuse the AIS-based vessel information with the corresponding visual targets. In addition, by combining the AIS- and video-based movement features, we also present a prior knowledge-driven anti-occlusion method to yield accurate and robust vessel tracking results under occlusion conditions. To validate the efficacy of our DeepSORVF, we have also constructed a new benchmark dataset (termed FVessel) for vessel detection, tracking, and data fusion. It consists of many videos and the corresponding AIS data collected in various weather conditions and locations. The experimental results have demonstrated that our method is capable of guaranteeing high-reliable data fusion and anti-occlusion vessel tracking.
abstract_zh: 自动识别系统（AIS）和摄像机已广泛用于内河航道的船舶交通监控。 AIS 数据可以提供船舶身份以及船舶位置和运动的动态信息。相比之下，视频数据可以描述移动船舶的视觉外观，但不知道其身份、位置和运动等信息。为了进一步改善船舶交通监控，有必要将AIS和视频数据融合起来，同时捕获感兴趣船舶的视觉特征、身份和动态信息。然而，传统的数据融合方法很容易受到一些潜在的限制，例如异步消息、丢失数据、随机异常值等。在这项工作中，我们首先提取基于AIS和视频的船舶轨迹，然后提出一种基于深度学习的异步轨迹匹配方法（名为DeepSORVF），将基于AIS的船舶信息与相应的视觉目标融合。此外，通过结合 AIS 和基于视频的运动特征，我们还提出了一种先验知识驱动的抗遮挡方法，可在遮挡条件下产生准确且稳健的血管跟踪结果。为了验证 DeepSORVF 的功效，我们还构建了一个新的基准数据集（称为 FVessel），用于船舶检测、跟踪和数据融合。它由许多视频以及在各种天气条件和地点收集的相应 AIS 数据组成。实验结果表明，我们的方法能够保证高可靠的数据融合和防闭塞血管跟踪。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于异步轨迹匹配的多模态海上数据融合方法DeepSORVF，用于提升内陆水域船舶交通监控的准确性与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统数据融合方法在处理AIS与视频数据异步性、缺失值及遮挡问题时存在局限，需结合AIS的动态信息与视频的视觉特征以实现更全面的船舶监控。
AI.method: 通过提取AIS和视频轨迹，设计深度学习驱动的异步轨迹匹配算法DeepSORVF，并结合先验知识提出抗遮挡方法，构建FVessel数据集验证效果。
AI.result: 实验表明DeepSORVF在多天气条件和遮挡场景下实现高可靠数据融合与船舶跟踪，FVessel数据集为后续研究提供基准。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法有效解决了异步数据融合与遮挡问题，为内陆水域船舶交通监控提供了新的技术方案。

authors_text: Song Duong,Alberto Lumbreras,Mike Gartrell,Patrick Gallinari
title: Learning from Multiple Sources for Data-to-Text and Text-to-Data
title_zh: 从数据到文本和文本到数据的多个来源学习
abstract: Data-to-text (D2T) and text-to-data (T2D) are dual tasks that convert structured data, such as graphs or tables into fluent text, and vice versa. These tasks are usually handled separately and use corpora extracted from a single source. Current systems leverage pre-trained language models fine-tuned on D2T or T2D tasks. This approach has two main limitations: first, a separate system has to be tuned for each task and source; second, learning is limited by the scarcity of available corpora. This paper considers a more general scenario where data are available from multiple heterogeneous sources. Each source, with its specific data format and semantic domain, provides a non-parallel corpus of text and structured data. We introduce a variational auto-encoder model with disentangled style and content variables that allows us to represent the diversity that stems from multiple sources of text and data. Our model is designed to handle the tasks of D2T and T2D jointly. We evaluate our model on several datasets, and show that by learning from multiple sources, our model closes the performance gap with its supervised single-source counterpart and outperforms it in some cases.
summary: Data-to-text (D2T) and text-to-data (T2D) are dual tasks that convert structured data, such as graphs or tables into fluent text, and vice versa. These tasks are usually handled separately and use corpora extracted from a single source. Current systems leverage pre-trained language models fine-tuned on D2T or T2D tasks. This approach has two main limitations: first, a separate system has to be tuned for each task and source; second, learning is limited by the scarcity of available corpora. This paper considers a more general scenario where data are available from multiple heterogeneous sources. Each source, with its specific data format and semantic domain, provides a non-parallel corpus of text and structured data. We introduce a variational auto-encoder model with disentangled style and content variables that allows us to represent the diversity that stems from multiple sources of text and data. Our model is designed to handle the tasks of D2T and T2D jointly. We evaluate our model on several datasets, and show that by learning from multiple sources, our model closes the performance gap with its supervised single-source counterpart and outperforms it in some cases.
abstract_zh: 数据到文本 (D2T) 和文本到数据 (T2D) 是将结构化数据（例如图形或表格）转换为流畅文本的双重任务，反之亦然。这些任务通常是单独处理的，并使用从单一来源提取的语料库。当前的系统利用针对 D2T 或 T2D 任务进行微调的预训练语言模型。这种方法有两个主要限制：首先，必须为每个任务和源调整单独的系统；其次，学习受到可用语料库稀缺的限制。本文考虑了一种更一般的场景，其中数据可从多个异构源获得。每个源都有其特定的数据格式和语义域，提供非并行的文本和结构化数据语料库。我们引入了一种具有解开样式和内容变量的变分自动编码器模型，使我们能够表示源于多个文本和数据源的多样性。我们的模型旨在联合处理 D2T 和 T2D 的任务。我们在多个数据集上评估我们的模型，并表明，通过从多个来源学习，我们的模型缩小了与其监督单源对应模型的性能差距，并在某些情况下优于它。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何从多个异构数据源联合学习数据到文本（D2T）和文本到数据（T2D）任务，解决单一来源语料限制和任务分离的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有D2T/T2D系统需为每个任务和来源单独训练，且受限于单一来源语料稀缺性，无法有效利用多源异构数据的多样性。
AI.method: 提出带分离风格-内容变量的变分自编码器模型，通过多源非并行数据联合学习，统一处理D2T和T2D任务。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上验证，模型性能超越单源监督方法，在部分场景下显著缩小甚至消除性能差距。
AI.conclusion: 多源联合学习能有效提升D2T/T2D任务表现，分离变量设计成功捕捉异构数据的多样性特征。

We introduce a variational auto-encoder model with disentangled style and content variables that allows us to represent the diversity that stems from multiple sources of text and data. Our model is designed to handle the tasks of D2T and T2D jointly. We evaluate our model on several datasets, and show that by learning from multiple sources, our model closes the performance gap with its supervised single-source counterpart and outperforms it in some cases. 数据到文本 (D2T) 和文本到数据 (T2D) 是将结构化数据（例如图形或表格）转换为流畅文本的双重任务，反之亦然。这些任务通常是单独处理的，并使用从单一来源提取的语料库。当前的系统利用针对 D2T 或 T2D 任务进行微调的预训练语言模型。这种方法有两个主要限制：首先，必须为每个任务和源调整单独的系统；其次，学习受到可用语料库稀缺的限制。本文考虑了一种更一般的场景，其中数据可从多个异构源获得。每个源都有其特定的数据格式和语义域，提供非并行的文本和结构化数据语料库。我们引入了一种具有解开样式和内容变量的变分自动编码器模型，使我们能够表示源于多个文本和数据源的多样性。我们的模型旨在联合处理 D2T 和 T2D 的任务。我们在多个数据集上评估我们的模型，并表明，通过从多个来源学习，我们的模型缩小了与其监督单源对应模型的性能差距，并在某些情况下优于它。 本文研究如何从多个异构数据源联合学习数据到文本（D2T）和文本到数据（T2D）任务，解决单一来源语料限制和任务分离的问题。 Song Duong,Alberto Lumbreras,Mike Gartrell,Patrick Gallinari cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CL,stat.ML

authors_text: Filippo Bragato,Tommaso Lotta,Gianmaria Ventura,Matteo Drago,Federico Mason,Marco Giordani,Michele Zorzi
title: Towards Decentralized Predictive Quality of Service in Next-Generation Vehicular Networks
title_zh: 实现下一代车辆网络中的去中心化预测服务质量
comment: This paper has been accepted for publication at IEEE Information Theory and Applications Workshop (ITA), 2023
comments: This paper has been accepted for publication at IEEE Information Theory and Applications Workshop (ITA), 2023
abstract: To ensure safety in teleoperated driving scenarios, communication between vehicles and remote drivers must satisfy strict latency and reliability requirements. In this context, Predictive Quality of Service (PQoS) was investigated as a tool to predict unanticipated degradation of the Quality of Service (QoS), and allow the network to react accordingly. In this work, we design a reinforcement learning (RL) agent to implement PQoS in vehicular networks. To do so, based on data gathered at the Radio Access Network (RAN) and/or the end vehicles, as well as QoS predictions, our framework is able to identify the optimal level of compression to send automotive data under low latency and reliability constraints. We consider different learning schemes, including centralized, fully-distributed, and federated learning. We demonstrate via ns-3 simulations that, while centralized learning generally outperforms any other solution, decentralized learning, and especially federated learning, offers a good trade-off between convergence time and reliability, with positive implications in terms of privacy and complexity.
summary: To ensure safety in teleoperated driving scenarios, communication between vehicles and remote drivers must satisfy strict latency and reliability requirements. In this context, Predictive Quality of Service (PQoS) was investigated as a tool to predict unanticipated degradation of the Quality of Service (QoS), and allow the network to react accordingly. In this work, we design a reinforcement learning (RL) agent to implement PQoS in vehicular networks. To do so, based on data gathered at the Radio Access Network (RAN) and/or the end vehicles, as well as QoS predictions, our framework is able to identify the optimal level of compression to send automotive data under low latency and reliability constraints. We consider different learning schemes, including centralized, fully-distributed, and federated learning. We demonstrate via ns-3 simulations that, while centralized learning generally outperforms any other solution, decentralized learning, and especially federated learning, offers a good trade-off between convergence time and reliability, with positive implications in terms of privacy and complexity.
abstract_zh: 为了确保远程操作驾驶场景的安全，车辆和远程驾驶员之间的通信必须满足严格的延迟和可靠性要求。在此背景下，人们对预测服务质量 (PQoS) 作为一种工具进行了研究，以预测服务质量 (QoS) 意外下降，并允许网络做出相应反应。在这项工作中，我们设计了一个强化学习（RL）代理来在车辆网络中实现 PQoS。为此，根据在无线接入网络 (RAN) 和/或终端车辆收集的数据以及 QoS 预测，我们的框架能够确定最佳压缩级别，以便在低延迟和可靠性约束下发送汽车数据。我们考虑不同的学习方案，包括集中式、完全分布式和联邦学习。我们通过 ns-3 模拟证明，虽然集中式学习通常优于任何其他解决方案，但去中心化学习，尤其是联邦学习，在收敛时间和可靠性之间提供了良好的权衡，在隐私和复杂性方面具有积极影响。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一个基于强化学习的框架，用于在车载网络中实现去中心化的预测服务质量（PQoS），以优化数据压缩并满足低延迟和高可靠性的通信需求。
AI.motivation: 在远程驾驶场景中，车辆与远程驾驶员的通信需满足严格的时延和可靠性要求，而传统服务质量（QoS）难以预测突发性网络退化，需通过预测性机制保障安全。
AI.method: 提出一个强化学习（RL）代理，结合无线接入网（RAN）和终端车辆的数据以及QoS预测，动态调整数据压缩级别；对比集中式、全分布式和联邦学习方案。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，集中式学习性能最优，但联邦学习在收敛时间与可靠性之间取得平衡，且在隐私保护和系统复杂性方面具有优势。
AI.conclusion: 联邦学习作为去中心化PQoS方案，在兼顾网络性能与隐私需求的车载环境中具有应用潜力。

authors_text: Bodo Manthey,Jesse van Rhijn
title: Approximation Ineffectiveness of a Tour-Untangling Heuristic
title_zh: 解开游览启发式的近似无效性
abstract: We analyze a tour-uncrossing heuristic for the Travelling Salesperson Problem, showing that its worst-case approximation ratio is $Ω(n)$ and its average-case approximation ratio is $Ω(\sqrt{n})$ in expectation. We furthermore evaluate the approximation performance of this heuristic numerically on average-case instances, and find that it performs far better than the average-case lower bound suggests. This indicates a shortcoming in the approach we use for our analysis, which is a rather common approach in the analysis of local search heuristics.
summary: We analyze a tour-uncrossing heuristic for the Travelling Salesperson Problem, showing that its worst-case approximation ratio is $Ω(n)$ and its average-case approximation ratio is $Ω(\sqrt{n})$ in expectation. We furthermore evaluate the approximation performance of this heuristic numerically on average-case instances, and find that it performs far better than the average-case lower bound suggests. This indicates a shortcoming in the approach we use for our analysis, which is a rather common approach in the analysis of local search heuristics.
abstract_zh: 我们分析了旅行推销员问题的巡回非交叉启发式，表明其最坏情况近似比为 $Ω(n)$，平均情况近似比预期为 $Ω(\sqrt{n})$。我们进一步在平均情况实例上以数值方式评估了这种启发式的近似性能，并发现它的性能远好于平均情况下限所建议的。这表明我们用于分析的方法存在缺陷，这是本地搜索启发式分析中相当常见的方法。

AI.tldr: 分析旅行商问题中一种路径解缠启发式算法的近似效果，发现其理论下界与实际表现存在显著差异。
AI.motivation: 验证局部搜索启发式算法的理论分析方法是否可靠，并评估特定启发式在TSP中的实际性能。
AI.method: 结合理论证明与数值实验，分析启发式算法的最坏/平均情况近似比，并通过实例测试其实际表现。
AI.result: 理论证明最坏/平均情况近似比分别为Ω(n)和Ω(√n)，但数值实验显示实际表现远超理论下界。
AI.conclusion: 现有分析方法存在局限性，需改进理论模型以更准确反映启发式算法的实际性能。

authors_text: Meng Liu,Kong Aik Lee,Longbiao Wang,Hanyi Zhang,Chang Zeng,Jianwu Dang
title: Cross-modal Audio-visual Co-learning for Text-independent Speaker Verification
title_zh: 用于独立于文本的说话人验证的跨模式视听协同学习
abstract: Visual speech (i.e., lip motion) is highly related to auditory speech due to the co-occurrence and synchronization in speech production. This paper investigates this correlation and proposes a cross-modal speech co-learning paradigm. The primary motivation of our cross-modal co-learning method is modeling one modality aided by exploiting knowledge from another modality. Specifically, two cross-modal boosters are introduced based on an audio-visual pseudo-siamese structure to learn the modality-transformed correlation. Inside each booster, a max-feature-map embedded Transformer variant is proposed for modality alignment and enhanced feature generation. The network is co-learned both from scratch and with pretrained models. Experimental results on the LRSLip3, GridLip, LomGridLip, and VoxLip datasets demonstrate that our proposed method achieves 60% and 20% average relative performance improvement over independently trained audio-only/visual-only and baseline fusion systems, respectively.
summary: Visual speech (i.e., lip motion) is highly related to auditory speech due to the co-occurrence and synchronization in speech production. This paper investigates this correlation and proposes a cross-modal speech co-learning paradigm. The primary motivation of our cross-modal co-learning method is modeling one modality aided by exploiting knowledge from another modality. Specifically, two cross-modal boosters are introduced based on an audio-visual pseudo-siamese structure to learn the modality-transformed correlation. Inside each booster, a max-feature-map embedded Transformer variant is proposed for modality alignment and enhanced feature generation. The network is co-learned both from scratch and with pretrained models. Experimental results on the LRSLip3, GridLip, LomGridLip, and VoxLip datasets demonstrate that our proposed method achieves 60% and 20% average relative performance improvement over independently trained audio-only/visual-only and baseline fusion systems, respectively.
abstract_zh: 由于语音产生的共现和同步，视觉语音（即嘴唇运动）与听觉语音高度相关。本文研究了这种相关性并提出了一种跨模态语音协同学习范式。我们跨模态协同学习方法的主要动机是通过利用另一种模态的知识来建模一种模态。具体来说，基于视听伪暹罗结构引入了两个跨模态增强器来学习模态转换的相关性。在每个助推器内部，提出了一个最大特征图嵌入式 Transformer 变体，用于模态对齐和增强特征生成。该网络是从头开始并与预训练模型共同学习的。 LRSLip3、GridLip、LomGridLip 和 VoxLip 数据集上的实验结果表明，我们提出的方法比独立训练的纯音频/纯视觉和基线融合系统分别实现了 60% 和 20% 的平均相对性能改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种跨模态的音频-视觉协同学习方法，用于文本无关的说话人验证，通过结合视觉语音（嘴唇运动）和听觉语音信息提升验证性能。
AI.motivation: 由于视觉语音（嘴唇运动）与听觉语音在语音生成中存在高度相关性和同步性，利用跨模态信息可以提升单一模态（音频或视觉）的说话人验证性能，从而弥补单一模态信息的不足。
AI.method: 提出基于音频-视觉伪孪生结构的跨模态增强器，结合最大特征图嵌入的Transformer变体进行模态对齐与特征增强，并通过从头训练或预训练模型实现跨模态协同学习。
AI.result: 在LRSLip3、GridLip、LomGridLip和VoxLip数据集上，该方法相比独立训练的音频仅/视觉仅系统和基线融合系统，分别平均提升60%和20%的相对性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过跨模态协同学习有效结合音频与视觉信息，显著提升了文本无关说话人验证的性能，验证了跨模态信息融合在提升模型鲁棒性和准确性方面的有效性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种跨模态的音频-视觉协同学习方法，用于文本无关的说话人验证，通过结合视觉语音（嘴唇运动）和听觉语音信息提升验证性能。

search_text: Cross-modal Audio-visual Co-learning for Text-independent Speaker Verification 用于独立于文本的说话人验证的跨模式视听协同学习 Visual speech (i.e., lip motion) is highly related to auditory speech due to the co-occurrence and synchronization in speech production. This paper investigates this correlation and proposes a cross-modal speech co-learning paradigm. The primary motivation of our cross-modal co-learning method is modeling one modality aided by exploiting knowledge from another modality. Specifically, two cross-modal boosters are introduced based on an audio-visual pseudo-siamese structure to learn the modality-transformed correlation. Inside each booster, a max-feature-map embedded Transformer variant is proposed for modality alignment and enhanced feature generation. The network is co-learned both from scratch and with pretrained models. Experimental results on the LRSLip3, GridLip, LomGridLip, and VoxLip datasets demonstrate that our proposed method achieves 60% and 20% average relative performance improvement over independently trained audio-only/visual-only and baseline fusion systems, respectively. 由于语音产生的共现和同步，视觉语音（即嘴唇运动）与听觉语音高度相关。本文研究了这种相关性并提出了一种跨模态语音协同学习范式。我们跨模态协同学习方法的主要动机是通过利用另一种模态的知识来建模一种模态。具体来说，基于视听伪暹罗结构引入了两个跨模态增强器来学习模态转换的相关性。在每个助推器内部，提出了一个最大特征图嵌入式 Transformer 变体，用于模态对齐和增强特征生成。该网络是从头开始并与预训练模型共同学习的。 LRSLip3、GridLip、LomGridLip 和 VoxLip 数据集上的实验结果表明，我们提出的方法比独立训练的纯音频/纯视觉和基线融合系统分别实现了 60% 和 20% 的平均相对性能改进。 本文提出了一种跨模态的音频-视觉协同学习方法，用于文本无关的说话人验证，通过结合视觉语音（嘴唇运动）和听觉语音信息提升验证性能。 Meng Liu,Kong Aik Lee,Longbiao Wang,Hanyi Zhang,Chang Zeng,Jianwu Dang cs.SD,cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.AS,eess.IV

authors_text: Viet-Quoc Pham,Nao Mishima
title: Focusing On Targets For Improving Weakly Supervised Visual Grounding
title_zh: 聚焦于改善弱监督视觉基础的目标
abstract: Weakly supervised visual grounding aims to predict the region in an image that corresponds to a specific linguistic query, where the mapping between the target object and query is unknown in the training stage. The state-of-the-art method uses a vision language pre-training model to acquire heatmaps from Grad-CAM, which matches every query word with an image region, and uses the combined heatmap to rank the region proposals. In this paper, we propose two simple but efficient methods for improving this approach. First, we propose a target-aware cropping approach to encourage the model to learn both object and scene level semantic representations. Second, we apply dependency parsing to extract words related to the target object, and then put emphasis on these words in the heatmap combination. Our method surpasses the previous SOTA methods on RefCOCO, RefCOCO+, and RefCOCOg by a notable margin.
summary: Weakly supervised visual grounding aims to predict the region in an image that corresponds to a specific linguistic query, where the mapping between the target object and query is unknown in the training stage. The state-of-the-art method uses a vision language pre-training model to acquire heatmaps from Grad-CAM, which matches every query word with an image region, and uses the combined heatmap to rank the region proposals. In this paper, we propose two simple but efficient methods for improving this approach. First, we propose a target-aware cropping approach to encourage the model to learn both object and scene level semantic representations. Second, we apply dependency parsing to extract words related to the target object, and then put emphasis on these words in the heatmap combination. Our method surpasses the previous SOTA methods on RefCOCO, RefCOCO+, and RefCOCOg by a notable margin.
abstract_zh: 弱监督视觉基础旨在预测图像中与特定语言查询相对应的区域，其中目标对象和查询之间的映射在训练阶段是未知的。最先进的方法使用视觉语言预训练模型从 Grad-CAM 获取热图，它将每个查询词与图像区域进行匹配，并使用组合的热图对区域建议进行排名。在本文中，我们提出了两种简单但有效的方法来改进这种方法。首先，我们提出了一种目标感知裁剪方法，以鼓励模型学习对象和场景级语义表示。其次，我们应用依存分析来提取与目标对象相关的单词，然后在热图组合中强调这些单词。我们的方法在 RefCOCO、RefCOCO+ 和 RefCOCOg 上明显优于之前的 SOTA 方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种方法改进弱监督视觉定位任务，通过关注目标对象提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖Grad-CAM生成的热图匹配查询词与图像区域，但未能有效聚焦目标对象及场景语义表示。
AI.method: 第一种方法采用目标感知裁剪增强物体和场景级语义学习；第二种方法通过依存句法分析提取目标相关词汇并在热图组合中加权强调。
AI.result: 在RefCOCO、RefCOCO+和RefCOCOg数据集上显著超越先前最优方法。
AI.conclusion: 聚焦目标对象及利用语言结构信息能有效提升弱监督视觉定位性能。

authors_text: Henri Froese,Martin Hoefer,Lisa Wilhelmi
title: Dynamic Debt Swapping in Financial Networks
title_zh: 金融网络中的动态债务交换
abstract: A debt swap is an elementary edge swap in a directed, weighted graph, where two edges with the same weight swap their targets. Debt swaps are a natural and appealing operation in financial networks, in which nodes are banks and edges represent debt contracts. They can improve the clearing payments and the stability of these networks. However, their algorithmic properties are not well-understood. We analyze the computational complexity of debt swapping. Our main interest lies in semi-positive swaps, in which no creditor strictly suffers and at least one strictly profits. These swaps lead to a Pareto-improvement in the entire network. We consider network optimization via sequences of v-improving debt swaps from which a given bank v strictly profits. For ranking-based clearing, we show that every sequence of semi-positive v-improving swaps has polynomial length. In contrast, for arbitrary v-improving swaps, the problem of reaching a network configuration that allows no further swaps is PLS-complete. In global optimization, the goal is to maximize the utility of a given bank $v$ by performing a sequence of debt swaps in the network. This problem is NP-hard to approximate for multiple types of swaps. Moreover, we study reachability problems -- deciding if a sequence of swaps exists between given initial and final networks. We design a polynomial-time algorithm to decide this question for arbitrary swaps and derive hardness results for several other types of swaps. Many of our results can be extended to networks with arbitrary monotone clearing.
summary: A debt swap is an elementary edge swap in a directed, weighted graph, where two edges with the same weight swap their targets. Debt swaps are a natural and appealing operation in financial networks, in which nodes are banks and edges represent debt contracts. They can improve the clearing payments and the stability of these networks. However, their algorithmic properties are not well-understood. We analyze the computational complexity of debt swapping. Our main interest lies in semi-positive swaps, in which no creditor strictly suffers and at least one strictly profits. These swaps lead to a Pareto-improvement in the entire network. We consider network optimization via sequences of v-improving debt swaps from which a given bank v strictly profits. For ranking-based clearing, we show that every sequence of semi-positive v-improving swaps has polynomial length. In contrast, for arbitrary v-improving swaps, the problem of reaching a network configuration that allows no further swaps is PLS-complete. In global optimization, the goal is to maximize the utility of a given bank $v$ by performing a sequence of debt swaps in the network. This problem is NP-hard to approximate for multiple types of swaps. Moreover, we study reachability problems -- deciding if a sequence of swaps exists between given initial and final networks. We design a polynomial-time algorithm to decide this question for arbitrary swaps and derive hardness results for several other types of swaps. Many of our results can be extended to networks with arbitrary monotone clearing.
abstract_zh: 债务交换是有向加权图中的基本边交换，其中具有相同权重的两条边交换其目标。债务互换是金融网络中一种自然且有吸引力的操作，其中节点是银行，边代表债务合约。他们可以改善这些网络的清算支付和稳定性。然而，它们的算法属性还没有被很好地理解。我们分析了债务交换的计算复杂性。我们的主要兴趣在于半正互换，其中没有债权人严格遭受损失，并且至少有一个债权人严格获利。这些交换导致整个网络的帕累托改进。我们考虑通过一系列 v 改进的债务互换来优化网络，给定银行 v 可以从中严格获利。对于基于排名的清算，我们表明每个半正 v 改进交换序列都具有多项式长度。相反，对于任意 v 改进交换，达到不允许进一步交换的网络配置的问题是 PLS 完成的。在全局优化中，目标是通过在网络中执行一系列债务互换来最大化给定银行 $v$ 的效用。对于多种类型的互换来说，这个问题是 NP 难近似的。此外，我们研究可达性问题——决定给定的初始网络和最终网络之间是否存在一系列交换。我们设计了一个多项式时间算法来解决任意交换的这个问题，并得出其他几种类型交换的硬度结果。我们的许多结果可以扩展到具有任意单调清除的网络。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了金融网络中债务置换的计算复杂性，重点分析了半正向债务置换和v-改进债务置换的算法性质。
AI.motivation: 债务置换是金融网络中改善清算支付和网络稳定性的自然操作，但其算法性质尚未被充分理解，因此需要对相关计算复杂性进行系统分析。
AI.method: 本文通过分析债务置换的计算复杂性，研究了半正向债务置换和v-改进债务置换的序列性质，并设计了多项式时间算法来判断网络可达性问题。
AI.result: 对于基于排名的清算，所有半正向v-改进债务置换序列的长度是多项式的；而对于任意v-改进债务置换，达到无法进一步置换的网络配置问题是PLS完全的。此外，全局优化问题是NP难近似，且设计了多项式时间算法判断任意置换的可达性问题。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了债务置换在金融网络优化中的计算复杂性，并为不同类型的债务置换问题提供了算法和复杂性分析结果，为金融网络的进一步研究提供了理论基础。

method: 本文通过分析债务置换的计算复杂性，研究了半正向债务置换和v-改进债务置换的序列性质，并设计了多项式时间算法来判断网络可达性问题。
result: 对于基于排名的清算，所有半正向v-改进债务置换序列的长度是多项式的；而对于任意v-改进债务置换，达到无法进一步置换的网络配置问题是PLS完全的。此外，全局优化问题是NP难近似，且设计了多项式时间算法判断任意置换的可达性问题。
conclusion: 本文揭示了债务置换在金融网络优化中的计算复杂性，并为不同类型的债务置换问题提供了算法和复杂性分析结果，为金融网络的进一步研究提供了理论基础。
search_text: Dynamic Debt Swapping in Financial Networks 金融网络中的动态债务交换 A debt swap is an elementary edge swap in a directed, weighted graph, where two edges with the same weight swap their targets. Debt swaps are a natural and appealing operation in financial networks, in which nodes are banks and edges represent debt contracts. They can improve the clearing payments and the stability of these networks. However, their algorithmic properties are not well-understood. We analyze the computational complexity of debt swapping. Our main interest lies in semi-positive swaps, in which no creditor strictly suffers and at least one strictly profits. These swaps lead to a Pareto-improvement in the entire network. We consider network optimization via sequences of v-improving debt swaps from which a given bank v strictly profits. For ranking-based clearing, we show that every sequence of semi-positive v-improving swaps has polynomial length. In contrast, for arbitrary v-improving swaps, the problem of reaching a network configuration that allows no further swaps is PLS-complete. In global optimization, the goal is to maximize the utility of a given bank $v$ by performing a sequence of debt swaps in the network. This problem is NP-hard to approximate for multiple types of swaps. Moreover, we study reachability problems -- deciding if a sequence of swaps exists between given initial and final networks. We design a polynomial-time algorithm to decide this question for arbitrary swaps and derive hardness results for several other types of swaps. Many of our results can be extended to networks with arbitrary monotone clearing. 债务交换是有向加权图中的基本边交换，其中具有相同权重的两条边交换其目标。债务互换是金融网络中一种自然且有吸引力的操作，其中节点是银行，边代表债务合约。他们可以改善这些网络的清算支付和稳定性。然而，它们的算法属性还没有被很好地理解。我们分析了债务交换的计算复杂性。我们的主要兴趣在于半正互换，其中没有债权人严格遭受损失，并且至少有一个债权人严格获利。这些交换导致整个网络的帕累托改进。我们考虑通过一系列 v 改进的债务互换来优化网络，给定银行 v 可以从中严格获利。对于基于排名的清算，我们表明每个半正 v 改进交换序列都具有多项式长度。相反，对于任意 v 改进交换，达到不允许进一步交换的网络配置的问题是 PLS 完成的。在全局优化中，目标是通过在网络中执行一系列债务互换来最大化给定银行 $v$ 的效用。对于多种类型的互换来说，这个问题是 NP 难近似的。此外，我们研究可达性问题——决定给定的初始网络和最终网络之间是否存在一系列交换。我们设计了一个多项式时间算法来解决任意交换的这个问题，并得出其他几种类型交换的硬度结果。我们的许多结果可以扩展到具有任意单调清除的网络。 本文研究了金融网络中债务置换的计算复杂性，重点分析了半正向债务置换和v-改进债务置换的算法性质。 Henri Froese,Martin Hoefer,Lisa Wilhelmi cs.DS,cs.CC,cs.GT,q-fin.RM

authors_text: Benjamin Vandersmissen,Jose Oramas
title: Considering Layerwise Importance in the Lottery Ticket Hypothesis
title_zh: 考虑彩票假设中的分层重要性
abstract: The Lottery Ticket Hypothesis (LTH) showed that by iteratively training a model, removing connections with the lowest global weight magnitude and rewinding the remaining connections, sparse networks can be extracted. This global comparison removes context information between connections within a layer. Here we study means for recovering some of this layer distributional context and generalise the LTH to consider weight importance values rather than global weight magnitudes. We find that given a repeatable training procedure, applying different importance metrics leads to distinct performant lottery tickets with little overlapping connections. This strongly suggests that lottery tickets are not unique
summary: The Lottery Ticket Hypothesis (LTH) showed that by iteratively training a model, removing connections with the lowest global weight magnitude and rewinding the remaining connections, sparse networks can be extracted. This global comparison removes context information between connections within a layer. Here we study means for recovering some of this layer distributional context and generalise the LTH to consider weight importance values rather than global weight magnitudes. We find that given a repeatable training procedure, applying different importance metrics leads to distinct performant lottery tickets with little overlapping connections. This strongly suggests that lottery tickets are not unique
abstract_zh: 彩票假设（LTH）表明，通过迭代训练模型，删除全局权重最低的连接并倒回剩余的连接，可以提取稀疏网络。这种全局比较删除了层内连接之间的上下文信息。在这里，我们研究恢复该层分布上下文的一些方法，并概括 LTH 以考虑权重重要性值而不是全局权重大小。我们发现，给定可重复的训练过程，应用不同的重要性指标会产生几乎没有重叠连接的不同性能的彩票。这强烈表明彩票并不是唯一的

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了在彩票假设（LTH）中考虑层内权重重要性而非全局权重幅度的方法，以提取更有效的稀疏网络。
AI.motivation: 原始LTH通过全局权重幅度筛选连接，忽略了层内连接的上下文信息，可能导致信息丢失。作者希望恢复层分布信息以提升模型性能。
AI.method: 通过可重复的训练过程，采用不同的权重重要性度量标准替代全局幅度比较，提取层内重要连接并重构稀疏网络。
AI.result: 不同重要性度量标准生成的彩票票证连接重叠度低，且性能差异显著，表明彩票票证并非唯一。
AI.conclusion: 彩票假设的稀疏网络并非唯一，层内权重重要性分析能有效提升模型性能。

authors_text: José L. Risco-Martín,Kevin Henares,Saurabh Mittal,Luis F. Almendras,Katzalin Olcoz
title: A Unified Cloud-Enabled Discrete Event Parallel and Distributed Simulation Architecture
title_zh: 统一的云支持离散事件并行和分布式仿真架构
abstract: Cloud simulation environments today are largely employed to model and simulate complex systems for remote accessibility and variable capacity requirements. In this regard, scalability issues in Modeling and Simulation (M\&S) computational requirements can be tackled through the elasticity of on-demand Cloud deployment. However, implementing a high performance cloud M\&S framework following these elastic principles is not a trivial task as parallelizing and distributing existing architectures is challenging. Indeed, both the parallel and distributed M\&S developments have evolved following separate ways. Parallel solutions has always been focused on ad-hoc solutions, while distributed approaches, on the other hand, have led to the definition of standard distributed frameworks like the High Level Architecture (HLA) or influenced the use of distributed technologies like the Message Passing Interface (MPI). Only a few developments have been able to evolve with the current resilience of computing hardware resources deployment, largely focused on the implementation of Simulation as a Service (SaaS), albeit independently of the parallel ad-hoc methods branch. In this paper, we present a unified parallel and distributed M\&S architecture with enough flexibility to deploy parallel and distributed simulations in the Cloud with a low effort, without modifying the underlying model source code, and reaching important speedups against the sequential simulation, especially in the parallel implementation. Our framework is based on the Discrete Event System Specification (DEVS) formalism. The performance of the parallel and distributed framework is tested using the xDEVS M\&S tool, Application Programming Interface (API) and the DEVStone benchmark with up to eight computing nodes, obtaining maximum speedups of $15.95\times$ and $1.84\times$, respectively.
summary: Cloud simulation environments today are largely employed to model and simulate complex systems for remote accessibility and variable capacity requirements. In this regard, scalability issues in Modeling and Simulation (M\&S) computational requirements can be tackled through the elasticity of on-demand Cloud deployment. However, implementing a high performance cloud M\&S framework following these elastic principles is not a trivial task as parallelizing and distributing existing architectures is challenging. Indeed, both the parallel and distributed M\&S developments have evolved following separate ways. Parallel solutions has always been focused on ad-hoc solutions, while distributed approaches, on the other hand, have led to the definition of standard distributed frameworks like the High Level Architecture (HLA) or influenced the use of distributed technologies like the Message Passing Interface (MPI). Only a few developments have been able to evolve with the current resilience of computing hardware resources deployment, largely focused on the implementation of Simulation as a Service (SaaS), albeit independently of the parallel ad-hoc methods branch. In this paper, we present a unified parallel and distributed M\&S architecture with enough flexibility to deploy parallel and distributed simulations in the Cloud with a low effort, without modifying the underlying model source code, and reaching important speedups against the sequential simulation, especially in the parallel implementation. Our framework is based on the Discrete Event System Specification (DEVS) formalism. The performance of the parallel and distributed framework is tested using the xDEVS M\&S tool, Application Programming Interface (API) and the DEVStone benchmark with up to eight computing nodes, obtaining maximum speedups of $15.95\times$ and $1.84\times$, respectively.
abstract_zh: 如今，云仿真环境主要用于对复杂系统进行建模和仿真，以满足远程访问和可变容量要求。在这方面，建模和仿真 (M\&S) 计算需求中的可扩展性问题可以通过按需云部署的弹性来解决。然而，遵循这些弹性原则实施高性能云 M\&S 框架并不是一项简单的任务，因为并行化和分布式现有架构具有挑战性。事实上，并行和分布式 M\&S 开发都是按照不同的方式发展的。并行解决方案始终专注于临时解决方案，而分布式方法则导致了高级架构 (HLA) 等标准分布式框架的定义，或影响了消息传递接口 (MPI) 等分布式技术的使用。只有少数开发能够随着当前计算硬件资源部署的弹性而发展，主要集中在模拟即服务 (SaaS) 的实施上，尽管独立于并行临时方法分支。在本文中，我们提出了一种统一的并行和分布式M\&S架构，该架构具有足够的灵活性，可以轻松地在云中部署并行和分布式仿真，无需修改底层模型源代码，并且相对于顺序仿真实现了重要的加速，特别是在并行实现中。我们的框架基于离散事件系统规范（DEVS）形式。使用 xDEVS M\&S 工具、应用程序编程接口 (API) 和具有多达 8 个计算节点的 DEVStone 基准测试并行分布式框架的性能，分别获得 $15.95\times$ 和 $1.84\times$ 的最大加速。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一的云支持离散事件并行与分布式仿真架构，旨在解决传统仿真框架在可扩展性和灵活性方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 当前云仿真环境面临可扩展性挑战，且并行与分布式仿真方法发展路径分离，难以高效适应云计算资源弹性需求。
AI.method: 基于离散事件系统规范（DEVS）形式化方法，设计统一架构并通过xDEVS工具链与DEVStone基准测试验证性能。
AI.result: 在八节点集群中实现最高15.95倍的并行加速和1.84倍的分布式加速，且无需修改模型源代码。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过统一抽象层实现了云环境下的高效仿真部署，为复杂系统建模提供了灵活且高性能的解决方案。

Our framework is based on the Discrete Event System Specification (DEVS) formalism. Risco-Martín,Kevin Henares,Saurabh Mittal,Luis F. Almendras,Katzalin Olcoz cs.DC,cs.AI

authors_text: Ayla Jungbluth,Johannes Lederer
title: The DeepCAR Method: Forecasting Time-Series Data That Have Change Points
title_zh: DeepCAR 方法：预测具有变化点的时间序列数据
abstract: Many methods for time-series forecasting are known in classical statistics, such as autoregression, moving averages, and exponential smoothing. The DeepAR framework is a novel, recent approach for time-series forecasting based on deep learning. DeepAR has shown very promising results already. However, time series often have change points, which can degrade the DeepAR's prediction performance substantially. This paper extends the DeepAR framework by detecting and including those change points. We show that our method performs as well as standard DeepAR when there are no change points and considerably better when there are change points. More generally, we show that the batch size provides an effective and surprisingly simple way to deal with change points in DeepAR, Transformers, and other modern forecasting models.
summary: Many methods for time-series forecasting are known in classical statistics, such as autoregression, moving averages, and exponential smoothing. The DeepAR framework is a novel, recent approach for time-series forecasting based on deep learning. DeepAR has shown very promising results already. However, time series often have change points, which can degrade the DeepAR's prediction performance substantially. This paper extends the DeepAR framework by detecting and including those change points. We show that our method performs as well as standard DeepAR when there are no change points and considerably better when there are change points. More generally, we show that the batch size provides an effective and surprisingly simple way to deal with change points in DeepAR, Transformers, and other modern forecasting models.
abstract_zh: 经典统计学中已知许多时间序列预测方法，例如自回归、移动平均和指数平滑。 DeepAR 框架是一种基于深度学习的新颖的、最新的时间序列预测方法。 DeepAR 已经显示出非常有希望的结果。然而，时间序列经常有变化点，这会大大降低 DeepAR 的预测性能。本文通过检测并包含这些变化点来扩展 DeepAR 框架。我们证明，当没有变化点时，我们的方法的性能与标准 DeepAR 一样好，而当有变化点时，我们的方法的性能要好得多。更一般地说，我们表明批量大小提供了一种有效且令人惊讶的简单方法来处理 DeepAR、Transformers 和其他现代预测模型中的变化点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeepCAR方法，通过检测和处理时间序列中的突变点来改进深度学习预测模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统时间序列预测方法（如DeepAR）在存在突变点时预测效果显著下降，需改进模型以适应突变点场景。
AI.method: 扩展DeepAR框架，引入突变点检测机制，并通过调整批量大小（batch size）优化模型对突变点的处理能力。
AI.result: 在无突变点时DeepCAR表现与标准DeepAR相当，在存在突变点时显著优于DeepAR及其他现代模型。
AI.conclusion: 突变点检测与批量大小调整是提升时间序列预测模型鲁棒性的有效方法，适用于DeepAR、Transformer等模型。

authors_text: Zhong Li,Matthijs van Leeuwen
title: Explainable Contextual Anomaly Detection using Quantile Regression Forests
title_zh: 使用分位数回归森林进行可解释的上下文异常检测
comment: Manuscript accepted by Data Mining and Knowledge Discovery for publication (June 2023). This is the final revised version
comments: Manuscript accepted by Data Mining and Knowledge Discovery for publication (June 2023). This is the final revised version
abstract: Traditional anomaly detection methods aim to identify objects that deviate from most other objects by treating all features equally. In contrast, contextual anomaly detection methods aim to detect objects that deviate from other objects within a context of similar objects by dividing the features into contextual features and behavioral features. In this paper, we develop connections between dependency-based traditional anomaly detection methods and contextual anomaly detection methods. Based on resulting insights, we propose a novel approach to inherently interpretable contextual anomaly detection that uses Quantile Regression Forests to model dependencies between features. Extensive experiments on various synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art anomaly detection methods in identifying contextual anomalies in terms of accuracy and interpretability.
summary: Traditional anomaly detection methods aim to identify objects that deviate from most other objects by treating all features equally. In contrast, contextual anomaly detection methods aim to detect objects that deviate from other objects within a context of similar objects by dividing the features into contextual features and behavioral features. In this paper, we develop connections between dependency-based traditional anomaly detection methods and contextual anomaly detection methods. Based on resulting insights, we propose a novel approach to inherently interpretable contextual anomaly detection that uses Quantile Regression Forests to model dependencies between features. Extensive experiments on various synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art anomaly detection methods in identifying contextual anomalies in terms of accuracy and interpretability.
abstract_zh: 传统的异常检测方法旨在通过平等对待所有特征来识别与大多数其他对象不同的对象。相比之下，上下文异常检测方法旨在通过将特征分为上下文特征和行为特征来检测在相似对象的上下文中偏离其他对象的对象。在本文中，我们开发了基于依赖关系的传统异常检测方法和上下文异常检测方法之间的联系。基于所得的见解，我们提出了一种本质上可解释的上下文异常检测的新方法，该方法使用分位数回归森林来对特征之间的依赖关系进行建模。对各种合成和真实数据集的广泛实验表明，我们的方法在识别上下文异常方面的准确性和可解释性方面优于最先进的异常检测方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分位数回归森林的可解释上下文异常检测方法，通过建模特征间依赖关系提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统异常检测对所有特征平等对待，而上下文方法需区分上下文特征与行为特征，但现有方法缺乏可解释性，需结合两者优势。
AI.method: 利用分位数回归森林建模特征依赖关系，构建可解释的上下文异常检测框架，通过量化特征间条件分布实现异常判定。
AI.result: 在多个合成与真实数据集实验中，该方法在准确率和可解释性指标上均优于现有先进异常检测方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效融合了传统与上下文异常检测优势，在保持高检测精度的同时提供可解释性，推动异常检测技术发展。

authors_text: Josefa Díaz Álvarez,José L. Risco-Martín,J. Manuel Colmenar
title: Multi-objective optimization of energy consumption and execution time in a single level cache memory for embedded systems
title_zh: 嵌入式系统单级高速缓存能耗和执行时间的多目标优化
comment: ef:Journal of Systems and Software, 111, pp. 200-212, 2016
comments: ef:Journal of Systems and Software, 111, pp. 200-212, 2016
abstract: Current embedded systems are specifically designed to run multimedia applications. These applications have a big impact on both performance and energy consumption. Both metrics can be optimized selecting the best cache configuration for a target set of applications. Multi-objective optimization may help to minimize both conflicting metrics in an independent manner. In this work, we propose an optimization method that based on Multi-Objective Evolutionary Algorithms, is able to find the best cache configuration for a given set of applications. To evaluate the goodness of candidate solutions, the execution of the optimization algorithm is combined with a static profiling methodology using several well-known simulation tools. Results show that our optimization framework is able to obtain an optimized cache for Mediabench applications. Compared to a baseline cache memory, our design method reaches an average improvement of 64.43\% and 91.69\% in execution time and energy consumption, respectively.
summary: Current embedded systems are specifically designed to run multimedia applications. These applications have a big impact on both performance and energy consumption. Both metrics can be optimized selecting the best cache configuration for a target set of applications. Multi-objective optimization may help to minimize both conflicting metrics in an independent manner. In this work, we propose an optimization method that based on Multi-Objective Evolutionary Algorithms, is able to find the best cache configuration for a given set of applications. To evaluate the goodness of candidate solutions, the execution of the optimization algorithm is combined with a static profiling methodology using several well-known simulation tools. Results show that our optimization framework is able to obtain an optimized cache for Mediabench applications. Compared to a baseline cache memory, our design method reaches an average improvement of 64.43\% and 91.69\% in execution time and energy consumption, respectively.
abstract_zh: 当前的嵌入式系统是专门为运行多媒体应用程序而设计的。这些应用对性能和能耗都有很大影响。这两个指标都可以进行优化，为目标应用程序集选择最佳缓存配置。多目标优化可能有助于以独立的方式最小化两个相互冲突的指标。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于多目标进化算法的优化方法，能够为给定的一组应用程序找到最佳的缓存配置。为了评估候选解决方案的优点，优化算法的执行与使用几种众所周知的模拟工具的静态分析方法相结合。结果表明，我们的优化框架能够为 Mediabench 应用程序获得优化的缓存。与基准缓存相比，我们的设计方法在执行时间和能耗方面分别平均提高了 64.43% 和 91.69%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多目标进化算法的优化方法，用于在嵌入式系统的单级缓存中同时优化能量消耗和执行时间。
AI.motivation: 多媒体应用对嵌入式系统的性能和能耗有显著影响，传统方法难以独立优化这两个冲突指标，需多目标优化技术实现平衡。
AI.method: 结合多目标进化算法与静态分析方法，利用仿真工具评估候选缓存配置方案，实现多目标优化。
AI.result: 在Mediabench应用中，相比基线缓存设计，平均减少64.43%的执行时间，降低91.69%的能量消耗。
AI.conclusion: 该优化框架能有效找到兼顾性能与能耗的缓存配置方案，验证了多目标进化算法在嵌入式系统设计中的可行性。

motivation: 多媒体应用对嵌入式系统的性能和能耗有显著影响，传统方法难以独立优化这两个冲突指标，需多目标优化技术实现平衡。
method: 结合多目标进化算法与静态分析方法，利用仿真工具评估候选缓存配置方案，实现多目标优化。
result: 在Mediabench应用中，相比基线缓存设计，平均减少64.43%的执行时间，降低91.69%的能量消耗。
conclusion: 该优化框架能有效找到兼顾性能与能耗的缓存配置方案，验证了多目标进化算法在嵌入式系统设计中的可行性。
search_text: Multi-objective optimization of energy consumption and execution time in a single level cache memory for embedded systems 嵌入式系统单级高速缓存能耗和执行时间的多目标优化 Current embedded systems are specifically designed to run multimedia applications. These applications have a big impact on both performance and energy consumption. Both metrics can be optimized selecting the best cache configuration for a target set of applications. Multi-objective optimization may help to minimize both conflicting metrics in an independent manner. In this work, we propose an optimization method that based on Multi-Objective Evolutionary Algorithms, is able to find the best cache configuration for a given set of applications. To evaluate the goodness of candidate solutions, the execution of the optimization algorithm is combined with a static profiling methodology using several well-known simulation tools. Results show that our optimization framework is able to obtain an optimized cache for Mediabench applications. Compared to a baseline cache memory, our design method reaches an average improvement of 64.43\% and 91.69\% in execution time and energy consumption, respectively. 当前的嵌入式系统是专门为运行多媒体应用程序而设计的。这些应用对性能和能耗都有很大影响。这两个指标都可以进行优化，为目标应用程序集选择最佳缓存配置。多目标优化可能有助于以独立的方式最小化两个相互冲突的指标。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于多目标进化算法的优化方法，能够为给定的一组应用程序找到最佳的缓存配置。为了评估候选解决方案的优点，优化算法的执行与使用几种众所周知的模拟工具的静态分析方法相结合。结果表明，我们的优化框架能够为 Mediabench 应用程序获得优化的缓存。与基准缓存相比，我们的设计方法在执行时间和能耗方面分别平均提高了 64.43% 和 91.69%。 本文提出一种基于多目标进化算法的优化方法，用于在嵌入式系统的单级缓存中同时优化能量消耗和执行时间。 Josefa Díaz Álvarez,José L. Risco-Martín,J. Manuel Colmenar cs.NE,cs.AI

authors_text: Yuhan Xie,Minghao Lu,Rui Peng,Peng Lu
title: Learning Agile Flights through Narrow Gaps with Varying Angles using Onboard Sensing
title_zh: 使用机载传感学习通过不同角度的狭窄间隙的敏捷飞行
abstract: This paper addresses the problem of traversing through unknown, tilted, and narrow gaps for quadrotors using Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL). Previous learning-based methods relied on accurate knowledge of the environment, including the gap's pose and size. In contrast, we integrate onboard sensing and detect the gap from a single onboard camera. The training problem is challenging for two reasons: a precise and robust whole-body planning and control policy is required for variable-tilted and narrow gaps, and an effective Sim2Real method is needed to successfully conduct real-world experiments. To this end, we propose a learning framework for agile gap traversal flight, which successfully trains the vehicle to traverse through the center of the gap at an approximate attitude to the gap with aggressive tilted angles. The policy trained only in a simulation environment can be transferred into different domains with fine-tuning while maintaining the success rate. Our proposed framework, which integrates onboard sensing and a neural network controller, achieves a success rate of 84.51% in real-world experiments, with gap orientations up to 60deg. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first paper that performs the learning-based variable-tilted narrow gap traversal flight in the real world, without prior knowledge of the environment.
summary: This paper addresses the problem of traversing through unknown, tilted, and narrow gaps for quadrotors using Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL). Previous learning-based methods relied on accurate knowledge of the environment, including the gap's pose and size. In contrast, we integrate onboard sensing and detect the gap from a single onboard camera. The training problem is challenging for two reasons: a precise and robust whole-body planning and control policy is required for variable-tilted and narrow gaps, and an effective Sim2Real method is needed to successfully conduct real-world experiments. To this end, we propose a learning framework for agile gap traversal flight, which successfully trains the vehicle to traverse through the center of the gap at an approximate attitude to the gap with aggressive tilted angles. The policy trained only in a simulation environment can be transferred into different domains with fine-tuning while maintaining the success rate. Our proposed framework, which integrates onboard sensing and a neural network controller, achieves a success rate of 84.51% in real-world experiments, with gap orientations up to 60deg. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first paper that performs the learning-based variable-tilted narrow gap traversal flight in the real world, without prior knowledge of the environment.
abstract_zh: 本文利用深度强化学习 (DRL) 解决了四旋翼飞行器穿越未知、倾斜和狭窄间隙的问题。以前基于学习的方法依赖于对环境的准确了解，包括间隙的姿态和大小。相比之下，我们集成了机载传感并通过单个机载摄像头检测间隙。训练问题具有挑战性，原因有两个：可变倾斜和窄间隙需要精确而强大的全身规划和控制策略，并且需要有效的 Sim2Real 方法来成功进行现实世界的实验。为此，我们提出了一种敏捷间隙穿越飞行的学习框架，该框架成功地训练了飞行器以与间隙近似的姿态以激进的倾斜角度穿越间隙中心。仅在模拟环境中训练的策略可以通过微调转移到不同的领域，同时保持成功率。我们提出的框架集成了机载传感和神经网络控制器，在实际实验中实现了 84.51% 的成功率，间隙方向高达 60 度。据我们所知，这是第一篇在现实世界中进行基于学习的可变倾斜窄间隙穿越飞行的论文，而无需事先了解环境。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度强化学习（DRL）的方法，使四旋翼无人机能够在未知、倾斜且狭窄的缝隙中自主飞行，无需预先了解环境信息。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖对缝隙姿态和尺寸的精确环境知识，而实际场景中此类信息往往不可获得。本文旨在通过 onboard 感知和自主学习，实现无需先验知识的敏捷缝隙穿越。
AI.method: 整合 onboard 相机感知与神经网络控制器，设计 DRL 框架进行仿真训练，并通过 Sim2Real 方法迁移至真实环境，实现对倾斜角度高达 60 度的缝隙的中心穿越控制。
AI.result: 在真实实验中，框架成功率达到 84.51%，验证了其在不同倾斜角度缝隙中的鲁棒性，且无需环境先验信息。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次实现了基于学习的无先验知识真实世界倾斜狭窄缝隙穿越，为自主飞行器在复杂环境中的导航提供了新思路。

authors_text: Honglin Shu,Pei Gao,Lingwei Zhu,Zheng Chen
title: Drugs Resistance Analysis from Scarce Health Records via Multi-task Graph Representation
title_zh: 通过多任务图表示从稀缺健康记录中进行耐药性分析
abstract: Clinicians prescribe antibiotics by looking at the patient's health record with an experienced eye. However, the therapy might be rendered futile if the patient has drug resistance. Determining drug resistance requires time-consuming laboratory-level testing while applying clinicians' heuristics in an automated way is difficult due to the categorical or binary medical events that constitute health records. In this paper, we propose a novel framework for rapid clinical intervention by viewing health records as graphs whose nodes are mapped from medical events and edges as correspondence between events in given a time window. A novel graph-based model is then proposed to extract informative features and yield automated drug resistance analysis from those high-dimensional and scarce graphs. The proposed method integrates multi-task learning into a common feature extracting graph encoder for simultaneous analyses of multiple drugs as well as stabilizing learning. On a massive dataset comprising over 110,000 patients with urinary tract infections, we verify the proposed method is capable of attaining superior performance on the drug resistance prediction problem. Furthermore, automated drug recommendations resemblant to laboratory-level testing can also be made based on the model resistance analysis.
summary: Clinicians prescribe antibiotics by looking at the patient's health record with an experienced eye. However, the therapy might be rendered futile if the patient has drug resistance. Determining drug resistance requires time-consuming laboratory-level testing while applying clinicians' heuristics in an automated way is difficult due to the categorical or binary medical events that constitute health records. In this paper, we propose a novel framework for rapid clinical intervention by viewing health records as graphs whose nodes are mapped from medical events and edges as correspondence between events in given a time window. A novel graph-based model is then proposed to extract informative features and yield automated drug resistance analysis from those high-dimensional and scarce graphs. The proposed method integrates multi-task learning into a common feature extracting graph encoder for simultaneous analyses of multiple drugs as well as stabilizing learning. On a massive dataset comprising over 110,000 patients with urinary tract infections, we verify the proposed method is capable of attaining superior performance on the drug resistance prediction problem. Furthermore, automated drug recommendations resemblant to laboratory-level testing can also be made based on the model resistance analysis.
abstract_zh: 临床医生通过经验丰富的眼睛查看患者的健康记录来开抗生素处方。然而，如果患者有耐药性，治疗可能会无效。确定耐药性需要耗时的实验室水平测试，而由于构成健康记录的分类或二元医疗事件，以自动化方式应用临床医生的启发法很困难。在本文中，我们提出了一种快速临床干预的新颖框架，通过将健康记录视为图，其节点从医疗事件映射，边作为给定时间窗口内事件之间的对应关系。然后提出了一种新颖的基于图的模型，从这些高维和稀缺的图中提取信息特征并产生自动耐药性分析。该方法将多任务学习集成到通用特征提取图编码器中，用于同时分析多种药物以及稳定学习。在包含超过 110,000 名尿路感染患者的海量数据集上，我们验证了所提出的方法能够在耐药性预测问题上获得优异的性能。此外，还可以根据模型耐药性分析做出类似于实验室水平测试的自动化药物建议。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多任务图表示的方法，通过将稀疏的医疗记录建模为图结构，实现对抗生素耐药性的快速预测与自动化分析。
AI.motivation: 传统抗生素耐药性检测依赖耗时的实验室测试，而临床经验难以通过自动化方法有效转化，尤其面对高维稀疏的医疗记录时挑战更大。
AI.method: 将医疗事件建模为图节点，事件间时间关联为边，设计图编码器提取特征，并结合多任务学习同时分析多种药物，提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在11万例泌尿道感染患者数据集上，模型在耐药性预测任务中表现优于现有方法，并能生成类似实验室检测的自动化用药建议。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为临床提供了快速、可扩展的耐药性分析方案，可辅助医生制定个性化抗生素治疗策略，减少实验室检测依赖。

Furthermore, automated drug recommendations resemblant to laboratory-level testing can also be made based on the model resistance analysis. 临床医生通过经验丰富的眼睛查看患者的健康记录来开抗生素处方。然而，如果患者有耐药性，治疗可能会无效。确定耐药性需要耗时的实验室水平测试，而由于构成健康记录的分类或二元医疗事件，以自动化方式应用临床医生的启发法很困难。在本文中，我们提出了一种快速临床干预的新颖框架，通过将健康记录视为图，其节点从医疗事件映射，边作为给定时间窗口内事件之间的对应关系。然后提出了一种新颖的基于图的模型，从这些高维和稀缺的图中提取信息特征并产生自动耐药性分析。该方法将多任务学习集成到通用特征提取图编码器中，用于同时分析多种药物以及稳定学习。在包含超过 110,000 名尿路感染患者的海量数据集上，我们验证了所提出的方法能够在耐药性预测问题上获得优异的性能。此外，还可以根据模型耐药性分析做出类似于实验室水平测试的自动化药物建议。 本文提出一种基于多任务图表示的方法，通过将稀疏的医疗记录建模为图结构，实现对抗生素耐药性的快速预测与自动化分析。 Honglin Shu,Pei Gao,Lingwei Zhu,Zheng Chen cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Jiaming Zhou,Shiwan Zhao,Ning Jiang,Guoqing Zhao,Yong Qin
title: MADI: Inter-domain Matching and Intra-domain Discrimination for Cross-domain Speech Recognition
title_zh: MADI：跨域语音识别的域间匹配和域内区分
abstract: End-to-end automatic speech recognition (ASR) usually suffers from performance degradation when applied to a new domain due to domain shift. Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) aims to improve the performance on the unlabeled target domain by transferring knowledge from the source to the target domain. To improve transferability, existing UDA approaches mainly focus on matching the distributions of the source and target domains globally and/or locally, while ignoring the model discriminability. In this paper, we propose a novel UDA approach for ASR via inter-domain MAtching and intra-domain DIscrimination (MADI), which improves the model transferability by fine-grained inter-domain matching and discriminability by intra-domain contrastive discrimination simultaneously. Evaluations on the Libri-Adapt dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach. MADI reduces the relative word error rate (WER) on cross-device and cross-environment ASR by 17.7% and 22.8%, respectively.
summary: End-to-end automatic speech recognition (ASR) usually suffers from performance degradation when applied to a new domain due to domain shift. Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) aims to improve the performance on the unlabeled target domain by transferring knowledge from the source to the target domain. To improve transferability, existing UDA approaches mainly focus on matching the distributions of the source and target domains globally and/or locally, while ignoring the model discriminability. In this paper, we propose a novel UDA approach for ASR via inter-domain MAtching and intra-domain DIscrimination (MADI), which improves the model transferability by fine-grained inter-domain matching and discriminability by intra-domain contrastive discrimination simultaneously. Evaluations on the Libri-Adapt dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach. MADI reduces the relative word error rate (WER) on cross-device and cross-environment ASR by 17.7% and 22.8%, respectively.
abstract_zh: 当应用于新域时，由于域转移，端到端自动语音识别（ASR）通常会出现性能下降。无监督域适应（UDA）旨在通过将知识从源域转移到目标域来提高未标记目标域的性能。为了提高可迁移性，现有的 UDA 方法主要侧重于全局和/或局部匹配源域和目标域的分布，而忽略了模型的可区分性。在本文中，我们提出了一种通过域间 MAtching 和域内区分（MADI）的新型 ASR UDA 方法，该方法通过细粒度域间匹配和同时通过域内对比区分来提高模型的可迁移性和可区分性。对 Libri-Adapt 数据集的评估证明了我们方法的有效性。 MADI 将跨设备和跨环境 ASR 的相对字错误率 (WER) 分别降低了 17.7% 和 22.8%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MADI的无监督域适应方法，用于提升跨领域语音识别的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有跨领域语音识别方法主要关注源域与目标域的分布匹配，但忽略了模型的判别能力，导致在新领域应用时性能下降。
AI.method: MADI通过细粒度的跨域匹配（inter-domain matching）和域内对比判别（intra-domain discrimination）联合优化，提升模型的迁移能力和判别能力。
AI.result: 在Libri-Adapt数据集上，MADI在跨设备和跨环境语音识别任务中分别将相对词错误率（WER）降低了17.7%和22.8%。
AI.conclusion: MADI通过联合优化跨域匹配与域内判别，有效提升了无监督域适应的性能，为跨领域语音识别提供了新思路。

authors_text: Paul Voigtlaender,Soravit Changpinyo,Jordi Pont-Tuset,Radu Soricut,Vittorio Ferrari
title: Connecting Vision and Language with Video Localized Narratives
title_zh: 将视觉和语言与视频本地化叙述联系起来
abstract: We propose Video Localized Narratives, a new form of multimodal video annotations connecting vision and language. In the original Localized Narratives, annotators speak and move their mouse simultaneously on an image, thus grounding each word with a mouse trace segment. However, this is challenging on a video. Our new protocol empowers annotators to tell the story of a video with Localized Narratives, capturing even complex events involving multiple actors interacting with each other and with several passive objects. We annotated 20k videos of the OVIS, UVO, and Oops datasets, totalling 1.7M words. Based on this data, we also construct new benchmarks for the video narrative grounding and video question answering tasks, and provide reference results from strong baseline models. Our annotations are available at https://google.github.io/video-localized-narratives/.
summary: We propose Video Localized Narratives, a new form of multimodal video annotations connecting vision and language. In the original Localized Narratives, annotators speak and move their mouse simultaneously on an image, thus grounding each word with a mouse trace segment. However, this is challenging on a video. Our new protocol empowers annotators to tell the story of a video with Localized Narratives, capturing even complex events involving multiple actors interacting with each other and with several passive objects. We annotated 20k videos of the OVIS, UVO, and Oops datasets, totalling 1.7M words. Based on this data, we also construct new benchmarks for the video narrative grounding and video question answering tasks, and provide reference results from strong baseline models. Our annotations are available at https://google.github.io/video-localized-narratives/.
abstract_zh: We propose Video Localized Narratives, a new form of multimodal video annotations connecting vision and language.在最初的本地化叙事中，注释者在图像上同时说话和移动鼠标，从而使每个单词都带有鼠标轨迹片段。然而，这对于视频来说是具有挑战性的。我们的新协议使注释者能够使用本地化叙事来讲述视频故事，甚至捕获涉及多个演员彼此交互以及与多个被动对象交互的复杂事件。 We annotated 20k videos of the OVIS, UVO, and Oops datasets, totalling 1.7M words.基于这些数据，我们还为视频叙事基础和视频问答任务构建了新的基准，并提供强大基线模型的参考结果。 Our annotations are available at https://google.github.io/video-localized-narratives/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的多模态视频标注方法——视频本地化叙述，通过改进的标注协议将视觉与语言连接，以捕捉视频中复杂的多对象交互事件。
AI.motivation: 传统本地化叙述在图像上应用时难以处理视频的动态性和复杂事件，需开发新方法以支持视频中多角色、多对象的交互描述。
AI.method: 设计新的标注协议，允许注释者在视频播放时同步语音描述与鼠标轨迹，生成与视频内容对应的文字叙述，并构建包含20k视频的标注数据集及视频叙述接地和问答任务基准。
AI.result: 标注了1.7M词的20k视频数据，建立新基准并提供基线模型结果，数据集公开可用以推动视频多模态研究。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效捕捉视频中复杂事件，为视频叙述理解和问答任务提供了高质量数据资源，促进了视觉与语言的跨模态研究进展。

authors_text: Kaikai Zhao,Norimichi Ukita
title: KS-DETR: Knowledge Sharing in Attention Learning for Detection Transformer
title_zh: KS-DETR：检测变压器注意力学习中的知识共享
abstract: Scaled dot-product attention applies a softmax function on the scaled dot-product of queries and keys to calculate weights and then multiplies the weights and values. In this work, we study how to improve the learning of scaled dot-product attention to improve the accuracy of DETR. Our method is based on the following observations: using ground truth foreground-background mask (GT Fg-Bg Mask) as additional cues in the weights/values learning enables learning much better weights/values; with better weights/values, better values/weights can be learned. We propose a triple-attention module in which the first attention is a plain scaled dot-product attention, the second/third attention generates high-quality weights/values (with the assistance of GT Fg-Bg Mask) and shares the values/weights with the first attention to improve the quality of values/weights. The second and third attentions are removed during inference. We call our method knowledge-sharing DETR (KS-DETR), which is an extension of knowledge distillation (KD) in the way that the improved weights and values of the teachers (the second and third attentions) are directly shared, instead of mimicked, by the student (the first attention) to enable more efficient knowledge transfer from the teachers to the student. Experiments on various DETR-like methods show consistent improvements over the baseline methods on the MS COCO benchmark. Code is available at https://github.com/edocanonymous/KS-DETR.
summary: Scaled dot-product attention applies a softmax function on the scaled dot-product of queries and keys to calculate weights and then multiplies the weights and values. In this work, we study how to improve the learning of scaled dot-product attention to improve the accuracy of DETR. Our method is based on the following observations: using ground truth foreground-background mask (GT Fg-Bg Mask) as additional cues in the weights/values learning enables learning much better weights/values; with better weights/values, better values/weights can be learned. We propose a triple-attention module in which the first attention is a plain scaled dot-product attention, the second/third attention generates high-quality weights/values (with the assistance of GT Fg-Bg Mask) and shares the values/weights with the first attention to improve the quality of values/weights. The second and third attentions are removed during inference. We call our method knowledge-sharing DETR (KS-DETR), which is an extension of knowledge distillation (KD) in the way that the improved weights and values of the teachers (the second and third attentions) are directly shared, instead of mimicked, by the student (the first attention) to enable more efficient knowledge transfer from the teachers to the student. Experiments on various DETR-like methods show consistent improvements over the baseline methods on the MS COCO benchmark. Code is available at https://github.com/edocanonymous/KS-DETR.
abstract_zh: 缩放点积注意力对查询和键的缩放点积应用 softmax 函数来计算权重，然后将权重和值相乘。在这项工作中，我们研究如何改进缩放点积注意力的学习，以提高 DETR 的准确性。我们的方法基于以下观察：使用地面实况前景-背景掩模（GT Fg-Bg Mask）作为权重/值学习中的附加线索可以学习更好的权重/值；有了更好的权重/值，就可以学习更好的值/权重。我们提出了一个三重注意力模块，其中第一个注意力是普通缩放的点积注意力，第二个/第三个注意力生成高质量的权重/值（在GT Fg-Bg Mask的帮助下）并与第一个注意力共享值/权重以提高值/权重的质量。第二个和第三个注意力在推理过程中被删除。我们将我们的方法称为知识共享DETR（KS-DETR），它是知识蒸馏（KD）的延伸，即教师（第二和第三注意力）改进的权重和值直接由学生（第一注意力）共享，而不是模仿，以实现从教师到学生更有效的知识转移。各种类似 DETR 方法的实验表明，与 MS COCO 基准测试中的基线方法相比，得到了一致的改进。代码可在 https://github.com/edocanonymous/KS-DETR 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出KS-DETR方法，通过改进检测Transformer中的缩放点积注意力机制，利用地面真实前景-背景掩码提升目标检测精度。
AI.motivation: 传统缩放点积注意力机制在权重/值学习中缺乏有效引导，而引入地面真实掩码作为额外线索可形成正向反馈循环，持续优化权重和值的质量。
AI.method: 设计三重注意力模块：第一层为标准注意力，第二/三层利用GT掩码生成高质量权重/值并与第一层共享。推理时移除后两层，通过直接参数共享而非模仿实现知识迁移。
AI.result: 在MS COCO基准测试中，KS-DETR在多种DETR变体上均优于基线方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 知识共享机制有效提升了注意力学习质量，为Transformer模型优化提供了新思路。

search_text: KS-DETR: Knowledge Sharing in Attention Learning for Detection Transformer KS-DETR：检测变压器注意力学习中的知识共享 Scaled dot-product attention applies a softmax function on the scaled dot-product of queries and keys to calculate weights and then multiplies the weights and values. In this work, we study how to improve the learning of scaled dot-product attention to improve the accuracy of DETR. Our method is based on the following observations: using ground truth foreground-background mask (GT Fg-Bg Mask) as additional cues in the weights/values learning enables learning much better weights/values; with better weights/values, better values/weights can be learned. We propose a triple-attention module in which the first attention is a plain scaled dot-product attention, the second/third attention generates high-quality weights/values (with the assistance of GT Fg-Bg Mask) and shares the values/weights with the first attention to improve the quality of values/weights. The second and third attentions are removed during inference. We call our method knowledge-sharing DETR (KS-DETR), which is an extension of knowledge distillation (KD) in the way that the improved weights and values of the teachers (the second and third attentions) are directly shared, instead of mimicked, by the student (the first attention) to enable more efficient knowledge transfer from the teachers to the student. Experiments on various DETR-like methods show consistent improvements over the baseline methods on the MS COCO benchmark. Code is available at https://github.com/edocanonymous/KS-DETR. 缩放点积注意力对查询和键的缩放点积应用 softmax 函数来计算权重，然后将权重和值相乘。在这项工作中，我们研究如何改进缩放点积注意力的学习，以提高 DETR 的准确性。我们的方法基于以下观察：使用地面实况前景-背景掩模（GT Fg-Bg Mask）作为权重/值学习中的附加线索可以学习更好的权重/值；有了更好的权重/值，就可以学习更好的值/权重。我们提出了一个三重注意力模块，其中第一个注意力是普通缩放的点积注意力，第二个/第三个注意力生成高质量的权重/值（在GT Fg-Bg Mask的帮助下）并与第一个注意力共享值/权重以提高值/权重的质量。第二个和第三个注意力在推理过程中被删除。我们将我们的方法称为知识共享DETR（KS-DETR），它是知识蒸馏（KD）的延伸，即教师（第二和第三注意力）改进的权重和值直接由学生（第一注意力）共享，而不是模仿，以实现从教师到学生更有效的知识转移。各种类似 DETR 方法的实验表明，与 MS COCO 基准测试中的基线方法相比，得到了一致的改进。代码可在 https://github.com/edocanonymous/KS-DETR 获取。 本文提出KS-DETR方法，通过改进检测Transformer中的缩放点积注意力机制，利用地面真实前景-背景掩码提升目标检测精度。 Kaikai Zhao,Norimichi Ukita cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Philipp Götz,Cagdas Tuna,Andreas Walther,Emanuël A. P. Habets
title: Contrastive Representation Learning for Acoustic Parameter Estimation
title_zh: 声学参数估计的对比表示学习
abstract: A study is presented in which a contrastive learning approach is used to extract low-dimensional representations of the acoustic environment from single-channel, reverberant speech signals. Convolution of room impulse responses (RIRs) with anechoic source signals is leveraged as a data augmentation technique that offers considerable flexibility in the design of the upstream task. We evaluate the embeddings across three different downstream tasks, which include the regression of acoustic parameters reverberation time RT60 and clarity index C50, and the classification into small and large rooms. We demonstrate that the learned representations generalize well to unseen data and perform similarly to a fully-supervised baseline.
summary: A study is presented in which a contrastive learning approach is used to extract low-dimensional representations of the acoustic environment from single-channel, reverberant speech signals. Convolution of room impulse responses (RIRs) with anechoic source signals is leveraged as a data augmentation technique that offers considerable flexibility in the design of the upstream task. We evaluate the embeddings across three different downstream tasks, which include the regression of acoustic parameters reverberation time RT60 and clarity index C50, and the classification into small and large rooms. We demonstrate that the learned representations generalize well to unseen data and perform similarly to a fully-supervised baseline.
abstract_zh: 提出了一项研究，其中使用对比学习方法从单通道混响语音信号中提取声学环境的低维表示。房间脉冲响应 (RIR) 与消声源信号的卷积被用作数据增强技术，为上游任务的设计提供了相当大的灵活性。我们评估了三个不同下游任务的嵌入，其中包括声学参数混响时间 RT60 和清晰度指数 C50 的回归，以及小房间和大房间的分类。我们证明，学习到的表示可以很好地推广到未见过的数据，并且表现与完全监督的基线类似。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对比学习的方法，从单通道混响语音信号中提取声学环境的低维表示，用于估计声学参数。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在单通道混响语音处理中存在局限，需探索更有效的数据增强和表示学习方法以提升声学参数估计的泛化能力。
AI.method: 利用房间脉冲响应（RIR）与无混响源信号卷积生成增强数据，通过对比学习提取声学表示，并在回归（RT60、C50）和分类（房间大小）任务中验证效果。
AI.result: 所学表示在未见数据上表现优异，性能接近全监督基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 对比学习能有效生成泛化性声学表示，为参数估计提供新思路，且数据增强策略提升模型鲁棒性。

authors_text: Mahyar Bolhassani,Ilkay Oksuz
title: Semi-Supervised Segmentation of Multi-vendor and Multi-center Cardiac MRI using Histogram Matching
title_zh: 使用直方图匹配对多供应商和多中心心脏 MRI 进行半监督分割
comment: 5 pages, 8 figures, IEEE conference published paper
comments: 5 pages, 8 figures, IEEE conference published paper
abstract: Automatic segmentation of the heart cavity is an essential task for the diagnosis of cardiac diseases. In this paper, we propose a semi-supervised segmentation setup for leveraging unlabeled data to segment Left-ventricle, Right-ventricle, and Myocardium. We utilize an enhanced version of residual U-Net architecture on a large-scale cardiac MRI dataset. Handling the class imbalanced data issue using dice loss, the enhanced supervised model is able to achieve better dice scores in comparison with a vanilla U-Net model. We applied several augmentation techniques including histogram matching to increase the performance of our model in other domains. Also, we introduce a simple but efficient semi-supervised segmentation method to improve segmentation results without the need for large labeled data. Finally, we applied our method on two benchmark datasets, STACOM2018, and M\&Ms 2020 challenges, to show the potency of the proposed model. The effectiveness of our proposed model is demonstrated by the quantitative results. The model achieves average dice scores of 0.921, 0.926, and 0.891 for Left-ventricle, Right-ventricle, and Myocardium respectively.
summary: Automatic segmentation of the heart cavity is an essential task for the diagnosis of cardiac diseases. In this paper, we propose a semi-supervised segmentation setup for leveraging unlabeled data to segment Left-ventricle, Right-ventricle, and Myocardium. We utilize an enhanced version of residual U-Net architecture on a large-scale cardiac MRI dataset. Handling the class imbalanced data issue using dice loss, the enhanced supervised model is able to achieve better dice scores in comparison with a vanilla U-Net model. We applied several augmentation techniques including histogram matching to increase the performance of our model in other domains. Also, we introduce a simple but efficient semi-supervised segmentation method to improve segmentation results without the need for large labeled data. Finally, we applied our method on two benchmark datasets, STACOM2018, and M\&Ms 2020 challenges, to show the potency of the proposed model. The effectiveness of our proposed model is demonstrated by the quantitative results. The model achieves average dice scores of 0.921, 0.926, and 0.891 for Left-ventricle, Right-ventricle, and Myocardium respectively.
abstract_zh: 心腔的自动分割是心脏病诊断的一项重要任务。在本文中，我们提出了一种半监督分割设置，用于利用未标记的数据来分割左心室、右心室和心肌。我们在大规模心脏 MRI 数据集上使用了残差 U-Net 架构的增强版本。使用骰子损失处理类别不平衡数据问题，与普通 U-Net 模型相比，增强型监督模型能够获得更好的骰子分数。我们应用了多种增强技术，包括直方图匹配，以提高我们的模型在其他领域的性能。此外，我们引入了一种简单但有效的半监督分割方法来改善分割结果，而无需大量标记数据。最后，我们将我们的方法应用于两个基准数据集：STACOM2018 和 M\&Ms 2020 挑战，以展示所提出模型的效力。定量结果证明了我们提出的模型的有效性。该模型的左心室、右心室和心肌的平均骰子分数分别为 0.921、0.926 和 0.891。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半监督分割方法，利用直方图匹配技术处理多厂商、多中心心脏MRI数据，实现左心室、右心室和心肌的自动分割。
AI.motivation: 心脏疾病诊断需要精确的心腔分割，但多中心MRI数据存在分布差异且标注成本高，需利用未标注数据提升模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 基于增强残差U-Net架构，结合Dice损失处理类别不平衡问题，采用直方图匹配等数据增强技术，并设计半监督分割框架减少对标注数据的依赖。
AI.result: 在STACOM2018和M\&Ms 2020数据集上，左心室、右心室和心肌的Dice系数分别达到0.921、0.926和0.891。
AI.conclusion: 提出的半监督分割方法通过直方图匹配有效提升了多源MRI数据的分割性能，验证了模型在跨中心应用中的鲁棒性。

search_text: Semi-Supervised Segmentation of Multi-vendor and Multi-center Cardiac MRI using Histogram Matching 使用直方图匹配对多供应商和多中心心脏 MRI 进行半监督分割 Automatic segmentation of the heart cavity is an essential task for the diagnosis of cardiac diseases. In this paper, we propose a semi-supervised segmentation setup for leveraging unlabeled data to segment Left-ventricle, Right-ventricle, and Myocardium. We utilize an enhanced version of residual U-Net architecture on a large-scale cardiac MRI dataset. Handling the class imbalanced data issue using dice loss, the enhanced supervised model is able to achieve better dice scores in comparison with a vanilla U-Net model. We applied several augmentation techniques including histogram matching to increase the performance of our model in other domains. Also, we introduce a simple but efficient semi-supervised segmentation method to improve segmentation results without the need for large labeled data. Finally, we applied our method on two benchmark datasets, STACOM2018, and M\&Ms 2020 challenges, to show the potency of the proposed model. The effectiveness of our proposed model is demonstrated by the quantitative results. The model achieves average dice scores of 0.921, 0.926, and 0.891 for Left-ventricle, Right-ventricle, and Myocardium respectively. 心腔的自动分割是心脏病诊断的一项重要任务。在本文中，我们提出了一种半监督分割设置，用于利用未标记的数据来分割左心室、右心室和心肌。我们在大规模心脏 MRI 数据集上使用了残差 U-Net 架构的增强版本。使用骰子损失处理类别不平衡数据问题，与普通 U-Net 模型相比，增强型监督模型能够获得更好的骰子分数。我们应用了多种增强技术，包括直方图匹配，以提高我们的模型在其他领域的性能。此外，我们引入了一种简单但有效的半监督分割方法来改善分割结果，而无需大量标记数据。最后，我们将我们的方法应用于两个基准数据集：STACOM2018 和 M\&Ms 2020 挑战，以展示所提出模型的效力。定量结果证明了我们提出的模型的有效性。该模型的左心室、右心室和心肌的平均骰子分数分别为 0.921、0.926 和 0.891。 本文提出一种半监督分割方法，利用直方图匹配技术处理多厂商、多中心心脏MRI数据，实现左心室、右心室和心肌的自动分割。 Mahyar Bolhassani,Ilkay Oksuz eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Fatin E. M. Al-Obaidi,Anwar H. Al-Saleh,Shaymaa H. Kafi,Ali J. Karam,Ali A. D. Al-Zuky
title: Invariant Target Detection in Images through the Normalized 2-D Correlation Technique
title_zh: 通过归一化二维相关技术检测图像中的不变目标
comment: The paper in its uploaded format contained errors in analysis as in Abstract-4th and 5th line. In section 4 ; results and discussion and in conclusion section. So, in order not to adopt the research as a source by other researchers I wish to withdraw it completely
comments: The paper in its uploaded format contained errors in analysis as in Abstract-4th and 5th line. In section 4 ; results and discussion and in conclusion section. So, in order not to adopt the research as a source by other researchers I wish to withdraw it completely
abstract: The normalized 2-D correlation technique is a robust method for detecting targets in images due to its ability to remain invariant under rotation, translation, and scaling. This paper examines the impact of translation, and scaling on target identification in images. The results indicate a high level of accuracy in detecting targets, even when they are exhibit variations in location and size. The results indicate that the similarity between the image and the two used targets improves as the resize ratio increases. All statistical estimators demonstrate a strong similarity between the original and extracted targets. The elapsed time for all scenarios falls within the range (44.75-44.85), (37.48-37.73) seconds for bird and children targets respectively, and the correlation coefficient displays stable relationships with values that fall within the range of (0.90-0.98) and (0.87-0.93) for bird and children targets respectively.
summary: The normalized 2-D correlation technique is a robust method for detecting targets in images due to its ability to remain invariant under rotation, translation, and scaling. This paper examines the impact of translation, and scaling on target identification in images. The results indicate that the similarity between the image and the two used targets improves as the resize ratio increases. All statistical estimators demonstrate a strong similarity between the original and extracted targets. The elapsed time for all scenarios falls within the range (44.75-44.85), (37.48-37.73) seconds for bird and children targets respectively, and the correlation coefficient displays stable relationships with values that fall within the range of (0.90-0.98) and (0.87-0.93) for bird and children targets respectively.
abstract_zh: 归一化二维相关技术是一种用于检测图像中目标的稳健方法，因为它能够在旋转、平移和缩放下保持不变。本文研究了平移和缩放对图像中目标识别的影响。结果表明，即使目标的位置和大小存在变化，检测目标也具有很高的准确性。结果表明，随着调整大小比率的增加，图像与两个使用的目标之间的相似性提高。所有统计估计量都表明原始目标和提取目标之间具有很强的相似性。所有场景的经过时间对于鸟类和儿童目标分别落在（44.75-44.85）和（37.48-37.73）秒范围内，并且相关系数与鸟类和儿童目标分别落在（0.90-0.98）和（0.87-0.93）范围内的值显示出稳定的关系。

AI.tldr: 本文研究通过归一化二维相关技术实现图像中目标的不变检测，分析平移和缩放对目标识别的影响。
AI.motivation: 在实际图像中，目标可能因平移、缩放等变换导致检测困难，需开发对这些变化具有鲁棒性的检测方法。
AI.method: 采用归一化二维相关技术，通过实验验证目标在不同位置和尺寸下的检测效果，并分析统计估计量与相关系数的关系。
AI.result: 检测准确率高，目标相似性随缩放比例增加而提升，统计估计量显示原始与提取目标高度相似，且相关系数稳定在0.87-0.98区间。
AI.conclusion: 归一化二维相关技术能有效应对目标的位置和尺寸变化，具有高效稳定的检测性能，适用于实际图像处理场景。
