authors_text: Xiaoqiang Wang,Yanqing Liu,Jinyu Li,Sheng Zhao
title: Improving Contextual Spelling Correction by External Acoustics Attention and Semantic Aware Data Augmentation
title_zh: 通过外部声学注意力和语义感知数据增强来改进上下文拼写纠正
abstract: We previously proposed contextual spelling correction (CSC) to correct the output of end-to-end (E2E) automatic speech recognition (ASR) models with contextual information such as name, place, etc. Although CSC has achieved reasonable improvement in the biasing problem, there are still two drawbacks for further accuracy improvement. First, due to information limitation in text only hypothesis or weak performance of ASR model on rare domains, the CSC model may fail to correct phrases with similar pronunciation or anti-context cases where all biasing phrases are not present in the utterance. Second, there is a discrepancy between the training and inference of CSC. The bias list in training is randomly selected but in inference there may be more similarity between ground truth phrase and other phrases. To solve above limitations, in this paper we propose an improved non-autoregressive (NAR) spelling correction model for contextual biasing in E2E neural transducer-based ASR systems to improve the previous CSC model from two perspectives: Firstly, we incorporate acoustics information with an external attention as well as text hypotheses into CSC to better distinguish target phrase from dissimilar or irrelevant phrases. Secondly, we design a semantic aware data augmentation schema in training phrase to reduce the mismatch between training and inference to further boost the biasing accuracy. Experiments show that the improved method outperforms the baseline ASR+Biasing system by as much as 20.3% relative name recall gain and achieves stable improvement compared to the previous CSC method over different bias list name coverage ratio.
summary: We previously proposed contextual spelling correction (CSC) to correct the output of end-to-end (E2E) automatic speech recognition (ASR) models with contextual information such as name, place, etc. Although CSC has achieved reasonable improvement in the biasing problem, there are still two drawbacks for further accuracy improvement. First, due to information limitation in text only hypothesis or weak performance of ASR model on rare domains, the CSC model may fail to correct phrases with similar pronunciation or anti-context cases where all biasing phrases are not present in the utterance. Second, there is a discrepancy between the training and inference of CSC. The bias list in training is randomly selected but in inference there may be more similarity between ground truth phrase and other phrases. To solve above limitations, in this paper we propose an improved non-autoregressive (NAR) spelling correction model for contextual biasing in E2E neural transducer-based ASR systems to improve the previous CSC model from two perspectives: Firstly, we incorporate acoustics information with an external attention as well as text hypotheses into CSC to better distinguish target phrase from dissimilar or irrelevant phrases. Secondly, we design a semantic aware data augmentation schema in training phrase to reduce the mismatch between training and inference to further boost the biasing accuracy. Experiments show that the improved method outperforms the baseline ASR+Biasing system by as much as 20.3% relative name recall gain and achieves stable improvement compared to the previous CSC method over different bias list name coverage ratio.
abstract_zh: 我们之前提出了上下文拼写校正（CSC），以使用名称、地点等上下文信息来校正端到端（E2E）自动语音识别（ASR）模型的输出。尽管CSC在偏差问题上取得了合理的改进，但仍存在两个缺点，需要进一步提高准确性。首先，由于纯文本假设中的信息限制或 ASR 模型在稀有领域上的性能较弱，CSC 模型可能无法纠正具有相似发音的短语或反上下文情况，其中所有偏见短语都不存在于话语中。其次，CSC的训练和推理之间存在差异。训练中的偏差列表是随机选择的，但在推理中，真实短语和其他短语之间可能有更多相似性。为了解决上述局限性，在本文中，我们提出了一种改进的非自回归（NAR）拼写校正模型，用于基于 E2E 神经换能器的 ASR 系统中的上下文偏差，从两个角度改进了先前的 CSC 模型：首先，我们将具有外部注意力的声学信息以及文本假设纳入 CSC，以更好地区分目标短语与不相似或不相关的短语。其次，我们在训练短语中设计了语义感知数据增强模式，以减少训练和推理之间的不匹配，从而进一步提高偏差准确性。实验表明，改进后的方法比基线 ASR+Biasing 系统提高了 20.3% 的相对名称召回增益，并且与之前的 CSC 方法相比，在不同偏差列表名称覆盖率上实现了稳定的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出改进的上下文拼写纠正模型，通过引入外部声学注意力和语义感知数据增强，解决现有方法在罕见领域纠错和训练推理差异问题。
AI.motivation: 现有上下文拼写纠正（CSC）在文本假设信息有限或ASR模型性能不足时，难以处理发音相似短语及反向上下文场景，且训练与推理阶段存在偏见列表匹配差异。
AI.method: 设计非自回归拼写纠正模型：1）融合外部声学注意力机制与文本假设，提升目标短语区分度；2）采用语义感知的数据增强策略，缩小训练与推理阶段的偏见匹配差异。
AI.result: 实验显示，改进方法在基准ASR+偏见系统上实现20.3%的相对名称召回率提升，在不同偏见列表覆盖率下均优于原有CSC方法。
AI.conclusion: 结合声学信息与语义增强的数据策略有效解决了CSC模型的局限性，显著提升了拼写纠正准确率与稳定性。

Secondly, we design a semantic aware data augmentation schema in training phrase to reduce the mismatch between training and inference to further boost the biasing accuracy. Experiments show that the improved method outperforms the baseline ASR+Biasing system by as much as 20.3% relative name recall gain and achieves stable improvement compared to the previous CSC method over different bias list name coverage ratio. 我们之前提出了上下文拼写校正（CSC），以使用名称、地点等上下文信息来校正端到端（E2E）自动语音识别（ASR）模型的输出。尽管CSC在偏差问题上取得了合理的改进，但仍存在两个缺点，需要进一步提高准确性。首先，由于纯文本假设中的信息限制或 ASR 模型在稀有领域上的性能较弱，CSC 模型可能无法纠正具有相似发音的短语或反上下文情况，其中所有偏见短语都不存在于话语中。其次，CSC的训练和推理之间存在差异。训练中的偏差列表是随机选择的，但在推理中，真实短语和其他短语之间可能有更多相似性。为了解决上述局限性，在本文中，我们提出了一种改进的非自回归（NAR）拼写校正模型，用于基于 E2E 神经换能器的 ASR 系统中的上下文偏差，从两个角度改进了先前的 CSC 模型：首先，我们将具有外部注意力的声学信息以及文本假设纳入 CSC，以更好地区分目标短语与不相似或不相关的短语。其次，我们在训练短语中设计了语义感知数据增强模式，以减少训练和推理之间的不匹配，从而进一步提高偏差准确性。实验表明，改进后的方法比基线 ASR+Biasing 系统提高了 20.3% 的相对名称召回增益，并且与之前的 CSC 方法相比，在不同偏差列表名称覆盖率上实现了稳定的改进。 本文提出改进的上下文拼写纠正模型，通过引入外部声学注意力和语义感知数据增强，解决现有方法在罕见领域纠错和训练推理差异问题。 Xiaoqiang Wang,Yanqing Liu,Jinyu Li,Sheng Zhao cs.SD,cs.CL,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Chao Zhang,Bo Li,Tara N. Sainath,Trevor Strohman,Shuo-yiin Chang
title: UML: A Universal Monolingual Output Layer for Multilingual ASR
title_zh: UML：用于多语言 ASR 的通用单语言输出层
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICASSP 2023
comments: Published as a conference paper at ICASSP 2023
abstract: Word-piece models (WPMs) are commonly used subword units in state-of-the-art end-to-end automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems. For multilingual ASR, due to the differences in written scripts across languages, multilingual WPMs bring the challenges of having overly large output layers and scaling to more languages. In this work, we propose a universal monolingual output layer (UML) to address such problems. Instead of one output node for only one WPM, UML re-associates each output node with multiple WPMs, one for each language, and results in a smaller monolingual output layer shared across languages. Consequently, the UML enables to switch in the interpretation of each output node depending on the language of the input speech. Experimental results on an 11-language voice search task demonstrated the feasibility of using UML for high-quality and high-efficiency multilingual streaming ASR.
summary: Word-piece models (WPMs) are commonly used subword units in state-of-the-art end-to-end automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems. For multilingual ASR, due to the differences in written scripts across languages, multilingual WPMs bring the challenges of having overly large output layers and scaling to more languages. In this work, we propose a universal monolingual output layer (UML) to address such problems. Instead of one output node for only one WPM, UML re-associates each output node with multiple WPMs, one for each language, and results in a smaller monolingual output layer shared across languages. Consequently, the UML enables to switch in the interpretation of each output node depending on the language of the input speech. Experimental results on an 11-language voice search task demonstrated the feasibility of using UML for high-quality and high-efficiency multilingual streaming ASR.
abstract_zh: 词块模型 (WPM) 是最先进的端到端自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统中常用的子词单元。对于多语言 ASR，由于不同语言的书面脚本存在差异，多语言 WPM 带来了输出层过大和扩展到更多语言的挑战。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个通用单语言输出层（UML）来解决此类问题。 UML 不再将一个输出节点仅对应一个 WPM，而是将每个输出节点与多个 WPM 重新关联，每个 WPM 对应一种语言，从而产生跨语言共享的更小的单语言输出层。因此，UML 能够根据输入语音的语言切换每个输出节点的解释。 11种语言的语音搜索任务的实验结果证明了使用UML进行高质量、高效率的多语言流式ASR的可行性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通用单语输出层（UML），用于解决多语言语音识别中输出层规模过大及扩展性问题。
AI.motivation: 多语言语音识别中，不同语言的书写系统差异导致传统词件模型输出层过大，难以高效扩展至更多语言。
AI.method: 通过将每个输出节点与多语言词件模型重新关联，构建共享的单语输出层，根据输入语言动态切换输出节点解释。
AI.result: 在11语言语音搜索任务中验证了UML在保持高质量的同时，显著提升多语言流式语音识别的效率。
AI.conclusion: UML有效解决了多语言ASR的输出层扩展难题，为高效跨语言语音识别提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Hristo N. Djidjev
title: Quantum annealing with inequality constraints: the set cover problem
title_zh: 具有不等式约束的量子退火：集合覆盖问题
abstract: This paper presents two novel approaches for solving the set cover problem (SCP) with multiple inequality constraints on quantum annealers. The first method uses the augmented Lagrangian approach to represent the constraints, while the second method employs a higher-order binary optimization (HUBO) formulation. Our experimental analysis demonstrate that both approaches outperform the standard approach with slack variables for solving problems with inequality constraints on D-Wave quantum annealers. The results show that the augmented Lagrangian method can be successfully used to implement a large number of inequality constraints, making it applicable to a wide range of constrained problems beyond the SCP. The HUBO formulation performs slightly better than the augmented Lagrangian method in solving the SCP, but it is less scalable in terms of embeddability in the quantum chip. These findings could impact the use of quantum annealers for solving constrained optimization problems.
summary: This paper presents two novel approaches for solving the set cover problem (SCP) with multiple inequality constraints on quantum annealers. The first method uses the augmented Lagrangian approach to represent the constraints, while the second method employs a higher-order binary optimization (HUBO) formulation. Our experimental analysis demonstrate that both approaches outperform the standard approach with slack variables for solving problems with inequality constraints on D-Wave quantum annealers. The results show that the augmented Lagrangian method can be successfully used to implement a large number of inequality constraints, making it applicable to a wide range of constrained problems beyond the SCP. The HUBO formulation performs slightly better than the augmented Lagrangian method in solving the SCP, but it is less scalable in terms of embeddability in the quantum chip. These findings could impact the use of quantum annealers for solving constrained optimization problems.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了两种新颖的方法来解决量子退火器上具有多重不等式约束的集合覆盖问题（SCP）。第一种方法使用增强拉格朗日方法来表示约束，而第二种方法则采用高阶二元优化 (HUBO) 公式。我们的实验分析表明，在解决 D-Wave 量子退火器上的不等式约束问题时，这两种方法都优于使用松弛变量的标准方法。结果表明，增广拉格朗日方法可以成功地用于实现大量不等式约束，使其适用于 SCP 之外的广泛约束问题。 HUBO 公式在求解 SCP 方面比增强拉格朗日方法稍好，但在量子芯片中的可嵌入性方面其可扩展性较差。这些发现可能会影响量子退火器解决约束优化问题的使用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种新方法解决量子退火器上的带不等式约束的集合覆盖问题，分别为增广拉格朗日方法和高阶二进制优化（HUBO）公式。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在处理量子退火器的不等式约束时存在局限性，需探索更高效的约束处理技术以提升量子计算在组合优化问题中的应用效果。
AI.method: 第一种方法采用增广拉格朗日方法表示约束，第二种方法使用高阶二进制优化（HUBO）公式进行问题建模。
AI.result: 实验表明两种方法均优于传统松弛变量方法，其中增广拉格朗日方法可处理大量约束且适用范围广，HUBO方法在SCP问题上表现略优但量子芯片嵌入性较差。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法为量子退火器解决约束优化问题提供了有效途径，增广拉格朗日方法在可扩展性方面更具优势，而HUBO方法在特定问题上表现更优。

authors_text: Jin Zhu,Guang Yang,Pietro Lio
title: A residual dense vision transformer for medical image super-resolution with segmentation-based perceptual loss fine-tuning
title_zh: 用于医学图像超分辨率的残差密集视觉变换器，具有基于分割的感知损失微调
comment: Preprint submitted to Medical Image Analysis and under review
comments: Preprint submitted to Medical Image Analysis and under review
abstract: Super-resolution plays an essential role in medical imaging because it provides an alternative way to achieve high spatial resolutions and image quality with no extra acquisition costs. In the past few decades, the rapid development of deep neural networks has promoted super-resolution performance with novel network architectures, loss functions and evaluation metrics. Specifically, vision transformers dominate a broad range of computer vision tasks, but challenges still exist when applying them to low-level medical image processing tasks. This paper proposes an efficient vision transformer with residual dense connections and local feature fusion to achieve efficient single-image super-resolution (SISR) of medical modalities. Moreover, we implement a general-purpose perceptual loss with manual control for image quality improvements of desired aspects by incorporating prior knowledge of medical image segmentation. Compared with state-of-the-art methods on four public medical image datasets, the proposed method achieves the best PSNR scores of 6 modalities among seven modalities. It leads to an average improvement of $+0.09$ dB PSNR with only 38\% parameters of SwinIR. On the other hand, the segmentation-based perceptual loss increases $+0.14$ dB PSNR on average for SOTA methods, including CNNs and vision transformers. Additionally, we conduct comprehensive ablation studies to discuss potential factors for the superior performance of vision transformers over CNNs and the impacts of network and loss function components. The code will be released on GitHub with the paper published.

Additionally, we conduct comprehensive ablation studies to discuss potential factors for the superior performance of vision transformers over CNNs and the impacts of network and loss function components. The code will be released on GitHub with the paper published.
abstract_zh: 超分辨率在医学成像中起着至关重要的作用，因为它提供了一种无需额外采集成本即可实现高空间分辨率和图像质量的替代方法。在过去的几十年里，深度神经网络的快速发展通过新颖的网络架构、损失函数和评估指标提升了超分辨率性能。具体来说，视觉转换器在广泛的计算机视觉任务中占据主导地位，但将其应用于低级医学图像处理任务时仍然存在挑战。本文提出了一种具有残余密集连接和局部特征融合的高效视觉变换器，以实现医疗模式的高效单图像超分辨率（SISR）。此外，我们通过结合医学图像分割的先验知识，通过手动控制来实现通用感知损失，以提高所需方面的图像质量。与四个公共医学图像数据集上的最先进方法相比，该方法在 7 种模态中的 6 种模态中实现了最佳 PSNR 分数。它仅用 SwinIR 的 38\% 参数即可平均提高 $+0.09$ dB PSNR。另一方面，对于 SOTA 方法（包括 CNN 和视觉 Transformer），基于分段的感知损失平均增加 +0.14$ dB PSNR。此外，我们还进行了全面的消融研究，以讨论视觉 Transformer 优于 CNN 的潜在因素以及网络和损失函数组件的影响。代码将随论文一起发布在 GitHub 上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合残差密集连接和分割感知损失的视觉变换器，用于医学图像超分辨率任务。
AI.motivation: 医学影像超分辨率需在无额外采集成本下提升图像质量，但传统视觉变换器在低级医学图像处理中存在挑战。
AI.method: 设计残差密集视觉变换器架构，融合局部特征，并引入基于医学分割先验知识的感知损失函数进行微调。
AI.result: 在四个医学数据集上，该方法在6/7模态中取得最佳PSNR，参数量仅为SwinIR的38%，且感知损失使SOTA方法平均提升0.14dB。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在参数效率和图像质量上优于现有技术，消融研究验证了架构与损失函数设计的有效性。

search_text: A residual dense vision transformer for medical image super-resolution with segmentation-based perceptual loss fine-tuning 用于医学图像超分辨率的残差密集视觉变换器，具有基于分割的感知损失微调 Super-resolution plays an essential role in medical imaging because it provides an alternative way to achieve high spatial resolutions and image quality with no extra acquisition costs. In the past few decades, the rapid development of deep neural networks has promoted super-resolution performance with novel network architectures, loss functions and evaluation metrics. Specifically, vision transformers dominate a broad range of computer vision tasks, but challenges still exist when applying them to low-level medical image processing tasks. This paper proposes an efficient vision transformer with residual dense connections and local feature fusion to achieve efficient single-image super-resolution (SISR) of medical modalities. Moreover, we implement a general-purpose perceptual loss with manual control for image quality improvements of desired aspects by incorporating prior knowledge of medical image segmentation. Compared with state-of-the-art methods on four public medical image datasets, the proposed method achieves the best PSNR scores of 6 modalities among seven modalities. It leads to an average improvement of $+0.09$ dB PSNR with only 38\% parameters of SwinIR. On the other hand, the segmentation-based perceptual loss increases $+0.14$ dB PSNR on average for SOTA methods, including CNNs and vision transformers. Additionally, we conduct comprehensive ablation studies to discuss potential factors for the superior performance of vision transformers over CNNs and the impacts of network and loss function components. The code will be released on GitHub with the paper published. 超分辨率在医学成像中起着至关重要的作用，因为它提供了一种无需额外采集成本即可实现高空间分辨率和图像质量的替代方法。在过去的几十年里，深度神经网络的快速发展通过新颖的网络架构、损失函数和评估指标提升了超分辨率性能。具体来说，视觉转换器在广泛的计算机视觉任务中占据主导地位，但将其应用于低级医学图像处理任务时仍然存在挑战。本文提出了一种具有残余密集连接和局部特征融合的高效视觉变换器，以实现医疗模式的高效单图像超分辨率（SISR）。此外，我们通过结合医学图像分割的先验知识，通过手动控制来实现通用感知损失，以提高所需方面的图像质量。与四个公共医学图像数据集上的最先进方法相比，该方法在 7 种模态中的 6 种模态中实现了最佳 PSNR 分数。它仅用 SwinIR 的 38\% 参数即可平均提高 $+0.09$ dB PSNR。另一方面，对于 SOTA 方法（包括 CNN 和视觉 Transformer），基于分段的感知损失平均增加 +0.14$ dB PSNR。此外，我们还进行了全面的消融研究，以讨论视觉 Transformer 优于 CNN 的潜在因素以及网络和损失函数组件的影响。代码将随论文一起发布在 GitHub 上。 本文提出一种结合残差密集连接和分割感知损失的视觉变换器，用于医学图像超分辨率任务。 Jin Zhu,Guang Yang,Pietro Lio eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Minghai Qin,Chao Sun,Jaco Hofmann,Dejan Vucinic
title: DISCO: Distributed Inference with Sparse Communications
title_zh: DISCO：稀疏通信的分布式推理
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have great potential to solve many real-world problems, but they usually require an extensive amount of computation and memory. It is of great difficulty to deploy a large DNN model to a single resource-limited device with small memory capacity. Distributed computing is a common approach to reduce single-node memory consumption and to accelerate the inference of DNN models. In this paper, we explore the "within-layer model parallelism", which distributes the inference of each layer into multiple nodes. In this way, the memory requirement can be distributed to many nodes, making it possible to use several edge devices to infer a large DNN model. Due to the dependency within each layer, data communications between nodes during this parallel inference can be a bottleneck when the communication bandwidth is limited. We propose a framework to train DNN models for Distributed Inference with Sparse Communications (DISCO). We convert the problem of selecting which subset of data to transmit between nodes into a model optimization problem, and derive models with both computation and communication reduction when each layer is inferred on multiple nodes. We show the benefit of the DISCO framework on a variety of CV tasks such as image classification, object detection, semantic segmentation, and image super resolution. The corresponding models include important DNN building blocks such as convolutions and transformers. For example, each layer of a ResNet-50 model can be distributively inferred across two nodes with five times less data communications, almost half overall computations and half memory requirement for a single node, and achieve comparable accuracy to the original ResNet-50 model. This also results in 4.7 times overall inference speedup.
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have great potential to solve many real-world problems, but they usually require an extensive amount of computation and memory. It is of great difficulty to deploy a large DNN model to a single resource-limited device with small memory capacity. Distributed computing is a common approach to reduce single-node memory consumption and to accelerate the inference of DNN models. In this paper, we explore the "within-layer model parallelism", which distributes the inference of each layer into multiple nodes. In this way, the memory requirement can be distributed to many nodes, making it possible to use several edge devices to infer a large DNN model. Due to the dependency within each layer, data communications between nodes during this parallel inference can be a bottleneck when the communication bandwidth is limited. We propose a framework to train DNN models for Distributed Inference with Sparse Communications (DISCO). We convert the problem of selecting which subset of data to transmit between nodes into a model optimization problem, and derive models with both computation and communication reduction when each layer is inferred on multiple nodes. We show the benefit of the DISCO framework on a variety of CV tasks such as image classification, object detection, semantic segmentation, and image super resolution. The corresponding models include important DNN building blocks such as convolutions and transformers. For example, each layer of a ResNet-50 model can be distributively inferred across two nodes with five times less data communications, almost half overall computations and half memory requirement for a single node, and achieve comparable accuracy to the original ResNet-50 model. This also results in 4.7 times overall inference speedup.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 具有解决许多现实问题的巨大潜力，但它们通常需要大量计算和内存。将大型DNN模型部署到内存容量较小的单一资源有限的设备上是非常困难的。分布式计算是减少单节点内存消耗、加速 DNN 模型推理的常用方法。在本文中，我们探索“层内模型并行性”，即将每一层的推理分布到多个节点。通过这种方式，内存需求可以分布到许多节点，从而可以使用多个边缘设备来推断大型 DNN 模型。由于每层内的依赖性，当通信带宽有限时，并行推理期间节点之间的数据通信可能成为瓶颈。我们提出了一个框架来训练用于稀疏通信分布式推理 (DISCO) 的 DNN 模型。我们将选择在节点之间传输哪个数据子集的问题转化为模型优化问题，并在每个层在多个节点上进行推断时推导出具有计算和通信减少的模型。我们展示了 DISCO 框架在图像分类、对象检测、语义分割和图像超分辨率等各种 CV 任务上的优势。相应的模型包括重要的 DNN 构建块，例如卷积和变换器。例如，ResNet-50 模型的每一层都可以跨两个节点进行分布式推断，数据通信量减少五倍，单个节点的总体计算量和内存需求几乎减半，并且达到与原始 ResNet-50 模型相当的精度。这也使整体推理速度提高了 4.7 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DISCO框架，通过稀疏通信实现大规模深度神经网络的分布式推理。
AI.motivation: 大型深度神经网络对单设备计算和内存要求过高，传统分布式方法因节点间通信瓶颈导致效率低下。
AI.method: 将通信子集选择转化为模型优化问题，通过联合优化计算与通信开销，实现层内模型并行。
AI.result: 在图像分类等任务中，ResNet-50模型通信量减少5倍，单节点计算和内存需求减半，推理速度提升4.7倍。
AI.conclusion: DISCO有效平衡了分布式推理中的计算、通信与精度，为边缘设备部署大模型提供可行方案。

authors_text: Songlin Zhai,Weiqing Wang,Yuanfang Li,Yuan Meng
title: DNG: Taxonomy Expansion by Exploring the Intrinsic Directed Structure on Non-gaussian Space
title_zh: DNG：通过探索非高斯空间上的内在有向结构进行分类扩展
abstract: Taxonomy expansion is the process of incorporating a large number of additional nodes (i.e., "queries") into an existing taxonomy (i.e., "seed"), with the most important step being the selection of appropriate positions for each query. Enormous efforts have been made by exploring the seed's structure. However, existing approaches are deficient in their mining of structural information in two ways: poor modeling of the hierarchical semantics and failure to capture directionality of is-a relation. This paper seeks to address these issues by explicitly denoting each node as the combination of inherited feature (i.e., structural part) and incremental feature (i.e., supplementary part). Specifically, the inherited feature originates from "parent" nodes and is weighted by an inheritance factor. With this node representation, the hierarchy of semantics in taxonomies (i.e., the inheritance and accumulation of features from "parent" to "child") could be embodied. Additionally, based on this representation, the directionality of is-a relation could be easily translated into the irreversible inheritance of features. Inspired by the Darmois-Skitovich Theorem, we implement this irreversibility by a non-Gaussian constraint on the supplementary feature. A log-likelihood learning objective is further utilized to optimize the proposed model (dubbed DNG), whereby the required non-Gaussianity is also theoretically ensured. Extensive experimental results on two real-world datasets verify the superiority of DNG relative to several strong baselines.
summary: Taxonomy expansion is the process of incorporating a large number of additional nodes (i.e., "queries") into an existing taxonomy (i.e., "seed"), with the most important step being the selection of appropriate positions for each query. Enormous efforts have been made by exploring the seed's structure. However, existing approaches are deficient in their mining of structural information in two ways: poor modeling of the hierarchical semantics and failure to capture directionality of is-a relation. This paper seeks to address these issues by explicitly denoting each node as the combination of inherited feature (i.e., structural part) and incremental feature (i.e., supplementary part). Specifically, the inherited feature originates from "parent" nodes and is weighted by an inheritance factor. With this node representation, the hierarchy of semantics in taxonomies (i.e., the inheritance and accumulation of features from "parent" to "child") could be embodied. Additionally, based on this representation, the directionality of is-a relation could be easily translated into the irreversible inheritance of features. Inspired by the Darmois-Skitovich Theorem, we implement this irreversibility by a non-Gaussian constraint on the supplementary feature. A log-likelihood learning objective is further utilized to optimize the proposed model (dubbed DNG), whereby the required non-Gaussianity is also theoretically ensured. Extensive experimental results on two real-world datasets verify the superiority of DNG relative to several strong baselines.
abstract_zh: 分类扩展是将大量附加节点（即“查询”）合并到现有分类（即“种子”）中的过程，最重要的步骤是为每个查询选择适当的位置。为了探索种子的结构，人们付出了巨大的努力。然而，现有的方法在结构信息的挖掘方面存在两个缺陷：层次语义的建模不佳以及未能捕获 is-a 关系的方向性。本文试图通过将每个节点明确表示为继承特征（即结构部分）和增量特征（即补充部分）的组合来解决这些问题。具体来说，继承的特征源自“父”节点并由继承因子加权。通过这种节点表示，可以体现分类中语义的层次结构（即从“父”到“子”的特征的继承和积累）。此外，基于这种表示，is-a关系的方向性可以很容易地转化为特征的不可逆继承。受 Darmois-Skitovich 定理的启发，我们通过对补充特征的非高斯约束来实现这种不可逆性。进一步利用对数似然学习目标来优化所提出的模型（称为 DNG），从而在理论上也保证了所需的非高斯性。对两个真实世界数据集的广泛实验结果验证了 DNG 相对于几个强基线的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DNG方法，通过探索非高斯空间中的内在定向结构，解决分类法扩展中层级语义建模不足和无法捕捉is-a关系方向性的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有分类法扩展方法在层级语义建模和is-a关系方向性捕捉方面存在缺陷，导致新增节点位置选择不准确。
AI.method: 将节点表示为继承特征（来自父节点）与增量特征的组合，通过非高斯约束实现特征不可逆继承，并利用对数似然目标优化模型。
AI.result: 在两个真实数据集上验证了DNG相比多个强基线方法的优越性。
AI.conclusion: DNG通过显式建模层级语义和方向性约束，有效提升了分类法扩展的准确性。

search_text: DNG: Taxonomy Expansion by Exploring the Intrinsic Directed Structure on Non-gaussian Space DNG：通过探索非高斯空间上的内在有向结构进行分类扩展 Taxonomy expansion is the process of incorporating a large number of additional nodes (i.e., "queries") into an existing taxonomy (i.e., "seed"), with the most important step being the selection of appropriate positions for each query. Enormous efforts have been made by exploring the seed's structure. However, existing approaches are deficient in their mining of structural information in two ways: poor modeling of the hierarchical semantics and failure to capture directionality of is-a relation. This paper seeks to address these issues by explicitly denoting each node as the combination of inherited feature (i.e., structural part) and incremental feature (i.e., supplementary part). Specifically, the inherited feature originates from "parent" nodes and is weighted by an inheritance factor. With this node representation, the hierarchy of semantics in taxonomies (i.e., the inheritance and accumulation of features from "parent" to "child") could be embodied. Additionally, based on this representation, the directionality of is-a relation could be easily translated into the irreversible inheritance of features. Inspired by the Darmois-Skitovich Theorem, we implement this irreversibility by a non-Gaussian constraint on the supplementary feature. A log-likelihood learning objective is further utilized to optimize the proposed model (dubbed DNG), whereby the required non-Gaussianity is also theoretically ensured. Extensive experimental results on two real-world datasets verify the superiority of DNG relative to several strong baselines. 分类扩展是将大量附加节点（即“查询”）合并到现有分类（即“种子”）中的过程，最重要的步骤是为每个查询选择适当的位置。为了探索种子的结构，人们付出了巨大的努力。然而，现有的方法在结构信息的挖掘方面存在两个缺陷：层次语义的建模不佳以及未能捕获 is-a 关系的方向性。本文试图通过将每个节点明确表示为继承特征（即结构部分）和增量特征（即补充部分）的组合来解决这些问题。具体来说，继承的特征源自“父”节点并由继承因子加权。通过这种节点表示，可以体现分类中语义的层次结构（即从“父”到“子”的特征的继承和积累）。此外，基于这种表示，is-a关系的方向性可以很容易地转化为特征的不可逆继承。受 Darmois-Skitovich 定理的启发，我们通过对补充特征的非高斯约束来实现这种不可逆性。进一步利用对数似然学习目标来优化所提出的模型（称为 DNG），从而在理论上也保证了所需的非高斯性。对两个真实世界数据集的广泛实验结果验证了 DNG 相对于几个强基线的优越性。 本文提出DNG方法，通过探索非高斯空间中的内在定向结构，解决分类法扩展中层级语义建模不足和无法捕捉is-a关系方向性的问题。 Songlin Zhai,Weiqing Wang,Yuanfang Li,Yuan Meng cs.AI

authors_text: Jonathan Huml,Abiy Tasissa,Demba Ba
title: Sparse, Geometric Autoencoder Models of V1
title_zh: V1 的稀疏几何自动编码器模型
comment: Symmetry and Geometry in Neural Representations (NeurIPS) 2022
comments: Symmetry and Geometry in Neural Representations (NeurIPS) 2022
abstract: The classical sparse coding model represents visual stimuli as a linear combination of a handful of learned basis functions that are Gabor-like when trained on natural image data. However, the Gabor-like filters learned by classical sparse coding far overpredict well-tuned simple cell receptive field (SCRF) profiles. A number of subsequent models have either discarded the sparse dictionary learning framework entirely or have yet to take advantage of the surge in unrolled, neural dictionary learning architectures. A key missing theme of these updates is a stronger notion of \emph{structured sparsity}. We propose an autoencoder architecture whose latent representations are implicitly, locally organized for spectral clustering, which begets artificial neurons better matched to observed primate data. The weighted-$\ell_1$ (WL) constraint in the autoencoder objective function maintains core ideas of the sparse coding framework, yet also offers a promising path to describe the differentiation of receptive fields in terms of a discriminative hierarchy in future work.
summary: The classical sparse coding model represents visual stimuli as a linear combination of a handful of learned basis functions that are Gabor-like when trained on natural image data. However, the Gabor-like filters learned by classical sparse coding far overpredict well-tuned simple cell receptive field (SCRF) profiles. A number of subsequent models have either discarded the sparse dictionary learning framework entirely or have yet to take advantage of the surge in unrolled, neural dictionary learning architectures. A key missing theme of these updates is a stronger notion of \emph{structured sparsity}. We propose an autoencoder architecture whose latent representations are implicitly, locally organized for spectral clustering, which begets artificial neurons better matched to observed primate data. The weighted-$\ell_1$ (WL) constraint in the autoencoder objective function maintains core ideas of the sparse coding framework, yet also offers a promising path to describe the differentiation of receptive fields in terms of a discriminative hierarchy in future work.
abstract_zh: 经典的稀疏编码模型将视觉刺激表示为一些学习基函数的线性组合，这些基函数在自然图像数据上训练时类似于 Gabor。然而，通过经典稀疏编码学习的类 Gabor 滤波器远远高估了经过良好调整的简单细胞感受野 (SCRF) 轮廓。许多后续模型要么完全放弃了稀疏字典学习框架，要么尚未利用展开的神经字典学习架构的激增。这些更新缺少的一个关键主题是\emph{结构化稀疏}的更强概念。我们提出了一种自动编码器架构，其潜在表示是隐式的、本地组织的谱聚类，从而产生与观察到的灵长类动物数据更好匹配的人工神经元。自动编码器目标函数中的加权 $\ell_1$ (WL) 约束保留了稀疏编码框架的核心思想，同时也提供了一条在未来工作中根据判别层次结构描述感受野差异的有前途的路径。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合结构化稀疏性的自编码器模型，用于更精确地模拟初级视觉皮层(V1)的神经元感受野特性。
AI.motivation: 传统稀疏编码模型在自然图像上学习的Gabor滤波器过度预测了灵长类动物简单细胞感受野的调谐特性，现有模型要么完全放弃稀疏字典学习框架，要么未能利用最新的神经字典学习架构。
AI.method: 设计了一种自编码器架构，其潜在表示通过谱聚类实现局部结构化稀疏性，并引入加权ℓ1约束来保持稀疏编码的核心思想。
AI.result: 该模型生成的人工神经元特性更符合灵长类动物视觉皮层的观测数据，为感受野的层次化区分提供了新途径。
AI.conclusion: 结构化稀疏性约束的自编码器框架有效改进了经典稀疏编码模型的生物合理性，为未来研究感受野层次化差异提供了可行方向。

authors_text: Ruoyan Kong,Chuankai Zhang,Ruixuan Sun,Vishnu Chhabra,Tanushsrisai Nadimpalli,Joseph A. Konstan
title: Multi-Objective Personalization in Multi-Stakeholder Organizational Bulk E-mail: A Field Experiment
title_zh: 多利益相关者组织批量电子邮件中的多目标个性化：现场实验
comment: This is a pre-print version of a paper accepted to CSCW 2022, The 25th ACM Conference On Computer-Supported Cooperative Work And Social Computing; Ruoyan Kong et al. 2022. Multi-Objective Personalization in Multi-Stakeholder Organizational Bulk E-mail: A Field Experiment. Proc. ACM Hum.-Comput. Interact. 6, CSCW2, Article 528 (November 2022)
comments: This is a pre-print version of a paper accepted to CSCW 2022, The 25th ACM Conference On Computer-Supported Cooperative Work And Social Computing; Ruoyan Kong et al. 2022. Multi-Objective Personalization in Multi-Stakeholder Organizational Bulk E-mail: A Field Experiment. Proc. ACM Hum.-Comput. Interact. 6, CSCW2, Article 528 (November 2022)
abstract: Bulk email is often used in organizations to communicate ``important-to-organization'' messages such as policy changes, organizational plans, and administrative updates. However, normal employees may prefer messages more relevant to their jobs or interests. Organizations face the challenge of balancing prioritizing the messages they prefer employees to know (tactical goals) while maintaining employees' positive experiences with these bulk emails, then they continue to read these emails in the future (strategic goals). Could personalization help organizations achieve these tactical and strategic goals? In an 8-week field experiment with a university newsletter, we implemented a 4x5x5 factorial design on personalizing subject lines, top news, and message order based on both the employees' and the organization's preferences. We measured these designs' influences on the open/interest/recognition/read-in-detail rate of the whole newsletter and the single messages within it. We found that ``important-to-organization'' messages only got higher recognition rates when being put on subject lines / top news (tactical goal). Mixing them with employee-preferred messages in top news did not bring further improvement to their own recognition rates but could improve the whole newsletter's recognition rate. Only when the top news solely contained the employee-preferred messages were the employees slightly more interested in the newsletter (strategic goal). We further analyze on which topics the employees and the organization's preferences conflicted. Finally, we discuss the design suggestions on personalization and recommendation for organizational bulk email.

However, normal employees may prefer messages more relevant to their jobs or interests. Organizations face the challenge of balancing prioritizing the messages they prefer employees to know (tactical goals) while maintaining employees' positive experiences with these bulk emails, then they continue to read these emails in the future (strategic goals). Could personalization help organizations achieve these tactical and strategic goals? In an 8-week field experiment with a university newsletter, we implemented a 4x5x5 factorial design on personalizing subject lines, top news, and message order based on both the employees' and the organization's preferences. We measured these designs' influences on the open/interest/recognition/read-in-detail rate of the whole newsletter and the single messages within it. We found that ``important-to-organization'' messages only got higher recognition rates when being put on subject lines / top news (tactical goal). Mixing them with employee-preferred messages in top news did not bring further improvement to their own recognition rates but could improve the whole newsletter's recognition rate. Only when the top news solely contained the employee-preferred messages were the employees slightly more interested in the newsletter (strategic goal). We further analyze on which topics the employees and the organization's preferences conflicted. Finally, we discuss the design suggestions on personalization and recommendation for organizational bulk email.
abstract_zh: 组织中经常使用批量电子邮件来传达“对组织重要”的消息，例如政策变更、组织计划和管理更新。然而，普通员工可能更喜欢与他们的工作或兴趣更相关的消息。组织面临着平衡的挑战：优先考虑他们希望员工知道的消息（战术目标），同时保持员工对这些批量电子邮件的积极体验，然后他们在未来继续阅读这些电子邮件（战略目标）。个性化可以帮助组织实现这些战术和战略目标吗？在针对大学通讯进行的为期 8 周的现场实验中，我们根据员工和组织的偏好，对个性化主题行、热门新闻和消息顺序实施了 4x5x5 因子设计。我们测量了这些设计对整个新闻通讯及其中的单个消息的打开/兴趣/识别/详细阅读率的影响。我们发现“对组织重要”的消息只有在被放在主题行/热门新闻（战术目标）上时才会获得更高的识别率。将它们与热门新闻中员工喜欢的消息混合并不会进一步提高他们自己的识别率，但可以提高整个时事通讯的识别率。只有当头条新闻仅包含员工偏好的消息时，员工才会对时事通讯（战略目标）稍微更感兴趣。我们进一步分析员工和组织的偏好在哪些主题上存在冲突。最后，我们讨论了组织批量电子邮件的个性化和推荐的设计建议。

AI.tldr: 本文通过实地实验研究如何通过个性化策略在组织批量邮件中平衡组织战术目标与员工战略目标。
AI.motivation: 组织需在传达关键信息（战术目标）与保持员工对批量邮件的积极体验（战略目标）间取得平衡，但传统方法难以兼顾两者需求。
AI.method: 在大学通讯场景中开展8周实地实验，采用4x5x5因子设计，个性化主题行、顶部新闻及消息顺序，基于员工与组织双重偏好进行测试。
AI.result: 重要信息置于主题行/顶部新闻可提升其识别率，混合员工偏好内容可提高整体通讯识别率，但单独展示员工偏好内容更易提升员工兴趣。
AI.conclusion: 需通过个性化设计平衡组织与员工偏好冲突，建议在邮件结构中分层呈现关键信息与员工兴趣内容以实现双重目标。

search_text: Multi-Objective Personalization in Multi-Stakeholder Organizational Bulk E-mail: A Field Experiment 多利益相关者组织批量电子邮件中的多目标个性化：现场实验 Bulk email is often used in organizations to communicate ``important-to-organization'' messages such as policy changes, organizational plans, and administrative updates. However, normal employees may prefer messages more relevant to their jobs or interests. Organizations face the challenge of balancing prioritizing the messages they prefer employees to know (tactical goals) while maintaining employees' positive experiences with these bulk emails, then they continue to read these emails in the future (strategic goals). Could personalization help organizations achieve these tactical and strategic goals? In an 8-week field experiment with a university newsletter, we implemented a 4x5x5 factorial design on personalizing subject lines, top news, and message order based on both the employees' and the organization's preferences. We measured these designs' influences on the open/interest/recognition/read-in-detail rate of the whole newsletter and the single messages within it. We found that ``important-to-organization'' messages only got higher recognition rates when being put on subject lines / top news (tactical goal). Mixing them with employee-preferred messages in top news did not bring further improvement to their own recognition rates but could improve the whole newsletter's recognition rate. Only when the top news solely contained the employee-preferred messages were the employees slightly more interested in the newsletter (strategic goal). We further analyze on which topics the employees and the organization's preferences conflicted. Finally, we discuss the design suggestions on personalization and recommendation for organizational bulk email. 组织中经常使用批量电子邮件来传达“对组织重要”的消息，例如政策变更、组织计划和管理更新。然而，普通员工可能更喜欢与他们的工作或兴趣更相关的消息。组织面临着平衡的挑战：优先考虑他们希望员工知道的消息（战术目标），同时保持员工对这些批量电子邮件的积极体验，然后他们在未来继续阅读这些电子邮件（战略目标）。个性化可以帮助组织实现这些战术和战略目标吗？在针对大学通讯进行的为期 8 周的现场实验中，我们根据员工和组织的偏好，对个性化主题行、热门新闻和消息顺序实施了 4x5x5 因子设计。我们测量了这些设计对整个新闻通讯及其中的单个消息的打开/兴趣/识别/详细阅读率的影响。我们发现“对组织重要”的消息只有在被放在主题行/热门新闻（战术目标）上时才会获得更高的识别率。将它们与热门新闻中员工喜欢的消息混合并不会进一步提高他们自己的识别率，但可以提高整个时事通讯的识别率。只有当头条新闻仅包含员工偏好的消息时，员工才会对时事通讯（战略目标）稍微更感兴趣。我们进一步分析员工和组织的偏好在哪些主题上存在冲突。最后，我们讨论了组织批量电子邮件的个性化和推荐的设计建议。 本文通过实地实验研究如何通过个性化策略在组织批量邮件中平衡组织战术目标与员工战略目标。 Ruoyan Kong,Chuankai Zhang,Ruixuan Sun,Vishnu Chhabra,Tanushsrisai Nadimpalli,Joseph A. Konstan cs.HC

authors_text: Hexiang Hu,Yi Luan,Yang Chen,Urvashi Khandelwal,Mandar Joshi,Kenton Lee,Kristina Toutanova,Ming-Wei Chang
title: Open-domain Visual Entity Recognition: Towards Recognizing Millions of Wikipedia Entities
title_zh: 开放域视觉实体识别：识别数百万个维基百科实体
abstract: Large-scale multi-modal pre-training models such as CLIP and PaLI exhibit strong generalization on various visual domains and tasks. However, existing image classification benchmarks often evaluate recognition on a specific domain (e.g., outdoor images) or a specific task (e.g., classifying plant species), which falls short of evaluating whether pre-trained foundational models are universal visual recognizers. To address this, we formally present the task of Open-domain Visual Entity recognitioN (OVEN), where a model need to link an image onto a Wikipedia entity with respect to a text query. We construct OVEN-Wiki by re-purposing 14 existing datasets with all labels grounded onto one single label space: Wikipedia entities. OVEN challenges models to select among six million possible Wikipedia entities, making it a general visual recognition benchmark with the largest number of labels. Our study on state-of-the-art pre-trained models reveals large headroom in generalizing to the massive-scale label space. We show that a PaLI-based auto-regressive visual recognition model performs surprisingly well, even on Wikipedia entities that have never been seen during fine-tuning. We also find existing pretrained models yield different strengths: while PaLI-based models obtain higher overall performance, CLIP-based models are better at recognizing tail entities.
summary: Large-scale multi-modal pre-training models such as CLIP and PaLI exhibit strong generalization on various visual domains and tasks. However, existing image classification benchmarks often evaluate recognition on a specific domain (e.g., outdoor images) or a specific task (e.g., classifying plant species), which falls short of evaluating whether pre-trained foundational models are universal visual recognizers. To address this, we formally present the task of Open-domain Visual Entity recognitioN (OVEN), where a model need to link an image onto a Wikipedia entity with respect to a text query. We construct OVEN-Wiki by re-purposing 14 existing datasets with all labels grounded onto one single label space: Wikipedia entities. OVEN challenges models to select among six million possible Wikipedia entities, making it a general visual recognition benchmark with the largest number of labels. Our study on state-of-the-art pre-trained models reveals large headroom in generalizing to the massive-scale label space. We show that a PaLI-based auto-regressive visual recognition model performs surprisingly well, even on Wikipedia entities that have never been seen during fine-tuning. We also find existing pretrained models yield different strengths: while PaLI-based models obtain higher overall performance, CLIP-based models are better at recognizing tail entities.
abstract_zh: CLIP 和 PaLI 等大规模多模态预训练模型在各种视觉领域和任务上表现出很强的泛化能力。然而，现有的图像分类基准通常评估特定领域（例如户外图像）或特定任务（例如植物物种分类）的识别，而无法评估预先训练的基础模型是否是通用视觉识别器。为了解决这个问题，我们正式提出了开放域视觉实体识别（OVEN）的任务，其中模型需要将图像链接到关于文本查询的维基百科实体。我们通过重新利用 14 个现有数据集来构建 OVEN-Wiki，其中所有标签都基于一个标签空间：维基百科实体。 OVEN 挑战模型从 600 万个可能的维基百科实体中进行选择，使其成为标签数量最多的通用视觉识别基准。我们对最先进的预训练模型的研究揭示了推广到大规模标签空间的巨大空间。我们证明，基于 PaLI 的自回归视觉识别模型的性能出人意料地好，即使是在微调过程中从未见过的维基百科实体上也是如此。我们还发现现有的预训练模型具有不同的优势：基于 PaLI 的模型获得了更高的整体性能，而基于 CLIP 的模型更擅长识别尾部实体。

AI.tldr: 本文提出开放领域视觉实体识别任务OVEN，通过构建基于维基百科实体的统一标签空间，评估预训练模型在大规模标签下的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有图像分类基准局限于特定领域或任务，无法全面验证预训练模型作为通用视觉识别器的能力，需构建更大规模的评估基准。
AI.method: 整合14个数据集构建OVEN-Wiki，将所有标签映射至维基百科实体，要求模型在600万实体中进行图像-实体链接，并测试PaLI/CLIP等模型表现。
AI.result: PaLI模型在未见过的维基实体上表现优异，CLIP模型在尾部实体识别上更具优势，现有模型在百万级标签空间中仍有显著提升空间。
AI.conclusion: OVEN成为首个百万级标签的视觉识别基准，揭示了预训练模型在开放领域任务中的能力差异与优化方向。

authors_text: Lingxiao Huang,Pinyan Lu,Xuan Wu
title: Improved Coresets for Clustering with Capacity and Fairness Constraints
title_zh: 改进的具有容量和公平性约束的集群核心集
comment: This paper has been merged with another paper (arXiv:2301.08460)
comments: This paper has been merged with another paper (arXiv:2301.08460)
abstract: We study coresets for clustering with capacity and fairness constraints. Our main result is a near-linear time algorithm to construct $\tilde{O}(k^2\varepsilon^{-2z-2})$-sized $\varepsilon$-coresets for capacitated $(k,z)$-clustering which improves a recent $\tilde{O}(k^3\varepsilon^{-3z-2})$ bound by [BCAJ+22, HJLW23]. As a corollary, we also save a factor of $k \varepsilon^{-z}$ on the coreset size for fair $(k,z)$-clustering compared to them. We fundamentally improve the hierarchical uniform sampling framework of [BCAJ+22] by adaptively selecting sample size on each ring instance, proportional to its clustering cost to an optimal solution. Our analysis relies on a key geometric observation that reduces the number of total ``effective centers" from [BCAJ+22]'s $\tilde{O}(k^2\varepsilon^{-z})$ to merely $O(k\log \varepsilon^{-1})$ by being able to ``ignore'' all center points that are too far or too close to the ring center.
summary: We study coresets for clustering with capacity and fairness constraints. Our main result is a near-linear time algorithm to construct $\tilde{O}(k^2\varepsilon^{-2z-2})$-sized $\varepsilon$-coresets for capacitated $(k,z)$-clustering which improves a recent $\tilde{O}(k^3\varepsilon^{-3z-2})$ bound by [BCAJ+22, HJLW23]. As a corollary, we also save a factor of $k \varepsilon^{-z}$ on the coreset size for fair $(k,z)$-clustering compared to them. We fundamentally improve the hierarchical uniform sampling framework of [BCAJ+22] by adaptively selecting sample size on each ring instance, proportional to its clustering cost to an optimal solution. Our analysis relies on a key geometric observation that reduces the number of total ``effective centers" from [BCAJ+22]'s $\tilde{O}(k^2\varepsilon^{-z})$ to merely $O(k\log \varepsilon^{-1})$ by being able to ``ignore'' all center points that are too far or too close to the ring center.
abstract_zh: 我们研究具有容量和公平性约束的集群核心集。我们的主要结果是一种近线性时间算法，用于构建用于有能力的$(k,z)$聚类的$\tilde{O}(k^2\varepsilon^{-2z-2})$大小的$\varepsilon$-核心集，该核心集改进了最近由[BCAJ+22, HJLW23]约束的$\tilde{O}(k^3\varepsilon^{-3z-2})$。作为推论，与它们相比，我们还在核心集大小上节省了 $k \varepsilon^{-z}$ 因子，以实现公平的 $(k,z)$ 聚类。我们通过自适应地选择每个环实例上的样本大小（与其最优解的聚类成本成比例），从根本上改进了 [BCAJ+22] 的分层均匀采样框架。我们的分析依赖于一个关键的几何观察，通过能够“忽略”所有距离环中心太远或太近的中心点，将总“有效中心”的数量从 [BCAJ+22] 的 $\tilde{O}(k^2\varepsilon^{-z})$ 减少到仅 $O(k\log \varepsilon^{-1})$。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了具有容量和公平性约束的聚类问题的核集构造方法，提出了一种近线性时间算法以生成更小规模的ε-核集。
AI.motivation: 现有核集构造方法在处理容量和公平性约束的聚类问题时存在效率低、规模大的问题，需改进以提升算法性能。
AI.method: 通过自适应调整各环实例的采样规模（与聚类成本成比例），并利用几何观察减少有效中心数量，改进了分层均匀采样框架。
AI.result: 实现了近线性时间算法，生成规模为$\	ilde{O}(k^2\\varepsilon^{-2z-2})$的ε-核集，相比先前结果提升了$\	ilde{O}(k^3\\varepsilon^{-3z-2})$的效率，并将公平聚类的核集规模降低了$k\\varepsilon^{-z}$因子。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过优化采样策略和几何分析，显著提升了具有容量和公平性约束的聚类问题的核集构造效率与精度。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究了具有容量和公平性约束的聚类问题的核集构造方法，提出了一种近线性时间算法以生成更小规模的ε-核集。
ai_content.motivation: 现有核集构造方法在处理容量和公平性约束的聚类问题时存在效率低、规模大的问题，需改进以提升算法性能。
ai_content.method: 通过自适应调整各环实例的采样规模（与聚类成本成比例），并利用几何观察减少有效中心数量，改进了分层均匀采样框架。
ai_content.result: 实现了近线性时间算法，生成规模为$\	ilde{O}(k^2\\varepsilon^{-2z-2})$的ε-核集，相比先前结果提升了$\	ilde{O}(k^3\\varepsilon^{-3z-2})$的效率，并将公平聚类的核集规模降低了$k\\varepsilon^{-z}$因子。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法通过优化采样策略和几何分析，显著提升了具有容量和公平性约束的聚类问题的核集构造效率与精度。

tldr: 本文研究了具有容量和公平性约束的聚类问题的核集构造方法，提出了一种近线性时间算法以生成更小规模的ε-核集。
motivation: 现有核集构造方法在处理容量和公平性约束的聚类问题时存在效率低、规模大的问题，需改进以提升算法性能。
method: 通过自适应调整各环实例的采样规模（与聚类成本成比例），并利用几何观察减少有效中心数量，改进了分层均匀采样框架。
result: 实现了近线性时间算法，生成规模为$\	ilde{O}(k^2\\varepsilon^{-2z-2})$的ε-核集，相比先前结果提升了$\	ilde{O}(k^3\\varepsilon^{-3z-2})$的效率，并将公平聚类的核集规模降低了$k\\varepsilon^{-z}$因子。
conclusion: 该方法通过优化采样策略和几何分析，显著提升了具有容量和公平性约束的聚类问题的核集构造效率与精度。
search_text: Improved Coresets for Clustering with Capacity and Fairness Constraints 改进的具有容量和公平性约束的集群核心集 We study coresets for clustering with capacity and fairness constraints. Our main result is a near-linear time algorithm to construct $\tilde{O}(k^2\varepsilon^{-2z-2})$-sized $\varepsilon$-coresets for capacitated $(k,z)$-clustering which improves a recent $\tilde{O}(k^3\varepsilon^{-3z-2})$ bound by [BCAJ+22, HJLW23]. As a corollary, we also save a factor of $k \varepsilon^{-z}$ on the coreset size for fair $(k,z)$-clustering compared to them. We fundamentally improve the hierarchical uniform sampling framework of [BCAJ+22] by adaptively selecting sample size on each ring instance, proportional to its clustering cost to an optimal solution. Our analysis relies on a key geometric observation that reduces the number of total ``effective centers" from [BCAJ+22]'s $\tilde{O}(k^2\varepsilon^{-z})$ to merely $O(k\log \varepsilon^{-1})$ by being able to ``ignore'' all center points that are too far or too close to the ring center. 我们研究具有容量和公平性约束的集群核心集。我们的主要结果是一种近线性时间算法，用于构建用于有能力的$(k,z)$聚类的$\tilde{O}(k^2\varepsilon^{-2z-2})$大小的$\varepsilon$-核心集，该核心集改进了最近由[BCAJ+22, HJLW23]约束的$\tilde{O}(k^3\varepsilon^{-3z-2})$。作为推论，与它们相比，我们还在核心集大小上节省了 $k \varepsilon^{-z}$ 因子，以实现公平的 $(k,z)$ 聚类。我们通过自适应地选择每个环实例上的样本大小（与其最优解的聚类成本成比例），从根本上改进了 [BCAJ+22] 的分层均匀采样框架。我们的分析依赖于一个关键的几何观察，通过能够“忽略”所有距离环中心太远或太近的中心点，将总“有效中心”的数量从 [BCAJ+22] 的 $\tilde{O}(k^2\varepsilon^{-z})$ 减少到仅 $O(k\log \varepsilon^{-1})$。 本文研究了具有容量和公平性约束的聚类问题的核集构造方法，提出了一种近线性时间算法以生成更小规模的ε-核集。 Lingxiao Huang,Pinyan Lu,Xuan Wu cs.DS,cs.CG
